mapper.select: SELECT A.RNMCNO ,A.CS_NM -- 성명 ,A.RNM_CNFR_CCD -- 실명확인구분 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', A.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM -- 실명확인구분[L019] ,A.RNMCNO ,A.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO_VIEW ,A.CS_ST_CD -- 고객상태 [A001] ,GET_CODE_NAME('M001', A.CS_ST_CD) AS CS_ST_CD_NM -- 고객상태 [A001] ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', A.CS_RGST_DT, '') AS CS_RGST_DT -- 고객등록일자 ,A.CS_EDD_MNG_F -- EDD 여부 ,CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_MNG_F = '1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CS_EDD_ST_CD_NM -- EDD 여부 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', A.AML_CRT_DT, '') AS AML_CRT_DT -- AML 생성일자 ,A.RSK_GRD_CD -- 위험등급[A026] ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', A.RSK_GRD_CD) AS RSK_GRD_CD_NM -- 위험등급[A026] ,A.RSK_GRD_MRK -- 위험점수 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', A.CS_EDD_MK_DT, '') AS CS_EDD_MK_DT -- EDD 작성일자 ,A.CS_EDD_MNG_CD_NM ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', A.RSK_GRD_RGST_DT, '') AS RSK_GRD_RGST_DT -- 위험등급등록일 ,A.STR_RPR_TNO -- STR 보고회수 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', CS_EDD_RFSL_DT, '') AS CS_EDD_RFSL_DT -- EDD거부일자 ,GET_CODE_NAME('A006', A.WL_TRD_CON_F) AS WL_TRD_CON_F_NM -- 거래유형 ,A.CS_EXCTN_BRN_CD -- 개설지점(거래지점) ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.CS_EXCTN_BRN_CD, '') AS CS_EXCTN_BRN_CD_NM -- 거래지점 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD, '') AS CS_MANAG_BRN_CD_NM -- 관리지점 ,A.CTR_RPR_TNO -- CTR 보고회수 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', A.CS_EDD_REG_DT, '') AS CS_EDD_RGST_DT -- EDD 등록일자 ,A.NTN_CD -- 국가 ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD --개인법인구분코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004', A.NTN_CD) AS NTN_NM -- 국가 ,DECODE(A.INDV_CORP_CCD, '1', GET_CODE_NAME('M009', AML_JOB_GUBN), GET_CODE_NAME('M008', A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD)) AS OCPTN_CD -- 직업 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M005', A.RSDNC_F) AS RSDNC_F_NM ,GET_CODE_NAME('M044', DL_CHNNL_CD) AS DL_CHNNL_CD_NM -- 거래채널 ,CASE A.AC_OPN_PRXY_F WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS AGT_YN -- 대리인여부 ,FN_DATE_FORMAT((SELECT MIN(I.AC_OPN_DT) AS AC_OPN_DT FROM NIC17B I WHERE I.RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO )) AS AC_OPN_DT ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', A.RNMCNO , '') AS RNMCNO_FORMAT ,A.* FROM VIC01B A WHERE A.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO}

SELECT A.RNMCNO ,CS_EDD_RGST_CCD -- 고객EDD등록구분코드 -- ,A.TSK_CD -- 직종코드(사용안함) -- ,GET_CODE_NAME('M008', A.TSK_CD) AS TSK_CD_NM -- 직종(사용안함) ,TRIM(B.AML_JOB_GUBN) AS OCPTN_CD -- 직업코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M009', TRIM(B.AML_JOB_GUBN)) AS OCPTN_CD_NM -- 직업 ,A.WP_NM AS WP_CMPNY_NM -- 회사명 ,B.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD AS INDST_IND_TYP_LDVD_CD -- 업종 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M008', B.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD) AS INDST_IND_TYP_LDVD_CD_NM -- 업종 ,A.WP_CMPNY_TEL_NO -- 직장회사전화번호 ,B.CORP_RGST_NO AS BSMN_RNO -- 사업자번호 ,A.DTY_DPRT_NM AS DPRT_NM -- 부서 ,DECODE(A.PSTN_CD, '00', '', GET_CODE_NAME('S015', A.PSTN_CD)) AS PSTN_NM -- 직위 ,A.WP_CMPNY_ADDR -- 회사주소 ,B.EMAIL -- 이메일 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', A.BSNSG_FNDTN_DT, '') AS BSNSG_FNDTN_DT -- 사업체 설립일 ,A.FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD -- 자금원천 및 출처 ,(SELECT I.CD_NM FROM NIC92B I WHERE I.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD = '1' THEN 'A013' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD = '2' THEN 'A014' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD = '3' THEN 'A015' ELSE '' END ) AND I.CNTNT = A.FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD ) AS FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD_NM -- 자금원천명 ,A.DL_OBJ_CD -- 거래목적 ,(SELECT J.CD_NM FROM NIC92B J WHERE J.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD = '1' THEN 'A016' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD = '2' THEN 'A017' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD = '3' THEN 'A018' ELSE 'A019' END ) AND J.CNTNT = A.DL_OBJ_CD ) AS DL_OBJ_CD_NM -- 거래목적명 ,A.DL_OBJ_IO_AMT_CD -- 거래목적입출금코드 ,(SELECT K.CD_NM FROM NIC92B K WHERE K.CD = 'A020' AND K.CNTNT = A.DL_OBJ_IO_AMT_CD ) AS DL_OBJ_IO_AMT_CD_NM -- 거래목적입출금코드 ,A.DL_OBJ_AC_OPN_CD -- 거래목적계좌개설코드 ,(SELECT L.CD_NM FROM NIC92B L WHERE L.CD = 'A021' AND L.CNTNT = A.DL_OBJ_AC_OPN_CD ) AS DL_OBJ_AC_OPN_CD_NM -- 거래목적입출금코드 -- ,A.DL_GDS_CD -- 거래상품 -- ,GET_CODE_NAME('M034', A.DL_GDS_CD) AS DL_GDS_CD_NM -- 거래상품명 ,A.EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD -- 예상거래입금횟수코드 ,(SELECT M.CD_NM FROM NIC92B M WHERE M.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1', '2') THEN 'A022' ELSE 'A023' END ) AND M.CNTNT = A.EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD ) AS EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD_NM -- 예상거래입금횟수코드 ,A.EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD -- 예상거래출금횟수코드 ,(SELECT N.CD_NM FROM NIC92B N WHERE N.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1', '2') THEN 'A022' ELSE 'A023' END ) AND N.CNTNT = A.EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD ) AS EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD_NM -- 예상거래출금횟수코드 ,A.INVST_I_AMT_CD -- 예상거래입금액 ,(SELECT O.CD_NM FROM NIC92B O WHERE O.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1', '2') THEN 'A024' ELSE 'A025' END ) AND O.CNTNT = A.INVST_I_AMT_CD ) AS INVST_I_AMT_CD_NM -- 예상거래입금액 ,A.INVST_O_AMT_CD -- 예상거래출금액 ,(SELECT P.CD_NM FROM NIC92B P WHERE P.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1', '2') THEN 'A024' ELSE 'A025' END ) AND P.CNTNT = A.INVST_O_AMT_CD ) AS INVST_O_AMT_CD_NM -- 예상거래출금액 ,A.MVAB_AMT AS MPRPTY_ASTS_STTN_CD -- 동산자산현황코드 ,(SELECT Q.CD_NM FROM NIC92B Q WHERE Q.CD = 'A026' AND Q.CNTNT = A.MVAB_AMT ) AS MPRPTY_ASTS_STTN_CD_NM ,A.ESTT_AMT AS RL_EST_ASTS_STTN_CD -- 부동산자산현황코드 ,(SELECT R.CD_NM FROM NIC92B R WHERE R.CD = 'A027' AND R.CNTNT = A.ESTT_AMT ) AS RL_EST_ASTS_STTN_CD_NM FROM VIC02B A INNER JOIN VIC01B B ON A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO WHERE A.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO}

SELECT A.RNMCNO ,A.PST_SQ ,RTRIM(A.ADDR || ' ' || A.DNG_FLWG_ADDR) AS ADDR FROM NIC05B A ,NIC01B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.ADDR_TYP_CD = DECODE(B.INDV_CORP_CCD, '1', '1', '2')
SELECT A.RNMCNO ,A.TEL_NO FROM NIC04B A ,NIC01B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.CNTC_TYP_CD = DECODE(B.INDV_CORP_CCD, '1', '1', '2')

SELECT A.RNMCNO -- 실명확인번호 ,A.PEP_RLTNS_P_CCD -- 정치적인물관계자구분코드 ,A.SQ -- 일련번호 ,A.PEP_NM -- 정치적인물성명 ,A.PEP_RNM_NO -- 정치적인물실명번호 ,A.PEP_RLTNS_CD -- 정치적인물관계코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('A028', A.PEP_RLTNS_CD) AS PEP_RLTNS_CD_NM -- 정치적인물관계코드 ,A.PEP_ADDR -- 정치적인물주소 ,A.PEP_CNTC_NO -- 정치적인물연락번호 FROM NIC13B A WHERE A.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO}

SELECT B.DL_P_NM AS COL0 ,B.DL_P_RNMCNO ,B.RNMCNO ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', B.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) AS COL2 ,B.DL_P_NTNLT_NM AS COL3 ,'( ' || C.DL_P_HSE_PST_NO || ' ) ' || C.DL_P_HSE_ADDR AS COL4 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', C.DL_P_BRTDY, '') AS COL5 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M013',C.DL_P_SEX_CD ) AS COL6 ,C.DL_P_HSE_TEL_NO AS COL7 ,C.DL_P_MBL_TEL_NO AS COL8 ,C.RNM_CMBNTN_NO AS COL9 ,C.DL_P_PSPT_NO AS COL10 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M059', C.OCPTN_CCD) AS COL11 ,C.DTY_DPRT_NM AS COL12 ,C.WP_NM AS COL13 ,C.CS_PSTN_CD AS COL14 ,DECODE(C.CS_PSTN_CD, '00', '', GET_CODE_NAME('S015', C.CS_PSTN_CD)) AS CS_PSTN_NM ,C.RPRST_P_NM AS COL15 ,C.IND_TYP_CD_NM AS COL16 ,C.RPRST_P_RNM_NO AS COL17 ,DECODE(C.LG_AMT_ASTS_F, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS COL18 ,C.ESTMT_ASTS_SCL_CD AS COL19 FROM NIC66B A ,NIC70B B ,NIC78B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = C.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

SELECT D.RPRST_P_NM AS COL0 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', D.RPRST_P_RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS COL1 ,D.RPRST_P_RNMCNO AS COL2 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', D.RPRST_P_RNMCNO, '') AS RPRST_P_RNMCNO_VIEW ,D.RPRST_P_RNMCNO ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004', D.RPRST_P_NTNLT) AS COL3 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M008', C.IND_TYP_CD) AS COL4 ,D.RPRST_P_TEL_NO AS COL5 --,'( ' || D.RPRST_P_HSE_PST_NO || ' ) ' || D.RPRST_P_HSE_ADDR AS COL6 ,CASE WHEN TRIM(D.RPRST_P_HSE_PST_NO) IS NOT NULL THEN '( ' || D.RPRST_P_HSE_PST_NO || ' ) ' || D.RPRST_P_HSE_ADDR END AS COL6 ,CASE WHEN TRIM(NVL(C.BSNSG_FNDTN_DT, '0')) < 19000101 THEN NULL ELSE C.BSNSG_FNDTN_DT END AS COL7 ,C.CORP_RGST_NO AS COL8 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', C.CORP_RGST_NO, '') AS CORP_RGST_NO_VIEW --,'( ' || C.HD_BRNCH_PST_NO || ' ) ' || C.HD_BRNCH_ADDR AS COL9 ,CASE WHEN TRIM(C.HD_BRNCH_PST_NO) IS NOT NULL THEN '( ' || C.HD_BRNCH_PST_NO || ' ) ' || C.HD_BRNCH_ADDR END AS COL9 --,'( ' || C.BSNS_CMPNY_PST_NO || ' ) ' || C.BSNS_CMPNY_ADDR AS COL10 ,CASE WHEN TRIM(C.BSNS_CMPNY_PST_NO) IS NOT NULL THEN '( ' || C.BSNS_CMPNY_PST_NO || ' ) ' || C.BSNS_CMPNY_ADDR END AS COL10 ,C.ENTP_SCL_CCD_NM AS COL11 ,GET_CODE_NAME('A108', DECODE(C.NPRFT_GROUP_F, 'Y', 'Y', 'N')) AS COL12 ,'거래소' AS COL13 ,GET_CODE_NAME('A108', DECODE(C.FOGN_F, 'Y', 'Y', 'N')) AS COL14 ,GET_CODE_NAME('A108', DECODE(C.NTN_PBLIC_GROUP_F, 'Y', 'Y', 'N')) AS COL15 ,GET_CODE_NAME('A108', DECODE(C.LSTNG_F, 'Y', 'Y', 'N')) AS COL16 FROM NIC66B A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT A.* FROM NIC03B_1 A , ( SELECT RNMCNO , MIN(RPRST_P_SQ) AS RPRST_P_SQ FROM NIC03B_1 WHERE RPR_TGT_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY RNMCNO ) B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.RPRST_P_SQ = B.RPRST_P_SQ ) D ON ( A.DL_P_RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO ) ,NIC70B B ,NIC79B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = C.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

SELECT CASE WHEN #{GUBUN} = 'B' THEN NVL(A.XCL_RSN_CNTNT, '') ELSE NVL(A.XCL_RSN_CNTNT2, '') END AS XCL_RSN_CNTNT -- 보고제외사유 ,A.OK_CCD ,A.DNY_RSN_CNTNT FROM NIC66B A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

SELECT B.ITEM_CNTNT1 as ITEM_CNTNT1 --의심스러운 거래자 ,B.ITEM_CNTNT2 as ITEM_CNTNT2 --거래 발생일자 ,B.ITEM_CNTNT3 as ITEM_CNTNT3 --거래 발생장소(영업점) ,B.ITEM_CNTNT4 as ITEM_CNTNT4 --금융거래 수단(상품) ,B.ITEM_CNTNT5 as ITEM_CNTNT5 --금융거래 방법(특이거래) ,B.ITEM_CNTNT6 as ITEM_CNTNT6 --혐의거래로 판단한 사유 ,B.RPR_RSN_CNTNT as RPR_RSN_CNTNT --종합의견 ,B.ATT_FILE_NM as ATT_FILE_NM --첨부파일명 작성 ,B.DOBT_DL_GRD_CD as DOBT_DL_GRD_CD --의심스러운 거래의 등급 설정 ,B.DOC_NM as SEND_DOC_NM --별도송부 문서명 작성 -- ,(select RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR||RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ from NIC66B where SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} and SSPS_DL_ID =#{SSPS_DL_ID} ) as RE_DOC --관련문서번호 ,NVL((SELECT SND_RCPT_DOC_NO FROM NIC80B where SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} and SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND ROWNUM = 1),'') AS RE_DOC FROM NIC88B B WHERE b.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND b.SSPS_DL_ID =#{SSPS_DL_ID} AND B.MN_DL_BRN_CD = #{MN_DL_BRN_CD}

SELECT A.ITEM_CNTNT1 AS ITEM_CNTNT1 --의심스러운 거래자 ,CASE WHEN TRIM(REPLACE(A.ITEM_CNTNT2, '-', '')) IS NULL THEN SUBSTR(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 7, 2)
WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(A.ITEM_CNTNT2)) <> 10 THEN SUBSTR(A.ITEM_CNTNT2, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.ITEM_CNTNT2, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.ITEM_CNTNT2, 7, 2)
ELSE A.ITEM_CNTNT2 END AS ITEM_CNTNT2 --거래 발생일자 ,A.ITEM_CNTNT3 AS ITEM_CNTNT3 --거래 발생장소(영업점) ,A.ITEM_CNTNT4 AS ITEM_CNTNT4 --금융거래 수단(상품) ,A.ITEM_CNTNT5 AS ITEM_CNTNT5 --금융거래 방법(특이거래) ,A.ITEM_CNTNT6 AS ITEM_CNTNT6 --혐의거래로 판단한 사유 ,REPLACE((A.RPR_RSN_CNTNT || A.RPR_RSN_CNTNT2), '--' , CASE WHEN TRIM(REPLACE(A.ITEM_CNTNT2, '-', '')) IS NULL THEN SUBSTR(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 7, 2)
WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(A.ITEM_CNTNT2)) <> 10 THEN SUBSTR(A.ITEM_CNTNT2, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.ITEM_CNTNT2, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.ITEM_CNTNT2, 7, 2)
ELSE A.ITEM_CNTNT2 END ) AS XCL_RSN_CNTNT --(20190510수정)RPR_RSN_CNTNT --종합의견 ,A.RPR_RSN_CNTNT AS RPR_RSN_CNTNT --보고제외사유(지점) ,A.ATT_FILE_NM AS ATT_FILE_NM --첨부파일명 작성 ,A.DOBT_DL_GRD_CD AS DOBT_DL_GRD_CD --의심스러운 거래의 등급 설정 ,A.DOC_NM AS SEND_DOC_NM --별도송부 문서명 작성 ,NVL((SELECT I.SND_RCPT_DOC_NO FROM NIC80B I WHERE I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID AND ROWNUM = 1), '' ) AS RE_DOC ,A.AI_RPR_RSN_CNTNT AS AI_RPR_RSN_CNTNT --AI 종합의견 FROM NIC88B A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.MN_DL_BRN_CD = #{MN_DL_BRN_CD}
SELECT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ,A.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD ,A.F_CCD ,A.ETC_CNTNT FROM NIC68B A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

SELECT PRXY_NM ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002',TRIM(PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD)) PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD , (SELECT TRIM(C.CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP) FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C WHERE C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.PRXY_RNMCNO GROUP BY TRIM(C.CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP)) AS PRXY_CS_NO ,PRXY_RNMCNO ,PRXY_CNTY_NATI_CRYP AS CNTY_NATI_CRYP ,PRXY_CNTY_AREA_CRYP AS CNTY_AREA_CRYP ,PRXY_CNTY_ECNO_CRYP AS CNTY_ECNO_CRYP ,PRXY_CNTY_NO_CRYP AS CNTY_NO_CRYP ,PRXY_NTNLT_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004',PRXY_NTNLT_CD) AS PRXY_NTNLT_NM ,AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M042',AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD) AS AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD_NM ,SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,GNL_AC_NO ,'계좌개설대리인' AS PRXY_GB_NM FROM NIC72B A WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT =#{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} UNION ALL SELECT TRIM(C.ENTY_NAME) AS PRXY_NM /*, GET_CODE_NAME('M002', CASE E.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHEN 'BRGN' THEN '03' WHEN 'CRGN' THEN '05' WHEN 'DIRN' THEN '99' WHEN 'FICN' THEN '12' WHEN 'FRIN' THEN '08' WHEN 'FRRN' THEN '07' WHEN 'FSSN' THEN '99' WHEN 'PSPT' THEN '04' WHEN 'SSCN' THEN '01' WHEN 'TXID' THEN '09' ELSE '99' END) */ , GET_CODE_NAME('M002', NVL((SELECT TRNSFRM_CD FROM SSQ.NIC95B WHERE CD = 'L200' AND CD_VL9 = TRIM(E.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE)), '99')) AS PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD , (SELECT TRIM(C.CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP) FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C WHERE C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CLNT_ENTY_ID GROUP BY TRIM(C.CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP)) AS PRXY_CS_NO , ''||A.CLNT_ENTY_ID AS PRXY_RNMCNO , B.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP AS CNTY_NATI_CRYP , B.MOBL_PHON_IDNF_NO_CRYP AS CNTY_AREA_CRYP , B.MOBL_PHON_ECNO_CRYP AS CNTY_ECNO_CRYP , B.MOBL_PHON_NO_CRYP AS CNTY_NO_CRYP , ''||G.CNTY_CODE AS PRXY_NTNLT_CD , GET_CODE_NAME('M004', G.CNTY_CODE) AS PRXY_NTNLT_NM , A.SELF_RLTP_CODE AS AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD , CASE WHEN NVL(A.SELF_RLTP_CODE,' ') = '08' THEN '기타(' || NVL(A.SELF_AGNT_RLTP_CTNT,'') || ')' ELSE NVL(F.CMN_CDVL_NAME,' ') END AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD_NM , #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , #{SSPS_DL_ID} AS SSPS_DL_ID , ''||A.ACNT_ID AS GNL_AC_NO , CASE WHEN A.ORDR_AGNT_TYPE_CODE = '1' THEN '주문(법정대리인)' WHEN A.ORDR_AGNT_TYPE_CODE = '2' THEN '주문(임의대리인)' WHEN A.ORDR_AGNT_TYPE_CODE = '3' THEN '주문(자문사대리인)' WHEN A.ORDR_AGNT_TYPE_CODE = '4' THEN '주문(법정후견인)' END AS PRXY_GB_NM FROM SID.IDO_A_MAA_ACNT_AGNT A , SID.IDO_A_UUE_MOBILE B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY C , SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS D , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN E , SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL F , SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY G WHERE A.MOBL_PHON_CNTT_ADDR_ID = B.CNTT_ADDR_ID(+) AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = C.ENTY_ID AND C.ENTY_ID = D.ENTY_ID AND D.ENTY_ID = E.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = E.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE AND A.SELF_RLTP_CODE = F.CMN_CDVL(+) AND F.CMN_CODE_ID(+) = '00565' AND E.NTNY_ID = G.CNTY_ID(+) AND A.ACNT_ID = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.RGSN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(A.CNCN_DATE) IS NULL

SELECT A.PRXY_NM ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', TRIM(A.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD)) AS PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD ,A.PRXY_RNMCNO ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', A.PRXY_RNMCNO, '') AS PRXY_RNMCNO_VIEW ,A.PRXY_TEL_NO ,A.PRXY_NTNLT_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004', A.PRXY_NTNLT_CD) AS PRXY_NTNLT_NM ,A.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M042', A.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD) AS AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD_NM ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ,A.GNL_AC_NO ,A.GDS_NO ,A.AGNC_EXTNT_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M056', A.AGNC_EXTNT_CD) AS AGNC_EXTNT_CD_NM FROM NIC72B A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.GDS_NO = #{GDS_NO}

SELECT A.DL_DT, -- 거래일자 TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.DL_TM,'HH24MISS'),'HH24:MI:SS') DL_TM, -- 거래시간 A.DL_SQ, -- 거래일련번호 A.DL_TYP_CD, -- 거래수단코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M045',A.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_NM, -- 거래종류명 A.DL_WY_CD, -- 거래수단코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M046',A.DL_WY_CD) as DL_WY_NM, -- 거래수단명 A.DL_CHNNL_CD, -- 거래채널코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M044',A.DL_CHNNL_CD) AS DL_CHNNL_NM, -- 거래채널명 A.DL_AMT, -- 거래금액 A.CSH, -- 현금 A.CHCK_AMT, -- 수표금액 A.EC_AMT, -- 정산금액 A.TFND_RA, -- 예수금잔액 B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO, -- 상대대체계좌번호 B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM, -- 상대대체계좌명 B.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD, -- 상대대체기관코드 '' AS CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_NM, B.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM, -- 상대대체금융기관명 A.CRNCY_CD, -- 통화코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M048',A.CRNCY_CD) AS CRNCY_NM, A.FCRNCY_DL_AMT, -- 외화거래금액 A.USD_EXCH_AMT, -- 달러환산금액 A.DL_Q, -- 거래수량 A.DL_UPRC, -- 거래단가 A.STND_IS_CD, -- 표준종목코드 A.STND_IS_CD_NM, -- 표준종목코드명 A.STR_DL_KND_CD, -- STR거래종류코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M045',A.STR_DL_KND_CD) AS STR_DL_KND_NM, A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD, -- 취급지점코드 Fn_Cdinfo_Var('DPT',A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD,'') AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM, -- 취급지점명 A.HNDL_P_ENO, -- 처리자사번 Fn_Cdinfo_Var('USER',A.HNDL_P_ENO,'') AS HNDL_P_ENO_NM, -- 처리자명 A.CHRG_P_RPR_ST_CCD, -- 담당자보고상태구분코드 A.RPR_TRGT_XCL_DL_CCD, -- 보고대상제외거래구분코드 A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, -- 혐의거래생성일자 A.SSPS_DL_ID, -- 혐의거래ID C.DL_P_NM, A.GNL_AC_NO, (SELECT ACNT_NO FROM NIC71B Z WHERE Z.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND Z.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID AND Z.GNL_AC_NO = A.GNL_AC_NO) AS ACNT_NO -- 종합계좌번호 FROM NIC75B A, NIC83B B, NIC70B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND A.RNMCNO = C.DL_P_RNMCNO(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} ORDER BY A.GNL_AC_NO, A.DL_DT, A.DL_TM, A.DL_SQ

SELECT 'Check' COL0 ,B.CHCK_STRT_NO COL1 ,B.CHCK_END_NO COL2 ,B.ISNG_BNK_NM COL3 ,B.CHCK_ISNG_DT COL4 ,TO_CHAR(B.BLL_TYP_AMT) COL5 ,B.ENDRS_P_KND_CD COL6 ,B.ENDRS_P_NM COL7 FROM NIC75B A ,NIC76B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} UNION ALL SELECT 'Wertpapier' COL0 ,TO_CHAR(STRT_SCRT_NO,'999999999') COL1 ,TO_CHAR(END_SCRT_NO,'999999999') COL2 ,'' COL3 ,'' COL4 ,SCRTS_BLL_TYP_CD COL5 ,ENDRS_P_KND_CD COL6 ,ENDRS_P_NM COL7 FROM NIC75B A ,NIC77B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ}

SELECT GET_CODE_NAME('M052', B.CHCK_KND_CD) AS COL0 ,B.CHCK_STRT_NO AS COL1 ,B.CHCK_END_NO AS COL2 ,B.ISNG_BNK_NM AS COL3 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', B.CHCK_ISNG_DT, '') AS COL4 ,TO_CHAR(B.CHCK_AMT) AS COL5 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M055', B.ENDRS_P_KND_CD) AS COL6 ,B.ENDRS_P_NM AS COL7 ,B.ENDRS_P_RNM_NO AS COL8 ,B.GNL_AC_NO ,B.GDS_NO ,B.DL_DT ,B.DL_SQ ,B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,B.SSPS_DL_ID ,B.ISNG_BNK_CD FROM NIC75B A ,NIC76B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO AND A.GDS_NO = B.GDS_NO AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.GDS_NO = #{GDS_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ}

SELECT TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.DL_AMT, '999,999,999,999')) COL0 , GET_CODE_NAME('M045',A.DL_TYP_CD) COL1 , TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.CSH, '999,999,999,999')) COL2 , GET_CODE_NAME('M046',A.DL_WY_CD) COL3 , TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.CHCK_AMT, '999,999,999,999')) COL4 , GET_CODE_NAME('M044',A.DL_CHNNL_CD) COL5 , TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.TFND_RA, '999,999,999,999')) COL6 , DECODE(TRIM(A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD), NULL, '', TRIM(A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD)||':')|| Fn_Cdinfo_Var('DPT',A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD,'') COL7 , TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.FCRNCY_DL_AMT, '999,999,999,999')) COL8 , TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.USD_EXCH_AMT, '999,999,999,999')) COL9, DECODE(TRIM(B.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD),NULL,'',TRIM(B.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD)||':') || B.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM COL10, B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO , B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO , GET_CODE_NAME('M002', B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD ) COL13, B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM COL14, GET_CODE_NAME('M004',TRIM(B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD)) COL15 from NIC75B A, NIC83B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO NIC03B ( RNMCNO ,RPRST_P_RNMCNO ,RPRST_P_NM ,RPRST_P_TEL_NO ,RPRST_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,RPRST_P_NTNLT_CD ,RPRST_P_HSE_ADDR ,RPRST_P_HSE_PST_NO ,RPRST_P_SEX_CD ,AML_CRT_DT ) VALUES ( #{param0} --RNMCNO ,#{param1} --RPRST_P_RNMCNO ,#{param2} --RPRST_P_NM ,#{param3} --RPRST_P_TEL_NO ,#{param4} --RPRST_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,#{param5} --RPRST_P_NTNLT_CD ,#{param6} --RPRST_P_HSE_ADDR ,#{param7} --RPRST_P_HSE_PST_NO ,#{param8} --RPRST_P_SEX_CD ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') )
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || '-' || A.SSPS_DL_ID) AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A ,A.DL_P_RNMCNO ,NVL(TRIM(B.CS_NM), B.ENG_CS_NM) AS DL_P_NM ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', B.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD_NM ,A.SSPS_TYP_CD ,NVL(GET_SYNARIO_NAME(A.SSPS_TYP_CD), '수기등록') AS SSPS_TYP_NM ,C.LST_RSK_EAL_SOR AS RSK_GRD_MRK ,C.RSK_GRD_CD AS RSK_GRD_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', C.RSK_GRD_CD) AS RSK_GRD_CD_NM ,A.RSK_MRK AS RSK_MRK ,A.RSK_GRD_CD AS RSK_GRD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', A.RSK_GRD_CD) AS RSK_GRD_NM ,(SELECT SUM(I.DL_AMT) FROM NIC75B I WHERE I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) AS DL_AMT ,E.ACT_NAME ,(NVL(A.OK_CCD, '0')) AS OK_CCD ,A.XCL_RSN_CNTNT ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ,A.INST_ID ,E.WORK_ID ,E.ACT_ID ,DECODE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC66B J WHERE J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND J.DL_P_RNMCNO = A.DL_P_RNMCNO AND J.M_SSPS_DL_ID IS NOT NULL ), 0, '', 'Y' ) AS MERGE_YN ,D.MN_DL_BRN_NM AS MN_DL_BRN_NM -- 처리점 ,D.MN_DL_BRN_CD AS MN_DL_BRN_CD -- 처리점 ,(SELECT K.GNL_AC_NO FROM NIC75B K WHERE K.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND K.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS GNL_AC_NO --- 계좌번호 ,(SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM NIC66B L ,NIC01B M ,NIC35B N ,(SELECT X.INST_ID ,Z.ACT_NAME FROM WF_PROC_INSTANCE X ,WF_WORKLIST Y ,WF_ACT Z WHERE X.WORK_ID = Y.WORK_ID AND Y.ACT_ID = Z.ACT_ID ) O WHERE L.DL_P_RNMCNO = M.RNMCNO AND L.DL_P_RNMCNO = N.RNMCNO (+) AND L.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD NOT IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND L.INST_ID = O.INST_ID(+) AND L.DL_P_RNMCNO = A.DL_P_RNMCNO AND L.INST_ID IS NOT NULL ) AS CNT ,(SELECT MAX(P.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT) FROM NIC66B P WHERE P.OK_CCD ='1' AND P.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '10' AND P.DL_P_RNMCNO = A.DL_P_RNMCNO AND P.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR', 'KYC') ) AS RPR_DT --최근 보고일자 ,B.LG_AMT_ASTS_F -- 고액자산가여부 ,A.XCL_RSN_CNTNT2 ,A.DNY_RSN_CNTNT FROM NIC66B A ,NIC01B B ,NIC35B C ,NIC73B D ,(SELECT Q.INST_ID ,Q.WORK_ID ,Q.ACT_NAME ,Q.ACT_ID ,R.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,R.SSPS_DL_ID ,Q.PROC_ID FROM V_WF_STANDBY Q ,NIC66B R WHERE ( ( Q.PERSON_YN = 'Y' AND Q.PARTICIPANT_ID = #{param0} ) OR ( Q.PERSON_YN = 'N' AND Q.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT Y1.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE X1 ,C_USER Y1 WHERE X1.USER_ID = #{param1} AND X1.USER_ID = Y1.USER_ID AND Y1.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID = '30.4' ) ) OR ( Q.PERSON_YN = 'N' AND Q.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT Z2.TGT_DEP_ID || '.' || Z2.ROLE_ID FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE X2 ,C_USER Y2 ,(SELECT XX.* FROM C_MULTI_POSITION XX WHERE XX.CHRG_P_ID = #{param1} AND XX.APPR_STAT_CD = 'E' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN XX.START_DT AND XX.END_DT AND ROWNUM = 1 ) Z2 WHERE X2.USER_ID = #{param1} AND X2.USER_ID = Y2.USER_ID AND X2.USER_ID = Z2.CHRG_P_ID AND Y2.DEP_ID || '.' || X2.ROLE_ID = '30.4' ) ) ) AND R.INST_ID = Q.PAR_INST_ID AND R.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' ) E WHERE A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = C.RNMCNO (+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = E.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = E.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD NOT IN ('CTR', 'CAC','KYC')
AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate}
AND D.MN_DL_BRN_CD = #{branchCode} AND #{branchCode} IN (SELECT S.MN_DL_BRN_CD FROM NIC73B S WHERE S.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND S.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID )
AND B.CS_NM LIKE '%' || #{CS_NM} || '%'
AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = REPLACE(RNMCNO}, '-', '')
AND A.SSPS_TYP_CD = #{SSPS_TYP_CD}
ORDER BY A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT DESC ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ASC

SELECT '0' AS SELECTED ,(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || '-' || A.SSPS_DL_ID) AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A ,B.CS_NM AS DL_P_NM ,A.DL_P_RNMCNO ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', B.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD_NM ,GET_SYNARIO_NAME(A.SSPS_TYP_CD) AS SSPS_TYP_NM ,C.LST_RSK_EAL_SOR AS RSK_GRD_MRK ,C.RSK_GRD_CD AS RSK_GRD_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', C.RSK_GRD_CD) AS RSK_GRD_CD_NM ,A.RSK_MRK AS RSK_MRK ,A.RSK_GRD_CD AS RSK_GRD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', A.RSK_GRD_CD) AS RSK_GRD_NM ,(SELECT SUM(I.DL_AMT) FROM NIC75B I WHERE I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) AS DL_AMT ,E.ACT_NAME ,NVL(A.OK_CCD, '0') AS OK_CCD ,(SELECT J.CD_NM FROM NIC92B J WHERE J.CD = 'A301' AND J.CNTNT = NVL(A.OK_CCD, '0') ) AS OK_CCD_NM ,A.XCL_RSN_CNTNT ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ,A.INST_ID ,E.WORK_ID ,E.ACT_ID ,E.PAR_INST_ID ,DECODE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC66B K WHERE K.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND K.DL_P_RNMCNO = A.DL_P_RNMCNO AND K.M_SSPS_DL_ID IS NOT NULL ), 0, '', 'Y' ) AS MERGE_YN ,D.MN_DL_BRN_NM AS MN_DL_BRN_NM -- 처리점 ,D.MN_DL_BRN_CD AS MN_DL_BRN_CD -- 처리점 ,(SELECT L.GNL_AC_NO FROM NIC75B L WHERE L.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND L.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS GNL_AC_NO -- 계좌번호 ,(SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM NIC66B M WHERE M.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD NOT IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND M.DL_P_RNMCNO = A.DL_P_RNMCNO AND M.INST_ID IS NOT NULL AND M.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), -60), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ) AS CNT ,(SELECT MAX(N.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT) FROM NIC66B N WHERE N.OK_CCD ='1' AND N.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '10' AND N.DL_P_RNMCNO = A.DL_P_RNMCNO AND N.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR', 'KYC') ) AS RPR_DT --최근 보고일자 ,B.LG_AMT_ASTS_F -- 고액자산가여부 ,A.XCL_RSN_CNTNT2 ,A.DNY_RSN_CNTNT FROM NIC66B A ,NIC01B B ,NIC35B C ,NIC73B D ,(SELECT O.INST_ID ,O.WORK_ID ,O.ACT_NAME ,O.ACT_ID ,P.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,P.SSPS_DL_ID ,O.PAR_INST_ID FROM V_WF_STANDBY O ,NIC66B P WHERE ( (O.PERSON_YN ='Y') OR ( O.PERSON_YN ='N' AND O.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT Y.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE X ,C_USER Y WHERE X.USER_ID = Y.USER_ID AND Y.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID = #{param2} ) ) ) AND P.INST_ID = O.PAR_INST_ID AND P.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' AND O.INST_STATUS_CD != 'RETURNED' /*회수제외*/ ) E WHERE A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = C.RNMCNO (+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = E.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = E.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD NOT IN ('CTR', 'CAC')
AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate}
AND #{branchCode} IN (SELECT Q.MN_DL_BRN_CD FROM NIC73B Q WHERE Q.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND Q.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID )
AND B.CS_NM LIKE '%' || #{CS_NM} || '%'
AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = REPLACE(#{RNMCNO}, '-', '')
AND A.SSPS_TYP_CD = #{SSPS_TYP_CD}
ORDER BY A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT DESC ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM NIC66B A ,NIC01B B ,NIC35B C ,NIC73B D ,(SELECT O.INST_ID ,O.WORK_ID ,O.ACT_NAME ,O.ACT_ID ,P.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,P.SSPS_DL_ID ,O.PAR_INST_ID FROM V_WF_STANDBY O ,NIC66B P WHERE ( (O.PERSON_YN ='Y') OR ( O.PERSON_YN ='N' AND O.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT Y.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE X ,C_USER Y WHERE X.USER_ID = Y.USER_ID AND Y.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID = #{dptRole} ) ) ) AND P.INST_ID = O.PAR_INST_ID AND P.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' AND O.INST_STATUS_CD != 'RETURNED' /*회수제외*/ ) E WHERE A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = C.RNMCNO (+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = E.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = E.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD NOT IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND (A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || '-' || A.SSPS_DL_ID) = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A}

SELECT T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || '-' || T1.SSPS_DL_ID AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A , NVL(TRIM(T2.CS_NM), T2.ENG_CS_NM) AS DL_P_NM , FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', T1.DL_P_RNMCNO , '') AS DL_P_RNMCNO _VIEW , GET_CODE_NAME('M002', T2.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD_NM
, NVL((SELECT BIZ_NM FROM C_BIZ A , MMA010TB B WHERE BIZ_ID = RT30_1 AND MA01_6 = T1.SSPS_TYP_CD ), '수기등록' ) AS SSPS_TYP_NM
, (SELECT '[' || A.SCNR_ID || ']' || A.SCNR_NM FROM TMS_APPL A WHERE A.SCNR_ID = T1.SSPS_TYP_CD ) AS SSPS_TYP_NM
, T3.LST_RSK_EAL_SOR AS RSK_GRD_MRK , T3.RSK_GRD_CD AS RSK_GRD_CD , GET_CODE_NAME('A004', T3.RSK_GRD_CD) AS RSK_GRD_CD_NM , T1.RSK_MRK AS RSK_MRK , T1.RSK_GRD_CD AS RSK_GRD , GET_CODE_NAME('A004', T1.RSK_GRD_CD) AS RSK_GRD_NM , T1.DL_P_RNMCNO , T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO_HIDDEN , (SELECT SUM(T4.DL_AMT) FROM NIC75B T4 WHERE T4.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T4.SSPS_DL_ID = T1.SSPS_DL_ID ) AS DL_AMT , GET_CODE_NAME('A029', T1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD) AS ACT_NAME , NVL(T1.OK_CCD, '0') AS OK_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('A301', NVL(T1.OK_CCD, '0')) AS OK_CCD_NM , NVL(T1.XCL_RSN_CNTNT, T1.XCL_RSN_CNTNT2) AS XCL_RSN_CNTNT , T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , T1.SSPS_DL_ID , T1.INST_ID , T4.MN_DL_BRN_NM AS MN_DL_BRN_NM -- 처리점 , T4.MN_DL_BRN_CD AS MN_DL_BRN_CD -- 처리점 , (SELECT GNL_AC_NO FROM NIC75B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND SSPS_DL_ID = T1.SSPS_DL_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS GNL_AC_NO -- 계좌번호 , (SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM NIC66B T11 WHERE T11.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD NOT IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND T11.DL_P_RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND T11.INST_ID IS NOT NULL AND T11.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT <= T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ) AS CNT , (SELECT MAX(SSPS_DL_CRT_DT) FROM NIC66B WHERE OK_CCD ='1' AND RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '10' AND DL_P_RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR', 'KYC') ) AS RPR_DT --최근 보고일자 , T2.LG_AMT_ASTS_F -- 고액자산가여부 , CASE WHEN (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD')) < 10 THEN '1' ELSE '2' END AS REPORTDATE , T1.SSPS_TYP_CD , T1.SCNR_MRK , TO_CHAR(T1.RPR_COMPLITE_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS RPR_COMPLITE_DT , T1.AI_RESULT , D.ACT_ID , T1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD FROM NIC66B T1 , NIC01B T2 , NIC35B T3 , NIC73B T4 , (SELECT C.ACT_NAME ACT_NAME , D.INST_STATUS_CD AS INST_STATUS_CD , BB.INST_ID INST_ID , C.ACT_ID FROM WF_WORKLIST BB , WF_ACT C , WF_PROC_INSTANCE D , WF_WORK_PARTICIPANT E WHERE BB.WORK_STATUS_CD ='FINISHED' AND D.INST_STATUS_CD ='FINISHED' AND BB.ACT_ID = C.ACT_ID AND BB.INST_ID = D.INST_ID AND BB.WORK_ID = E.WORK_ID AND E.PARTICIPANT_ID LIKE '%.5' /*최종결재자 ROLE_ID*/ GROUP BY BB.INST_ID , C.ACT_NAME , D.INST_STATUS_CD , C.ACT_ID ) D WHERE T1.DL_P_RNMCNO = T2.RNMCNO AND T1.DL_P_RNMCNO = T3.RNMCNO (+) AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T4.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = T4.SSPS_DL_ID AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD NOT IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND T1.INST_ID = D.INST_ID AND T1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN ('9', '97', '98', '99')
AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate}
AND #{branchCode} IN (SELECT MN_DL_BRN_CD FROM NIC73B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND SSPS_DL_ID = T1.SSPS_DL_ID )
AND T2.CS_NM LIKE '%' || #{CS_NM} || '%'
AND T1.DL_P_RNMCNO = REPLACE(#{RNMCNO}, '-', '')
AND T1.SSPS_TYP_CD = #{SSPS_TYP_CD}
ORDER BY T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT DESC , T1.SSPS_DL_ID ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM NIC66B T1 , NIC01B T2 , NIC35B T3 , NIC73B T4 , (SELECT C.ACT_NAME ACT_NAME , D.INST_STATUS_CD AS INST_STATUS_CD , B.INST_ID INST_ID , C.ACT_ID FROM WF_WORKLIST B , WF_ACT C , WF_PROC_INSTANCE D , WF_WORK_PARTICIPANT E WHERE B.WORK_STATUS_CD ='FINISHED' AND D.INST_STATUS_CD ='FINISHED' AND B.ACT_ID = C.ACT_ID AND B.INST_ID = D.INST_ID AND B.WORK_ID = E.WORK_ID AND E.PARTICIPANT_ID LIKE '%.5' /*최종결재자 ROLE_ID*/ GROUP BY B.INST_ID , C.ACT_NAME , D.INST_STATUS_CD , C.ACT_ID ) D WHERE T1.DL_P_RNMCNO = T2.RNMCNO AND T1.DL_P_RNMCNO = T3.RNMCNO (+) AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T4.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = T4.SSPS_DL_ID AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD NOT IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND T1.INST_ID = D.INST_ID AND T1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN ('9', '97', '98', '99') AND (T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || '-' || T1.SSPS_DL_ID) = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A}
mapper.update: UPDATE WF_WORKLIST SET WORK_STATUS_CD ='READY' ,WORK_FINISHED_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE WORK_ID = #{WORK_ID}
mapper.select:
SELECT A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD ,A.SSPS_TYP_CD
,GET_SYNARIO_NAME(A.SSPS_TYP_CD) AS SSPS_TYP_NM
,NVL(GET_SYNARIO_NAME(A.SSPS_TYP_CD), '수기등록') AS SSPS_TYP_NM
,B.INDV_CORP_CCD ,B.RNM_CNFR_CCD AS DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', B.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD_NM ,A.DL_P_RNMCNO ,(SELECT CS_NO FROM NIC70B Z WHERE Z.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND Z.DL_P_RNMCNO = A.DL_P_RNMCNO) AS CS_NO_VIEW ,B.CS_NM AS DL_P_NM ,A.INST_ID ,A.OK_CCD -- 20170228 추가 KEOL ,A.DL_P_RNMCNO FROM NIC66B A ,NIC01B B ,NIC35B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = C.RNMCNO(+)

SELECT A.CS_NM ,SUBSTR(A.DL_DT, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.DL_DT, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.DL_DT, 7, 2) AS DL_DT ,A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD ,(SELECT I.DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B I WHERE I.DPRT_CD = A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD ) AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM ,GET_CODE_NAME('M034', GDS_NO) AS GDS_NM ,A.GNL_AC_NO ,A.SSPS_TYP_NM ,A.DOBT_TYP_KND_NM ,A.RNMCNO ,A.HOME_ADDR ,A.HOME_ADDR_DNG_FLWG_ADDR ,A.TEL_NO ,A.TELCD --,A.SSPS_TYP_NM_DESC ,NVL(A.SSPS_TYP_NM_DESC2, A.SSPS_TYP_NM_DESC) AS SSPS_TYP_NM_DESC ,A.OCPTN_CD ,A.DL_TYP_CD --,A.DL_WY_CD ,NVL(A.DL_WY_CD2, A.DL_WY_CD) AS DL_WY_CD ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD --,A.RL_OWNR FROM (SELECT J.CS_NM ,MAX(L.DL_DT) AS DL_DT ,DECODE(L.HANDLNG_BRN_CD, '', I.MN_DL_DPRT_CD, L.HANDLNG_BRN_CD) AS HANDLNG_BRN_CD ,NVL(L.GDS_NO, '99') AS GDS_NO ,MAX(I.GNL_AC_NO) AS GNL_AC_NO ,GET_CODE_NAME('M045', L.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M046', L.DL_WY_CD) AS DL_WY_CD ,GET_SYNARIO_NAME(K.SSPS_TYP_CD) AS SSPS_TYP_NM ,GET_SYNARIO_NAME(K.SSPS_TYP_CD) AS DOBT_TYP_KND_NM ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', J.RNMCNO, '') AS RNMCNO ,(SELECT DECODE(X1.HOME, '', X1.WORK, X1.HOME) FROM (SELECT MAX(DECODE(Y1.ADDR_TYP_CD, '1', TRIM(Y1.ADDR))) AS HOME ,MAX(DECODE(Y1.ADDR_TYP_CD, '2', TRIM(Y1.ADDR))) AS WORK FROM NIC05B Y1 WHERE Y1.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} ) X1 ) AS HOME_ADDR ,(SELECT DECODE(X2.HOME, '', X2.WORK, X2.HOME) FROM (SELECT MAX(DECODE(Y2.ADDR_TYP_CD, '1', TRIM(Y2.ADDR) || ' ' || TRIM(Y2.DNG_FLWG_ADDR))) AS HOME ,MAX(DECODE(Y2.ADDR_TYP_CD, '2', TRIM(Y2.ADDR) || ' ' || TRIM(Y2.DNG_FLWG_ADDR))) AS WORK FROM NIC05B Y2 WHERE Y2.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} ) X2 ) AS HOME_ADDR_DNG_FLWG_ADDR ,(SELECT DECODE(X3.HP, '', DECODE(X3.HOME, '', X3.WORK, X3.HOME), X3.HP) FROM (SELECT MAX(DECODE(Y3.CNTC_TYP_CD, '3', Y3.TEL_NO)) AS HP ,MAX(DECODE(Y3.CNTC_TYP_CD, '1', Y3.TEL_NO)) AS HOME ,MAX(DECODE(Y3.CNTC_TYP_CD, '2', Y3.TEL_NO)) AS WORK FROM NIC04B Y3 WHERE Y3.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} ) X3 ) AS TEL_NO ,(SELECT DECODE(X4.HP, '', DECODE(X4.HOME, '', '2', '1'), '3') FROM (SELECT MAX(DECODE(Y4.CNTC_TYP_CD, '3', Y4.TEL_NO)) AS HP ,MAX(DECODE(Y4.CNTC_TYP_CD, '1', Y4.TEL_NO)) AS HOME ,MAX(DECODE(Y4.CNTC_TYP_CD, '2', Y4.TEL_NO)) AS WORK FROM NIC04B Y4 WHERE Y4.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} ) X4 ) AS TELCD ,MAX(I.SSPS_DL_ID) AS SSPS_DL_ID ,MAX(I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT) AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT
,(SELECT X5.BIZ_NM FROM C_BIZ X5 ,MMA010TB Y5 WHERE X5.BIZ_ID = Y5.RT30_1 AND Y5.MA01_8 = 'S' AND Y5.MA01_6 = K.SSPS_TYP_CD ) AS SSPS_TYP_NM_DESC
,(SELECT X6.SCNR_NM FROM TMS_APPL X6 WHERE X6.SCNR_ID = K.SSPS_TYP_CD ) AS SSPS_TYP_NM_DESC
,DECODE(J.INDV_CORP_CCD, '1', GET_CODE_NAME('M009', MAX(J.AML_JOB_GUBN)), GET_CODE_NAME('M008', MAX(J.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD))) AS OCPTN_CD ,MAX(J.INDV_CORP_CCD) AS INDV_CORP_CCD --,MAX(DECODE(M.CPT_OWN_YN, 'Y', '본인', TRIM(M.RL_OWNR_NM))) AS RL_OWNR ,MAX(N.RULE_DESC3) AS DL_WY_CD2 ,MAX(N.RULE_DESC4) AS SSPS_TYP_NM_DESC2 FROM NIC71B I ,NIC01B J ,NIC66B K ,NIC75B L --,AML_CDDEDD M ,AML_TB_STRINF_MNG N WHERE I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = K.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = K.SSPS_DL_ID AND K.DL_P_RNMCNO = J.RNMCNO AND I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = L.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = L.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND I.GNL_AC_NO = L.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND I.GDS_NO = L.GDS_NO(+) --AND J.RNMCNO = M.CUST_NO(+) AND K.SSPS_TYP_CD = N.SSPS_TYP_CD(+) GROUP BY J.CS_NM ,K.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,L.HANDLNG_BRN_CD ,I.MN_DL_DPRT_CD ,K.SSPS_TYP_CD ,J.RNMCNO ,L.GDS_NO ,J.INDV_CORP_CCD ,L.DL_TYP_CD ,L.DL_WY_CD ) A

WITH TMP_AML AS (SELECT DECODE(J.DL_TYP_CD, '04', '01', '08', '01', '12', '01', '14', '01', '20', '01', '05', '02', '09', '02', '13', '02', '15', '02', '21', '02', J.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_CD ,NVL(SUM(J.DL_AMT), 0) AS DL_AMT ,NVL(SUM(J.CSH), 0) AS CSH_AMT FROM NIC71B I ,NIC61B J WHERE I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND I.GNL_AC_NO = J.GNL_AC_NO AND I.GDS_NO = J.GDS_NO AND J.DL_DT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), -3) - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AND I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND J.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01', '02') GROUP BY DECODE(J.DL_TYP_CD, '04', '01', '08', '01', '12', '01', '14', '01', '20', '01', '05', '02', '09', '02', '13', '02', '15', '02', '21', '02', J.DL_TYP_CD) ) SELECT NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD = '01' THEN '총입금 ' || TRIM(TO_CHAR(ROUND(NVL(A.DL_AMT, 0) / 1000000, 0), '999,999,999,999')) ||'백만원 (현금 ' || TRIM(TO_CHAR(ROUND(NVL(A.CSH_AMT, 0) / 1000000, 0), '999,999,999,999')) || '백만원) ' ELSE ' 총입금 : 0 원 ' END ), '없음' ) AS TOTAL_DEPOSIT ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD = '02' THEN '총출금 ' || TRIM(TO_CHAR(ROUND(NVL(A.DL_AMT, 0) / 1000000, 0), '999,999,999,999')) || '백만원 (현금 ' || TRIM(TO_CHAR(ROUND(NVL(A.CSH_AMT, 0) / 1000000, 0), '999,999,999,999')) || '백만원)' ELSE ' / 총출금 : 0 원' END ), '없음' ) AS TOTAL_WITHDRAWAL FROM TMP_AML A

SELECT DISTINCT(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || '-' || A.SSPS_DL_ID) AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A ,B.CS_NM AS DL_P_NM ,A.DL_P_RNMCNO ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', B.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD_NM ,GET_SYNARIO_NAME(A.SSPS_TYP_CD) AS SSPS_TYP_NM ,A.SSPS_TYP_CD ,C.LST_RSK_EAL_SOR AS RSK_GRD_MRK ,C.RSK_GRD_CD AS RSK_GRD_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', C.RSK_GRD_CD) AS RSK_GRD_CD_NM ,A.RSK_MRK AS RSK_MRK ,A.RSK_GRD_CD AS RSK_GRD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', A.RSK_GRD_CD) AS RSK_GRD_NM ,(SELECT SUM(I.DL_AMT) FROM NIC75B I WHERE I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) AS DL_AMT ,(SELECT 'D' AS TEXT FROM NIC66B_W J WHERE J.INST_ID = A.INST_ID AND J.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = 'D' AND J.WORK_ID = (SELECT MAX(X1.WORK_ID) FROM NIC66B_W X1 WHERE X1.INST_ID = A.INST_ID ) ) AS RPR_PRGRS_CCD ,(SELECT '[반려]' AS TEXT FROM NIC66B_W K WHERE K.INST_ID = A.INST_ID AND K.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = 'D' AND K.WORK_ID = (SELECT MAX(X2.WORK_ID) FROM NIC66B_W X2 WHERE X2.INST_ID = A.INST_ID ) ) || (CASE WHEN A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' THEN D.ACT_NAME ELSE GET_CODE_NAME('A029', A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD) END ) AS ACT_NAME ,GET_CODE_NAME('A301', (NVL(A.OK_CCD, '0'))) AS OK_CCD_NM ,(CASE WHEN NVL(A.OK_CCD, '0') = '1' THEN '' ELSE A.XCL_RSN_CNTNT END ) AS XCL_RSN_CNTNT ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ,A.INST_ID ,(SELECT MAX(L.GNL_AC_NO) FROM NIC75B L WHERE L.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND L.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) AS LST_ACNT_NO --계좌번호 ,CASE WHEN (TO_DATE(SYSDATE) - TO_DATE(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD')) >= 10 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS TEN_YN ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC66B M WHERE M.OK_CCD IN ('1', '2') AND M.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '10' AND M.DL_P_RNMCNO = A.DL_P_RNMCNO ) AS CNT ,(SELECT MAX(N.RPR_DT) FROM NIC66B N WHERE N.OK_CCD IN ('1', '2') AND N.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '10' AND N.DL_P_RNMCNO = A.DL_P_RNMCNO ) AS RPR_DT FROM NIC66B A ,NIC01B B ,NIC35B C ,(SELECT O.INST_ID ,Q.ACT_NAME FROM WF_PROC_INSTANCE O ,WF_WORKLIST P ,WF_ACT Q WHERE O.WORK_ID = P.WORK_ID AND P.ACT_ID = Q.ACT_ID ) D WHERE A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = C.RNMCNO(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD NOT IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND A.INST_ID = D.INST_ID(+) AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL ORDER BY A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT DESC ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ASC

SELECT A.GNL_AC_NO, A.GDS_NO, ROWNUM AS DL_SQ, --거래일련번호 Fn_Cdinfo_Var('DT',A.DL_DT,'') AS DL_DT, --거래발생일시 TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DL_DT || LPAD(TRIM(DL_TM),6,'0'),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS DL_DT_TM, --거래발생일시 GET_CODE_NAME('M045',A.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_NM, --거래종류명 GET_CODE_NAME('M046',A.DL_WY_CD) AS DL_WY_NM, --거래수단명 GET_CODE_NAME('M044',A.DL_CHNNL_CD) AS DL_CHNNL_NM, --거래채널명 A.CRNCY_CD, --거래통화 A.DL_AMT, --거래금액 A.USD_EXCH_AMT, --달러환산금액 A.CSH, --현금 A.CHCK_AMT, --수표 -- A.ETC_CHCK_AMT, -- 기타수표금액 A.TFND_RA, -- 정산금액 DECODE(nvl(trim(A.CRNCY_CD),''),'','',#{moneyType}, '', DECODE(NVL(trim(A.FCRNCY_DL_AMT),0),0,0,A.FCRNCY_DL_AMT) ) AS FCRNCY_DL_AMT, -- 외화거래금액 Fn_Cdinfo_Var('DPT',A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD,'') AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM, -- 취급지점 DECODE(FN_CDINFO_VAR('USER',TO_CHAR(A.L_HNDL_P_ENO),''),'',TO_CHAR(A.L_HNDL_P_ENO),FN_CDINFO_VAR('USER',TO_CHAR(A.L_HNDL_P_ENO),'')) AS HNDL_P_ENO -- 처리자사번 FROM NIC61B A WHERE A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT >= #{stDate} AND A.DL_DT <= #{edDate} ORDER BY A.DL_DT, LPAD(TRIM(A.DL_TM),6,'0')

SELECT T1.COL0 ,T1.COL1 ,T1.COL2 ,T1.COL3 ,T1.COL4 ,T1.COL5 ,T1.COL6 ,T1.COL7 ,T1.COL8 ,T1.COL9 ,T1.COL10 ,T1.COL11 ,T1.COL12 ,T1.COL90 ,T1.COL91 ,T1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD ,T1.SND_RSLT_CD ,T1.DL_DT ,T1.DL_TM ,T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,T1.SSPS_DL_ID FROM (SELECT A.RPR_CCD AS COL0 ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(C.DL_DT || C.DL_TM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS COL1 ,CASE WHEN C.SMRY_TYP_CD = '165' THEN TRIM(C.AML_OGN_CD) || TRIM(C.BNK_BRN_CD) -- CD출금이면 기관코드 || 은행지점코드를 부여함 ELSE C.HANDLNG_BRN_CD -- 계좌개설지점명 END AS COL2 ,C.CSH AS COL3 ,C.CTR_DL_KND_CD AS COL4 ,A.DL_P_RNMCNO AS COL5 ,CASE WHEN C.CTR_DL_KND_CD IN ('11', '12') THEN DECODE(E.NW_AC_CNVR_F, '0', E.OLD_AC_NO, B.GNL_AC_NO) ELSE '' END AS COL6 ,CASE WHEN C.CTR_DL_KND_CD IN ('11', '12') THEN D.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO ELSE DECODE(E.NW_AC_CNVR_F, '0', E.OLD_AC_NO, B.GNL_AC_NO) END AS COL7 ,DECODE(E.NW_AC_CNVR_F, '0', E.OLD_AC_NO, B.GNL_AC_NO) AS COL8 ,C.HANDLNG_BRN_CD AS COL9 ,DECODE(A.RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR, NULL, '', A.RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR || '-') || DECODE(A.RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ, '0', '', TRIM(LPAD(A.RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ, '7', '0'))) AS COL10 ,DECODE(A.DOC_NO_YR,NULL, '', A.DOC_NO_YR || '-') || DECODE(A.DOC_SQ, '0', '', TRIM(LPAD(A.DOC_SQ, '7', '0'))) AS COL11 ,(SELECT TRIM(Y1.RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR) || '-' || TRIM(TO_CHAR(Y1.RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ, '0000000')) FROM NIC84B X1 ,NIC66B Y1 WHERE X1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = Y1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND X1.SSPS_DL_ID = Y1.SSPS_DL_ID AND X1.RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR = A.RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR AND X1.RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ = A.RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ ) AS COL12 ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AS COL90 ,A.SSPS_DL_ID AS COL91 ,A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD AS RPR_PRGRS_CCD ,(SELECT X2.SND_RSLT_CD FROM NIC80B X2 WHERE X2.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND X2.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) AS SND_RSLT_CD ,C.DL_DT ,C.DL_TM ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID FROM NIC66B A ,NIC71B B ,NIC75B C ,NIC83B D ,NIC17B E WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND B.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND C.GNL_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND C.GDS_NO = D.GDS_NO(+) AND C.DL_DT = D.DL_DT(+) AND C.DL_SQ = D.DL_SQ(+) AND B.GNL_AC_NO = E.GNL_AC_NO AND B.GDS_NO = E.GDS_NO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{param0} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = #{param1} AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN (#{param2}, #{param3}) UNION ALL SELECT F.RPR_CCD AS COL0 ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(J.DL_DT || J.DL_TM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS COL1 ,CASE WHEN J.SMRY_TYP_CD = '165' THEN TRIM(J.AML_OGN_CD) || TRIM(J.BNK_BRN_CD) -- CD출금이면 기관코드 || 은행지점코드를 부여함 ELSE J.HANDLNG_BRN_CD -- 계좌개설지점명 END AS COL2 ,J.CSH AS COL3 ,J.CTR_DL_KND_CD AS COL4 ,H.DL_P_RNMCNO AS COL5 ,CASE WHEN J.CTR_DL_KND_CD IN ('11', '12') THEN DECODE(L.NW_AC_CNVR_F, '0', L.OLD_AC_NO, I.GNL_AC_NO) ELSE '' END AS COL6 ,CASE WHEN J.CTR_DL_KND_CD IN ('11', '12') THEN K.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO ELSE DECODE(L.NW_AC_CNVR_F, '0', L.OLD_AC_NO, I.GNL_AC_NO) END AS COL7 ,DECODE(L.NW_AC_CNVR_F, '0', L.OLD_AC_NO, I.GNL_AC_NO) AS COL8 ,J.HANDLNG_BRN_CD AS COL9 ,DECODE(F.RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR, NULL, '', F.RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR || '-') || DECODE(F.RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ, '0', '', TRIM(LPAD(F.RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ, '7', '0'))) AS COL10 ,DECODE(F.DOC_NO_YR,NULL, '', F.DOC_NO_YR || '-' ) || DECODE(F.DOC_SQ, '0', '',TRIM(LPAD(F.DOC_SQ, '7', '0'))) AS COL11 ,(SELECT TRIM(Y3.RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR) || '-' || TRIM(TO_CHAR(Y3.RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ, '0000000')) FROM NIC84B X3 ,NIC66B Y3 WHERE X3.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = Y3.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND X3.SSPS_DL_ID = Y3.SSPS_DL_ID AND X3.RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR = F.RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR AND X3.RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ = F.RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ ) AS COL12 ,F.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AS COL90 ,F.SSPS_DL_ID AS COL91 ,F.RPR_PRGRS_CCD AS RPR_PRGRS_CCD ,(SELECT X4.SND_RSLT_CD FROM NIC80B X4 WHERE X4.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = F.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND X4.SSPS_DL_ID = F.SSPS_DL_ID ) AS SND_RSLT_CD ,J.DL_DT ,J.DL_TM ,F.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,F.SSPS_DL_ID FROM NIC66B F ,NIC84B G ,NIC66B H ,NIC71B I ,NIC75B J ,NIC83B K ,NIC17B L WHERE F.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = G.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND F.SSPS_DL_ID = G.SSPS_DL_ID AND G.RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR = H.RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR AND G.RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ = H.RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ AND H.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND H.SSPS_DL_ID = I.SSPS_DL_ID AND I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = J.SSPS_DL_ID AND I.GNL_AC_NO = J.GNL_AC_NO AND I.GDS_NO = J.GDS_NO AND J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = K.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND J.SSPS_DL_ID = K.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND J.GNL_AC_NO = K.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND J.GDS_NO = K.GDS_NO(+) AND J.DL_DT = K.DL_DT(+) AND J.DL_SQ = K.DL_SQ(+) AND I.GNL_AC_NO = L.GNL_AC_NO AND I.GDS_NO = L.GDS_NO AND F.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{param4} AND F.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = #{param5} AND F.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN (#{param6}, #{param7}) ) T1 ORDER BY T1.DL_DT ,T1.COL5 ,T1.DL_TM

SELECT T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT /* 혐의거래일 */ , T1.SSPS_DL_ID /* 혐의거래ID */ , GET_SYNARIO_NAME(T1.SSPS_TYP_CD) AS SSPS_TYP_NM /* 혐의명 */ , CASE WHEN T1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' THEN D.ACT_NAME ELSE GET_CODE_NAME('A029',T1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD) END AS ACT_NAME /* 결재단계 */ , GET_CODE_NAME('A301', (NVL(T1.OK_CCD, '0')) ) AS OK_CCD_NM /* 보고구분 */ , T1.TRIG_CTNT /* 트리거 */ , T2.RPR_RSN_CNTNT || T1.XCL_RSN_CNTNT AS RPR_RSN_CNTNT /* 보고/제외 의견 */ FROM NIC66B T1 , NIC67B T2 , (SELECT A.INST_ID, C.ACT_NAME FROM WF_PROC_INSTANCE A , WF_WORKLIST B , WF_ACT C WHERE A.WORK_ID = B.WORK_ID AND B.ACT_ID = C.ACT_ID ) D WHERE T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T2.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = T2.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR', 'KYC') AND T1.INST_ID = D.INST_ID AND T1.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO} AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate}
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC35B SET CTR_RPR_TNO = (SELECT SUM(A.CTR) - SUM(A.CAC) AS CAC FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN X1.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS CTR ,CASE WHEN X1.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CAC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS CAC FROM NIC66B X1 WHERE X1.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO} AND X1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' AND X1.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR', 'CAC') ) A ) ,STR_RPR_TNO = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC66B X2 WHERE X2.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO} AND X2.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR', 'KYC') AND X2.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' ) WHERE RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO}
mapper.select: SELECT A.LOGIN_ID AS ENO ,A.USER_NM AS EMP_NM ,B.DEP_DESC AS DPRT_CD ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', B.DEP_DESC, '') AS DPRT_NAME ,NVL((SELECT SUBSTR(NVL(X.KFB_DPRT_CD, X.DPRT_CD), 0, 7) FROM NIC41B X WHERE X.DPRT_CD = B.DEP_DESC ), 'ZZZZZZZ' ) AS KFB_DPRT_CD ,A.POSITION_CODE AS POSITION_CD ,GET_CCD_NAME(A.POSITION_CODE, CAST(? AS VARCHAR(20))) AS POSITION_NM FROM C_USER A ,C_DEP_INFO B ,C_USER_GROUP_ROLE C WHERE A.DEP_ID = B.DEP_ID AND A.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND C.GROUP_ID = 5 AND C.ROLE_ID = #{param0}

SELECT A.* --,FN_CDINFO_VAR('AC', A.GNL_AC_NO, '') AS GNL_AC_NO_VIEW ,A.GNL_AC_NO AS GNL_AC_NO_VIEW ,(SELECT X.CS_NM FROM NIC01B X WHERE X.RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO ) AS CS_NM ,DECODE(NVL(TRIM(A.CLSD_DT), ''), '', 'N', 'Y') AS CLSD_YN -- ,GET_CODE_NAME('M034', A.GDS_NO) AS GDS_NM -- 계좌종류(상품) FROM NIC17B A WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.RNMCNO IN (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE (CS_NO= #{CS_NO} OR RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO}))
AND A.RNMCNO = (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC17B WHERE TRIM(ACNT_NO) = #{ACNT_NO} AND ROWNUM = 1)
ORDER BY A.ACNT_NO

SELECT T1.* -- 종합계좌번호 FROM (SELECT A.GNL_AC_NO -- 종합계좌번호 ,A.GDS_NO -- 상품번호 ,C.CS_NM -- 계좌주명 ,DECODE(D.NW_AC_CNVR_F, '0', 'N', 'Y') AS NW_AC_CNVR_F -- 신구 계좌 전환여부 ,DECODE(D.NW_AC_CNVR_F, '0', D.OLD_AC_NO, C.GNL_AC_NO || C.GDS_NO) AS NEW_GDS_NO -- 신계좌 ,A.DL_DT -- 거래일자 ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.DL_TM, 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DL_TM -- 거래시간 ,A.DL_SQ -- 거래일련번호 ,A.DL_TYP_CD -- 거래유형코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('L077', A.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_NM -- 거래유형명 ,A.SMRY_TYP_CD -- 적요유형코드 ,(SELECT X1.CD_VL_NM FROM SZC03B X1 WHERE X1.STND_CD_ID = 'SW03004' AND TRIM(X1.CD_VL3) = TRIM(A.SMRY_TYP_CD) ) AS SMRY_TYP_NM -- 적요유형명 ,A.DL_WY_CD -- 거래방법코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('A032', A.DL_WY_CD) AS DL_WY_NM -- 거래방법명 ,A.DL_CHNNL_CD -- 거래채널코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('A033', A.DL_WY_CD) AS DL_CHNNL_NM -- 거래채널명 ,A.DL_AMT -- 거래금액 ,A.CSH -- 현금 ,A.CHCK_AMT -- 수표금액 ,A.EC_AMT -- 정산금액 ,A.TFND_RA -- 예수금잔액 ,A.DL_MD_CCD -- 거래매체 ,GET_CODE_NAME('L097', A.DL_MD_CCD) AS DL_MD_CCD_NM -- 거래채널명 ,B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM -- 상대대체계좌명 ,B.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD -- 상대대체기관코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('L088', B.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD) AS CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM -- 상대대체금융기관명 ,A.CRNCY_CD -- 통화코드 ,A.FCRNCY_DL_AMT -- 외화거래금액 ,A.USD_EXCH_AMT -- 달러환산금액 ,A.DL_Q -- 거래수량 ,A.DL_UPRC -- 거래단가 ,A.STND_IS_CD -- 표준종목코드 ,(SELECT NVL(TRIM(X2.HNGL_SHRT_NM), TRIM(A.STND_IS_CD)) FROM SIZ01B X2 WHERE TRIM(X2.STND_IS_CD) = TRIM(A.STND_IS_CD) ) AS STND_IS_NM -- 표준종목코드명 ,A.STR_DL_KND_CD -- STR거래종류코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('L081', A.STR_DL_KND_CD) AS STR_DL_KND_NM -- 거래종류명 ,A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD -- 취급지점코드 ,(SELECT X3.DPRT_NM FROM HPP01B X3 WHERE TRIM(X3.DPRT_CD) = TRIM(A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD) ) AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM -- 취급지점명 ,A.HNDL_P_ENO -- 처리자사번 FROM NIC61B A ,NIC62B B ,NIC01B C ,NIC17B D WHERE A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.GDS_NO = B.GDS_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ(+) AND A.RNMCNO = C.RNMCNO AND B.GNL_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO AND B.GDS_NO = D.GDS_NO AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{param0} AND A.GDS_NO = #{param1} AND A.DL_DT BETWEEN #{param2} AND #{param3} ) T1 ORDER BY T1.GNL_AC_NO ,T1.DL_DT ,T1.DL_TM ,T1.DL_SQ DESC

SELECT A.CS_NM --고객명 ,A.RNM_CNFR_CCD --실명번호구분코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', A.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM --실명번호구분코드명 ,A.RNMCNO ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', A.RNMCNO, '') AS RNMCNO --실명번호 ,A.NTN_CD --국가코드 ,A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD --직업코드 ,D.RPR_OGN_NM --계좌개설금융기관 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('AC', B.GNL_AC_NO, '') AS GNL_AC_NO --계좌번호 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', B.OPN_BRN_CD, '') AS OPN_BRN_CD_NM --상품개설지점명 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', B.MN_DL_DPRT_CD, '') AS MN_DL_DPRT_CD_NM --주거래부점명 ,(SELECT I.DPRT_POST_NO FROM NIC41B I WHERE I.DPRT_CD = B.OPN_BRN_CD ) AS OPN_BRN_CD_POST --계좌개설지점우편번호 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', B.AC_OPN_DT, '') AS GDS_OPN_DT --계좌개설일자 ,C.PRXY_NM --대리인명 ,C.PRXY_RLTNS_CD --대리인계좌주와의관계 ,C.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD --대리인실명구분 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', C.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) AS PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD_NM --대리인실명구분 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', C.PRXY_RNMCNO, '') AS PRXY_RNMCNO --대리인실명번호 ,C.PRXY_TEL_NO --대리인전화번호 ,C.NTN_CD --대리인국적 ,D.BRN_NM ,D.BRN_CD ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') AS RP_DT FROM NIC01B A ,NIC17B B ,NIC18B C ,NIC86B D WHERE B.RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND B.GNL_AC_NO = #{param0} AND B.GDS_NO = #{param1}

SELECT ROWNUM AS DL_SQ ,T1.* FROM (SELECT A.DL_DT --거래발생일시 ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.DL_DT || LPAD(TRIM(A.DL_TM), 6, '0'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS DL_DT_TM ,GET_CODE_NAME('M045', A.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_NM --거래종류명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M046', A.DL_WY_CD) AS DL_WY_NM --거래수단명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M044', A.DL_CHNNL_CD) AS DL_CHNNL_NM --거래채널명 ,A.DL_AMT --거래금액 ,A.CSH --현금 ,A.CHCK_AMT --수표 ,A.ETC_CHCK_AMT -- 기타수표금액 ,A.TFND_RA --잔액 ,A.CRNCY_CD --거래통화 ,DECODE(NVL(TRIM(A.CRNCY_CD), ''), '', '', #{param0}, '', DECODE(NVL(TRIM(A.FCRNCY_DL_AMT), 0), 0, 0, A.FCRNCY_DL_AMT)) AS FCRNCY_DL_AMT -- 외화거래금액 ,A.USD_EXCH_AMT --달러환산금액 ,DECODE(FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD, ''), '', '', FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD, '')) AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM -- 취급지점 ,NVL((SELECT X.USER_NM FROM C_USER X WHERE X.LOGIN_ID = A.L_HNDL_P_ENO), A.L_HNDL_P_ENO) AS HNDL_P_ENO -- 처리자사번 ,B.PRXY_NM --대리인명 ,B.PRXY_RLTNS_CD --대리인계좌주와의관계 ,B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD --대리인실명구분 ,GET_CODE_NAME('A100', B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) AS PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD_NM --대리인실명구분 ,B.PRXY_RNMCNO --대리인실명번호 ,B.PRXY_TEL_NO --대리인전화번호 ,B.NTN_CD --대리인국적 ,C.CHCK_KND_CD --유가증권종류 ,C.CHCK_STRT_NO --시작번호 ,C.CHCK_END_NO --끝번호 ,C.ISNG_BNK_NM --발행은행 ,C.ISNG_BRN_NM --발행지점 ,C.CHCK_AMT AS ISNG_CHCK_AMT --금액 ,'3' AS ENDRS_P_KND_CD --발행인/소지인구분 ,D.CS_NM AS ENDRS_P_NM --발행인/소지인명 ,A.RNMCNO AS ENDRS_P_RNM_NO --실명번호 ,'' AS ENDRS_P_TEL_NO --전화번호 FROM NIC61B A ,NIC99B B ,NIC63B C ,NIC01B D ,NIC04B E WHERE A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.GDS_NO = B.GDS_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = C.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ(+) AND A.RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND D.RNMCNO = E.RNMCNO(+) AND E.CNTC_TYP_CD(+) = '1' AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{param1} AND A.GDS_NO = #{param2} AND A.DL_DT >= #{param3} AND A.DL_DT <= #{param4} ORDER BY A.DL_DT ,LPAD(TRIM(A.DL_TM), 6, '0') ) T1

SELECT '0' AS SELECTED ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || '-' || A.SSPS_DL_ID AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A ,GET_CODE_NAME('A101', A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD) AS SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD_VIEW ,CASE WHEN C.CNT > 1 THEN TO_CHAR(C.CNT) ELSE (SELECT FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', I.MN_DL_BRN_CD, '') FROM NIC73B I WHERE I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) END AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM ,B.CS_NM AS DL_P_NM ,A.DL_P_RNMCNO ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', B.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD_NM ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD FROM NIC66B A ,NIC01B B ,(SELECT J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,J.SSPS_DL_ID ,COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM NIC73B J GROUP BY J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,J.SSPS_DL_ID ) C WHERE A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.INST_ID IS NULL AND ( 1 = #{param0} OR #{param1} IN (SELECT K.MN_DL_BRN_CD FROM NIC73B K WHERE K.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND K.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) ) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{param3} AND #{param4} AND ( 1 = #{param5} OR A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = #{param6} ) ORDER BY A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT DESC ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ASC

SELECT A.USER_ID ,B.USER_NM ,A.GROUP_ID ,C.GROUP_NM ,A.ROLE_ID ,D.ROLE_NM ,A.CRE_ID ,GET_USER_NAME(A.CRE_ID) AS CRE_NM ,A.CRE_DT ,A.UPD_ID ,GET_USER_NAME(A.UPD_ID) AS UPD_NM ,A.UPD_DT ,'R' AS CRUD ,GET_DEP_NAME(B.DEP_ID) AS DEP_TITLE FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE A ,C_USER B ,C_GROUP C ,C_ROLE D WHERE A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.GROUP_ID = C.GROUP_ID AND A.ROLE_ID = D.ROLE_ID AND B.DEP_ID = (SELECT I.MN_DL_BRN_CD FROM NIC73B I WHERE I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} ) AND A.ROLE_ID IN (3, 6) ORDER BY A.ROLE_ID

SELECT '0' AS SELECTED ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || '-' || A.SSPS_DL_ID AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A ,GET_CODE_NAME('A101', A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD) AS SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD_VIEW ,C.MN_DL_BRN_CD AS HANDLNG_BRN_CD ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', C.MN_DL_BRN_CD, '') AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM ,B.CS_NM AS DL_P_NM ,A.DL_P_RNMCNO ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', B.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD_NM ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD ,A.INST_ID ,CASE WHEN A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' THEN F.ACT_NAME ELSE GET_CODE_NAME('A029', A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD) END AS ACT_NAME ,GET_CODE_NAME('A301', (NVL(A.OK_CCD, '0'))) AS OK_CCD_NM ,C.RPR_PRGRS_CCD AS RPR_PRGRS_CCD ,G.WORK_ID ,G.PARTICIPANT_ID AS USER_ID ,GET_USER_NAME(G.PARTICIPANT_ID) AS USER_NM FROM NIC66B A ,NIC01B B ,NIC73B C ,WF_PROC_INSTANCE D ,WF_WORKLIST E ,WF_ACT F ,V_WF_STANDBY G ,C_USER H ,C_DEP_INFO I WHERE A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.INST_ID = D.INST_ID AND D.WORK_ID = E.WORK_ID AND E.ACT_ID = F.ACT_ID AND D.PAR_INST_ID = G.PAR_INST_ID AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL AND C.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = 0 AND ( 1 = #{param0} OR #{param1} IN (SELECT X.MN_DL_BRN_CD FROM NIC73B X WHERE X.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND X.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) ) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{param2} AND ( 1 = #{param3} OR A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = #{param4} ) AND G.PARTICIPANT_ID = H.USER_ID AND H.DEP_ID = I.DEP_ID AND I.DEP_DESC = C.MN_DL_BRN_CD ORDER BY A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT DESC ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ASC

SELECT T1.* ,ROWNUM FROM (SELECT T2.* FROM (SELECT SUBSTR(B.DL_DT, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(B.DL_DT, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(B.DL_DT, 7, 2) || ' ' || TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(LPAD(TRIM(B.DL_TM), 6, '0'), 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DL_DT_TM -- 거래일시 ,TRIM(B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT) AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,TRIM(B.SSPS_DL_ID) AS SSPS_DL_ID ,TRIM(B.GNL_AC_NO) AS GNL_AC_NO ,TRIM(B.GDS_NO) AS GDS_NO ,TRIM(B.DL_SQ) AS SEQ /* 거래일련번호 */ ,TRIM(B.DL_DT) AS DDATE /* 거래일자 */ ,TRIM(LPAD(TRIM(B.DL_TM), 6, '0')) AS DTIME /* 거래시간 */ ,TRIM(NVL(B.DL_CHNNL_CD, '99')) AS CHANNELCODE /* 거래채널코드 */ ,GET_CODE_NAME('M044', NVL(B.DL_CHNNL_CD, '99')) AS CHANNEL ,TRIM(NVL(B.DL_WY_CD, '99')) AS MEANCODE /* 거래방법코드 */ ,GET_CODE_NAME('M046', NVL(B.DL_WY_CD, '99')) AS MEAN ,TRIM(NVL(B.DL_TYP_CD, '99')) AS METHODCODE /* STR거래종류코드 */ ,GET_CODE_NAME('M045', NVL(B.DL_TYP_CD, '99')) AS METHOD ,TRIM(NVL(B.GDS_NO, '99')) AS GOODSCODE /* 거래상품코드 */ ,GET_CODE_NAME('M034', NVL(B.GDS_NO, '99')) AS GOODS /* 거래상품명 */ ,NVL(TRIM(B.CRNCY_CD), #{moneyType}) AS MONEYTYPECODE /* 통화코드 */ ,'' AS MONEYTYPE ,TRIM(B.DL_AMT) AS KRWAMOUNT /* 거래금액 */ ,TRIM(B.FCRNCY_DL_AMT) AS FOREIGNAMOUNT /* 외화거래금액 */ ,TRIM(B.USD_EXCH_AMT) AS USDAMOUNT /* 달러환산금액 */ ,TRIM(C.TRNS_OGN_CD) AS ORGNAMECODE /* 기관코드 */ ,TRIM(C.RPR_OGN_NM) AS ORGNAME ,NVL(B.HANDLNG_BRN_NM, 'UNKNOWN') AS BRANCHOFFICE --지점명 ,NVL((SELECT SUBSTR(NVL(I.KFB_DPRT_CD, I.DPRT_CD), 0, 7) FROM NIC41B I WHERE I.DPRT_CD = B.HANDLNG_BRN_CD ), 'ZZZZZZZ' ) AS BRANCHOFFICECODE --지점코드 ,NVL(RPAD(TRIM(B.HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO), 6, 0), '999999') AS BRANCHOFFICEZIPCODE --우편번호* ,CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC83B J WHERE J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND J.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) > 0 THEN '2' ELSE '1' END AS HASRECEIVEACCOUNT FROM NIC66B A ,NIC75B B ,NIC86B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} ) T2 ORDER BY T2.DL_DT_TM DESC ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM < 101

SELECT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ,A.GNL_AC_NO ,A.DL_DT ,A.DL_SQ ,TRIM(NVL(A.DL_WY_CD, '99')) AS MEANCODE -- 거래수단코드(거래방법코드) ,B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO AS ACCOUNTNUMBER --송/수취계좌번호 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M058', '91') AS ACCOUNTHOLDERTYPE --계좌주구분명 ,'91' AS ACCOUNTHOLDERTYPECODE --계좌주구분코드 ,B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM AS NAME --계좌주명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004', NVL(B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD, 'KR')) AS NATIONALITY --상대국가명 ,NVL(B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD, 'KR') AS NATIONALITYCODE --상대국가코드* ,NVL(B.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM, 'UNKNOWN') AS ORGNAME --금융기관명 ,NVL(B.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD , 'ZZZZZZ') AS ORGNAMECODE --금융기관코드 ,NVL(B.CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD_NM, 'UNKNOWN') AS BRANCHOFFICE --지점명 ,NVL(B.CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD , 'ZZZZZZZ') AS BRANCHOFFICECODE --지점코드 ,NVL(TRIM(B.CPRTY_TRSNS_PST_NO), '999999') AS BRANCHOFFICEZIPCODE --우편번호* ,(SELECT MAX(I.SND_RCPT_DOC_NO) FROM NIC80B I WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = I.SSPS_DL_ID ) || LPAD(ROWNUM, 5, '0') AS SNDRCPTDOCNO FROM NIC75B A ,NIC83B B ,NIC86B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ AND B.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD <> C.TRNS_OGN_CD AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ}

SELECT GET_CODE_NAME('M056','01') AS RELATIONROLE , '01' AS RELATIONROLECODE, -- 거래역할코드 A.INDV_CORP_CCD AS INDV_CORP_CCD, -- 개인법인구분코드 NVL( DECODE( TRIM(A.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) , '04', (SELECT DL_P_PSPT_NO FROM NIC78B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND DL_P_RNMCNO = A.DL_P_RNMCNO ) , TRIM(A.CS_NO) ), TRIM(A.CS_NO) ) AS REALNUMBERCONFIRM , -- 의심거래자 실명번호 TRIM(A.CS_NO) REALNUMBER, -- 의심거래자 실명 구분코드 TRIM(A.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) REALNUMBERCODE, -- 의심거래자 실명 구분코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M002',TRIM(A.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD)) AS REALNUMBERCODENAME , '' INSURELDESC, -- 의심거래자 거래자와의 관계 '' PARREALNUMBER, -- 관계구분 A.DL_P_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO --고객엔티티ID FROM NIC70B A , NIC71B D , NIC66B B , NIC75B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND C.RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND C.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND C.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND C.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} UNION SELECT GET_CODE_NAME('M056','03') AS RELATIONROLE , '03' AS RELATIONROLECODE, -- 거래역할코드 '1' AS INDV_CORP_CCD, -- 개인법인구분코드 TRIM(A.PRXY_CS_NO) AS REALNUMBERCONFIRM, -- 거래대리인 실명번호 TRIM(A.PRXY_CS_NO) AS REALNUMBER, -- 거래대리인 실명번호 TRIM(A.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE, -- 거래대리인 실명 구분코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M002',TRIM(A.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD)) AS REALNUMBERCODENAME , GET_CODE_NAME('M042',TRIM(A.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD)) AS INSURELDESC, '' AS PARREALNUMBER, A.PRXY_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO FROM NIC98B A , NIC75B C , NIC01B D WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND A.DL_DT = C.DL_DT AND A.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ AND A.PRXY_RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND TRIM(A.PRXY_RNMCNO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(A.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) IS NOT NULL AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND C.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND C.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND C.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} UNION SELECT GET_CODE_NAME('M056','09') AS RELATIONROLE , '09' RELATIONROLECODE, -- 거래역할코드 '1' AS INDV_CORP_CCD, -- 개인법인구분코드 TRIM(B.PRXY_CS_NO) AS REALNUMBERCONFIRM, -- 계좌개설대리인 실명번호 TRIM(B.PRXY_CS_NO) AS REALNUMBER, -- 계좌개설대리인 실명번호 TRIM(B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE, -- 계좌개설대리인 실명 구분코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M002',TRIM(B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD)) AS REALNUMBERCODENAME , GET_CODE_NAME('M042',TRIM(B.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD)) AS INSURELDESC, '' AS PARREALNUMBER, B.PRXY_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO FROM NIC71B A , NIC72B B , NIC75B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO AND TRIM(B.PRXY_CS_NO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) IS NOT NULL AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND C.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND C.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND C.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} UNION SELECT GET_CODE_NAME('M056','11') AS RELATIONROLE , '11' AS RELATIONROLECODE, -- 거래역할코드 '1' AS INDV_CORP_CCD, -- 개인법인구분코드 TRIM(D.CS_NO) AS REALNUMBER, -- 의심거래자 실명번호 NVL( DECODE( TRIM(D.RNM_CNFR_CCD),'04',E.PSPT_NO, TRIM(D.CS_NO) ), TRIM(A.RNMCNO) ) AS REALNUMBERCONFIRM ,-- 의심거래자 실명번호 TRIM(D.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE, -- 의심거래자 실명 구분코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M002',TRIM(D.RNM_CNFR_CCD)) AS REALNUMBERCODENAME , '' INSURELDESC, -- 의심거래자 거래자와의 관계 '' PARREALNUMBER, -- 관계구분 D.RNMCNO FROM NIC17B A , NIC83B B , NIC75B C , NIC01B D , NIC02B E WHERE A.ACNT_NO = B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND B.DL_DT = C.DL_DT AND B.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ AND A.RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND D.RNMCNO = E.RNMCNO AND TRIM(A.RNMCNO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(D.CS_NO) IS NOT NULL AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND C.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND C.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND C.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} UNION SELECT GET_CODE_NAME('M056','12') AS RELATIONROLE , '12' AS RELATIONROLECODE, -- 거래역할코드 '1' AS INDV_CORP_CCD, -- 개인법인구분코드 TRIM(D.CS_NO) AS REALNUMBERCONFIRM, -- 계좌개설대리인 실명번호 TRIM(D.CS_NO) AS REALNUMBER, -- 계좌개설대리인 실명번호 TRIM(A.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE, -- 계좌개설대리인 실명 구분코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M002',TRIM(A.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD)) AS REALNUMBERCODENAME , GET_CODE_NAME('M042',TRIM(A.PRXY_RLTNS_CD)) AS INSURELDESC, '' PARREALNUMBER, -- 관계구분 A.PRXY_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO FROM NIC17B E , NIC18B A , NIC83B B , NIC75B C , NIC01B D WHERE E.ACNT_NO = B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO AND E.GNL_AC_NO = A.GNL_AC_NO AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND B.DL_DT = C.DL_DT AND B.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ AND A.PRXY_RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND TRIM(A.PRXY_RNMCNO) IS NOT NULL AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND C.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND C.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND C.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ}

SELECT NVL( DECODE( TRIM(A.RNM_CNFR_CCD) , '04' , B.PSPT_NO , TRIM(A.CS_NO) ) , TRIM(A.CS_NO) ) AS REALNUMBER , NVL(A.RNM_CNFR_CCD,'99') AS REALNUMBERCODE, --거래자실명번호구분(기타기재) NVL(GET_CODE_NAME('M002',TRIM(A.RNM_CNFR_CCD)),'기타') AS REALNUMBERTYPENAME, --실명번호구분코드* A.INDV_CORP_CCD AS INDV_CORP_CCD, -- 개인법인구분코드 SUBSTRB(TRIM(TO_SINGLE_BYTE(A.CS_NM)),1,60) AS NAME, --성명 GET_CODE_NAME('A009',TRIM(A.NTN_CD) ) AS NATIONALITY, -- 국가코드 TRIM(A.NTN_CD) AS NATIONALITYCODE -- 국가코드 FROM NIC01B A, NIC02B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO(+)

SELECT RPRST_P_BRDY1 AS REALNUMBER , '99' AS REALNUMBERCODE, -- 거래자실명번호구분(기타기재) '기타' AS REALNUMBERTYPENAME, -- 실명번호구분코드* '1' AS INDV_CORP_CCD, -- 개인법인구분코드 SUBSTRB(TRIM(TO_SINGLE_BYTE(RPRST_P_NM1)),1,60) AS NAME, -- 성명 GET_CODE_NAME('A009',TRIM(RPRST_P_NTNLT1) ) AS NATIONALITY, -- 국가코드 TRIM(RPRST_P_NTNLT1) AS NATIONALITYCODE -- 국가코드 FROM NIC03B WHERE TRIM(RPRST_P_BRDY1) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(RPRST_P_NTNLT1) IS NOT NULL AND RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO}

SELECT A.CS_NO AS REALNUMBER , TEL1.CNTY_NATI_CRYP AS PHONE_NATI --자택 국가번호(자택/본사) , TEL1.CNTY_AREA_CRYP AS PHONE_AREA --자택 지역번호(자택/본사) , TEL1.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP AS PHONE_ECNO --자택 국번(자택/본사) , TEL1.CNTY_NO_CRYP AS PHONE_NO --자택 번호(자택/본사) , TEL3.CNTY_NATI_CRYP AS PHONEHANDPHONE_NATI --휴대폰 국가번호 , TEL3.CNTY_AREA_CRYP AS PHONEHANDPHONE_AREA --휴대폰 지역번호 , TEL3.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP AS PHONEHANDPHONE_ECNO --휴대폰 국번 , TEL3.CNTY_NO_CRYP AS PHONEHANDPHONE_NO --휴대폰 번호 , ADDR1.BSC_ADDR AS ADDRESS_BSC, --주소(자택) ADDR1.DNG_FLWG_ADDR AS ADDRESS_DNG, --주소(자택) NVL(ADDR1.PST_NO, '999999') AS ADDRESSZIPCODE, --우편번호*(법인/단체의 경우, 사업체 우편번호/주소-본점에 해당) ADDR2.BSC_ADDR AS ADDRESSCOMPANY_BSC, --주소(직장) ADDR2.DNG_FLWG_ADDR AS ADDRESSCOMPANY_DNG, --주소(직장) NVL(ADDR2.PST_NO, '999999') AS ADDRESSCOMPANYZIPCODE --우편번호* , TEL2.CNTY_NATI_CRYP AS PHONECOMPANY_NATI --직장 국가번호 , TEL2.CNTY_AREA_CRYP AS PHONECOMPANY_AREA --직장 지역번호 , TEL2.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP AS PHONECOMPANY_ECNO --직장 국번 , TEL2.CNTY_NO_CRYP AS PHONECOMPANY_NO --직장 번호 , A.BRTDY AS BIRTHDAY, --생년월일 NULL AS CEONAME, --대표자명 NULL AS CEOREALNUMBER, --대표자실명번호 A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD AS KSICCODE, --업종코드* get_code_name('M008',A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD) AS KSIC, --업종코드명 GET_CODE_NAME('M013',C.SEX_CD ) AS GENDER, --성별 C.SEX_CD AS GENDERCODE, --성별코드* C.PSPT_NO AS PASSPORTNO, -- 여권번호 C.WP_NM AS COMPANY, -- 직장명 C.DTY_DPRT_NM AS DEPTNAME, -- 근무부점명 C.PSTN_CD AS POSITION, --직위 GET_CODE_NAME('M059','91') AS OCCUPATIONTYPE, --직업구분 '91' AS OCCUPATIONTYPECODE, --직업구분코드* '' AS BIZNO, --직업내용 A.LG_AMT_ASTS_F AS ISHIGHASSET -- 고액자산여부 FROM NIC01B A , ( SELECT RNMCNO, PST_NO, BSC_ADDR, DNG_FLWG_ADDR FROM NIC05B T1 WHERE RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND ADDR_TYP_CD = '1' ) ADDR1 , ( SELECT RNMCNO, PST_NO, BSC_ADDR, DNG_FLWG_ADDR FROM NIC05B T1 WHERE RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND ADDR_TYP_CD = '2' ) ADDR2 , ( SELECT RNMCNO, CNTY_NATI_CRYP, CNTY_AREA_CRYP, CNTY_ECNO_CRYP, CNTY_NO_CRYP FROM NIC04B WHERE RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND CNTC_TYP_CD='1' ) TEL1, ( SELECT RNMCNO, CNTY_NATI_CRYP, CNTY_AREA_CRYP, CNTY_ECNO_CRYP, CNTY_NO_CRYP FROM NIC04B WHERE RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND CNTC_TYP_CD='2' ) TEL2, ( SELECT RNMCNO, CNTY_NATI_CRYP, CNTY_AREA_CRYP, CNTY_ECNO_CRYP, CNTY_NO_CRYP FROM NIC04B WHERE RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND CNTC_TYP_CD='3' ) TEL3, NIC02B C WHERE A.RNMCNO = ADDR1.RNMCNO(+) AND A.RNMCNO = ADDR2.RNMCNO(+) AND A.RNMCNO = TEL1.RNMCNO(+) AND A.RNMCNO = TEL2.RNMCNO(+) AND A.RNMCNO = C.RNMCNO(+) AND A.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO}

SELECT A.CS_NO AS REALNUMBER , B.DL_P_HSE_NATI AS PHONE_NATI, -- 자택전화번호 B.DL_P_HSE_AREA AS PHONE_AREA, -- 자택전화번호 B.DL_P_HSE_ECNO AS PHONE_ECNO, -- 자택전화번호 B.DL_P_HSE_NO AS PHONE_NO, -- 자택전화번호 B.DL_P_MBL_NATI AS PHONEHANDPHONE_NATI, -- 휴대전화번호 B.DL_P_MBL_AREA AS PHONEHANDPHONE_AREA, -- 휴대전화번호 B.DL_P_MBL_ECNO AS PHONEHANDPHONE_ECNO, -- 휴대전화번호 B.DL_P_MBL_NO AS PHONEHANDPHONE_NO, -- 휴대전화번호 B.DL_P_HSE_BSC_ADDR AS ADDRESS_BSC, --주소(자택) B.DL_P_HSE_DNG_ADDR AS ADDRESS_DNG, --주소(자택) NVL(B.DL_P_HSE_PST_NO, '999999') AS ADDRESSZIPCODE, --우편번호(법인_단체의 경우, 사업체 우편번호_주소-본점에 해당) B.DL_P_WP_BSC_ADDR AS ADDRESSCOMPANY_BSC, --주소(직장) B.DL_P_WP_DNG_ADDR AS ADDRESSCOMPANY_DNG, --주소(직장) NVL(B.DL_P_WP_PST_NO, '999999') AS ADDRESSCOMPANYZIPCODE, --우편번호 B.DL_P_WP_NATI AS PHONECOMPANY_NATI, -- 직장전화번호 B.DL_P_WP_AREA AS PHONECOMPANY_AREA, -- 직장전화번호 B.DL_P_WP_ECNO AS PHONECOMPANY_ECNO, -- 직장전화번호 B.DL_P_WP_NO AS PHONECOMPANY_NO, -- 직장전화번호 B.DL_P_BRTDY AS BIRTHDAY, --생년월일 NULL AS CEONAME, --대표자명 NULL AS CEOREALNUMBER, --대표자실명번호 NULL AS KSICCODE, --업종코드 NULL AS KSIC, --업종코드명 -- get_code_name('M013', B.DL_P_SEX_CD ) AS GENDER, --성별 --20240626 컴플요청으로 인해, 파일생성시 성별은 NIC02B(CDD수행내역의 성별)로 변경 -- B.DL_P_SEX_CD AS GENDERCODE, --성별코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M013',E.SEX_CD ) AS GENDER, --성별 E.SEX_CD AS GENDERCODE, --성별코드 B.DL_P_PSPT_NO AS PASSPORTNO, -- 여권번호 B.WP_NM AS COMPANY, -- 직장명 B.DTY_DPRT_NM AS DEPTNAME, -- 근무부점명 B.CS_PSTN_CD AS POSITION, --직위 GET_CODE_NAME('M059', (CASE WHEN NVL(D.STR_JOB_GUBN,'99')='99' THEN '91' ELSE D.STR_JOB_GUBN END)) AS OCCUPATIONTYPE, --직업구분 CASE WHEN NVL(D.STR_JOB_GUBN,'99')='99' THEN '91' ELSE D.STR_JOB_GUBN END AS OCCUPATIONTYPECODE, --직업구분코드 '' AS BIZNO, --직업내용 B.LG_AMT_ASTS_F AS ISHIGHASSET, -- 고액자산여부 MAX(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT) SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, D.INDV_CORP_CCD, A.DL_P_NTNLT_CD, A.DL_P_NTNLT_CD AS NATIONALITYCODE FROM NIC70B A , NIC78B B , NIC01B D , NIC02B E WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND D.RNMCNO = E.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY A.CS_NO,B.DL_P_HSE_NATI,B.DL_P_HSE_AREA,B.DL_P_HSE_ECNO ,B.DL_P_HSE_NO,B.DL_P_MBL_NATI,B.DL_P_MBL_AREA,B.DL_P_MBL_ECNO,B.DL_P_MBL_NO,B.DL_P_HSE_BSC_ADDR, B.DL_P_HSE_DNG_ADDR,NVL(B.DL_P_HSE_PST_NO, '999999'),B.DL_P_WP_BSC_ADDR,B.DL_P_WP_DNG_ADDR,NVL(B.DL_P_WP_PST_NO, '999999'),B.DL_P_WP_NATI,B.DL_P_WP_AREA, B.DL_P_WP_ECNO,B.DL_P_WP_NO,B.DL_P_BRTDY, E.SEX_CD,B.DL_P_PSPT_NO,B.WP_NM,B.DTY_DPRT_NM,B.CS_PSTN_CD, D.STR_JOB_GUBN, B.LG_AMT_ASTS_F, D.INDV_CORP_CCD, A.DL_P_NTNLT_CD ORDER BY SSPS_DL_CRT_DT DESC

SELECT DISTINCT A.RPRST_P_BRDY1 AS REALNUMBER, A.HD_BRNCH_NATI AS PHONE_NATI, --자택전화번호 A.HD_BRNCH_AREA AS PHONE_AREA, --자택전화번호 A.HD_BRNCH_ECNO AS PHONE_ECNO, --자택전화번호 A.HD_BRNCH_NO AS PHONE_NO, --자택전화번호 '' AS PHONEHANDPHONE_NATI, --휴대전화번호 '' AS PHONEHANDPHONE_AREA, --휴대전화번호 '' AS PHONEHANDPHONE_ECNO, --휴대전화번호 '' AS PHONEHANDPHONE_NO, --휴대전화번호 A.HD_BRNCH_BSC_ADDR AS ADDRESS_BSC, --주소(자택) A.HD_BRNCH_DNG_ADDR AS ADDRESS_DNG, --주소(자택) NVL(A.HD_BRNCH_PST_NO, '999999') AS ADDRESSZIPCODE, --우편번호*(법인/단체의 경우, 사업체 우편번호/주소-본점에 해당) A.HD_BRNCH_BSC_ADDR AS ADDRESSCOMPANY_BSC, --주소(직장) A.HD_BRNCH_DNG_ADDR AS ADDRESSCOMPANY_DNG, --주소(직장) NVL(A.HD_BRNCH_PST_NO, '999999') AS ADDRESSCOMPANYZIPCODE, --우편번호* A.HD_BRNCH_NATI AS PHONECOMPANY_NATI, --직장전화번호 A.HD_BRNCH_AREA AS PHONECOMPANY_AREA, --직장전화번호 A.HD_BRNCH_ECNO AS PHONECOMPANY_ECNO, --직장전화번호 A.HD_BRNCH_NO AS PHONECOMPANY_NO, --직장전화번호 A.RPRST_P_BRDY1 AS BIRTHDAY, --생년월일 NULL AS CEONAME, --대표자명 NULL AS CEOREALNUMBER, --대표자실명번호 NULL AS KSICCODE, --업종코드* NULL AS KSIC, --업종코드명 NULL AS GENDER, --성별 NULL AS GENDERCODE, --성별코드* NULL AS PASSPORTNO, --여권번호 NULL AS COMPANY, --직장명 NULL AS DEPTNAME, --근무부점명 NULL AS POSITION, --직위 GET_CODe_NAME('M059','91') AS OCCUPATIONTYPE, --직업구분 '91' AS OCCUPATIONTYPECODE, --직업구분코드* NULL AS BIZNO, --직업내용 'N' AS ISHIGHASSET -- 고액자산여부 FROM NIC79B A WHERE A.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO}

SELECT A.CS_NO AS BIZNO , B.RPRST_P_NM1 AS CEONAME , '99' AS CEOREALNUMBERCODE , '' AS CEOREALNUMBER , B.RPRST_P_NTNLT1 AS CEONATIONALITY , GET_CODE_NAME('M004',B.RPRST_P_NTNLT1) AS CEONATIONALITYNAME, --국적명 NULL AS CEOPHONE , GET_CODE_NAME('M008', NVL(A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD, '94990')) AS KSIC, --업종코드명 NVL(A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD, '94990') AS KSICCODE, --업종코드* //2019.06.20 99999 -> ZZZZZ B.FNDTN_DT AS BIRTHDAY, A.CORP_RGST_NO AS CORPNO , G.CNTY_NATI_CRYP AS PHONE_NATI , G.CNTY_AREA_CRYP AS PHONE_AREA , G.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP AS PHONE_ECNO , G.CNTY_NO_CRYP AS PHONE_NO , DECODE(LENGTH(NVL(E.PST_NO, '999999')), 0, '999999', 6, E.PST_NO, '999999') AS ADDRESSZIPCODE , E.BSC_ADDR AS ADDRESS_BSC, --본점주소 E.DNG_FLWG_ADDR AS ADDRESS_DNG, --본점주소 DECODE(LENGTH(NVL(F.PST_NO, '999999')), 0, '999999', 6, F.PST_NO, '999999') AS BIZADDRESSZIPCODE , F.BSC_ADDR AS BIZADDRESS_BSC , F.DNG_FLWG_ADDR AS BIZADDRESS_DNG , H.CNTY_NATI_CRYP AS BIZTELNO_NATI , H.CNTY_AREA_CRYP AS BIZTELNO_AREA , H.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP AS BIZTELNO_ECNO , H.CNTY_NO_CRYP AS BIZTELNO_NO , B.HMPG_ADDR AS HOMEPAGEURL , 'N' AS ISBANKINGORGAN , DECODE(LENGTH(NVL(TRIM(A.NPRFT_GROUP_F), '')), 0, 'N', 1, A.NPRFT_GROUP_F) AS ISNONPROFITCORP , 'N' AS ISNATIONALPUBLICGROUP , 'N' AS ISSTOCKLIST FROM NIC01B A, ( SELECT * FROM NIC03B WHERE TRIM(RPRST_P_NM1) IS NOT NULL ) B, ( SELECT RNMCNO, PST_NO, BSC_ADDR, DNG_FLWG_ADDR FROM NIC05B T1 WHERE RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND ADDR_TYP_CD = '1' ) E , ( SELECT RNMCNO, PST_NO, BSC_ADDR, DNG_FLWG_ADDR FROM NIC05B T1 WHERE RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND ADDR_TYP_CD = '2' ) F , ( SELECT RNMCNO, CNTY_NATI_CRYP, CNTY_AREA_CRYP, CNTY_ECNO_CRYP, CNTY_NO_CRYP FROM NIC04B WHERE RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND CNTC_TYP_CD='1' ) G, ( SELECT RNMCNO, CNTY_NATI_CRYP, CNTY_AREA_CRYP, CNTY_ECNO_CRYP, CNTY_NO_CRYP FROM NIC04B WHERE RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND CNTC_TYP_CD='2' ) H WHERE A.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO(+) AND A.RNMCNO = E.RNMCNO(+) AND A.RNMCNO = F.RNMCNO(+) AND A.RNMCNO = G.RNMCNO(+) AND A.RNMCNO = H.RNMCNO(+)

SELECT DISTINCT A.CS_NO AS REALNUMBER, get_code_name('M002', A.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD ) AS REALNUMBERCODE, A.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD AS REALNUMBERTYPENAME, A.INDV_CORP_CCD, A.DL_P_NM AS NAME ,--법인/단체명 A.DL_P_NTNLT_CD, A.DL_P_NTNLT_CD AS NATIONALITYCODE, get_code_name('M004', A.DL_P_NTNLT_CD ) AS NATIONALITY, A.DL_P_NTNLT_CD AS NATIONALITYCODE, B.HD_BRNCH_NATI AS PHONE_NATI, B.HD_BRNCH_AREA AS PHONE_AREA, B.HD_BRNCH_ECNO AS PHONE_ECNO, B.HD_BRNCH_NO AS PHONE_NO, NVL(TRIM(B.HD_BRNCH_BSC_ADDR), B.BSNS_CMPNY_BSC_ADDR) AS ADDRESS_BSC, NVL(TRIM(B.HD_BRNCH_DNG_ADDR), B.BSNS_CMPNY_DNG_ADDR) AS ADDRESS_DNG, COALESCE(TRIM(B.HD_BRNCH_PST_NO), TRIM(B.BSNS_CMPNY_PST_NO), '999999') AS ADDRESSZIPCODE, ----DECODE(LENGTH(NVL(B.HD_BRNCH_PST_NO, '999999')), 0, '999999', 6, B.HD_BRNCH_PST_NO, '999999') AS ADDRESSZIPCODE, B.BSNSG_FNDTN_DT AS BIRTHDAY, B.RPRST_P_NM1 AS CEONAME, --대표자명 A.CS_NO AS BIZNO, --거래자직업내용-사업자등록번호 GET_CODE_NAME('M008', NVL(B.IND_TYP_CD, '94990')) AS KSIC ,--업종코드명 NVL(B.IND_TYP_CD, '94990') AS KSICCODE ,--업종코드 B.CORP_RGST_NO AS CORPNO ,--법인등록번호 B.BSNS_CMPNY_BSC_ADDR AS BIZADDRESS_BSC, --사업체 사업장 우편번호/주소 B.BSNS_CMPNY_DNG_ADDR AS BIZADDRESS_DNG, --사업체 사업장 우편번호/주소 NVL(B.BSNS_CMPNY_PST_NO, '999999') AS BIZADDRESSZIPCODE, --우편번호 B.BSNS_CMPNY_NATI AS BIZTELNO_NATI, --사업체 사업장 전화번호 B.BSNS_CMPNY_AREA AS BIZTELNO_AREA, --사업체 사업장 전화번호 B.BSNS_CMPNY_ECNO AS BIZTELNO_ECNO, --사업체 사업장 전화번호 B.BSNS_CMPNY_NO AS BIZTELNO_NO, --사업체 사업장 전화번호 B.HMPG_ADDR AS HOMEPAGEURL, --홈페이지 주소 NVL(ENTP_SCL_CCD_NM,get_code_name('M030',NVL(B.ENTP_SCL_CCD,'2'))) AS BIZSCALE, --기업규모 DECODE(NVL(TRIM(B.ENTP_SCL_CCD),'2'),'02','','0'||NVL(B.ENTP_SCL_CCD,'2')) AS BIZSCALECODE, --기업규모코드 NVL(DECODE(TRIM(B.FOGN_F), '1', 'Y', '2', 'N', B.FOGN_F),'N') AS ISBANKINGORGAN, --금융기관 여부 NVL(DECODE(TRIM(B.NPRFT_GROUP_F), '1', 'Y', '2', 'N', B.NPRFT_GROUP_F),'N') AS ISNONPROFITCORP , --비영리법인 여부 NVL(DECODE(NVL(B.NTN_PBLIC_GROUP_F, 'N'), '1', 'Y', 'N'),'N') AS ISNATIONALPUBLICGROUP , --국가공공단체여부 NVL(DECODE(TRIM(B.LSTNG_F), '1', 'Y', '2', 'N', B.LSTNG_F),'N') AS ISSTOCKLIST, --상장여부 DECODE(TRIM(B.LSTNG_F), '1', B.LSTNG_INFO, '') AS STOCKLISTINFO --상장정보 FROM NIC70B A , NIC79B B , NIC66B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.DL_P_RNMCNO(+) = A.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT NVL(DECODE(TRIM(A.RNM_CNFR_CCD), '04', TRIM(B.PSPT_NO), TRIM(A.RNMCNO) ), TRIM(A.RNMCNO) ) AS REALNUMBER ,NVL(A.RNM_CNFR_CCD, '99') AS REALNUMBERCODE --거래자실명번호구분(기타기재) ,DECODE(A.RNM_CNFR_CCD, '14', A.CS_CI_NO, '') AS CINUMBER --고객CI번호(2020.07.23 추가) ,NVL(GET_CODE_NAME('M002', TRIM(A.RNM_CNFR_CCD)), 'UNKNOWN') AS REALNUMBERTYPENAME --실명번호구분코드* ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD AS INDV_CORP_CCD --개인법인구분코드 ,A.CS_NM AS NAME --성명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004', TRIM(A.NTN_CD)) AS NATIONALITY --국가코드 ,TRIM(A.NTN_CD) AS NATIONALITYCODE --국가코드 FROM NIC01B A ,NIC02B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO(+)

SELECT A.CORP_RGST_NO AS REALNUMBER ,A.RNM_CNFR_CCD AS REALNUMBERCODE -- 거래자실명번호구분(기타기재) ,DECODE(A.RNM_CNFR_CCD, '14', A.CS_CI_NO, '') AS CINUMBER -- 고객CI번호(2020.07.23 추가) ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', TRIM(A.RNM_CNFR_CCD)) AS REALNUMBERTYPENAME -- 실명번호구분코드 ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD AS INDV_CORP_CCD -- 개인법인구분코드 ,A.CS_NM AS NAME -- 성명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004', NVL(TRIM(A.NTN_CD), '99')) AS NATIONALITY -- 국가코드 ,NVL(TRIM(A.NTN_CD), '99') AS NATIONALITYCODE -- 국가코드 FROM NIC01B A ,NIC03B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = #{REALNUMBER} AND A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO(+)

SELECT A.RNMCNO AS REALNUMBER ,(SELECT TEL_NO FROM NIC04B WHERE RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO AND CNTC_TYP_CD='1' ) AS PHONE -- 자택전화번호 ,(SELECT TEL_NO FROM NIC04B WHERE RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO AND CNTC_TYP_CD ='3' ) AS PHONEHANDPHONE -- 휴대전화번호 , B.ADDR AS ADDRESS --주소(자택) ,NVL(TRIM( B.PST_NO), '999999') AS ADDRESSZIPCODE --우편번호*(법인/단체의 경우, 사업체 우편번호/주소-본점에 해당) ,C.ADDR AS ADDRESSCOMPANY --주소(직장) ,NVL(C.PST_NO, '999999') AS ADDRESSCOMPANYZIPCODE --우편번호* ,(SELECT TEL_NO FROM NIC04B WHERE RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO AND CNTC_TYP_CD = '2' ) AS PHONECOMPANY -- 직장전화번호 ,'' AS MIXEDREALNUMBER -- 실명조합번호 ,CASE WHEN NVL(D.BRTDY, '0') < 19000101 THEN NULL ELSE D.BRTDY END AS BIRTHDAY --생년월일 ,E.RPRST_P_NM AS CEONAME --대표자명 ,E.RPRST_P_RNMCNO AS CEOREALNUMBER --대표자실명번호 ,A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD AS KSICCODE --업종코드* ,GET_CODE_NAME('M008', A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD) AS KSIC --업종코드명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M013', D.SEX_CD) AS GENDER --성별 ,D.SEX_CD AS GENDERCODE --성별코드* ,D.PSPT_NO AS PASSPORTNO -- 여권번호 ,D.WP_NM AS COMPANY -- 직장명 ,D.DTY_DPRT_NM AS DEPTNAME -- 근무부점명 ,D.PSTN_CD AS POSITION --직위 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M059', '91') AS OCCUPATIONTYPE --직업구분 ,'91' AS OCCUPATIONTYPECODE --직업구분코드* ,'' AS BIZNO -- 직업내용 ,DECODE(A.LG_AMT_ASTS_F, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS ISHIGHASSET -- 고액자산여부 FROM NIC01B A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT RNMCNO , PST_NO , ADDR || ' ' || DNG_FLWG_ADDR AS ADDR FROM NIC05B T1 WHERE RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND ADDR_TYP_CD = '1' AND PST_SQ = ( SELECT MAX(PST_SQ) FROM NIC05B T2 WHERE T1.RNMCNO = T2.RNMCNO AND T1.ADDR_TYP_CD = T2.ADDR_TYP_CD ) ) B ON ( A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO ) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT RNMCNO , PST_NO , ADDR || ' ' || DNG_FLWG_ADDR AS ADDR FROM NIC05B T1 WHERE RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND ADDR_TYP_CD = '2' AND PST_SQ = ( SELECT MAX(PST_SQ) FROM NIC05B T2 WHERE T1.RNMCNO = T2.RNMCNO AND T1.ADDR_TYP_CD = T2.ADDR_TYP_CD ) ) C ON ( A.RNMCNO = C.RNMCNO ) LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC02B D ON ( A.RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO ) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT A.* FROM NIC03B_1 A , ( SELECT RNMCNO , MIN(RPRST_P_SQ) AS RPRST_P_SQ FROM NIC03B_1 WHERE RPR_TGT_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY RNMCNO ) B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.RPRST_P_SQ = B.RPRST_P_SQ ) E ON ( A.RNMCNO = E.RNMCNO ) WHERE A.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO }

SELECT A.RPRST_P_RNMCNO AS REALNUMBER ,A.RPRST_P_TEL_NO AS PHONE -- 자택전화번호 ,NULL AS PHONEHANDPHONE -- 휴대전화번호 ,NVL(A.RPRST_P_HSE_ADDR, 'UNKNOWN') AS ADDRESS -- 주소(자택) ,NVL(REPLACE(A.RPRST_P_HSE_PST_NO, '-', ''), '999999') AS ADDRESSZIPCODE -- 우편번호*(법인/단체의 경우, 사업체 우편번호/주소-본점에 해당) ,NULL AS ADDRESSCOMPANY -- 주소(직장) ,NULL AS ADDRESSCOMPANYZIPCODE -- 우편번호* ,NULL AS PHONECOMPANY -- 직장전화번호 ,NULL AS MIXEDREALNUMBER -- 실명조합번호 ,NULL AS BIRTHDAY -- 생년월일 ,NULL AS CEONAME -- 대표자명 ,NULL AS CEOREALNUMBER -- 대표자실명번호 ,NULL AS KSICCODE -- 업종코드* ,NULL AS KSIC -- 업종코드명 -- ,A.RPRST_P_SEX_CD AS GENDERCODE -- 성별코드* ,NULL AS PASSPORTNO -- 여권번호 ,NULL AS COMPANY -- 직장명 ,NULL AS DEPTNAME -- 근무부점명 ,NULL AS POSITION -- 직위 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M059', '4') AS OCCUPATIONTYPE -- 직업구분 ,'91' AS OCCUPATIONTYPECODE -- 직업구분코드* ,NULL AS BIZNO -- 직업내용(실명번호-사업자번호) ,'N' AS ISHIGHASSET -- 고액자산여부 FROM ( SELECT A.* FROM NIC03B_1 A , ( SELECT RNMCNO , MIN(RPRST_P_SQ) AS RPRST_P_SQ FROM NIC03B_1 WHERE RPR_TGT_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY RNMCNO ) B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.RPRST_P_SQ = B.RPRST_P_SQ ) A WHERE TRIM(A.RPRST_P_RNMCNO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(A.RPRST_P_RNM_CNFR_CCD) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(A.RPRST_P_NTNLT) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(A.RPRST_P_HSE_PST_NO) IS NOT NULL AND A.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO}

SELECT A.RNMCNO AS BIZNO --실명번호(사업자번호) ,B.RPRST_P_NM AS CEONAME ,B.RPRST_P_RNM_CNFR_CCD AS CEOREALNUMBERCODE ,B.RPRST_P_RNMCNO AS CEOREALNUMBER ,B.RPRST_P_NTNLT AS CEONATIONALITY ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004',B.RPRST_P_NTNLT) AS CEONATIONALITYNAME --국적명 ,B.RPRST_P_TEL_NO AS CEOPHONE ,B.RPRST_P_HSE_PST_NO AS CEOZIPCODE ,B.RPRST_P_HSE_ADDR AS CEOADDRESS ,GET_CODE_NAME('M008', A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD) AS KSIC --업종코드명 -- ,DECODE(NVL(A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD, '99999'), '', '99999', A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD) AS KSICCODE --업종코드* ,NVL(SUBSTR(A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD, 1, 5), '99999') AS KSICCODE
