--업종코드* ,CASE WHEN NVL(C.FNDTN_DT, '0') < 19000101 THEN '19000101' ELSE C.FNDTN_DT END AS BIRTHDAY --설립일 ,A.CORP_RGST_NO AS CORPNO ,B.RPRST_P_TEL_NO AS PHONE ,NVL(TRIM(D.PST_NO), '999999') AS ADDRESSZIPCODE ,NVL(TRIM(D.ADDR), 'UNKNOWN') AS ADDRESS --자택/본점주소 ,NVL(TRIM(D.PST_NO), '999999') AS ADDRESSCOMPANYZIPCODE ,NVL(TRIM(D.ADDR), 'UNKNOWN') AS ADDRESSCOMPANY --자택/본점주소 ,NVL(TRIM(E.PST_NO), '999999') AS BIZADDRESSZIPCODE ,NVL(TRIM(E.ADDR), 'UNKNOWN') AS BIZADDRESS -- 사업장주소 ,(SELECT I.TEL_NO FROM NIC04B I WHERE I.RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO AND I.CNTC_TYP_CD = '1' ) AS BIZTELNO -- 직장전화번호 ,C.HMPG_ADDR AS HOMEPAGEURL ,'N' AS ISBANKINGORGAN ,DECODE(LENGTH(NVL(TRIM(C.NPRFT_GROUP_F), '')), 0, 'N', 1, DECODE(C.NPRFT_GROUP_F, 'Y', 'Y', 'N'), 'N') AS ISNONPROFITCORP ,'N' AS ISNATIONALPUBLICGROUP ,'N' AS ISSTOCKLIST , C.ENTP_SCL_CCD AS BIZSCALECODE , GET_CODE_NAME('M030',C.ENTP_SCL_CCD) AS BIZSCALE FROM NIC01B A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT A.* FROM NIC03B_1 A , ( SELECT RNMCNO , MIN(RPRST_P_SQ) AS RPRST_P_SQ FROM NIC03B_1 WHERE RPR_TGT_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY RNMCNO ) B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.RPRST_P_SQ = B.RPRST_P_SQ ) B ON ( A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO ) LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC03B C ON ( A.RNMCNO = C.RNMCNO ) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT K.RNMCNO , K.PST_NO , K.ADDR || K.DNG_FLWG_ADDR AS ADDR FROM NIC05B K WHERE K.ADDR_TYP_CD = '1' AND K.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} ) D ON ( A.RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO ) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT L.RNMCNO , L.PST_NO , L.ADDR || L.DNG_FLWG_ADDR AS ADDR FROM NIC05B L WHERE L.ADDR_TYP_CD = '2' AND L.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} ) E ON ( A.RNMCNO = E.RNMCNO ) WHERE A.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO}

SELECT A.RNMCNO AS REALNUMBER ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', A.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE ,A.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD AS REALNUMBERTYPENAME ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', A.RNMCNO) AS INDV_CORP_CCD ,A.DL_P_NM AS NAME --법인/단체명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004', A.DL_P_NTNLT_CD) AS NATIONALITY ,A.DL_P_NTNLT_CD AS NATIONALITYCODE ,B.HD_BRNCH_TEL_NO AS PHONE ,B.RPRST_P_HSE_ADDR AS ADDRESS --대표자자택주소 ,NVL(TRIM(B.RPRST_P_HSE_PST_NO), '999999') AS ADDRESSZIPCODE --대표자자택우편번호 ,B.HD_BRNCH_ADDR AS ADDRESSCOMPANY --본점우편번호 ,NVL(TRIM(B.HD_BRNCH_PST_NO), '999999') AS ADDRESSCOMPANYZIPCODE --본점주소 ,CASE WHEN TRIM(NVL(B.BSNSG_FNDTN_DT, '0')) < '19000101' THEN NULL ELSE B.BSNSG_FNDTN_DT END AS BIRTHDAY ,B.RPRST_P_NM AS CEONAME --대표자명 ,A.RNMCNO AS BIZNO --거래자직업내용-사업자등록번호 ,B.IND_TYP_CD_NM AS KSIC --업종코드명 ,NVL(B.IND_TYP_CD, '99999') AS KSICCODE --업종코드 ,B.CORP_RGST_NO AS CORPNO --법인등록번호 ,B.BSNS_CMPNY_ADDR AS BIZADDRESS --사업체 사업장 우편번호/주소 ,NVL(TRIM(B.BSNS_CMPNY_PST_NO), '999999') AS BIZADDRESSZIPCODE --우편번호 ,B.BSNS_CMPNY_TEL_NO AS BIZTELNO --사업체 사업장 전화번호 ,B.HMPG_ADDR AS HOMEPAGEURL --홈페이지 주소 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M030', B.ENTP_SCL_CCD) AS BIZSCALE --기업규모 ,NVL(TRIM(B.ENTP_SCL_CCD), '') AS BIZSCALECODE --기업규모코드 ,DECODE(TRIM(B.FOGN_F), 'Y', 'Y', 'N', 'N', B.FOGN_F) AS ISBANKINGORGAN --금융기관 여부 ,DECODE(B.NPRFT_GROUP_F, '04', 'Y', 'N') AS ISNONPROFITCORP --비영리법인 여부 ,DECODE(TRIM(B.NTN_PBLIC_GROUP_F), 'Y', 'Y', 'N', 'N', B.NTN_PBLIC_GROUP_F) AS ISNATIONALPUBLICGROUP --국가공공단체 여부 ,DECODE(TRIM(B.LSTNG_F), 'Y', 'Y', 'N', 'N', B.LSTNG_F) AS ISSTOCKLIST --상장여부 ,DECODE(TRIM(B.LSTNG_F), 'Y', B.LSTNG_INFO, '') AS STOCKLISTINFO --상장정보 FROM NIC70B A ,NIC79B B ,NIC66B C WHERE C.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO } AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.DL_P_RNMCNO = A.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO

SELECT A.RPR_OGN_NM AS ORGNAME, --금융기관명 A.TRNS_OGN_CD AS ORGNAMECODE, --금융기관코드* NVL( B.AC_OPN_BRN_NM, 'UNKNOWN' ) AS BRANCHOFFICE, --지점명 NVL( (SELECT SUBSTR(NVL(KFB_DPRT_CD, DPRT_CD), 0,7) FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = B.OPN_BRN_CD) , 'ZZZZZZZ' ) AS BRANCHOFFICECODE, --지점코드 char 7 NVL( (SELECT DPRT_POST_NO FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = B.OPN_BRN_CD ), '999999') AS BRANCHOFFICEZIPCODE, --우편번호 B.ACNT_NO AS ACCOUNTNUMBER, --계좌번호 NVL(B.AC_OPN_DT, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS REGDATE , --계좌개설일 NVL( DECODE(TRIM(D.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) , '04' , ( SELECT DL_P_PSPT_NO FROM NIC78B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND DL_P_RNMCNO = D.DL_P_RNMCNO ) , TRIM(D.CS_NO) ) , TRIM(D.CS_NO) ) AS ACCOUNTUSER, --계좌주실명번호 D.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD AS ACCOUNTUSERCODE, --실명번호구분코드* CASE WHEN B.AC_OPN_PRXY_F = '1' AND (TRIM(E.PRXY_CS_NO) IS NOT NULL OR TRIM(F.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP) IS NOT NULL) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS AGENTFLAG, --대리인존재여부 NVL(TRIM(E.PRXY_CS_NO), TRIM(F.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP)) AS AGENTUSER, --대리인실명번호 E.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD AS AGENTUSERCODE, --실명번호구분코드* GET_CODE_NAME('M038',NVL(B.AC_OPN_OBJ_CCD, '99') ) AS ACCOUNTOPENPURPOSE, --계좌개설목적 NVL(B.AC_OPN_OBJ_CCD, '99') AS ACCOUNTOPENPURPOSECODE --계좌개설목적코드* FROM NIC86B A , NIC71B B , NIC66B C , NIC70B D , NIC72B E , SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS F WHERE C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.RNMCNO = D.DL_P_RNMCNO AND E.PRXY_RNMCNO = ''||F.ENTY_ID(+) AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = E.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = E.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND B.GNL_AC_NO = E.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

SELECT GET_CODE_NAME('M061','52' ) AS RELATION, --USER관계 '52' AS RELATIONCODE, --거래자관계코드* D.CS_NO AS PRINCIPALUSER, --거래자, 계좌주, 송/수취계좌주,법인/단체 D.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD AS PRINCIPALUSERCODE, --실명번호구분코드* E.PRXY_CS_NO AS PARTICIPANTUSER, --관계인 DECODE(E.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD, '', '99', E.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) AS PARTICIPANTUSERCODE, --실명번호구분코드* GET_CODE_NAME('M042',DECODE(E.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD, '', '9', E.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD) ) AS REMARK --관계명 FROM NIC66B C , NIC70B D , NIC71B B , NIC72B E WHERE C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.DL_P_RNMCNO = D.DL_P_RNMCNO AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = E.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = E.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = E.GNL_AC_NO AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND TRIM(E.PRXY_CS_NO) IS NOT NULL

SELECT GET_CODE_NAME('M061', '52') AS RELATION --USER관계 ,'52' AS RELATIONCODE --거래자관계코드* ,B.CS_NO AS PRINCIPALUSER --거래자, 계좌주, 송/수취계좌주,법인/단체 ,B.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD AS PRINCIPALUSERCODE --실명번호구분코드* ,(SELECT I.CS_CI_NO FROM NIC01B I WHERE I.RNMCNO = A.DL_P_RNMCNO AND I.RNM_CNFR_CCD = '14' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS PRINCIPALUSERCINUMBER --거래자, 계좌주, 송/수취계좌주,법인/단체 CI 번호(2020.07.23 추가) ,D.PRXY_CS_NO AS PARTICIPANTUSER --관계인 ,DECODE(D.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD, '', '99', D.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) AS PARTICIPANTUSERCODE --실명번호구분코드* ,(SELECT J.CS_CI_NO FROM NIC01B J WHERE J.RNMCNO = D.PRXY_RNMCNO AND J.RNM_CNFR_CCD = '14' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS PARTICIPANTUSERCINUMBER --관계인 CI 번호(2020.07.23 추가) ,GET_CODE_NAME('M042', DECODE(D.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD, '', '9', D.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD) ) AS REMARK --관계명 FROM NIC66B A ,NIC70B B ,NIC71B C ,NIC72B D ,NIC01B E WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID AND C.GNL_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO AND C.GDS_NO = D.GDS_NO AND D.PRXY_RNMCNO = E.RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} UNION SELECT GET_CODE_NAME('M061', '51') AS RELATION --USER관계 ,'51' AS RELATIONCODE --거래자관계코드* ,C.CS_NO AS PRINCIPALUSER --거래자, 계좌주, 송/수취계좌주,법인/단체 ,C.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD AS PRINCIPALUSERCODE --실명번호구분코드* ,(SELECT I.CS_CI_NO FROM NIC01B I WHERE I.RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND I.RNM_CNFR_CCD = '14' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS PRINCIPALUSERCINUMBER --거래자, 계좌주, 송/수취계좌주,법인/단체 CI 번호(2020.07.23 추가) ,D.RPRST_P_RNMCNO AS PARTICIPANTUSER --관계인 ,D.RPRST_P_RNM_CNFR_CCD AS PARTICIPANTUSERCODE --실명번호구분코드* ,(SELECT J.CS_CI_NO FROM NIC01B J WHERE J.RNMCNO = D.RPRST_P_RNMCNO AND J.RNM_CNFR_CCD = '14' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS PARTICIPANTUSERCINUMBER --관계인 CI 번호(2020.07.23 추가) ,'' AS REMARK --관계명 FROM NIC71B A ,NIC66B B ,NIC70B C ,( SELECT A.* FROM NIC03B_1 A , ( SELECT RNMCNO , MIN(RPRST_P_SQ) AS RPRST_P_SQ FROM NIC03B_1 WHERE RPR_TGT_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY RNMCNO ) B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.RPRST_P_SQ = B.RPRST_P_SQ ) D WHERE B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.DL_P_RNMCNO = C.DL_P_RNMCNO AND C.DL_P_RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND TRIM(D.RPRST_P_RNMCNO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(D.RPRST_P_RNM_CNFR_CCD) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(D.RPRST_P_NTNLT) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(D.RPRST_P_HSE_PST_NO) IS NOT NULL AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

SELECT '05' AS SECURITIESTYPECODE, -- 수표종류코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M052', '05') AS SECURITIESTYPE , DECODE( LENGTH(TRIM(NVL('', ''))), 8, TRIM(NVL(B.NEW_CHCK_NO, ''))||'~'||SUBSTR(TRIM(NVL('', '')), 4, 4) , TRIM(NVL(B.NEW_CHCK_NO, '')) ) SECURITIESNUMBER, -- 수표시작번호,수표끝번호 '삼성증권' AS ORGNAME ,--금융기관명 '5130' AS ORGNAMECODE, --금융기관코드 A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM AS BRANCHOFFICE, --지점명 NVL(B2.BANK_NAME, 'UNKNOWN') AS ISSUEORGNAME, --발행은행명 NVL((SELECT TRIM(TRNSFRM_CD) FROM NIC95B WHERE CD='L088' AND CD_VL9 = B2.BANK_CODE) , 'ZZZZ') AS ISSUEORGNAMECODE, --발행은행코드 NVL(B1.BANK_BRNH_NAME, 'UNKNOWN') AS ISSUEBRANCHOFFICE, --발행영업점명 B.CHCK_AMNT AS ISSUEAMOUNT, -- 수표금액 DECODE(LENGTH(TRIM(B.ISSD_DATE)), '8', TRIM(B.ISSD_DATE), B.TRDG_DATE) ISSUEDATE, -- 수표발행일자 '최종소지인' AS ISSUERDIV , '3' AS ISSUERDIVCODE, -- 배서자종류코드 TRIM(D.CS_NO) REALNUMBER, -- 배서자실명번호 TRIM(D.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE -- 배서자실명번호 구분 FROM NIC75B A, SID.IDO_A_MBA_CHCK_INOU B, SID.IDO_A_UUS_BANK_BRANCH B1, SID.IDO_A_UUS_BANK B2, NIC66B C, NIC70B D WHERE A.GNL_AC_NO = B.ACNT_ID AND A.DL_DT = B.TRDG_DATE AND A.DL_SQ = DECODE(B.TRDG_NO, 0, A.DL_SQ, B.TRDG_NO) AND B.BANK_CODE = B1.BANK_CODE (+) -- 은행코드 AND B.BANK_BNCD = B1.BANK_BNCD (+) -- 지점코드 AND B.BANK_CODE = B2.BANK_CODE (+) -- 은행코드 AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.DL_P_RNMCNO = D.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN A.GDS_NO LIKE 'M10%' THEN '09' --CD WHEN A.GDS_NO LIKE 'M19%' THEN '02' --약속어음 ELSE '99' --기타 END AS SECURITIESTYPECODE , GET_CODE_NAME('M052', CASE WHEN A.GDS_NO LIKE 'M10%' THEN '09' --CD WHEN A.GDS_NO LIKE 'M19%' THEN '02' --약속어음 ELSE '99' --기타 END) AS SECURITIESTYPE , B.RPRS_ISCD AS SECURITIESNUMBER , '삼성증권' AS ORGNAME , '5130' AS ORGNAMECODE , A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM AS BRANCHOFFICE , '삼성증권' AS ISSUEORGNAME , '5130' AS ISSUEORGNAMECODE , A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM AS ISSUEBRANCHOFFICE , A.DL_AMT AS ISSUEAMOUNT , NVL(TRIM(B.ISSD_DATE), A.DL_DT) AS ISSUEDATE , '최종소지인' AS ISSUERDIV , '3' AS ISSUERDIVCODE , TRIM(D.CS_NO) AS REALNUMBER , TRIM(D.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE FROM NIC75B A , SID.IDO_A_UUP_PRODUCT B , NIC70B D WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} AND A.ISUS_PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.RNMCNO = D.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.GDS_NO LIKE 'M%' UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN A.GDS_NO LIKE 'D10%' THEN '03' --국채 WHEN A.GDS_NO LIKE 'D11%' OR A.GDS_NO LIKE 'D12%' THEN '04' --공채 ELSE '99' --기타 END AS SECURITIESTYPECODE , GET_CODE_NAME('M052', CASE WHEN A.GDS_NO LIKE 'D10%' THEN '03' --국채 WHEN A.GDS_NO LIKE 'D11%' OR A.GDS_NO LIKE 'D12%' THEN '04' --공채 ELSE '99' --기타 END ) AS SECURITIESTYPE , B.RPRS_ISCD AS SECURITIESNUMBER , '삼성증권' AS ORGNAME , '5130' AS ORGNAMECODE , A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM AS BRANCHOFFICE , '삼성증권' AS ISSUEORGNAME , '5130' AS ISSUEORGNAMECODE , A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM AS ISSUEBRANCHOFFICE , A.DL_AMT AS ISSUEAMOUNT , NVL(TRIM(B.ISSD_DATE), A.DL_DT) AS ISSUEDATE , '최종소지인' AS ISSUERDIV , '3' AS ISSUERDIVCODE , TRIM(D.CS_NO) AS REALNUMBER , TRIM(D.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE FROM SSQ.NIC75B A , SID.IDO_A_UUP_PRODUCT B , SSQ.NIC70B D WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} AND A.ISUS_PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.RNMCNO = D.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.GDS_NO LIKE 'D%' UNION ALL SELECT '99' AS SECURITIESTYPECODE , GET_CODE_NAME('M052', '99') AS SECURITIESTYPE , B.RPRS_ISCD AS SECURITIESNUMBER , '삼성증권' AS ORGNAME , '5130' AS ORGNAMECODE , A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM AS BRANCHOFFICE , '삼성증권' AS ISSUEORGNAME , '5130' AS ISSUEORGNAMECODE , A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM AS ISSUEBRANCHOFFICE , A.DL_AMT AS ISSUEAMOUNT , NVL(TRIM(B.ISSD_DATE), A.DL_DT) AS ISSUEDATE , '최종소지인' AS ISSUERDIV , '3' AS ISSUERDIVCODE , TRIM(D.CS_NO) AS REALNUMBER , TRIM(D.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE FROM SSQ.NIC75B A , SID.IDO_A_UUP_PRODUCT B , SSQ.NIC70B D WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} AND A.ISUS_PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.RNMCNO = D.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.GDS_NO NOT LIKE 'M%' AND A.GDS_NO NOT LIKE 'D%'

SELECT B.CHCK_KND_CD SECURITIESTYPECODE -- 수표종류코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M052', B.CHCK_KND_CD) AS SECURITIESTYPE ,DECODE(LENGTH(TRIM(NVL(B.CHCK_END_NO, ''))), 8, TRIM(NVL(B.CHCK_STRT_NO, '')) || '~' || SUBSTR(TRIM(NVL(B.CHCK_END_NO, '')), 4, 4), TRIM(NVL(B.CHCK_STRT_NO, ''))) AS SECURITIESNUMBER -- 수표시작번호,수표끝번호 ,'UNKNOWN' AS ORGNAME --금융기관명 ,'ZZZZZZ' AS ORGNAMECODE --금융기관코드 ,'UNKNOWN' AS BRANCHOFFICE --지점명 ,NVL(B.ISNG_BNK_NM, 'UNKNOWN') AS ISSUEORGNAME --발행은행명 ,NVL(B.ISNG_BNK_CD, 'ZZZZZZ') AS ISSUEORGNAMECODE --발행은행코드 ,'UNKNOWN' AS ISSUEBRANCHOFFICE --발행영업점명 ,TRIM(B.CHCK_AMT) AS ISSUEAMOUNT -- 수표금액 ,DECODE(LENGTH(TRIM(B.CHCK_ISNG_DT)), '8', TRIM(B.CHCK_ISNG_DT), B.DL_DT) AS ISSUEDATE -- 수표발행일자 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M055', B.ENDRS_P_KND_CD) AS ISSUERDIV ,DECODE(TRIM(B.ENDRS_P_KND_CD), '1', '1', '3') AS ISSUERDIVCODE -- 배서자종류코드 ,TRIM(D.RNMCNO) AS REALNUMBER -- 배서자실명번호 ,TRIM(D.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE -- 배서자실명번호 구분 ,(SELECT I.CS_CI_NO FROM NIC01B I WHERE I.RNMCNO = C.DL_P_RNMCNO AND I.RNM_CNFR_CCD = '14' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS CINUMBER -- CI번호(2020.07.23 추가) FROM NIC75B A ,NIC76B B ,NIC66B C ,NIC70B D WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO AND A.GDS_NO = B.GDS_NO AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.DL_P_RNMCNO = D.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.GDS_NO = #{GDS_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} UNION SELECT B.SCRTS_BLL_TYP_CD AS SECURITIESTYPECODE -- 수표종류코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M052', B.SCRTS_BLL_TYP_CD) AS SECURITIESTYPE ,SUBSTR(TRIM(NVL(B.STRT_SCRT_NO, '')), 0, 15) SECURITIESNUMBER -- 수표시작번호,수표끝번호 ,'UNKNOWN' AS ORGNAME --금융기관명 ,'ZZZZZZ' AS ORGNAMECODE --금융기관코드 ,'UNKNOWN' AS BRANCHOFFICE --지점명 ,'UNKNOWN' AS ISSUEORGNAME --발행은행명 ,'ZZZZZZ' AS ISSUEORGNAMECODE --발행은행코드 ,'UNKNOWN' AS ISSUEBRANCHOFFICE --발행영업점명 ,'0' ISSUEAMOUNT -- 수표금액 ,B.DL_DT ISSUEDATE -- 수표발행일자 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M055', B.ENDRS_P_KND_CD) AS ISSUERDIV ,'3' ISSUERDIVCODE -- 배서자종류코드 ,TRIM(D.RNMCNO) AS REALNUMBER -- 배서자실명번호 ,TRIM(D.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE -- 배서자실명번호 구분 ,(SELECT J.CS_CI_NO FROM NIC01B J WHERE J.RNMCNO = C.DL_P_RNMCNO AND J.RNM_CNFR_CCD = '14' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS CINUMBER -- CI번호(2020.07.23 추가) FROM NIC75B A ,NIC77B B ,NIC66B C ,NIC70B D WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO AND A.GDS_NO = B.GDS_NO AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ AND B.SCRTS_BLL_TYP_CD IN ('03', '04', '99') AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.DL_P_RNMCNO = D.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.GDS_NO = #{GDS_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} UNION SELECT TRIM(NVL(A.DL_WY_CD, '99')) AS SECURITIESTYPECODE --수표종류코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M052', TRIM(NVL(A.DL_WY_CD, '99'))) AS SECURITIESTYPE ,SUBSTR(TRIM(NVL('999999999999999', '')), 0, 15) AS SECURITIESNUMBER --수표시작번호,수표끝번호 ,'대한민국증권' AS ORGNAME --금융기관명 ,'KR9999' AS ORGNAMECODE --금융기관코드 , NVL(A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM, 'UNKNOWN') AS BRANCHOFFICE --지점명 ,'UNKNOWN' AS ISSUEORGNAME --발행은행명 ,'ZZZZZZ' AS ISSUEORGNAMECODE --발행은행코드 ,'UNKNOWN' AS ISSUEBRANCHOFFICE --발행영업점명 ,TRIM(A.DL_AMT) AS ISSUEAMOUNT --수표금액 ,A.DL_DT AS ISSUEDATE --수표발행일자 ,'최종소지인' AS ISSUERDIV --발행인/최종소지인구분 ,'3' AS ISSUERDIVCODE --배서자종류코드 ,TRIM(C.RNMCNO) AS REALNUMBER -- 배서자실명번호 ,TRIM(C.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD) AS REALNUMBERCODE -- 배서자실명번호 구분 ,(SELECT J.CS_CI_NO FROM NIC01B J WHERE J.RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND J.RNM_CNFR_CCD = '14' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS CINUMBER -- CI번호(2020.07.23 추가) FROM NIC75B A , NIC66B B , NIC70B C WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.DL_P_RNMCNO = C.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.GDS_NO = #{GDS_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} AND ( TRIM(NVL(A.DL_WY_CD, '99')) IN ('02', '04', '08') /*수표, 채권, 기타유가증권*/ OR TRIM(NVL(A.DL_TYP_CD, '99')) IN ('16', '17', '22', '23') /*수표지급(발행),지급(발행)*/ )

SELECT A.DL_TYP_CD AS TRANSTYPECODE -- 거래종류코드 , GET_CODE_NAME('M045',A.DL_TYP_CD) AS TRANSTYPE -- 거래종류명 , B.PRDT_NAME AS STOCKNAME -- 매매종목명 , DECODE(A.DL_Q, 0 ,1, A.DL_Q) AS QUANTITY -- 매매수량 , TRIM(C.TRNS_OGN_CD) AS ORGNAMECODE , TRIM(C.RPR_OGN_NM) AS ORGNAME , NVL(A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM, 'UNKNOWN') AS BRANCHOFFICE , NVL((SELECT SUBSTR(TRIM(KFB_DPRT_CD), 0,7) FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD), 'ZZZZZZZ') AS BRANCHOFFICECODE , NVL(A.HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO, '999999') AS BRANCHOFFICEZIPCODE FROM NIC75B A, SID.IDO_A_UUP_PRODUCT B, NIC86B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} AND A.ISUS_PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID(+)

SELECT A.DL_TYP_CD AS DL_TYP_CD -- 거래종류코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M045', A.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_NM -- 거래종류명 ,NVL(B.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD, 'KR9999') AS CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD -- 상대대체기관코드(자사대체등) 금융기관 코드 ,NVL(B.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM, '대한민국증권') AS CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM -- 상대대체금융기관명 ,NVL((SELECT SUBSTR(NVL(I.KFB_DPRT_CD, I.DPRT_CD), 0, 7) FROM NIC41B I WHERE I.DPRT_CD = A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD ), '3257012' ) AS HANDLNG_BRN_CD -- 취급지점코드 ,NVL((SELECT RPAD(TRIM(J.DPRT_POST_NO), 6, 0) FROM NIC41B J WHERE J.DPRT_CD = A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD ), '04538' ) AS HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO -- 취급지점우편번호 ,NVL(FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD, ''), '골드센터영업부') AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM -- 취급지점명 ,'' AS STBD_CODE -- 종목코드 ,'' AS STBD_NM -- 종목명 ,CASE WHEN ( C.DL_SQ BETWEEN 500000 AND 599999 OR C.DL_SQ >= 700000) THEN 0 --MTH_QTY ELSE 0 --C.TRD_QTY END AS DEAL_FLUC_QTY -- 매매수량 ,A.SSPS_DL_ID AS SSPS_DL_ID -- 혐의거래 ID FROM NIC75B A ,NIC83B B ,NIC61B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.GDS_NO = B.GDS_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO (+) AND A.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO (+) AND A.DL_DT = C.DL_DT (+) AND A.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ (+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.GDS_NO = #{GDS_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} AND A.DL_TYP_CD IN ('10', '11', '12', '13', '14', '15') /*매수,매도,입고,출고,대체입고,대체출고*/ ORDER BY A.GNL_AC_NO ,A.DL_DT ,A.DL_TM ,A.DL_SQ

SELECT A.SSPS_DL_ID ,A.INSR_JAMT AS AMOUNT -- 보험가입금액NEED ,CASE WHEN C.LG_AMT_ASTS_F = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ISHIGHASSET -- 고가의 자산여부 ,A.GDS_OPN_DT AS CONTRACTDATE -- 계약일NEED ,A.EXPR_DATE AS MATURITYDATE -- 만기일NEED ,A.PREM_PYMD_DVCD AS CHARGEMETHOD_CD -- 보험료납입방법코드-NEED ,GET_CODE_NAME('M067', A.PREM_PYMD_DVCD) AS CHARGEMETHOD_NM -- 보험료납입방법명 FROM NIC71B A ,NIC66B B ,NIC78B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND B.DL_P_RNMCNO = C.DL_P_RNMCNO (+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.GDS_NO = #{GDS_NO}

SELECT TRNS_OGN_CD ORGNAMECODE , RPR_OGN_NM ORGNAME , NVL(TRIM(FIU_USER_ID), RPR_CHRG_P_ENO) MAINAUTHORUSERID , RPR_CHRG_P_NM MAINAUTHOR , RPR_RSPSB_P_NM MANAGER , RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO PHONE , DECODE(LENGTH(NVL(RPR_ORG_PST_NO, '99999')), 0, '99999', 5, RPR_ORG_PST_NO, '99999') ADDRESSZIPCODE , RPR_ORG_ADDR AS ADDRESS, --주소(자택) RPR_ORG_EMAIL EMAIL , ( SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = RPR_CHRG_P_ENO ) AS MAINAUTHORRANKNAME FROM NIC86B

SELECT TRNS_OGN_CD AS ORGNAMECODE ,RPR_OGN_NM AS ORGNAME ,RPR_CHRG_P_ENO AS MAINAUTHORUSERID ,RPR_CHRG_P_NM AS MAINAUTHOR ,RPR_RSPSB_P_NM AS MANAGER ,RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO AS PHONE ,NVL(RPR_ORG_PST_NO, '99999') AS ADDRESSZIPCODE ,RPR_ORG_ADDR AS ADDRESS ,RPR_ORG_EMAIL AS EMAIL ,RPR_CHRG_P_NM AS MAINAUTHORRANKNAME FROM NIC86B

SELECT TRIM(C.SND_RCPT_DOC_NO) AS FIUDOCNUM /* 보고번호 금융기관코드 + YYYYMM + 순번(5)*/ ,TRIM(C.SND_RCPT_DOC_NO) AS ORGDOCNUM /* 작성번호 금융기관코드 + YY + 순번(4)*/ ,TRIM(C.SND_BEFORE_RCPT_DOC_NO) AS FORMERFIUDOCNUM /* 종전 보고문서번호 */ ,'' AS FORMERORGDOCNUM /* 종전 작성번호 */ ,MIN(B.DL_DT) AS STARTDATE /* 거래시작일 */ ,MAX(B.DL_DT) AS ENDDATE /* 거래종료일*/
,(SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 999 THEN 999 ELSE COUNT(*) END FROM NIC75B I WHERE I.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01', '04', '08', '12', '14', '20') AND I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) AS INNERCOUNT /* 입금횟수*/ ,(SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 999 THEN 999 ELSE COUNT(*) END FROM NIC75B J WHERE J.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02', '05', '09', '13', '15', '21', '25', '26', '27', '28', '29', '30') AND J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND J.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) AS OUTERCOUNT /* 출금횟수*/
,(SELECT NVL(SUM(K.DL_AMT), '0') FROM NIC75B K WHERE K.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01', '04', '08', '12', '14', '20') AND K.CRNCY_CD = #{CRNCY_CD} AND K.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND K.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) AS INNERKRWAMOUNT /* 입금원화금액*/ ,(SELECT NVL(SUM(L.DL_AMT), '0') FROM NIC75B L WHERE L.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02', '05', '09', '13', '15', '21', '25', '26', '27') AND L.CRNCY_CD = #{CRNCY_CD} AND L.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND L.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) AS OUTERKRWAMOUNT /* 출금원화금액*/ ,(SELECT NVL(SUM(M.USD_EXCH_AMT), '0') FROM NIC75B M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01', '04', '08', '12', '14', '20') AND M.CRNCY_CD = 'USD' AND M.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND M.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) AS INNERUSDAMOUNT /* 입금달러화금액*/ ,(SELECT NVL(SUM(N.USD_EXCH_AMT), '0') FROM NIC75B N WHERE N.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02', '05', '09', '13', '15', '21', '28', '29', '30') AND N.CRNCY_CD = 'USD' AND N.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND N.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) AS OUTERUSDAMOUNT /* 출금달러화금액 */ ,COUNT(*) AS COUNT /* 거래건수 */ ,(SELECT NVL(SUM(O.DL_AMT), '0') FROM NIC75B O WHERE O.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01', '04', '08', '12', '14', '20', '02', '05', '09', '13', '15', '21', '25', '26', '27') AND O.CRNCY_CD = #{CRNCY_CD} AND O.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND O.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) AS KRWAMOUNT /* 입출금원화금액*/ ,(SELECT NVL(SUM(P.USD_EXCH_AMT), '0') FROM NIC75B P WHERE P.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01', '04', '08', '12', '14', '20', '02', '05', '09', '13', '15', '21', '28', '29', '30') AND P.CRNCY_CD = 'USD' AND P.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND P.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) AS USDAMOUNT /* 입출금달러화금액*/ ,LPAD(A.RPR_CCD, '2', '0') AS MESSAGETYPECODE /* 보고구분 */ ,C.RPR_DT AS DOCSENDDATE /* 보고일자 */ ,(SELECT Q.PROC_FALG FROM NIC80B_LOG Q WHERE Q.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND Q.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID AND Q.SQ = (SELECT MAX(X.SQ) FROM NIC80B_LOG X WHERE X.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = Q.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND X.SSPS_DL_ID = Q.SSPS_DL_ID ) ) AS MAX_PROC_FALG /* 0: 정상, 1: 오류, '': 로그없음 */ FROM NIC66B A ,NIC75B B ,NIC80B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} GROUP BY A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ,A.RPR_CCD /* 혐의거래보고구분코드 */ ,C.RPR_DT /* 보고일자 */ ,C.SND_RCPT_DOC_NO ,C.SND_BEFORE_RCPT_DOC_NO

SELECT A.* ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(BSNSG_FNDTN_DT) AS BSNSG_FNDTN_DT_1 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M030', A.CORP_CCD) AS CORP_CCD_NM -- 법인구분 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M031', A.LSTNG_CLSF_DMSTC_CD) AS LSTNG_CLSF_DMSTC_CD_NM -- 상장구분-국내 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M032', A.LSTNG_CLSF_ABRD_CD) AS LSTNG_CLSF_ABRD_CD_NM -- 상장구분-국외 ,GET_CODE_NAME((CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1', '2') THEN 'A022' ELSE 'A023' END), A.EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD ) AS EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD_NM -- 예상거래입금횟수코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME((CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1', '2') THEN 'A022' ELSE 'A023' END), A.EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD ) AS EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD_NM -- 예상거래출금횟수코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME((CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD = '1' THEN 'A016' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD = '2' THEN 'A017' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD = '3' THEN 'A018' ELSE 'A019' END), A.DL_OBJ_CD) AS DL_OBJ_CD_NM -- 거래목적명 ,GET_CODE_NAME((CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD = '1' THEN 'A013' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD = '2' THEN 'A014' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD = '3' THEN 'A015' ELSE '' END), A.FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD) AS FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD_NM ,B.EMAIL FROM VIC03B A ,VIC01B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO

SELECT A.RNMCNO -- 실명확인번호 ,A.MAIN_ACTN_ZONE_NM -- 주요활동지역 ,A.CMPNY_ORGNZTN_AND_STRCT_CNTNT -- 회사체계및구조내용 ,A.FNDTN_OBJ_NM -- 설립목적명 ,A.OTR_NPRFT_OGN_CNCT_RLTNS_CNTNT -- 타비영리기관협력관계내용 ,A.CRNBTN_P_INFO -- 기부자정보 ,A.BNFCR_INFO -- 수익자정보 ,A.FNDS_FND_OPRT_EXCT_INFO -- 자금펀드운영집행정보 FROM NIC12B A WHERE A.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO}

SELECT A.RNMCNO -- 실명확인번호 ,A.STKHD_CCD -- 주주구분코드 ,A.SQ -- 일련번호 ,A.STKHD_NM -- 주주명 ,A.QTA_R -- 지분율 ,A.RNM_CNFR_CCD AS STKHD_RNM_CNFR_CCD -- 실명확인구분코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', A.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS STKHD_RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM -- 실명번호구분명 ,A.STKHD_RNMCNO -- 주주실명확인번호 ,A.PST_NO -- 우편번호 ,A.ADDR AS STKHD_ADDR -- 주소 ,A.TEL_NO AS STKHD_TEL_NO -- 연락처 ,A.NTNLT_CD -- 국적코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004', A.NTNLT_CD) AS STKHD_NTNLT_CD_NM -- 국적명 FROM NIC15B A WHERE A.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO}

SELECT DISTINCT '0' AS SELECTED , T1.SSPS_DL_ID AS SSPS_DL_ID_F , GET_SYNARIO_NAME(T1.SSPS_TYP_CD) AS SSPS_TYP_NM , CASE WHEN T1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' THEN D.ACT_NAME ELSE GET_CODE_NAME('A029',T1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD) END AS ACT_NAME , T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , T1.SSPS_DL_ID , CASE WHEN T1.M_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT IS NULL OR T1.M_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT='' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS M_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT FROM NIC66B T1 , (SELECT A.INST_ID, C.ACT_NAME FROM WF_PROC_INSTANCE A , WF_WORKLIST B , WF_ACT C WHERE A.WORK_ID = B.WORK_ID AND B.ACT_ID = C.ACT_ID) D WHERE T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR', 'KYC') AND T1.INST_ID = D.INST_ID AND T1.OK_CCD = '0' AND T1.SSPS_TYP_CD NOT IN (SELECT C.MA01_6 FROM C_BIZ A LEFT OUTER JOIN MMA010TB C ON ( A.BIZ_ID=C.RT30_1) , C_PKG_BIZ_MAP B WHERE B.PKG_ID = '6' AND A.BIZ_ID=B.BIZ_ID AND B.PAR_BIZ_ID='6318' AND A.EDIT_YN = 'Y') AND T1.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO} AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID != #{SSPS_DL_ID} UNION SELECT DISTINCT '0' AS SELECTED , T1.SSPS_DL_ID AS SSPS_DL_ID_F , GET_SYNARIO_NAME(T1.SSPS_TYP_CD) AS SSPS_TYP_NM , V1.ACT_NAME , T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , T1.SSPS_DL_ID , CASE WHEN T1.M_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT IS NULL OR T1.M_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT='' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS M_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT FROM NIC66B T1 , ( SELECT A.ACT_NAME , D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , D.SSPS_DL_ID FROM V_WF_STANDBY A , NIC66B D WHERE ((A.PERSON_YN='Y' AND A.PARTICIPANT_ID = #{USER_ID}) OR (A.PERSON_YN='N' AND A.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE AA, C_USER BB WHERE AA.USER_ID= #{USER_ID} AND AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID = #{DPT_ROLE} ) ) ) AND D.M_INST_ID = A.PAR_INST_ID AND D.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '9' AND D.XCL_RSN_CNTNT = '병합처리' ) V1 WHERE T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR', 'KYC') AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = V1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = V1.SSPS_DL_ID AND T1.OK_CCD = '2' AND T1.SSPS_TYP_CD NOT IN (SELECT C.MA01_6 FROM C_BIZ A LEFT OUTER JOIN MMA010TB C ON ( A.BIZ_ID=C.RT30_1) , C_PKG_BIZ_MAP B WHERE B.PKG_ID = '6' AND A.BIZ_ID=B.BIZ_ID AND B.PAR_BIZ_ID='6318' AND A.EDIT_YN = 'Y') AND T1.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO} AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND T1.M_SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} ORDER BY SSPS_DL_ID_F
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC66B SET RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '9' --완료 ,OK_CCD = '2' --보고제외 ,M_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_MASTER} --PARAM ,M_SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID_MASTER} --PARAM ,M_INST_ID = INST_ID ,INST_ID = 0 ,XCL_RSN_CNTNT = '병합처리 (' || #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_MASTER} || ' ' || #{SSPS_DL_ID_MASTER} || ' ' || #{DL_P_NM_MASTER} || ')' --PARAM WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} --PARAM AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} --PARAM

INSERT INTO NIC71B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,GNL_AC_NO ,AC_OPN_DT ,OPN_BRN_CD ,AC_OPN_BRN_NM ,MN_DL_DPRT_CD ,MN_DL_DPRT_NM ,AC_OPN_BRN_PST_NO ,AC_OPN_PRXY_F ,AC_OPN_OBJ_CCD ,STAT_DATE ,STAT_CD ,GOOD_CODE_DTAL ,GOOD_CODE_ITEM ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,RNMCNO ,CS_NM ,MERGE_YN ,AC_TY_CD ,PRFT_BRN_CD ,PRFT_BRN_NM ,ACNT_NO ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_MASTER} --원본PARAM ,#{SSPS_DL_ID_MASTER} --원본PARAM ,GNL_AC_NO ,AC_OPN_DT ,OPN_BRN_CD ,AC_OPN_BRN_NM ,MN_DL_DPRT_CD ,MN_DL_DPRT_NM ,AC_OPN_BRN_PST_NO ,AC_OPN_PRXY_F ,AC_OPN_OBJ_CCD ,STAT_DATE ,STAT_CD ,GOOD_CODE_DTAL ,GOOD_CODE_ITEM ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,RNMCNO ,CS_NM ,'Y' -- MERGE_YN ,AC_TY_CD ,PRFT_BRN_CD ,PRFT_BRN_NM ,ACNT_NO FROM NIC71B A WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM NIC71B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_MASTER} --원본PARAM AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID_MASTER} --원본PARAM AND GNL_AC_NO = A.GNL_AC_NO) --동일건이 있으면 제외

INSERT INTO NIC72B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,AGNC_EXTNT_CD ,SQ ,PRXY_NM ,PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD ,PRXY_RNMCNO ,PRXY_CNTY_NATI_CRYP ,PRXY_CNTY_AREA_CRYP ,PRXY_CNTY_ECNO_CRYP ,PRXY_CNTY_NO_CRYP ,PRXY_NTNLT_CD ,PRXY_NTNLT_NM ,AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,MERGE_YN ,PRXY_CS_NO ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_MASTER} --원본PARAM ,#{SSPS_DL_ID_MASTER} --원본PARAM ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,AGNC_EXTNT_CD ,SQ ,PRXY_NM ,PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD ,PRXY_RNMCNO ,PRXY_CNTY_NATI_CRYP ,PRXY_CNTY_AREA_CRYP ,PRXY_CNTY_ECNO_CRYP ,PRXY_CNTY_NO_CRYP ,PRXY_NTNLT_CD ,PRXY_NTNLT_NM ,AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,'Y' --MERGE YN ,PRXY_CS_NO FROM NIC72B A WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM NIC72B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_MASTER} --원본PARAM AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID_MASTER} --원본PARAM AND GNL_AC_NO = A.GNL_AC_NO) --동일건이 있으면 제외

INSERT INTO NIC75B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,DL_TM ,STR_DL_KND_CD ,CTR_DL_KND_CD ,DL_KND_NM ,DL_WY_CD ,DL_WY_NM ,DL_CHNNL_CD ,DL_CHNNL_NM ,SMRY_TYP_CD ,SMRY_TYP_NM ,DL_UPRC ,DL_Q ,DL_AMT ,EC_AMT ,CRNCY_CD ,FCRNCY_DL_AMT ,USD_EXCH_AMT ,FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD ,FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD_NM ,DL_TYP_CD ,CSH ,CHCK_AMT ,STND_IS_CD ,STND_IS_CD_NM ,CSH_PY_FOGN_NM ,CSH_PY_FOGN_CD ,CSH_PY_BRN_NM ,CSH_PY_BRN_CD ,CSH_PY_BRN_PST_NO ,CNCT_AC_NO ,SCRTS_BLNC ,TFND_RA ,RCVBL_AMT_RA ,FNCNG_AND_SL_AMT ,HANDLNG_BRN_CD ,HANDLNG_BRN_NM ,HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO ,CRCT_CCD ,CHRG_P_RPR_ST_CCD ,CHRG_P_ENO ,CHRG_P_NM ,RPR_TRGT_XCL_DL_CCD ,BNK_BRN_CD ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,OGN_CD ,LN_AMT ,LN_INT_AMT ,I_AMT_P_NM ,I_AMT_P_RNM_NO ,I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,I_AMT_P_TEL_NO ,MERGE_YN ,GDS_DIT_CD ,TRDG_CODE ,DTLS_TRDG_NAME ,FUNS_SCRS_CODE ,TRTY_DTLS_CODE ,ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE ,PRDT_CLSN_CODE ,SERV_CLSN_CODE ,ISUS_PRDT_ID ,RLTV_ACNT_ID ,RNMCNO ,MNGG_BRN_CD ,PRFT_BRN_CD ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_MASTER} --원본PARAM ,#{SSPS_DL_ID_MASTER} --원본PARAM ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,DL_TM ,STR_DL_KND_CD ,CTR_DL_KND_CD ,DL_KND_NM ,DL_WY_CD ,DL_WY_NM ,DL_CHNNL_CD ,DL_CHNNL_NM ,SMRY_TYP_CD ,SMRY_TYP_NM ,DL_UPRC ,DL_Q ,DL_AMT ,EC_AMT ,CRNCY_CD ,FCRNCY_DL_AMT ,USD_EXCH_AMT ,FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD ,FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD_NM ,DL_TYP_CD ,CSH ,CHCK_AMT ,STND_IS_CD ,STND_IS_CD_NM ,CSH_PY_FOGN_NM ,CSH_PY_FOGN_CD ,CSH_PY_BRN_NM ,CSH_PY_BRN_CD ,CSH_PY_BRN_PST_NO ,CNCT_AC_NO ,SCRTS_BLNC ,TFND_RA ,RCVBL_AMT_RA ,FNCNG_AND_SL_AMT ,HANDLNG_BRN_CD ,HANDLNG_BRN_NM ,HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO ,CRCT_CCD ,CHRG_P_RPR_ST_CCD ,CHRG_P_ENO ,CHRG_P_NM ,RPR_TRGT_XCL_DL_CCD ,BNK_BRN_CD ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,OGN_CD ,LN_AMT ,LN_INT_AMT ,I_AMT_P_NM ,I_AMT_P_RNM_NO ,I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,I_AMT_P_TEL_NO ,'Y' ,GDS_DIT_CD ,TRDG_CODE ,DTLS_TRDG_NAME ,FUNS_SCRS_CODE ,TRTY_DTLS_CODE ,ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE ,PRDT_CLSN_CODE ,SERV_CLSN_CODE ,ISUS_PRDT_ID ,RLTV_ACNT_ID ,RNMCNO ,MNGG_BRN_CD ,PRFT_BRN_CD FROM NIC75B A WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} --병합PARAM AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} --병합PARAM AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM NIC75B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_MASTER} --원본PARAM AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID_MASTER} --원본PARAM AND GNL_AC_NO = A.GNL_AC_NO AND DL_DT = A.DL_DT AND DL_SQ = A.DL_SQ ) --동일건이 있으면 제외

INSERT INTO NIC76B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,CHCK_STRT_NO ,CHCK_END_NO ,ISNG_BNK_CD ,ISNG_BNK_NM ,BLL_TYP_AMT ,CHCK_AMT ,CHCK_ISNG_DT ,CHCK_KND_CD ,IO_CCD ,CHCK_B ,CNCL_F ,ENDRS_P_F ,ENDRS_P_KND_CD ,ENDRS_P_NM ,ENDRS_P_RNM_NO ,ENDRS_P_TEL_NO ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,MERGE_YN ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_MASTER} --원본PARAM ,#{SSPS_DL_ID_MASTER} --원본PARAM ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,CHCK_STRT_NO ,CHCK_END_NO ,ISNG_BNK_CD ,ISNG_BNK_NM ,BLL_TYP_AMT ,CHCK_AMT ,CHCK_ISNG_DT ,CHCK_KND_CD ,IO_CCD ,CHCK_B ,CNCL_F ,ENDRS_P_F ,ENDRS_P_KND_CD ,ENDRS_P_NM ,ENDRS_P_RNM_NO ,ENDRS_P_TEL_NO ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,'Y' FROM NIC76B A WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} --병합PARAM AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} --병합PARAM AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM NIC76B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_MASTER} --원본PARAM AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID_MASTER} --원본PARAM AND GNL_AC_NO = A.GNL_AC_NO AND DL_DT = A.DL_DT AND DL_SQ = A.DL_SQ ) --동일건이 있으면 제외

INSERT INTO NIC77B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,STRT_SCRT_NO ,END_SCRT_NO ,ISNG_SQC ,SCRTS_BLL_TYP_CD ,SCRTS_Q ,ENDRS_P_F ,ENDRS_P_KND_CD ,ENDRS_P_NM ,ENDRS_P_RNM_NO ,ENDRS_P_TEL_NO ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,MERGE_YN ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_MASTER} --원본PARAM ,#{SSPS_DL_ID_MASTER} --원본PARAM ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,STRT_SCRT_NO ,END_SCRT_NO ,ISNG_SQC ,SCRTS_BLL_TYP_CD ,SCRTS_Q ,ENDRS_P_F ,ENDRS_P_KND_CD ,ENDRS_P_NM ,ENDRS_P_RNM_NO ,ENDRS_P_TEL_NO ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,'Y' FROM NIC77B A WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} --병합PARAM AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} --병합PARAM AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM NIC77B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_MASTER} --원본PARAM AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID_MASTER} --원본PARAM AND GNL_AC_NO = A.GNL_AC_NO AND DL_DT = A.DL_DT AND DL_SQ = A.DL_SQ ) --동일건이 있으면 제외

INSERT INTO NIC83B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_PST_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_OBJ_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_OBJ_CNTNT ,CPRTY_TRSNS_OPN_PRXY_F ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_DT ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CLSF_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_BRTDY ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_PST_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_ADDR ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_TEL_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_MBL_TEL_NO ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,MERGE_YN ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_MASTER} --원본PARAM ,#{SSPS_DL_ID_MASTER} --원본PARAM ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_PST_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_OBJ_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_OBJ_CNTNT ,CPRTY_TRSNS_OPN_PRXY_F ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_DT ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CLSF_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_BRTDY ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_PST_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_ADDR ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_TEL_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_MBL_TEL_NO ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,'Y' FROM NIC83B A WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} --병합PARAM AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} --병합PARAM AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM NIC83B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_MASTER} --원본PARAM AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID_MASTER} --원본PARAM AND GNL_AC_NO = A.GNL_AC_NO AND DL_DT = A.DL_DT AND DL_SQ = A.DL_SQ ) --동일건이 있으면 제외

INSERT INTO NIC98B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,PRXY_NM ,PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD ,PRXY_RNMCNO ,PRXY_TEL_NO ,PRXY_NTNLT_CD ,PRXY_NTNLT_NM ,AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD ,CHBF_RNMCNO ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,MERGE_YN ,PRXY_CS_NO ,PRXY_NATI ,PRXY_AREA ,PRXY_ECNO ,PRXY_NO ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_MASTER} --원본PARAM ,#{SSPS_DL_ID_MASTER} --원본PARAM ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,PRXY_NM ,PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD ,PRXY_RNMCNO ,PRXY_TEL_NO ,PRXY_NTNLT_CD ,PRXY_NTNLT_NM ,AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD ,CHBF_RNMCNO ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,'Y' ,PRXY_CS_NO ,PRXY_NATI ,PRXY_AREA ,PRXY_ECNO ,PRXY_NO FROM NIC98B A WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} --병합PARAM AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} --병합PARAM AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM NIC98B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_MASTER} --원본PARAM AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID_MASTER} --원본PARAM AND GNL_AC_NO = A.GNL_AC_NO AND DL_DT = A.DL_DT AND DL_SQ = A.DL_SQ ) --동일건이 있으면 제외

DELETE FROM NIC83B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_MASTER} --원본PARAM AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID_MASTER} --원본PARAM AND MERGE_YN = 'Y'
DELETE FROM NIC98B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_MASTER} --원본PARAM AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID_MASTER} --원본PARAM AND MERGE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT '0' AS SELECTED , A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || '-' || A.SSPS_DL_ID AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A , GET_CODE_NAME('A101', A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD) AS SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD_VIEW , C.MN_DL_BRN_CD AS HANDLNG_BRN_CD , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', C.MN_DL_BRN_CD, '') AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM , B.CS_NM AS DL_P_NM , A.DL_P_RNMCNO , GET_CODE_NAME('M002', B.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD_NM , A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , A.SSPS_DL_ID , A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD , A.INST_ID , CASE WHEN A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' THEN D.ACT_NAME ELSE GET_CODE_NAME('A029', A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD) END AS ACT_NAME , GET_CODE_NAME('A301', (NVL(A.OK_CCD, '0'))) AS OK_CCD_NM , C.RPR_PRGRS_CCD AS RPR_PRGRS_CCD , D.WORK_ID , D.PARTICIPANT_ID , SUBSTR(D.PARTICIPANT_ID, 1, INSTR(D.PARTICIPANT_ID, '.') - 1) AS PARTICIPANT_DPT , SUBSTR(D.PARTICIPANT_ID, INSTR(D.PARTICIPANT_ID, '.') + 1, LENGTH(D.PARTICIPANT_ID) - INSTR(D.PARTICIPANT_ID, '.')) AS PARTICIPANT_RULE FROM NIC66B A , NIC01B B , NIC73B C , V_WF_STANDBY D , C_DEP_INFO E WHERE A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.INST_ID = D.PAR_INST_ID AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL AND C.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = 0 AND ( 1 = #{branchCodeYN} OR SUBSTR(D.PARTICIPANT_ID, 1, INSTR(D.PARTICIPANT_ID, '.') - 1) IN (SELECT I.DEP_ID FROM C_DEP_INFO I WHERE I.DEP_DESC = #{branchCode} ) ) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate} AND ( 1 = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD_YN} OR A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD} ) AND D.PERSON_YN = 'N' AND C.MN_DL_BRN_CD = E.DEP_DESC AND E.DEP_ID = SUBSTR(D.PARTICIPANT_ID, 1, INSTR(D.PARTICIPANT_ID, '.') - 1) ORDER BY A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT DESC ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS T_CNT ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD NOT IN (9,99) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS C_CNT ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = 9 AND A.OK_CCD = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS F_CNT FROM NIC66B A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = (SELECT B.DL_P_RNMCNO FROM NIC66B B WHERE B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} )

SELECT '' AS SELECTED ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', A.BSMN_RNO, '') AS BSMN_RNO_VIEW ,A.BSMN_RNO AS BSMN_RNO ,A.RPRST_OGN_NM AS CS_NM ,A.DTLS_OGN_NM ,TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS HNDL_DY_TM ,A.APP_YN ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY HNDL_DY_TM) AS ROW_NUM FROM NIC87B A WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.BSMN_RNO LIKE '%' || #{BSMN_RNO} || '%'
AND ( A.RPRST_OGN_NM LIKE '%' || #{CS_NM} || '%' OR A.DTLS_OGN_NM LIKE '%' || #{CS_NM} || '%' )
ORDER BY HNDL_DY_TM

SELECT T1.* FROM (SELECT A.INST_ID ,A.PAR_INST_ID ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.INST_ID ORDER BY A.INST_ID, D.RPR_P_DY_TM DESC) AS RN ,A.INST_START_DT AS REQ_DT ,B.WORK_ID ,CASE WHEN INST_STATUS_CD = 'FINISHED' THEN '결재완료' ELSE C.ACT_NAME END AS ACT_NAME ,D.MN_DL_BRN_CD ,CASE WHEN INST_STATUS_CD = 'FINISHED' THEN 'F' ELSE D.RPR_PRGRS_CCD END AS APPROVE_STATUS ,D.DPRT_CD ,D.RPR_P_ENO ,D.RPR_P_NM AS REQ_NM ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(D.RPR_P_DY_TM, 'yyyymmddhh24miss'), 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AS APPROVE_DT ,D.CNTNT FROM WF_PROC_INSTANCE A ,WF_WORKLIST B ,WF_ACT C ,NIC87B_W D WHERE A.PROC_ID = 53 AND A.WORK_ID = B.WORK_ID AND B.ACT_ID = C.ACT_ID AND A.INST_ID = D.INST_ID
AND D.INST_ID = #{INST_ID}
AND D.RPR_P_DY_TM BETWEEN #{FROM_DATE} ||'000000' AND #{TO_DATE} || '999999'
AND D.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = 'A'
AND D.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = 'D'
AND D.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = 'R'
AND A.INST_STATUS_CD = 'FINISHED'
) T1 WHERE T1.RN = 1 ORDER BY T1.INST_ID DESC

SELECT ROWNUM AS SEQ ,T1.* FROM (SELECT T2.* FROM (SELECT D.ACT_NAME AS ACT_NAME ,A.DPRT_NM ,A.RPR_P_NM ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', A.RPR_P_DY_TM, '') AS RPR_P_DY_TM ,A.CNTNT ,A.WORK_ID ,CASE WHEN B.INST_STATUS_CD = 'FINISHED' THEN 'F' ELSE A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD END AS OK_CCD FROM NIC87B_W A ,WF_PROC_INSTANCE B ,WF_WORKLIST C ,WF_ACT D WHERE A.PAR_INST_ID = #{INST_ID} AND A.INST_ID = B.INST_ID AND A.WORK_ID = C.WORK_ID AND C.ACT_ID = D.ACT_ID
UNION ALL
SELECT G.ACT_NAME ,E.DEP_TITLE ,F.USER_NM ,NULL ,'' ,H.WORK_ID ,(CASE WHEN ( H.WORK_STATUS_CD = 'READY' OR H.WORK_STATUS_CD = 'ACTIVE' ) THEN 'A' WHEN H.WORK_STATUS_CD = 'RETURNED' THEN 'R' WHEN H.WORK_STATUS_CD = 'FINISHED' THEN 'F' ELSE 'D' END ) AS OK_CCD FROM C_DEP_INFO E ,C_USER F ,WF_ACT G ,WF_WORKLIST H ,WF_WORK_PARTICIPANT I LEFT OUTER JOIN WF_WORK_PERFORMER J ON ( I.WORK_ID = J.WORK_ID AND I.PARTICIPANT_ID = J.PERFORMER_ID ) ,WF_PROC_INSTANCE K WHERE E.DEP_ID=F.DEP_ID AND F.USER_ID IN (SELECT X.USER_ID FROM C_USER X , C_USER_GROUP_ROLE Y WHERE X.USER_ID = Y.USER_ID AND ( X.DEP_ID || '.' || Y.ROLE_ID = I.PARTICIPANT_ID OR TO_NUMBER(X.USER_ID) = TO_NUMBER(I.PARTICIPANT_ID) ) ) AND J.WORK_ID IS NULL AND H.ACT_ID = G.ACT_ID AND H.WORK_ID = I.WORK_ID AND H.WORK_STATUS_CD IN ('READY', 'ACTIVE') AND K.PAR_INST_ID = #{INST_ID} AND K.INST_ID = H.INST_ID AND H.WORK_ID = K.WORK_ID ) T2 ORDER BY T2.WORK_ID ) T1

SELECT A.INST_ID ,A.BSMN_RNO ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', A.BSMN_RNO, '') AS BSMN_RNO_VIEW ,A.RPRST_OGN_NM AS CS_NM ,A.DTLS_OGN_NM ,A.REQ_TYPE AS IDU ,A.HNDL_DY_TM ,A.HNDL_P_ENO ,A.REQ_ID ,A.REQ_DT ,A.APP_YN FROM NIC87B_HIST A WHERE A.INST_ID = #{INST_ID}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO NIC87B A USING (SELECT C.BSMN_RNO ,C.RPRST_OGN_NM ,C.DTLS_OGN_NM ,C.HNDL_DY_TM ,C.HNDL_P_ENO FROM NIC87B_HIST C WHERE C.INST_ID = #{INST_ID} ) B ON (A.BSMN_RNO = B.BSMN_RNO) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.RPRST_OGN_NM = B.RPRST_OGN_NM ,A.DTLS_OGN_NM = B.DTLS_OGN_NM ,A.HNDL_DY_TM = SYSDATE ,A.HNDL_P_ENO = B.HNDL_P_ENO ,A.APP_YN = 'Y' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BSMN_RNO ,RPRST_OGN_NM ,DTLS_OGN_NM ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,APP_YN ) VALUES ( B.BSMN_RNO ,B.RPRST_OGN_NM ,B.DTLS_OGN_NM ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,B.HNDL_P_ENO ,'Y' )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM NIC87B
mapper.select: SELECT A.FILE_POS AS FILE_PATH ,A.USER_FILE_NM AS FILE_NM ,A.USER_FILE_NM AS USER_FILE_NM ,A.PHSC_FILE_NM AS PHSC_FILE_NM ,A.FILE_SEQ FROM NIC64B A WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

SELECT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ,A.FILE_SEQ ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD ,A.FILE_POS ,A.USER_FILE_NM AS FILE_NM ,A.PHSC_FILE_NM ,A.FILE_SIZE ,A.DOWNLOAD_COUNT ,A.REG_ID ,A.REG_DT FROM NIC64B A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(A.ITEM_CNTNT1, '<|>|"|&|''', '_') AS CWHO /* 항목내용1 */ ,A.ITEM_CNTNT2 AS CWHEN /* 항목내용2 */ ,A.ITEM_CNTNT3 AS CWHERE /* 항목내용3 */ ,A.ITEM_CNTNT4 AS CWHAT /* 항목내용4 */ ,REGEXP_REPLACE(A.ITEM_CNTNT5, '<|>|"|&|''', '_') AS CHOW /* 항목내용5 */ ,REGEXP_REPLACE(A.ITEM_CNTNT6, '<|>|"|&|''', '_') AS CWHY /* 항목내용6 */ ,REGEXP_REPLACE(A.RPR_RSN_CNTNT, '<|>|"|&|''', '_') AS SYNTHETICOPINION /* 보고사유내용 */ ,NVL((SELECT MAX(I.DOBT_DL_GRD_CD) FROM NIC88B I WHERE I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ), DOBT_DL_GRD_CD) AS BRANCHOFFICESCORE /* 의심거래등급코드 */ ,DOBT_DL_GRD_CD AS ORGSCORE ,'' AS RELATIONORGDOCNUM ,'' AS RELATIONFIUDOCNUM ,REGEXP_REPLACE((SELECT J.ETC_CNTNT FROM NIC68B J WHERE J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND J.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID AND J.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD = '501' ), '<|>|"|&|''', '_') AS ETCPECULARITYTYPE /* 2.기타 특징 및 유형 */
FROM NIC67B A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

SELECT A.* FROM (SELECT CONCAT('A@', I.ACT_ID) AS CODE ,I.ACT_NAME AS NAME FROM WF_ACT I INNER JOIN WF_PROC J ON I.PROC_ID = J.PROC_ID AND I.PROC_VER_ID = J.PROC_ACTIVE_VER_ID INNER JOIN WF_ACT_CONF K ON I.ACT_CONF_ID = K.ACT_CONF_ID
WHERE I.PROC_ID IN (SELECT X.MA04_3 FROM MMA040TB X WHERE X.MA04_1 = 101 )
WHERE I.PROC_ID IN (SELECT Y.STD_VAL FROM NIC92B_STD_VAL Y WHERE Y.STD_ID = 101 )
AND K.APP_AUTO_YN = 'N' ORDER BY I.ACT_POS_X ) A UNION ALL SELECT B.* FROM (SELECT CONCAT('B@', L.CNTNT) AS CODE , L.CD_NM AS NAME FROM NIC92B L WHERE L.CD = 'A029' ORDER BY L.CD_RNK_SQ ) B

choose.when: SELECT B.MA01_6 AS CODE ,B.MA01_6 || '::' || A.BIZ_NM AS NAME ,2 AS PRIORITY FROM C_BIZ A INNER JOIN MMA010TB B ON A.BIZ_ID = B.RT30_1 WHERE B.MA01_8 ='S' AND B.MA01_6 = 'KYC0' UNION ALL SELECT D.MA01_6 AS CODE ,D.MA01_6 || '::' || C.BIZ_NM AS NAME ,1 AS PRIORITY FROM C_BIZ C INNER JOIN MMA010TB D ON C.BIZ_ID = D.RT30_1 WHERE D.MA01_8 ='S' AND D.MA01_6 != 'KYC0' ORDER BY PRIORITY ASC ,CODE ASC

mapper.select: SELECT CNTNT AS CODE , CD_NM AS NAME FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'A101' AND CNTNT NOT IN('CTR', 'CAC') ORDER BY CNTNT

choose.when: SELECT 'KYC0' AS CODE, 'KYC0::수기 등록' NAME, 1 AS PRIORITY FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT D.MA01_6 AS CODE ,D.MA01_6 || '::' || C.BIZ_NM AS NAME ,2 AS PRIORITY FROM C_BIZ C INNER JOIN MMA010TB D ON C.BIZ_ID = D.RT30_1 WHERE D.MA01_8 ='S' AND D.MA01_6 != 'KYC0' ORDER BY PRIORITY ASC , CODE ASC
choose.otherwise:
SELECT 'STR' AS SCNR_CCD, 'KYC0' AS CODE, 'KYC0::수기 등록' NAME FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT E.SCNR_CCD ,E.SCNR_ID AS CODE ,E.SCNR_ID || '::' || E.SCNR_NM AS NAME FROM TMS_APPL E WHERE E.SCNR_CCD = 'STR'
AND E.BZDM_CD = #{CD}

mapper.select:
SELECT T1.* FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) OVER() AS TOTALCOUNT ,ROWNUM AS SEQ ,T2.* FROM (SELECT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || '-' || A.SSPS_DL_ID AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A ,CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') <= '20140101' THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') + 5, 'YYYYMMDD') ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') + 5, 'YYYYMMDD') END AS REPORTDATE ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', C.DL_DT || C.DL_TM, '') AS DL_DT_TM_VIEW ,FN_NIC70B_INFO(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, A.DL_P_RNMCNO , 'DL_P_NM') AS DL_P_NM ,A.DL_P_RNMCNO ,A.RNM_PR_DL_SQ ,GET_CODE_NAME('M062', C.CTR_DL_KND_CD) AS CTR_DL_KND_CD_NM ,TO_CHAR(C.DL_AMT, 'FM999,999,999,999') AS DL_AMT ,CASE WHEN CTR_DL_KND_CD IN ('11', '12') THEN B.GNL_AC_NO ELSE '' END AS GNL_AC_NO_FULL ,CASE WHEN CTR_DL_KND_CD IN ('11','12') THEN T2.ACNT_NO ELSE '' END AS ACNT_NO ,CASE WHEN CTR_DL_KND_CD IN ('21', '22') THEN NVL(D.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO, B.GNL_AC_NO) ELSE '' END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', C.HANDLNG_BRN_CD, '') AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', F.MN_DL_BRN_CD, '') AS MN_DL_BRN_CD ,C.HNDL_P_ENO ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('USER', C.HNDL_P_ENO, '') AS HNDL_P_ENO_NM ,CASE WHEN A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' THEN E.ACT_NAME ELSE GET_CODE_NAME('A029', A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD) END AS ACT_NAME ,A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD ,TO_CHAR(C.CSH, 'FM999,999,999,999') AS CSH ,TO_CHAR(C.CHCK_AMT, 'FM999,999,999,999') AS CHCK_AMT ,GET_CODE_NAME('A301', A.OK_CCD) AS OK_CCD_NM ,A.XCL_RSN_CNTNT ,A.INST_ID ,FN_NIC70B_INFO(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, A.DL_P_RNMCNO , 'RNMCNO') AS RNMCNO ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ,GET_CODE_NAME('M045',C.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_NM ,C.DTLS_TRDG_NAME ,F.SPRN_KEEP_TAGT_YN ,(SELECT CS_NO FROM NIC01B WHERE RNMCNO = A.DL_P_RNMCNO) AS AML_CUST_ID FROM NIC66B A ,NIC71B B ,NIC75B C ,NIC83B D ,(SELECT I.INST_ID ,K.ACT_NAME FROM WF_PROC_INSTANCE I ,WF_WORKLIST J ,WF_ACT K WHERE I.WORK_ID = J.WORK_ID AND J.ACT_ID = K.ACT_ID AND ( 1 = #{wfCodeYN} OR K.ACT_ID = #{wfcode} ) ) E ,NIC73B F WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND B.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = F.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = F.SSPS_DL_ID AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND C.GNL_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND C.GDS_NO = D.GDS_NO(+) AND C.DL_DT = D.DL_DT(+) AND C.DL_SQ = D.DL_SQ(+) -- AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR') AND A.INST_ID = E.INST_ID AND ( 1 = 0 OR A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate} --날짜 ) AND ( 1 = #{RNMCNOYN} OR A.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} --실명번호 )
AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = #{rpr_prgrs_ccd}
ORDER BY
SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A DL_DT_TM_VIEW DL_P_NM A.DL_P_RNMCNO A.RNM_PR_DL_SQ CTR_DL_KND_CD_NM CSH GNL_AC_NO_FULL CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO HANDLNG_BRN_NM ACT_NAME A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD OK_CCD_NM A.XCL_RSN_CNTNT
ASC DESC
ORDER BY A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ASC ,A.SSPS_DL_ID
) T2 ) T1 WHERE 1 = 1
AND T1.SEQ >= ((#{thisPage} - 1) * #{pageCount} + 1 ) AND T1.SEQ <= (#{thisPage} * #{pageCount})
SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') - LEVEL + 1 AS CODE , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') - LEVEL + 1 || '년' AS NAME FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= ((TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') + 1) - 2018)

choose.when: SELECT C.PAR_BIZ_ID AS CODE , (SELECT I.BIZ_NM FROM C_BIZ I WHERE I.BIZ_ID = C.PAR_BIZ_ID ) AS NAME FROM C_BIZ A INNER JOIN MMA010TB B ON A.BIZ_ID = B.RT30_1 INNER JOIN C_PKG_BIZ_MAP C ON A.BIZ_ID = C.BIZ_ID WHERE B.MA01_8 ='S' AND C.PKG_ID ='6' GROUP BY C.PAR_BIZ_ID ORDER BY 2
choose.otherwise: SELECT A.BZDM_CD AS CODE , GET_CODE_NAME('A045', A.BZDM_CD) AS NAME FROM TMS_APPL A INNER JOIN TMS_BZDM_MNG B ON A.BZDM_CD = B.BZDM_CD WHERE A.SCNR_CCD = 'STR' GROUP BY A.BZDM_CD ORDER BY A.BZDM_CD ASC

mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT (T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || '-' || T1.SSPS_DL_ID) AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A -- , T2.CS_NM AS DL_P_NM , T6.CS_NM AS DL_P_NM , FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO',T1.DL_P_RNMCNO,'') AS DL_P_RNMCNO_VIEW , GET_CODE_NAME('M002',T2.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD_NM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'YYYYMMDD')+5,'YYYYMMDD') AS REPORTDATE , CASE WHEN T1.SSPS_TYP_CD = 'KYC0' THEN '수기 등록' ELSE GET_SYNARIO_NAME(T1.SSPS_TYP_CD) END AS SSPS_TYP_NM , T3.LST_RSK_EAL_SOR AS RSK_GRD_MRK , T3.RSK_GRD_CD AS RSK_GRD_CD , GET_CODE_NAME('A004',T3.RSK_GRD_CD) AS RSK_GRD_CD_NM , T1.RSK_MRK AS RSK_MRK , T1.RSK_GRD_CD AS RSK_GRD , GET_CODE_NAME('A004',T1.RSK_GRD_CD) AS RSK_GRD_NM , T1.DL_P_RNMCNO , T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO_HIDDEN , (SELECT SUM(T4.DL_AMT) FROM NIC75B T4 WHERE T4.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T4.SSPS_DL_ID = T1.SSPS_DL_ID ) AS DL_AMT , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',T5.MN_DL_BRN_CD,'') AS MN_DL_BRN_CD , CASE WHEN T1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' THEN D.ACT_NAME ELSE GET_CODE_NAME('A029',T1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD) END AS ACT_NAME , GET_CODE_NAME('A301', (NVL(T1.OK_CCD, '0')) ) AS OK_CCD_NM , T1.XCL_RSN_CNTNT , T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , T1.SSPS_DL_ID , T1.INST_ID , T6.ACNT_NO -- , T2.CS_NO , CASE WHEN T6.SPRN_KEEP_TAGT_YN = 'Y' THEN T6.CS_NO ELSE T2.CS_NO END AS CS_NO , T1.TRIG_CTNT , D.ACT_ID , T6.SPRN_KEEP_TAGT_YN ,(SELECT CS_NO FROM NIC01B WHERE RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO) AS AML_CUST_ID FROM NIC66B T1 , NIC01B T2 , NIC35B T3, (SELECT A.INST_ID, C.ACT_NAME, C.ACT_ID FROM WF_PROC_INSTANCE A , WF_WORKLIST B , WF_ACT C WHERE A.WORK_ID = B.WORK_ID AND B.ACT_ID = C.ACT_ID AND (1 = #{wfCodeYN} OR C.ACT_ID = #{wfcode}) ) D , NIC73B T5 , (SELECT X.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , X.SSPS_DL_ID , X.GNL_AC_NO , X.MN_DL_DPRT_CD , X.MN_DL_DPRT_NM , X.PRFT_BRN_CD , X.PRFT_BRN_NM , X.ACNT_NO , X.CS_NM , X.SPRN_KEEP_TAGT_YN , Y.CS_NO FROM NIC71B X , NIC70B Y WHERE (X.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, X.SSPS_DL_ID, X.GNL_AC_NO) IN (SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, MIN(GNL_AC_NO) FROM NIC71B GROUP BY SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID) AND X.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = Y.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND X.RNMCNO = Y.DL_P_RNMCNO(+) ) T6 WHERE T1.DL_P_RNMCNO = T2.RNMCNO AND T1.DL_P_RNMCNO = T3.RNMCNO(+) AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'KYC' AND T1.INST_ID = D.INST_ID AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T5.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = T5.SSPS_DL_ID AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T6.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = T6.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND (1 = 0 OR T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate}) AND (1 = #{rnmcnoYN} OR T1.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO}) AND (1 = #{wfCodeStsYN} OR T1.OK_CCD = #{wfCodeSts}) AND T1.INST_ID IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT DESC, T1.SSPS_DL_ID ASC

SELECT B.RS33_1 AS ROW_NUM ,SUBSTR(C.RS32_2, INSTR(C.RS32_2, '_', 1, 1) - LENGTH(C.RS32_2), INSTR(C.RS32_2, '_', -1, 1)) AS STR_NO ,B.RS33_1 AS SEQ ,E.RS33_3 ,B.RS3A_1 ,E.RS33_2 AS TYPE ,B.RS31_1 || '::' || B.RS33_1 AS RULE ,D.RS36_2 AS RS35_1 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M006', D.RS36_2) AS CUST_NAME FROM BRS440TB A ,BRS3A0TB B ,BRS320TB C ,BRS360TB D ,BRS330TB E WHERE A.RS43_1 = B.RS31_1 AND B.RS31_1 = C.RS31_1 AND A.RS44_1 = B.RS34_1 AND B.RS31_1 = D.RS31_1 AND B.RS32_1 = D.RS32_1 AND B.RS34_1 = D.RS34_1 AND B.RS35_1 = D.RS35_1 AND D.RS31_1 = E.RS31_1 AND D.RS32_1 = E.RS32_1 AND B.RS33_1 = E.RS33_1 AND D.RS36_1 = 2 AND B.RS31_1 = (SELECT I.RS31_1 FROM BRT3B0TB I WHERE I.RT31_1 = #{RT31_1} AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND D.RS36_2 = #{INDV_CORP_CCD} -- 개인/법인

SELECT /*+ INDEX(A PK_NIC66B) */ COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM NIC66B A ,NIC71B B ,NIC75B C ,NIC83B D ,(SELECT /*+ INDEX(L IDX3_NIC66B) */ K.INST_ID ,K.WORK_ID ,K.ACT_NAME ,K.ACT_ID ,L.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,L.SSPS_DL_ID ,K.PROC_ID FROM V_WF_STANDBY K ,NIC66B L WHERE ( (K.PERSON_YN = 'Y' AND K.PARTICIPANT_ID = #{USER_ID jdbcType=VARCHAR}) OR (K.PERSON_YN = 'N' AND K.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT /*+ PUSH_SUBQ */ Y2.DEP_ID || '.' || X2.ROLE_ID FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE X2 ,C_USER Y2 WHERE X2.USER_ID = #{USER_ID jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND X2.USER_ID = Y2.USER_ID AND Y2.DEP_ID || '.' || X2.ROLE_ID = #{DPT_ROLE jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) OR (K.PERSON_YN = 'N' AND K.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT Z3.TGT_DEP_ID || '.' || Z3.ROLE_ID FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE X3 ,C_USER Y3 ,(SELECT X4.* FROM C_MULTI_POSITION X4 WHERE X4.CHRG_P_ID = #{USER_ID jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND X4.APPR_STAT_CD = 'E' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN X4.START_DT AND X4.END_DT AND ROWNUM = 1 ) Z3 WHERE X3.USER_ID = #{USER_ID jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND X3.USER_ID = Y3.USER_ID AND X3.USER_ID = Z3.CHRG_P_ID AND Y3.DEP_ID || '.' || X3.ROLE_ID = #{DPT_ROLE jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) ) AND L.INST_ID = K.PAR_INST_ID AND L.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' ) E WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND B.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND C.GNL_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND C.GDS_NO = D.GDS_NO(+) AND C.DL_DT = D.DL_DT(+) AND C.DL_SQ = D.DL_SQ(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = E.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = E.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND (A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || '-' || A.SSPS_DL_ID) = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT '0' AS SELECTED ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || '-' || A.SSPS_DL_ID AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', C.DL_DT || C.DL_TM, '') AS DL_DT_TM_VIEW ,FN_NIC70B_INFO(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, A.DL_P_RNMCNO , 'DL_P_NM') AS DL_P_NM ,A.DL_P_RNMCNO ,A.RNM_PR_DL_SQ ,REPLACE(REPLACE(GET_CODE_NAME('M062', C.CTR_DL_KND_CD), '영수', '입금'), '지급', '출금') AS CTR_DL_KND_CD_NM ,TO_CHAR(C.CSH, 'FM999,999,999,999') AS CSH ,CASE WHEN C.CTR_DL_KND_CD IN ('11', '12') THEN B.GNL_AC_NO ELSE '' END AS GNL_AC_NO_FULL ,CASE WHEN C.CTR_DL_KND_CD IN ('21', '22') THEN NVL(D.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO, B.GNL_AC_NO) ELSE '' END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', C.HANDLNG_BRN_CD, '') AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM ,E.ACT_NAME ,A.OK_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A301', A.OK_CCD) AS OK_CCD_NM ,A.XCL_RSN_CNTNT ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ,A.INST_ID ,E.WORK_ID ,E.ACT_ID ,E.PAR_INST_ID ,FN_NIC70B_INFO(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, A.DL_P_RNMCNO , 'RNMCNO') AS RNMCNO ,DECODE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC64B I WHERE I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ), 0, 'No', 'Yes') AS FILE_ATT_YN ,C.DL_DT ,C.DL_CHNNL_CD ,C.DL_CHNNL_NM ,C.SMRY_TYP_CD ,C.SMRY_TYP_NM ,CASE WHEN A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' THEN TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') + 1 || '' ELSE '' END AS DURATION ,(SELECT MAX(RPR_P_NM) FROM NIC66B_W WHERE WORK_ID IN (SELECT MAX(J.WORK_ID) FROM NIC66B_W J ,WF_WORKLIST K ,WF_ACT L WHERE J.PAR_INST_ID = A.INST_ID AND J.WORK_ID = K.WORK_ID AND K.ACT_ID = L.ACT_ID AND L.ACT_NAME = '지점담당자' ) ) AS INPUT_P_NM ,'Click' AS SELECT_TEXT ,A.XCL_RSN_CNTNT2 ,A.XCL_RSN_CNTNT ,A.DNY_RSN_CNTNT FROM NIC66B A ,NIC71B B ,NIC75B C ,NIC83B D ,(SELECT M.INST_ID ,M.WORK_ID ,M.ACT_NAME ,M.PAR_INST_ID ,M.ACT_ID ,N.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,N.SSPS_DL_ID FROM V_WF_STANDBY M ,NIC66B N WHERE ( (M.PERSON_YN = 'Y') OR ( M.PERSON_YN = 'N' AND M.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT Y1.DEP_ID || '.' || X1.ROLE_ID FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE X1 ,C_USER Y1 WHERE X1.USER_ID = Y1.USER_ID AND Y1.DEP_ID || '.' || X1.ROLE_ID = #{param2} ) ) ) AND N.INST_ID = M.PAR_INST_ID AND N.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' ) E WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND B.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND C.GNL_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND C.GDS_NO = D.GDS_NO(+) AND C.DL_DT = D.DL_DT(+) AND C.DL_SQ = D.DL_SQ(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = E.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = E.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR', 'CAC')
AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate}
AND #{branchCode} IN (SELECT X2.MN_DL_BRN_CD FROM NIC73B X2 WHERE X2.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND X2.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID )
AND FN_NIC70B_INFO(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, A.DL_P_RNMCNO , 'DL_P_NM') LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{CS_NM}) || '%'
ORDER BY A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT DESC ,A.SSPS_DL_ID

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM NIC66B A ,NIC71B B ,NIC75B C ,NIC83B D ,(SELECT M.INST_ID ,M.WORK_ID ,M.ACT_NAME ,M.PAR_INST_ID ,M.ACT_ID ,N.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,N.SSPS_DL_ID FROM V_WF_STANDBY M ,NIC66B N WHERE ( (M.PERSON_YN = 'Y') OR ( M.PERSON_YN = 'N' AND M.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT Y1.DEP_ID || '.' || X1.ROLE_ID FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE X1 ,C_USER Y1 WHERE X1.USER_ID = Y1.USER_ID AND Y1.DEP_ID || '.' || X1.ROLE_ID = #{dptRole jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) ) AND N.INST_ID = M.PAR_INST_ID AND N.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' ) E WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND B.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND C.GNL_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND C.GDS_NO = D.GDS_NO(+) AND C.DL_DT = D.DL_DT(+) AND C.DL_SQ = D.DL_SQ(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = E.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = E.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND (A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || '-' || A.SSPS_DL_ID) = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT T1.* FROM (SELECT /*+ Leading(T3 T1) INDEX(T1 PK_NIC66B) */ A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || '-' || A.SSPS_DL_ID AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A ,(SELECT CS_NM FROM NIC01B WHERE RNMCNO = A.DL_P_RNMCNO ) AS DL_P_NM ,A.DL_P_RNMCNO ,A.RNM_PR_DL_SQ ,TO_CHAR(C.CSH, 'FM999,999,999,999') AS CSH ,TO_CHAR(NVL(C.FRST_CSH, C.CSH), 'FM999,999,999,999') AS FRST_CSH ,CASE WHEN C.CTR_DL_KND_CD IN ('11', '12') THEN B.GNL_AC_NO ELSE '' END AS GNL_AC_NO_FULL ,CASE WHEN C.CTR_DL_KND_CD IN ('21', '22') THEN NVL(D.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO, B.GNL_AC_NO) ELSE '' END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO ,REPLACE(REPLACE(GET_CODE_NAME('M062', C.CTR_DL_KND_CD), '영수', '입금'), '지급', '출금') AS CTR_DL_KND_CD_NM ,E.ACT_NAME ,A.OK_CCD ,A.XCL_RSN_CNTNT ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ,A.INST_ID ,E.WORK_ID ,E.ACT_ID ,C.DL_CHNNL_CD ,C.DL_CHNNL_NM ,C.SMRY_TYP_CD ,C.SMRY_TYP_NM ,C.GNL_AC_NO ,C.GDS_NO ,C.DL_DT ,C.DL_SQ ,DECODE(C.SEQ, 0, 9999999999, C.SEQ) AS T3_SEQ -- 최종변경분을 제일 위에 보여 주려면 ,CASE WHEN A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' THEN TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') + 1 || '' ELSE '' END AS DURATION ,'Click' AS SELECT_TEXT ,A.XCL_RSN_CNTNT2 ,A.DNY_RSN_CNTNT ,C.HANDLNG_BRN_CD ,C.CTR_DL_KND_CD ,C.DL_TM ,A.RPR_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A103', A.RPR_CCD) AS RPR_CCD_NM ,A.CORT_CNCL_RSN_CNTNT -- 취소정정사유 ,C.CSH_UPD_RSCD ,C.SEQ ,GET_USER_NAME(C.UPD_ID) AS UPD_ID ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(C.UPD_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPD_DT FROM NIC66B A ,NIC71B B ,NIC75B_LOG C ,NIC83B D ,(SELECT /*+ INDEX(D IDX3_NIC66B)*/ I.INST_ID ,I.WORK_ID ,I.ACT_NAME ,I.ACT_ID ,J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,J.SSPS_DL_ID ,I.PROC_ID FROM V_WF_STANDBY I ,NIC66B J WHERE ( (I.PERSON_YN = 'Y' AND I.PARTICIPANT_ID = #{userId}) OR (I.PERSON_YN = 'N' AND I.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT /*+ PUSH_SUBQ */ Y1.DEP_ID || '.' || X1.ROLE_ID FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE X1 ,C_USER Y1 WHERE X1.USER_ID = #{userId} AND X1.USER_ID = Y1.USER_ID AND Y1.DEP_ID || '.' || X1.ROLE_ID = #{dptRole} ) ) OR (I.PERSON_YN = 'N' AND I.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT Z2.TGT_DEP_ID || '.' || Z2.ROLE_ID FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE X2 ,C_USER Y2 ,(SELECT X3.* FROM C_MULTI_POSITION X3 WHERE X3.CHRG_P_ID = #{userId} AND X3.APPR_STAT_CD = 'E' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN X3.START_DT AND X3.END_DT AND ROWNUM = 1 ) Z2 WHERE X2.USER_ID = #{userId} AND X2.USER_ID = Y2.USER_ID AND X2.USER_ID = Z2.CHRG_P_ID AND Y2.DEP_ID || '.' || X2.ROLE_ID = #{dptRole} ) ) ) AND J.INST_ID = I.PAR_INST_ID AND J.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' ) E WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND C.GNL_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND C.GDS_NO = D.GDS_NO(+) AND C.DL_DT = D.DL_DT(+) AND C.DL_SQ = D.DL_SQ(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = E.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = E.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND C.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND C.GDS_NO = #{GDS_NO} AND C.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND C.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} ) T1 ORDER BY T1.T3_SEQ DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC75B_LOG SELECT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ,A.GNL_AC_NO ,A.GDS_NO ,A.DL_DT ,A.DL_SQ ,NVL((SELECT MAX(I.SEQ) + 1 FROM NIC75B_LOG I WHERE I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID AND I.GNL_AC_NO = A.GNL_AC_NO AND I.GDS_NO = A.GDS_NO AND I.DL_DT = A.DL_DT AND I.DL_SQ = A.DL_SQ --SEQ 0 번에는 변경후 데이터를 저장함 ), 1) AS SEQ ,A.DL_TM ,A.STR_DL_KND_CD ,A.CTR_DL_KND_CD ,A.DL_KND_NM ,A.DL_WY_CD ,A.DL_WY_NM ,A.DL_CHNNL_CD ,A.DL_CHNNL_NM ,A.SMRY_TYP_CD ,A.SMRY_TYP_NM ,A.DL_UPRC ,A.DL_Q ,A.DL_AMT ,A.EC_AMT ,A.CRNCY_CD ,A.FCRNCY_DL_AMT ,A.USD_EXCH_AMT ,A.FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD ,A.FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD_NM ,A.DL_TYP_CD ,A.CSH ,A.CHCK_AMT ,A.STND_IS_CD ,A.STND_IS_CD_NM ,A.CSH_PY_FOGN_NM ,A.CSH_PY_FOGN_CD ,A.CSH_PY_BRN_NM ,A.CSH_PY_BRN_CD ,A.CSH_PY_BRN_PST_NO ,A.CNCT_AC_NO ,A.SCRTS_BLNC ,A.TFND_RA ,A.RCVBL_AMT_RA ,A.FNCNG_AND_SL_AMT ,A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD ,A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM ,A.HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO ,A.CHRG_P_ENO ,A.CHRG_P_NM ,A.BNK_BRN_CD ,A.HNDL_DY_TM ,A.HNDL_P_ENO ,A.OGN_CD ,A.LN_AMT ,A.LN_INT_AMT ,A.I_AMT_P_NM ,A.I_AMT_P_RNM_NO ,A.I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,A.I_AMT_P_TEL_NO ,A.MERGE_YN ,A.DL_SMRY ,A.FRST_CSH ,A.CSH_UPD_RSCD ,A.UPD_ID ,A.UPD_DT FROM NIC75B_LOG A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.GDS_NO = #{GDS_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} AND A.SEQ = 0

INSERT INTO NIC75B_LOG SELECT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ,A.GNL_AC_NO ,A.GDS_NO ,A.DL_DT ,A.DL_SQ ,0 SEQ -- 변경후 데이터 저장을 위해서 ,A.DL_TM ,A.STR_DL_KND_CD ,A.CTR_DL_KND_CD ,A.DL_KND_NM ,A.DL_WY_CD ,A.DL_WY_NM ,A.DL_CHNNL_CD ,A.DL_CHNNL_NM ,A.SMRY_TYP_CD ,A.SMRY_TYP_NM ,A.DL_UPRC ,A.DL_Q ,A.DL_AMT ,A.EC_AMT ,A.CRNCY_CD ,A.FCRNCY_DL_AMT ,A.USD_EXCH_AMT ,A.FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD ,A.FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD_NM ,A.DL_TYP_CD ,A.CSH ,A.CHCK_AMT ,A.STND_IS_CD ,A.STND_IS_CD_NM ,A.CSH_PY_FOGN_NM ,A.CSH_PY_FOGN_CD ,A.CSH_PY_BRN_NM ,A.CSH_PY_BRN_CD ,A.CSH_PY_BRN_PST_NO ,A.CNCT_AC_NO ,A.SCRTS_BLNC ,A.TFND_RA ,A.RCVBL_AMT_RA ,A.FNCNG_AND_SL_AMT ,A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD ,A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM ,A.HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO ,A.CHRG_P_ENO ,A.CHRG_P_NM ,A.BNK_BRN_CD ,A.HNDL_DY_TM ,0 AS HNDL_P_ENO ,A.OGN_CD ,A.LN_AMT ,A.LN_INT_AMT ,A.I_AMT_P_NM ,A.I_AMT_P_RNM_NO ,A.I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,A.I_AMT_P_TEL_NO ,A.MERGE_YN ,'' ,A.FRST_CSH ,#{CSH_UPD_RSCD} -- 수정사유코드 ,#{UPD_ID} -- 수정자ID ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') -- 수정일시 FROM NIC75B A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ}
mapper.select:
SELECT A.* FROM (SELECT CONCAT('A@', I.ACT_ID) AS CODE ,I.ACT_NAME AS NAME FROM WF_ACT I INNER JOIN WF_PROC J ON I.PROC_ID = J.PROC_ID AND I.PROC_VER_ID = J.PROC_ACTIVE_VER_ID INNER JOIN WF_ACT_CONF K ON I.ACT_CONF_ID = K.ACT_CONF_ID
WHERE I.PROC_ID = (SELECT X.MA04_3 FROM MMA040TB X WHERE X.MA04_1 = 102)
WHERE I.PROC_ID = (SELECT Y.STD_VAL FROM NIC92B_STD_VAL Y WHERE Y.STD_ID = 102)
AND (K.APP_AUTO_YN = 'N' OR K.ACT_INVK_TP_CD = 'SUB_PROCESS') ) A UNION ALL SELECT B.* FROM (SELECT CONCAT('B@', L.CNTNT) AS CODE , L.CD_NM AS NAME FROM NIC92B L WHERE L.CD = 'A029' ORDER BY L.CD_RNK_SQ ) B

SELECT A.CS_NM --고객명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', B.RSK_GRD_CD) AS RSK_GRD_CD --위험등급 ,CASE B.SSPS_DL_F WHEN 'N' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS SSPS_DL_F --혐의거래 ,CASE (B.STR_RPR_TNO + B.CTR_RPR_TNO) WHEN 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS RPR_TNO_YN --보고여부 ,CASE B.CS_EDD_MNG_F WHEN '1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CS_EDD_ST_CD_NM --EDD상태 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', A.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM --실명구분 ,A.RNMCNO ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004', A.NTN_CD) AS NTN_NM --국적 ,(SELECT I.TEL_NO FROM NIC04B I WHERE I.RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS TEL_NO --연락처 ,(SELECT CASE WHEN J.DNG_FLWG_ADDR_F ='0' THEN J.DNG_FLWG_ADDR ELSE J.ADDR || ' ' || J.DNG_FLWG_ADDR END FROM NIC05B J WHERE J.RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS DNG_FLWG_ADDR --주소 ,A.RNM_CNFR_CCD --실명구분 ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD --개인법인구분 FROM NIC01B A ,NIC35B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO
AND A.RNMCNO LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{RNMCNO}) || '%'
AND A.RNMCNO = (SELECT K.RNMCNO FROM NIC17B K WHERE K.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND 1 = 2

SELECT T1.* FROM (SELECT B.GNL_AC_NO ,B.GDS_NO ,B.GNL_AC_NO || '-' || B.GDS_NO AS GNL_GDS_NO ,GET_CODE_NAME('M036', B.GDS_TYP_CD) AS GDS_TYP_CD_NM ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', B.AC_OPN_DT, '') AS AC_OPN_DT ,(SELECT I.DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B I WHERE I.DPRT_CD = B.OPN_BRN_CD ) AS GDS_OPN_BRN_CD_NM ,GET_CODE_NAME('M035', B.AC_ST_CCD) AS GDS_ST_CCD_NM ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', FNL_DL_DT, '') AS FNL_DL_DT ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', CLSD_DT, '') AS CLSD_DT ,B.GNL_AC_NO || B.GDS_NO AS GNL_AC_NO_GDS_NO ,GET_CODE_NAME('M034', B.GDS_NO) AS GDS_NM --계좌종류(상품) FROM NIC01B A ,NIC17B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND ( A.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} OR A.RNMCNO = (SELECT J.RNMCNO FROM NIC17B J WHERE J.GNL_AC_NO LIKE #{GNL_AC_NO} AND ROWNUM = 1 ) ) ) T1 WHERE T1.GNL_AC_NO LIKE #{P_GNL_GDS_NO} || '%'

SELECT A.GNL_AC_NO ,A.GDS_NO ,A.GNL_AC_NO || '-' || A.GDS_NO AS GNL_GDS_NO ,A.DL_DT ,A.DL_SQ ,A.DL_AMT ,A.TFND_RA ,GET_CODE_NAME('M046', A.DL_WY_CD) AS DL_WY_CD_NM ,A.CHCK_AMT ,NVL(A.CRNCY_CD, 'KRW') AS CRNCY_CD_NM ,GET_CODE_NAME('M044', A.DL_CHNNL_CD) AS DL_CHNNL_CD_NM ,GET_CODE_NAME('M045', A.DL_TYP_CD) AS STR_DL_KND_CD_NM ,(SELECT I.DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B I WHERE I.DPRT_CD = A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD ) AS HANDLNG_BRN_CD_NM ,CASE A.CNCL_F WHEN 'Y' THEN 'CANCEL' ELSE '' END AS CNCL_F FROM NIC61B A ,NIC17B B WHERE A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO AND A.GDS_NO = B.GDS_NO AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.GDS_NO = #{GDS_NO} AND A.DL_DT >= #{sDate} AND A.DL_DT <= #{eDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC70B( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT -- 혐의거래 생성일자 , DL_P_RNMCNO -- 거래자엔티티id , CS_NO -- 거래자 실명번호(암호문) , DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD -- 거래자 실명확인 구분 , DL_P_NM -- 거래자명 , DL_P_NTNLT_CD -- 거래자국적코드 , DL_P_NTNLT_NM -- 거래자국적명 , RNM_PR_DL_SQ , RNM_PR_TL_DL_CNT , HNDL_DY_TM , HNDL_P_ENO , INDV_CORP_CCD ) ( SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} , RNMCNO , CS_NO , RNM_CNFR_CCD , CS_NM , NTN_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD='A009' AND CNTNT=NTN_CD) , 0 , 0 , SYSDATE , #{HNDL_P_ENO} , INDV_CORP_CCD FROM NIC01B WHERE RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO} )
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC35B SET STR_AND_CTR_EXTRCT_F = '1' WHERE RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO}

INSERT INTO NIC78B(SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,DL_P_RNMCNO,HNDL_DY_TM,HNDL_P_ENO) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT}, #{DL_P_RNMCNO}, SYSDATE, #{HNDL_P_ENO} FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM NIC78B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO})

UPDATE NIC78B T1 SET ( DL_P_BRTDY ,DL_P_SEX_CD ,WP_NM ,DTY_DPRT_NM ,OCPTN_CCD ,OCPTN_CCD_NM ,CS_PSTN_CD ,DL_P_PSPT_NO ,IND_TYP_CD ,IND_TYP_CD_NM ,LG_AMT_ASTS_F ) = (SELECT B.BRTDY ,B.SEX_CD ,B.WP_NM ,B.DTY_DPRT_NM ,A.STR_JOB_GUBN AS DD ,(SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M059' AND CNTNT = A.STR_JOB_GUBN) AS DD1 ,B.PSTN_CD ,B.PSPT_NO ,A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M008', RTRIM(A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD)) ,A.LG_AMT_ASTS_F FROM NIC01B A ,NIC02B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO ) , (DL_P_HSE_BSC_ADDR, DL_P_HSE_DNG_ADDR, DL_P_HSE_PST_NO) = ( SELECT TRIM(BSC_ADDR), TRIM(DNG_FLWG_ADDR), PST_NO FROM NIC05B T2 WHERE T2.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND T2.ADDR_TYP_CD = '1' ) , (DL_P_WP_BSC_ADDR, DL_P_WP_DNG_ADDR, DL_P_WP_PST_NO) = ( SELECT TRIM(BSC_ADDR), TRIM(DNG_FLWG_ADDR), PST_NO FROM NIC05B T2 WHERE T2.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND T2.ADDR_TYP_CD = '2' ) , (DL_P_HSE_NATI, DL_P_HSE_AREA, DL_P_HSE_ECNO, DL_P_HSE_NO) = ( SELECT TRIM(CNTY_NATI_CRYP), TRIM(CNTY_AREA_CRYP), TRIM(CNTY_ECNO_CRYP), TRIM(CNTY_NO_CRYP) FROM NIC04B T2 WHERE T2.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND T2.CNTC_TYP_CD = '1' ) , (DL_P_WP_NATI, DL_P_WP_AREA, DL_P_WP_ECNO, DL_P_WP_NO) = ( SELECT TRIM(CNTY_NATI_CRYP), TRIM(CNTY_AREA_CRYP), TRIM(CNTY_ECNO_CRYP), TRIM(CNTY_NO_CRYP) FROM NIC04B T2 WHERE T2.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND T2.CNTC_TYP_CD = '2' ) , (DL_P_MBL_NATI, DL_P_MBL_AREA, DL_P_MBL_ECNO, DL_P_MBL_NO) = ( SELECT TRIM(CNTY_NATI_CRYP), TRIM(CNTY_AREA_CRYP), TRIM(CNTY_ECNO_CRYP), TRIM(CNTY_NO_CRYP) FROM NIC04B T2 WHERE T2.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND T2.CNTC_TYP_CD = '3' ) WHERE T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND T1.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC79B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,DL_P_RNMCNO ,CORP_RGST_NO ,INDST_RSK_DVD_CD ,NPRFT_GROUP_F ,IND_TYP_CD ,IND_TYP_CD_NM ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} ,A.RNMCNO ,A.CORP_RGST_NO ,A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD ,NPRFT_GROUP_F ,A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD ,(SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M008' AND CNTNT = INDST_RSK_DVD_CD) ,SYSDATE ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} FROM NIC01B A WHERE A.RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM NIC79B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO} )
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC79B T1 SET (RPRST_P_NM1 , RPRST_P_RNM_NO_CCD1 , RPRST_P_BRDY1 , RPRST_P_NTNLT_CD1 , RPRST_P_NTNLT_NM1 , RPRST_P_NM2 , RPRST_P_RNM_NO_CCD2 , RPRST_P_BRDY2 , RPRST_P_NTNLT_CD2 , RPRST_P_NTNLT_NM2 , RPRST_P_NM3 , RPRST_P_RNM_NO_CCD3 , RPRST_P_BRDY3 , RPRST_P_NTNLT_CD3 , RPRST_P_NTNLT_NM3 , BSNSG_FNDTN_DT , ENTP_SCL_CCD , ENTP_SCL_CCD_NM , FOGN_F , LSTNG_F , LSTNG_INFO , AML_CRP_LTG_DIT_CD) = ( SELECT RPRST_P_NM1 , '99' AS RPRST_P_RNM_NO_CCD1 , RPRST_P_BRDY1 , RPRST_P_NTNLT1 , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'A009' AND CNTNT = RPRST_P_NTNLT1) , RPRST_P_NM2 , '99' AS RPRST_P_RNM_NO_CCD2 , RPRST_P_BRDY2 , RPRST_P_NTNLT2 , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'A009' AND CNTNT = RPRST_P_NTNLT2) , RPRST_P_NM3 , '99' AS RPRST_P_RNM_NO_CCD3 , RPRST_P_BRDY3 , RPRST_P_NTNLT3 , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'A009' AND CNTNT = RPRST_P_NTNLT3) , FNDTN_DT , '' AS ENTP_SCL_CCD , '' AS ENTP_SCL_CCD_NM , FOGN_F , LSTNG_F , LSTNG_INFO , AML_CRP_LTG_DIT_CD FROM NIC03B T2 WHERE RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO ) , (HD_BRNCH_NATI, HD_BRNCH_AREA, HD_BRNCH_ECNO, HD_BRNCH_NO) = (SELECT TRIM(CNTY_NATI_CRYP), TRIM(CNTY_AREA_CRYP), TRIM(CNTY_ECNO_CRYP), TRIM(CNTY_NO_CRYP) FROM NIC04B T2 WHERE T2.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND T2.CNTC_TYP_CD = '1' ) , (HD_BRNCH_BSC_ADDR, HD_BRNCH_DNG_ADDR, HD_BRNCH_PST_NO) = (SELECT TRIM(BSC_ADDR), TRIM(DNG_FLWG_ADDR), PST_NO FROM NIC05B T2 WHERE T2.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND T2.ADDR_TYP_CD = '1' ) , (BSNS_CMPNY_NATI, BSNS_CMPNY_AREA, BSNS_CMPNY_ECNO, BSNS_CMPNY_NO) = (SELECT TRIM(CNTY_NATI_CRYP), TRIM(CNTY_AREA_CRYP), TRIM(CNTY_ECNO_CRYP), TRIM(CNTY_NO_CRYP) FROM NIC04B T2 WHERE T2.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND T2.CNTC_TYP_CD = '2' ) , (BSNS_CMPNY_BSC_ADDR, BSNS_CMPNY_DNG_ADDR, BSNS_CMPNY_PST_NO) = (SELECT TRIM(BSC_ADDR), TRIM(DNG_FLWG_ADDR), PST_NO FROM NIC05B T2 WHERE T2.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND T2.ADDR_TYP_CD = '2') WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO}

UPDATE NIC79B T1 SET (ENTP_SCL_CCD, ENTP_SCL_CCD_NM, HMPG_ADDR, LSTNG_F, LSTNG_INFO) = ( SELECT CORP_CCD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M030' AND CNTNT = RTRIM(CORP_CCD)) , HMPG_ADDR , CASE WHEN (LSTNG_CLSF_DMSTC_CD IS NOT NULL) THEN '1' WHEN (LSTNG_CLSF_ABRD_CD IS NOT NULL) THEN '1' ELSE '2' END AS LSTNG_F, CASE WHEN (LSTNG_CLSF_DMSTC_CD IS NOT NULL AND LSTNG_CLSF_ABRD_CD IS NOT NULL) THEN '0' || LSTNG_CLSF_DMSTC_CD || '||' || '1' || LSTNG_CLSF_ABRD_CD WHEN (LSTNG_CLSF_DMSTC_CD IS NOT NULL) THEN '0' || LSTNG_CLSF_DMSTC_CD WHEN (LSTNG_CLSF_ABRD_CD IS NOT NULL) THEN '1' || LSTNG_CLSF_ABRD_CD END AS LSTNG_INFO FROM NIC14B T2 WHERE RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO ) WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC74B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,DL_P_RNMCNO ,STKHD_CCD ,SQ ,STKHD_NM ,QTA_R ,STKHD_RNMCNO ,RNM_CNFR_CCD ,PST_NO ,TEL_NO ,ADDR ,NTNLT_CD ,NTNLT_NM ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} ,A.RNMCNO ,A.STKHD_CCD ,A.SQ ,A.STKHD_NM ,A.QTA_R ,A.STKHD_RNMCNO ,A.RNM_CNFR_CCD ,A.PST_NO ,A.TEL_NO ,A.ADDR ,A.NTNLT_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004', RTRIM(A.NTNLT_CD)) ,SYSDATE ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} FROM NIC15B A WHERE A.RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO}
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC71B T1 SET ( AC_TY_CD , AC_OPN_DT , OPN_BRN_CD , MN_DL_DPRT_CD , PRFT_BRN_CD , RNMCNO , CS_NM , ACNT_NO , AC_OPN_OBJ_CCD) = ( SELECT AC_TY_CD , AC_OPN_DT , OPN_BRN_CD , MNGG_BRN_CD , PRFT_BRN_CD , RNMCNO , (SELECT CS_NM FROM NIC01B WHERE RNMCNO = T2.RNMCNO) , ACNT_NO , AC_RE_OBJ_CCD FROM NIC17B T2 WHERE GNL_AC_NO = T1.GNL_AC_NO) , (AC_OPN_PRXY_F) = ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN '1' ELSE '2' END FROM NIC18B T4 WHERE GNL_AC_NO = T1.GNL_AC_NO) WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO}

UPDATE NIC71B T1 SET (AC_OPN_BRN_NM, AC_OPN_BRN_PST_NO) = ( SELECT DPRT_NM , DPRT_POST_NO FROM NIC41B T2 WHERE DPRT_CD = T1.OPN_BRN_CD ) , (MN_DL_DPRT_NM) = ( SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B T3 WHERE DPRT_CD = T1.MN_DL_DPRT_CD ) , (PRFT_BRN_NM) = ( SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B T3 WHERE DPRT_CD = T1.PRFT_BRN_CD ) WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC72B( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , GNL_AC_NO , AGNC_EXTNT_CD , SQ , GDS_NO , PRXY_NM , PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD , PRXY_RNMCNO , PRXY_CS_NO , PRXY_CNTY_NATI_CRYP , PRXY_CNTY_AREA_CRYP , PRXY_CNTY_ECNO_CRYP , PRXY_CNTY_NO_CRYP , PRXY_NTNLT_CD , PRXY_NTNLT_NM , AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD , HNDL_DY_TM , HNDL_P_ENO ) ( SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} , #{SSPS_DL_ID} , T1.GNL_AC_NO , '1' , 1 AS SQ , #{GDS_NO} , T1.PRXY_NM , T1.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD , T1.PRXY_RNMCNO , NVL(T2.CS_NO, T3.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP) , T1.PRXY_CNTY_NATI_CRYP , T1.PRXY_CNTY_AREA_CRYP , T1.PRXY_CNTY_ECNO_CRYP , T1.PRXY_CNTY_NO_CRYP , T1.NTN_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'A009' AND CNTNT = RTRIM(T1.NTN_CD)) , T1.PRXY_RLTNS_CD , SYSDATE , #{HNDL_P_ENO} FROM NIC18B T1, NIC01B T2, SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS T3 WHERE T1.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND T1.PRXY_RNMCNO = T2.RNMCNO(+) AND T1.PRXY_RNMCNO = ''||T3.CLNT_ENTY_ALIS_ID(+) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM NIC72B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND GNL_AC_NO = T1.GNL_AC_NO ) )

INSERT INTO NIC75B( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , GNL_AC_NO , DL_DT , DL_SQ , DL_TM , GDS_NO , STR_DL_KND_CD , DL_KND_NM , DL_WY_CD , DL_WY_NM , DL_CHNNL_CD , DL_CHNNL_NM , DL_UPRC , DL_Q , DL_AMT , EC_AMT , CRNCY_CD , FCRNCY_DL_AMT , USD_EXCH_AMT , DL_TYP_CD , CSH , CHCK_AMT , STND_IS_CD , STND_IS_CD_NM , SCRTS_BLNC , TFND_RA , RCVBL_AMT_RA , HANDLNG_BRN_CD , HNDL_DY_TM , HNDL_P_ENO , I_AMT_P_NM , I_AMT_P_RNM_NO , I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD , I_AMT_P_TEL_NO , GDS_DIT_CD , TRDG_CODE , DTLS_TRDG_NAME , FUNS_SCRS_CODE , TRTY_DTLS_CODE , ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE , PRDT_CLSN_CODE , SERV_CLSN_CODE , ISUS_PRDT_ID , RLTV_ACNT_ID , RNMCNO , MNGG_BRN_CD , PRFT_BRN_CD ) ( SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} , #{SSPS_DL_ID} , GNL_AC_NO , DL_DT , DL_SQ , DL_TM , GDS_NO , DL_TYP_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M045' AND CNTNT = DL_TYP_CD) , DL_WY_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M046' AND CNTNT = RTRIM(DL_WY_CD)) , DL_CHNNL_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M044' AND CNTNT = DL_CHNNL_CD) , DL_UPRC , DL_Q , DL_AMT , ADJST_AMT -- 정산금액 , CRNCY_CD , FCRNCY_DL_AMT , NVL(USD_EXCH_AMT,0) , DL_TYP_CD
, CSH , CHCK_AMT , STND_IS_CD , STND_IS_NM , SECBAL_EVAL_AMT , TFND_RA , RCVBL_BAL_AMT , HANDLNG_BRN_CD , SYSDATE , L_HNDL_P_ENO , I_AMT_P_NM , I_AMT_P_RNM_NO , I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD , I_AMT_P_TEL_NO , GDS_DIT_CD , TRDG_CODE , DTLS_TRDG_NAME , FUNS_SCRS_CODE , TRTY_DTLS_CODE , ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE , PRDT_CLSN_CODE , SERV_CLSN_CODE , ISUS_PRDT_ID , RLTV_ACNT_ID , RNMCNO , MNGG_BRN_CD , PRFT_BRN_CD FROM NIC61B T1 WHERE GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} )

INSERT INTO NIC76B( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , GNL_AC_NO , GDS_NO , DL_DT , DL_SQ , CHCK_STRT_NO , CHCK_END_NO , ISNG_BNK_CD , ISNG_BNK_NM , CHCK_ISNG_DT , BLL_TYP_AMT , CHCK_AMT , CHCK_KND_CD , IO_CCD , CHCK_B , CNCL_F , HNDL_DY_TM , HNDL_P_ENO , ISNG_BRN_CD , ISNG_BRN_NM ) ( SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} , #{SSPS_DL_ID} , GNL_AC_NO , GDS_NO , DL_DT , DL_SQ , CHCK_STRT_NO , CHCK_END_NO , ISNG_BNK_CD , ISNG_BNK_NM , CHCK_ISNG_DT , BLL_TYP_AMT , CHCK_AMT , CHCK_KND_CD , IO_CCD , CHCK_B , CNCL_F , SYSDATE , #{HNDL_P_ENO} , ISNG_BRN_CD , ISNG_BRN_NM FROM NIC63B T1 WHERE GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} AND CHCK_KND_CD IN ('05','06','07','08') )

INSERT INTO NIC77B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,STRT_SCRT_NO ,END_SCRT_NO ,SCRTS_BLL_TYP_CD ,SCRTS_Q ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} ,#{SSPS_DL_ID} ,A.GNL_AC_NO ,A.GDS_NO ,A.DL_DT ,A.DL_SQ ,A.CHCK_STRT_NO ,A.CHCK_END_NO ,A.CHCK_KND_CD ,A.CHCK_B ,SYSDATE ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} FROM NIC63B A WHERE A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.GDS_NO = #{GDS_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} AND A.CHCK_KND_CD IN ('01', '02', '03', '04', '09', '99')

INSERT INTO NIC83B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_PST_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CLSF_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} ,#{SSPS_DL_ID} ,A.GNL_AC_NO ,A.GDS_NO ,A.DL_DT ,A.DL_SQ ,A.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD ,A.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM ,A.CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD ,A.CPRTY_TRSNS_PST_NO ,A.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO ,A.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM ,A.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO ,A.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', RTRIM(A.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD)) ,A.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD ,SYSDATE ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} FROM NIC62B A WHERE A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.GDS_NO = #{GDS_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ}
