INSERT INTO NIC98B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,PRXY_NM ,PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD ,PRXY_RNMCNO ,PRXY_TEL_NO ,PRXY_NTNLT_CD ,PRXY_NTNLT_NM ,AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD ,CHBF_RNMCNO ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} ,#{SSPS_DL_ID} ,A.GNL_AC_NO ,A.GDS_NO ,A.DL_DT ,A.DL_SQ ,A.PRXY_NM ,A.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD ,A.PRXY_RNMCNO ,A.PRXY_TEL_NO ,A.NTN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004', RTRIM(A.NTN_CD)) ,A.PRXY_RLTNS_CD ,'' ,SYSDATE ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} FROM NIC99B A WHERE A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.GDS_NO = #{GDS_NO} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ}

INSERT INTO NIC75B( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , GNL_AC_NO , DL_DT , DL_SQ , DL_TM , STR_DL_KND_CD , DL_KND_NM , DL_WY_CD , DL_WY_NM , DL_CHNNL_CD , DL_CHNNL_NM , DL_UPRC , DL_Q , DL_AMT , EC_AMT , CRNCY_CD , FCRNCY_DL_AMT , USD_EXCH_AMT , DL_TYP_CD , CSH , CHCK_AMT , SCRTS_BLNC , TFND_RA , RCVBL_AMT_RA , HANDLNG_BRN_CD , HANDLNG_BRN_NM , HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO , HNDL_DY_TM , HNDL_P_ENO , I_AMT_P_NM , I_AMT_P_RNM_NO , I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD , I_AMT_P_TEL_NO , RNMCNO , MNGG_BRN_CD , PRFT_BRN_CD ) ( SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} , #{SSPS_DL_ID} , GNL_AC_NO , #{DL_DT} , #{DL_SQ} , '000000' , '99' , '기타' , '99' , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M046' AND CNTNT = '99') , '99' , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M044' AND CNTNT = '99') , 0 , 0 , 0 , 0 , '' , 0 , 0 , '99' , 0 , 0 , 0 , 0 , 0 , MNGG_BRN_CD ,( SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B T2 WHERE DPRT_CD = T1.MNGG_BRN_CD ) ,( SELECT DPRT_POST_NO FROM NIC41B T2 WHERE DPRT_CD = T1.MNGG_BRN_CD ) , SYSDATE , '수기등록' , '' , '' , '' , '' , RNMCNO , MNGG_BRN_CD , PRFT_BRN_CD FROM NIC17B T1 WHERE GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} )

INSERT INTO NIC75B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,DL_WY_CD ,DL_WY_NM ,DL_CHNNL_CD ,DL_CHNNL_NM ,SMRY_TYP_CD ,DL_TM ,DL_AMT ,CHCK_AMT ,CSH ,FCRNCY_DL_AMT ,USD_EXCH_AMT ,TFND_RA ,CRNCY_CD ,HANDLNG_BRN_CD ,HANDLNG_BRN_NM ,HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO ,DL_TYP_CD ,FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD ,LN_AMT ,LN_INT_AMT ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,I_AMT_P_NM ,I_AMT_P_RNM_NO ,I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,I_AMT_P_TEL_NO ) VALUES ( #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} ,#{SSPS_DL_ID} ,#{GNL_AC_NO} ,#{GDS_NO} ,#{DL_DT} ,#{DL_SQ} ,'01' ,GET_CODE_NAME('M046', '01') ,'01' ,GET_CODE_NAME('M044', '01') ,'' ,'000000' ,0 ,0 ,0 ,0 ,0 ,0 ,'KRW' ,#{SESS_AML_BDPT_CD} ,#{SESS_DEPT_NAME} ,(SELECT A.DPRT_POST_NO FROM NIC41B A WHERE A.DPRT_CD = #{SESS_AML_BDPT_CD} ) ,'18' ,'' ,0 ,0 ,SYSDATE ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} ,'' ,'' ,'' ,'' )
mapper.select: SELECT A.CS_NM --고객명 ,A.GNL_AC_NO --계좌번호 ,A.GDS_OPN_DT --계좌개설일자 ,A.GDS_OPN_BRN_CD --계좌개설점코드 ,A.AC_OPN_BRN_NM --계좌개설점명 ,A.MN_DL_DPRT_CD --계좌관리점코드 ,A.MN_DL_DPRT_NM --계좌관리점명 ,A.GDS_NO --계좌종류코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M034', A.GDS_NO) AS GDS_NM --계좌종류(상품) FROM NIC71B A /*혐의거래계좌정보*/ WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} /*혐의거래생성일자*/ AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} /*혐의거래ID*/

SELECT A.CS_NM --고객명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', A.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM --실명번호구분코드명 ,DECODE(A.RNM_CNFR_CCD, '14', A.CS_CI_NO, '') AS CS_CI_NO --계좌주CI번호(고객CI번호) ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', A.RNMCNO, '') AS RNMCNO --실명번호 ,A.NTN_CD --국가코드 ,A.RNM_CNFR_CCD --실명번호구분코드 ,A.RNMCNO --고객번호 ,A.RNMCNO FROM NIC01B A /*고객통합기본*/ WHERE RNMCNO = #{DL_RNMCNO}

SELECT C.RPR_OGN_NM --계좌개설금융기관 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('AC', B.GNL_AC_NO, '') AS GNL_AC_NO --계좌번호 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M034', B.GDS_NO) AS GOODS --계좌종류(상품) ,GET_CODE_NAME('M037', B.GDS_CD) AS GDS_NM --계좌상품명 ,B.AC_OPN_DT AS GDS_OPN_DT --계좌개설일자 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', B.OPN_BRN_CD, '') AS OPN_BRN_CD_NM --계좌개설점명(상품개설지점명) ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', B.MN_DL_DPRT_CD, '') AS MN_DL_DPRT_CD_NM --계좌관리점명(주거래부점명) ,NVL((SELECT SUM(I.TFND_RA) FROM NIC61B I WHERE I.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO AND I.GDS_NO = B.GDS_NO ), 0 ) AS AC_BAL --계좌잔액 ,C.TRNS_OGN_CD --계좌개설금융기관코드 ,B.GDS_NO --계좌종류코드 ,NVL((SELECT TRIM(J.KFB_DPRT_CD) FROM NIC41B J WHERE J.DPRT_CD = B.OPN_BRN_CD ), 'ZZZZZZZ' ) AS OPN_BRN_CD --계좌개설지점코드 ,NVL((SELECT TRIM(K.KFB_DPRT_CD) FROM NIC41B K WHERE K.DPRT_CD = B.MN_DL_DPRT_CD ), 'ZZZZZZZ' ) AS MN_DL_DPRT_CD --계좌관리점코드 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS RP_DT --조회일시 ,C.BRN_NM --조회점명 ,C.BRN_CD --조회점코드 ,(SELECT L.DPRT_POST_NO FROM NIC41B L WHERE L.DPRT_CD = B.OPN_BRN_CD ) AS OPN_BRN_CD_POST --계좌개설지점우편번호 ,B.RNMCNO --고객번호 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 30, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') AS RP_DT_BE FROM NIC01B A /*고객통합기본*/ ,NIC17B B /*계좌상품정보*/ ,NIC86B C /*혐의거래REPORTORG*/ WHERE B.RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO AND B.RNMCNO = #{DL_RNMCNO} AND B.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND B.GDS_NO IN (SELECT M.GDS_NO FROM NIC71B M WHERE M.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND M.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND M.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} )

SELECT A.GNL_AC_NO || LPAD(ROWNUM, 5, '0') AS GNL_SQ -- 거래일련번호(계좌번호 + 순번 ex) 11100001123456 + 000001) ,ROWNUM AS DL_SQ -- 거래순번 ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.DL_DT || LPAD(TRIM(A.DL_TM), 6, '0'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS DL_DT_TM --거래발생일시 ,A.GNL_AC_NO --계좌번호 ,B.PRXY_NM --의뢰인명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) AS PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD_NM --의뢰인실명구분 ,B.PRXY_RNMCNO --의뢰인실명번호 ,(SELECT I.CS_CI_NO FROM NIC01B I WHERE I.RNMCNO = B.PRXY_RNMCNO AND I.RNM_CNFR_CCD = '14' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS PRXY_CI_NO --의뢰인CI번호 ,B.NTN_CD --의뢰인국적 ,D.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM --상대금융기관명 ,D.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO --상대계좌번호 ,D.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM --상대계좌주명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', D.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM --상대계좌주실명구분 ,D.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO --상대계좌주실명번호 ,(SELECT J.CS_CI_NO FROM NIC01B J WHERE J.RNMCNO = D.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO AND J.RNM_CNFR_CCD = '14' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS CPRTY_GNL_CI_NO --상대계좌주CI번호 ,D.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M045', A.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_NM --거래종류명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M046', A.DL_WY_CD) AS DL_WY_NM --거래수단명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M044', A.DL_CHNNL_CD) AS DL_CHNNL_NM --거래채널명 ,A.SMRY_TYP_NM --적요 ,NVL(TRIM(A.CRNCY_CD), 'KRW') AS CRNCY_CD --통화구분코드 ,A.FCRNCY_DL_AMT -- 외화거래금액 ,A.OUT_AMT --지급금액 ,A.IN_AMT --입금금액 ,A.TFND_RA --잔액금액 ,A.RPR_OGN_NM --취급금융기관명 ,A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM --취급점명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M052', C.CHCK_KND_CD) AS CHCK_KND_NM --유가증권명 ,C.CHCK_STRT_NO --시작번호 ,C.CHCK_END_NO --끝번호 ,CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = '01' THEN A.RPR_OGN_NM END AS CSH_ORG --현금지급금융기관명 ,CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = '01' THEN A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM END AS CSH_BRN --현금지급영업점명 ,A.DOBT_DL_RPR_YN --의심거래보고여부 ,A.DL_TYP_CD --거래종류코드 ,A.DL_WY_CD --거래수단코드 ,A.DL_CHNNL_CD --거래채널코드 ,A.OGN_CD --취급금융기관코드 ,A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD --취급점코드 ,C.CHCK_KND_CD --유가증권코드 ,CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = '01' THEN A.OGN_CD END AS CSH_ORG_CD --현금지급금융기관코드 ,CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = '01' THEN A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD END AS CSH_BRN_CD --현금지급영업점코드 ,B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD --의뢰인실명구분코드 ,D.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD --상대금융기관코드 ,D.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD --상대계좌주실명구분코드 ,LPAD(ROWNUM, 5, '0') AS DL_SQ_VIEW ,'A' AS GBN_CD --정정구분코드 (신규:A, 정정:U, 삭제:D) FROM (SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(L PK_NIC61B)*/ L.GNL_AC_NO --계좌번호 ,L.GDS_NO --상품번호 ,L.DL_DT --거래일자 ,L.DL_SQ --거래일련번호 ,L.DL_TM --거래시간 ,L.DL_CHNNL_CD --거래채널코드 ,L.DL_TYP_CD --거래종류코드 ,L.DL_WY_CD --거래수단코드 ,L.OGN_CD --취급기관코드 ,L.HANDLNG_BRN_CD --취급지점코드 ,L.SMRY_TYP_NM --적요 ,L.CRNCY_CD --통화구분코드 ,L.FCRNCY_DL_AMT --외화거래금액 ,L.TFND_RA --잔액금액 ,L.DOBT_DL_RPR_YN --의심거래보고여부 ,M.RPR_OGN_NM --취급금융기관명 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', L.HANDLNG_BRN_CD, '') AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM --취급점명 ,L.GNL_AC_NO || LPAD(ROWNUM, 5, '0') AS GNL_SQ --거래일련번호 (계좌번호 + 순번 e.g. 11100001123456 + 000001) ,CASE WHEN L.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02', '05', '09', '13', '15', '21', '25', '26', '27', '28', '29', '30') THEN L.DL_AMT END AS OUT_AMT --지급금액 ,CASE WHEN L.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01', '04', '08', '12', '14', '20') THEN L.DL_AMT END AS IN_AMT --입금금액 FROM NIC01B K /*고객통합기본*/ ,NIC61B L /*출납거래내역*/ ,NIC86B M /*혐의거래REPORTORG*/ WHERE K.RNMCNO = L.RNMCNO AND L.RNMCNO = #{DL_RNMCNO} AND L.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND L.DL_DT BETWEEN #{DL_DT_B} AND #{DL_DT_A} AND L.GDS_NO IN (SELECT X.GDS_NO FROM NIC71B X WHERE X.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND X.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND X.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} ) AND ROWNUM <= 500 ) A ,NIC99B B /*거래대리인정보*/ ,NIC63B C /*출납수표내역*/ ,NIC62B D /*출납송금내역*/ WHERE A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.GDS_NO = B.GDS_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = C.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.GDS_NO = D.GDS_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = D.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = D.DL_SQ(+)

SELECT A.CS_NM --계좌주(사업자)명(고객명) ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', A.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM --실명번호구분코드명 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', A.RNMCNO, '') AS RNMCNO --실명번호 ,DECODE(A.RNM_CNFR_CCD, '14', A.CS_CI_NO, '') AS CS_CI_NO --계좌주CI번호 ,A.NTN_CD --국가코드 ,A.RNM_CNFR_CCD --실명번호구분코드 ,A.RNMCNO --고객번호 ,A.RNMCNO FROM NIC01B A /*고객통합기본*/ WHERE RNMCNO = #{DL_RNMCNO}

SELECT C.RPR_OGN_NM --계좌개설금융기관 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('AC', B.GNL_AC_NO, '') AS GNL_AC_NO --계좌번호 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M034', B.GDS_NO) AS GOODS --계좌종류(상품) ,GET_CODE_NAME('M037', B.GDS_CD) AS GDS_NM --계좌상품명 ,B.AC_OPN_DT --계좌개설일자 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', B.OPN_BRN_CD, '') AS OPN_BRN_CD_NM --계좌개설점명 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', B.MN_DL_DPRT_CD, '') AS MN_DL_DPRT_CD_NM --계좌관리점명 ,'' AS AC_BAL --계좌잔액 ,C.TRNS_OGN_CD --계좌개설금융기관코드 ,B.GDS_NO --계좌종류코드 ,B.OPN_BRN_CD --계좌개설지점코드 ,B.MN_DL_DPRT_CD --계좌관리점코드 ,C.BRN_NM --조회점명 ,C.BRN_CD --조회점코드 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHHMISS') AS RP_DT --조회일시 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 30, 'YYYYMMDDHHMISS') AS RP_DT_BE ,B.RNMCNO --고객번호 FROM NIC01B A /*고객통합기본*/ ,NIC17B B /*계좌상품정보*/ ,NIC86B C /*혐의거래REPORTORG*/ WHERE B.RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO AND B.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND B.GDS_NO IN (SELECT I.GDS_NO FROM NIC17B I WHERE I.RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO} AND I.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} )

SELECT T1.GNL_AC_NO || LPAD(ROWNUM, 5, '0') AS GNL_SQ -- 거래일련번호(계좌번호 + 순번 e.g. 11100001123456 + 000001) ,ROWNUM AS DL_SQ -- 거래순번 ,T1.* FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.DL_DT || LPAD(TRIM(A.DL_TM), 6, '0'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS DL_DT_TM -- 거래발생일 ,DECODE(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM, '', '', G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) AS CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM -- (상대)금융기관명 ,DECODE(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM, '', '', G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO -- (상대)계좌번호 ,G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM -- (상대)계좌주명 ,DECODE(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM, '', '', GET_CODE_NAME('M002', NVL(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD, '99'))) AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM --(상대)계좌주실명구분 ,DECODE(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM, '', '', G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO) AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO -- (상대)계좌주실명번호 ,'' AS CPRTY_TRSNS_CI_NO --상대게좌주CI번호 ,DECODE(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM, '', '', G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD) AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD -- (상대)계좌주국적 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M045', A.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_NM -- 거래종류명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M046', A.DL_WY_CD) AS DL_WY_NM -- 거래수단명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M044', A.DL_CHNNL_CD) AS DL_CHNNL_NM -- 거래채널명 ,A.SMRY_TYP_NM AS SMRY_TYP_NM -- 적요 ,'' AS DL_SMRY -- 거래소명 ,'' AS STK_NM -- 매매/입고/출고종목명 ,0 AS QTY -- 거래변동수량 ,NVL(TRIM(A.CRNCY_CD), 'KRW') AS CRNCY_CD -- 통화구분코드 ,NVL(A.FCRNCY_DL_AMT, 0) AS FCRNCY_DL_AMT -- 외화거래금액 ,NVL(CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02', '05', '09', '13', '15', '21', '25', '26', '27', '28', '29', '30') THEN A.DL_AMT END, 0 ) AS OUT_AMT -- 거래금액(지급금액) ,NVL(CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01', '04', '07', '08', '12', '14', '16', '20') THEN A.DL_AMT END, 0 ) AS IN_AMT -- 정산금액(입금금액) ,NVL(C.CHCK_AMT, 0) AS CHCK_AMT -- 수표금액 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M052', C.CHCK_KND_CD) AS CHCK_KND_NM -- 유가증권명 ,C.CHCK_STRT_NO AS CHCK_STRT_NO -- 시작번호 ,C.CHCK_END_NO AS CHCK_END_NO -- 끝번호 ,CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = 01 THEN F.RPR_OGN_NM END AS CSH_ORG -- 현금지급금융기관명 ,CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = 01 THEN DECODE(FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD, ''), '', '', FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD, '')) END AS CSH_BRN -- 현금지급영업점명 ,NVL(C.BLL_TYP_AMT, 0) * NVL(C.CHCK_B, 0) AS YUGA_RA -- 유가잔고(권종금액 * 수표매수) ,NVL(A.TFND_RA, 0) AS TFND_RA -- 잔액금액(예수금잔고) ,0 AS RCVBL_AMT_RA -- 현금미수금잔고 ,'0' AS FNCNG_AND_SL_AMT -- 융자금/대주금 ,F.RPR_OGN_NM AS RPR_OGN_NM -- 취급금융기관명 ,DECODE(FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD, ''), '', '', FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD, '')) AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM -- 취급점명 ,NVL((SELECT CASE WHEN I.OK_CCD = '1' AND I.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN('9', '10', '99') /*9:결재완료, 10:보고완료, 99:파일생성*/ THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM NIC66B I WHERE I.DL_P_RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO AND I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} ), 'N' ) AS DOBT_DL_RPR_YN -- 의심거래보고여부 ,A.DL_TYP_CD AS DL_TYP_CD -- 거래종류코드 ,A.DL_WY_CD AS DL_WY_CD -- 거래수단코드 ,A.DL_CHNNL_CD AS DL_CHNNL_CD -- 거래채널코드 ,'' AS STK_CD -- 종목코드 ,C.CHCK_KND_CD AS CHCK_KND_CD -- 유가증권코드 ,CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = 01 THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD END AS CSH_ORG_CD -- 현금지급금융기관코드 ,CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = 01 THEN A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD END AS CSH_BRN_CD -- 현금지급영업점코드 ,G.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD AS CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD -- (상대)금융기관코드 ,G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD -- (상대)계좌주실명구분코드 ,A.OGN_CD AS OGN_CD -- 취급금융기관코드 ,A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD AS HANDLNG_BRN_CD -- 취급점코드 ,'A' AS GBN_CD -- 정정구분코드 ,A.GNL_AC_NO AS GNL_AC_NO -- 계좌식별ID ,A.GNL_AC_NO AS LST_ACNT_NO -- 계좌번호 ,NVL(A.DL_AMT, 0) AS DL_AMT -- 거래금액 ,0 AS ADJ_AMT -- 정산금액 ,'' AS DPO_NOWRM -- 예수금잔고 ,'' AS MKT_TRD_GDS_TP_CD -- 거래소코드 FROM NIC61B A --출납거래내역 ,NIC63B C --출납수표내역 ,NIC01B D ,NIC04B E ,NIC86B F ,NIC62B G --출납송금내역 WHERE A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = C.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ(+) AND A.RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND D.RNMCNO = E.RNMCNO(+) AND E.CNTC_TYP_CD(+) = '1' AND A.GNL_AC_NO = G.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.GDS_NO = G.GDS_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = G.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = G.DL_SQ(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT BETWEEN #{DL_DT_B} AND #{DL_DT_A} ORDER BY A.DL_DT DESC ,LPAD(TRIM(A.DL_TM), 6, '0') ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM <= 300

SELECT A.CS_NM --고객명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', A.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM --실명번호구분코드명 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', A.RNMCNO, '') AS RNMCNO --실명번호 ,DECODE(A.RNM_CNFR_CCD, '14', A.CS_CI_NO, '') AS CS_CI_NO --계좌주CI번호(고객CI번호) ,A.NTN_CD --국가코드 ,A.RNM_CNFR_CCD --실명번호구분코드 ,A.RNMCNO --고객번호 ,A.RNMCNO FROM NIC01B A /*고객통합기본*/ WHERE A.RNMCNO = #{DL_RNMCNO}

SELECT GET_CODE_NAME('M034', B.GDS_NO) AS GOODS --계좌종류(상품) ,GET_CODE_NAME('M037', B.GDS_CD) AS GDS_NM --보험상품명(계좌상품명) ,C.RPR_OGN_NM AS FNNC_FCLTY_NM --계약금융기관 ,'' AS INSURANCE_NO -- 보험계약번호 ,'' AS INSURANCE_ST_DT --보험계약일자 ,'' AS INSURANCE_ED_DT --보험만기일자 ,'' AS INSURANCE_CYCLE --납입주기 ,0 AS INSURANCE_TOT_AMT --총납입보험료 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', B.OPN_BRN_CD, '') AS OPN_BRN_CD_NM --개설점명 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', B.MN_DL_DPRT_CD, '') AS MN_DL_DPRT_CD_NM --관리점명 ,B.GDS_NO --상품종류코드 ,C.TRNS_OGN_CD AS FNNC_FCLTY_CD --계약금융기관코드 ,NVL((SELECT TRIM(I.KFB_DPRT_CD) FROM NIC41B I WHERE I.DPRT_CD = B.OPN_BRN_CD ), 'ZZZZZZZ' ) AS OPN_BRN_CD --계좌개설지점코드 ,NVL((SELECT TRIM(J.KFB_DPRT_CD) FROM NIC41B J WHERE J.DPRT_CD = B.MN_DL_DPRT_CD ), 'ZZZZZZZ' ) AS MN_DL_DPRT_CD --계좌관리점코드 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS RP_DT --조회일시 ,C.BRN_NM --조회점명 ,C.BRN_CD --조회점코드 ,B.RNMCNO ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 30, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') AS RP_DT_BE FROM NIC01B A /*고객통합기본*/ ,NIC17B B /*계좌상품정보*/ ,NIC86B C /*혐의거래REPORTORG*/ WHERE B.RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO AND B.RNMCNO = #{DL_RNMCNO} AND B.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND B.GDS_NO IN (SELECT K.GDS_NO FROM NIC71B K WHERE K.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND K.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND K.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} )

SELECT T1.GNL_AC_NO || LPAD(ROWNUM, 5, '0') AS GNL_SQ -- 거래일련번호(계좌번호 + 순번 e.g. 11100001123456 + 000001) ,ROWNUM AS DL_SQ -- 거래순번 ,T1.* FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.DL_DT || LPAD(TRIM(A.DL_TM), 6, '0'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS DL_DT_TM --거래발생일시 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M045', A.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_NM --거래종류명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M046', A.DL_WY_CD) AS DL_WY_NM --거래수단명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M044', A.DL_CHNNL_CD) AS DL_CHNNL_NM --거래채널명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M052', C.CHCK_KND_CD) AS CHCK_KND_NM --유가증권명 ,A.SMRY_TYP_NM --적요 ,A.OUT_AMT --거래금액(지급금액) ,A.CHCK_AMT --수표금액 ,0 AS TOT_AMT --보험료합계 ,A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM --취급점명 ,D.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM --상대금융기관명 ,D.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO --상대계좌번호 ,D.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM --상대계좌주명 ,A.DOBT_DL_RPR_YN --의심거래보고여부 ,A.DL_TYP_CD --거래종류코드 ,A.DL_WY_CD --거래수단코드 ,A.DL_CHNNL_CD --거래채널코드 ,C.CHCK_KND_CD --유가증권코드 ,A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD --취급점코드 ,D.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD --상대금융기관코드 ,A.GNL_AC_NO --계좌번호 ,LPAD(ROWNUM, 5, '0') AS DL_SQ_VIEW ,'A' AS GBN_CD --정정구분코드 (신규:A, 정정:U, 삭제:D) FROM (SELECT J.GNL_AC_NO --계좌번호 ,J.GDS_NO --상품번호 ,J.DL_DT --거래일자 ,J.DL_SQ --거래일련번호 ,J.DL_TM --거래시간 ,J.DL_CHNNL_CD --거래채널코드 ,J.DL_TYP_CD --거래종류코드 ,J.DL_WY_CD --거래수단코드 ,J.OGN_CD --취급기관코드 ,J.HANDLNG_BRN_CD --취급지점코드 ,J.SMRY_TYP_NM --적요 ,NVL(TRIM(J.CRNCY_CD), 'KRW') AS CRNCY_CD --통화구분코드 ,J.FCRNCY_DL_AMT --외화거래금액 ,J.TFND_RA --잔액금액 ,J.CHCK_AMT --수표금액 ,J.DOBT_DL_RPR_YN --의심거래보고여부 ,K.RPR_OGN_NM --취급금융기관명 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', J.HANDLNG_BRN_CD, '') AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM --취급점명 ,J.GNL_AC_NO || LPAD(ROWNUM, 5, '0') AS GNL_SQ --거래일련번호(계좌번호 + 순번 e.g. 11100001123456 + 000001) ,CASE WHEN J.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02', '05', '09', '13', '15', '21', '25', '26', '27', '28', '29', '30') THEN J.DL_AMT END AS OUT_AMT --지급금액 ,CASE WHEN J.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01', '04', '08', '12', '14', '20') THEN J.DL_AMT END AS IN_AMT --입금금액 FROM NIC01B I /*고객통합기본*/ ,NIC61B J /*출납거래내역*/ ,NIC86B K /*혐의거래REPORTORG*/ WHERE I.RNMCNO = J.RNMCNO AND J.RNMCNO = #{DL_RNMCNO} AND J.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND J.DL_DT BETWEEN #{DL_DT_B} AND #{DL_DT_A} AND J.GDS_NO IN (SELECT X.GDS_NO FROM NIC71B X WHERE X.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND X.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND X.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} ) ) A ,NIC99B B /*거래대리인정보*/ ,NIC63B C /*출납수표내역*/ ,NIC62B D /*출납송금내역*/ WHERE A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.GDS_NO = B.GDS_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = C.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.GDS_NO = D.GDS_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = D.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = D.DL_SQ(+) ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM <= 300

SELECT A.CS_NM --고객명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', A.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM --실명번호구분코드명 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', A.RNMCNO, '') AS RNMCNO --실명번호 ,DECODE(A.RNM_CNFR_CCD, '14', A.CS_CI_NO, '') AS CS_CI_NO --고객CI번호 ,A.NTN_CD --국가코드 ,A.RNM_CNFR_CCD --실명번호구분코드 ,A.RNMCNO --고객번호 ,A.RNMCNO FROM NIC01B A/*고객통합기본*/ WHERE A.RNMCNO = #{DL_RNMCNO}

SELECT '' AS GDS_GB --상품구분 ,C.RPR_OGN_NM --계좌개설금융기관 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M034', B.GDS_NO) AS GOODS --계좌종류(상품) ,B.AC_OPN_DT AS GDS_OPN_DT --계좌개설일자 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', B.OPN_BRN_CD, '') AS OPN_BRN_CD_NM --상품개설지점명 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', B.MN_DL_DPRT_CD, '') AS MN_DL_DPRT_CD_NM --주거래부점명 ,C.TRNS_OGN_CD --계좌개설금융기관코드 ,B.GDS_NO --계좌종류코드 ,NVL((SELECT TRIM(I.KFB_DPRT_CD) FROM NIC41B I WHERE I.DPRT_CD = B.OPN_BRN_CD ), 'ZZZZZZZ' ) AS OPN_BRN_CD --계좌개설지점코드 ,NVL((SELECT TRIM(J.KFB_DPRT_CD) FROM NIC41B J WHERE J.DPRT_CD = B.MN_DL_DPRT_CD ), 'ZZZZZZZ' ) AS MN_DL_DPRT_CD --계좌관리점코드 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS RP_DT --조회일시 ,C.BRN_NM --조회점명 ,C.BRN_CD --조회점코드 ,B.RNMCNO --고객번호 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('AC', B.GNL_AC_NO, '') AS GNL_AC_NO --계좌번호 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M037', B.GDS_CD) AS GDS_NM --계좌상품명 ,'0' AS AC_BAL --계좌잔액 ,(SELECT K.DPRT_POST_NO FROM NIC41B K WHERE K.DPRT_CD = B.OPN_BRN_CD ) AS OPN_BRN_CD_POST --계좌개설지점우편번호 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 30, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') AS RP_DT_BE FROM NIC01B A /*고객통합기본*/ ,NIC17B B /*계좌상품정보*/ ,NIC86B C /*혐의거래REPORTORG*/ WHERE B.RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO AND B.RNMCNO = #{DL_RNMCNO} AND B.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND B.GDS_NO IN (SELECT L.GDS_NO FROM NIC71B L WHERE L.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND L.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND L.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} )

SELECT T1.GNL_AC_NO || LPAD(ROWNUM, 5, '0') AS GNL_SQ -- 거래일련번호(계좌번호 + 순번 e.g. 11100001123456 + 000001) ,ROWNUM AS DL_SQ -- 거래순번 ,T1.* FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.DL_DT || LPAD(TRIM(A.DL_TM), 6, '0'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS DL_DT_TM --거래발생일시 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M045', A.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_NM --거래종류명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M046', A.DL_WY_CD) AS DL_WY_NM --거래수단명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M044', A.DL_CHNNL_CD) AS DL_CHNNL_NM --거래채널명 ,A.SMRY_TYP_NM --적요 ,A.CRNCY_CD --통화구분코드 ,A.FCRNCY_DL_AMT -- 외화거래금액 ,A.OUT_AMT --거래금액(지급금액) ,CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = '01' THEN A.RPR_OGN_NM END AS CSH_ORG --현금지급금융기관명 ,CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = '01' THEN A.HANDLNG_BRN_NM END AS CSH_BRN --현금지급영업점명 ,B.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM --상대금융기관명 ,B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO --상대계좌번호 ,B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM --상대계좌주명 ,B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO --상대계좌주실명번호 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM --상대계좌주실명구분 ,(SELECT I.CS_CI_NO FROM NIC01B I WHERE I.RNMCNO = B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO AND I.RNM_CNFR_CCD = '14' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS CPRTY_GNL_CI_NO --상대계좌주CI번호 ,B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD --상대계좌주국적 ,A.DOBT_DL_RPR_YN --의심거래보고여부 ,A.DL_TYP_CD --거래종류코드 ,A.DL_WY_CD --거래수단코드 ,A.DL_CHNNL_CD --거래채널코드 ,A.OGN_CD --취급금융기관코드 ,A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD --취급점코드 ,B.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD --상대금융기관코드 ,B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD --상대계좌주실명구분코드 ,A.GNL_AC_NO --계좌번호 ,LPAD(ROWNUM, 5, '0') AS DL_SQ_VIEW ,'A' AS GBN_CD --정정구분코드 (신규:A, 정정:U, 삭제:D) FROM (SELECT K.GNL_AC_NO --계좌번호 ,K.GDS_NO --상품번호 ,K.DL_DT --거래일자 ,K.DL_SQ --거래일련번호 ,K.DL_TM --거래시간 ,K.DL_CHNNL_CD --거래채널코드 ,K.DL_TYP_CD --거래종류코드 ,K.DL_WY_CD --거래수단코드 ,K.OGN_CD --취급기관코드 ,K.HANDLNG_BRN_CD --취급지점코드 ,K.SMRY_TYP_NM --적요 ,NVL(TRIM(K.CRNCY_CD), 'KRW') AS CRNCY_CD --통화구분코드 ,K.FCRNCY_DL_AMT --외화거래금액 ,K.TFND_RA --잔액금액 ,K.CHCK_AMT --수표금액 ,K.DOBT_DL_RPR_YN --의심거래보고여부 ,L.RPR_OGN_NM --취급금융기관명 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', K.HANDLNG_BRN_CD, '') AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM --취급점명 ,K.GNL_AC_NO || LPAD(ROWNUM, 5, '0') AS GNL_SQ --거래일련번호(계좌번호 + 순번 e.g. 11100001123456 + 000001) ,CASE WHEN K.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02', '05', '09', '13', '15', '21', '25', '26', '27', '28', '29', '30') THEN K.DL_AMT END AS OUT_AMT --지급금액 ,CASE WHEN K.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01', '04', '08', '12', '14', '20') THEN K.DL_AMT END AS IN_AMT --입금금액 FROM NIC01B J /*고객통합기본*/ ,NIC61B K /*출납거래내역*/ ,NIC86B L /*혐의거래REPORTORG*/ WHERE J.RNMCNO = K.RNMCNO AND K.RNMCNO = #{DL_RNMCNO} AND K.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND K.DL_DT BETWEEN #{DL_DT_B} AND #{DL_DT_A} AND K.GDS_NO IN (SELECT X.GDS_NO FROM NIC71B X WHERE X.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND X.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND X.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} ) ) A ,NIC62B B /*출납송금내역*/ WHERE A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.GDS_NO = B.GDS_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ(+) ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM <= 300

SELECT A.CS_NM -고객명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', A.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM --실명번호구분코드명 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', A.RNMCNO, '') AS RNMCNO --실명번호 ,A.NTN_CD --국가코드 ,A.RNM_CNFR_CCD --실명번호구분코드 ,A.RNMCNO --고객번호 ,A.RNMCNO ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS RP_DT --조회일시 ,B.BRN_NM --조회점명 ,B.BRN_CD --조회점코드 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 30, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') AS RP_DT_BE FROM NIC01B A /*고객통합기본*/ ,NIC86B B /*혐의거래REPORTORG*/ WHERE A.RNMCNO = #{DL_RNMCNO}

SELECT T1.GNL_AC_NO || LPAD(ROWNUM, 5, '0') AS GNL_SQ -- 거래일련번호(계좌번호 + 순번 e.g. 11100001123456 + 000001) ,ROWNUM AS DL_SQ -- 거래순번 ,T1.* FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.DL_DT || LPAD(TRIM(A.DL_TM), 6, '0'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS DL_DT_TM --거래발생일시 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M045', A.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_NM --거래종류명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M046', A.DL_WY_CD) AS DL_WY_NM --거래수단명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M044', A.DL_CHNNL_CD) AS DL_CHNNL_NM --거래채널명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M034', A.GDS_NO) AS GDS_NM --게임종류명(상품번호명) ,A.SMRY_TYP_NM --적요 ,A.CRNCY_CD --통화구분코드 ,A.FCRNCY_DL_AMT -- 외화거래금액 ,A.OUT_AMT --지급금액(칩스환전) ,A.IN_AMT --입금금액(칩스구매) ,B.PRXY_NM --대리인명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002', B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) AS PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD_NM --대리인실명구분 ,B.PRXY_RNMCNO --대리인실명번호 ,B.NTN_CD --대리인국적 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M052', C.CHCK_KND_CD) AS CHCK_KND_NM --유가증권명 ,C.CHCK_STRT_NO --시작번호 ,C.CHCK_END_NO --끝번호 ,A.DOBT_DL_RPR_YN --의심거래보고여부 ,A.DL_TYP_CD --거래종류코드 ,A.DL_WY_CD --거래수단코드 ,A.DL_CHNNL_CD --거래채널코드 ,C.CHCK_KND_CD --유가증권코드 ,B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD --대리인실명구분코드 ,A.GDS_NO --게임종류코드(상품번호) ,A.GNL_AC_NO --계좌번호 ,LPAD(ROWNUM, 5, '0') AS DL_SQ_VIEW ,'A' AS GBN_CD --정정구분코드 (신규:A, 정정:U, 삭제:D) FROM (SELECT J.GNL_AC_NO --계좌번호 ,J.GDS_NO --상품번호 ,J.DL_DT --거래일자 ,J.DL_SQ --거래일련번호 ,J.DL_TM --거래시간 ,J.DL_CHNNL_CD --거래채널코드 ,J.DL_TYP_CD --거래종류코드 ,J.DL_WY_CD --거래수단코드 ,J.OGN_CD --취급기관코드 ,J.HANDLNG_BRN_CD --취급지점코드 ,J.SMRY_TYP_NM --적요 ,NVL(TRIM(J.CRNCY_CD), 'KRW') AS CRNCY_CD --통화구분코드 ,J.FCRNCY_DL_AMT --외화거래금액 ,J.TFND_RA --잔액금액 ,J.CHCK_AMT --수표금액 ,J.DOBT_DL_RPR_YN --의심거래보고여부 ,K.RPR_OGN_NM --취급금융기관명 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', J.HANDLNG_BRN_CD, '') AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM --취급점명 ,J.GNL_AC_NO || LPAD(ROWNUM, 5, '0') AS GNL_SQ --거래일련번호(계좌번호 + 순번 e.g. 11100001123456 + 000001) ,CASE WHEN J.DL_TYP_CD = '71' THEN J.DL_AMT END AS OUT_AMT --지급금액(칩스환전) ,CASE WHEN J.DL_TYP_CD = '70' THEN J.DL_AMT END AS IN_AMT --입금금액(칩스구매) FROM NIC01B I /*고객통합기본*/ ,NIC61B J /*출납거래내역*/ ,NIC86B K /*혐의거래REPORTORG*/ WHERE I.RNMCNO = J.RNMCNO AND J.RNMCNO = #{DL_RNMCNO} AND J.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND J.DL_DT BETWEEN #{DL_DT_B} AND #{DL_DT_A} AND J.GDS_NO IN (SELECT X.GDS_NO FROM NIC71B X WHERE X.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND X.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND X.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} ) ) A ,NIC99B B /*거래대리인정보*/ ,NIC63B C /*출납수표내역*/ WHERE A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.GDS_NO = B.GDS_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = C.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ(+) ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM <= 300

SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AS BOARD_ID ,A.SSPS_DL_ID AS BOARD_SEQ ,A.FILE_SEQ ,A.FILE_POS ,A.USER_FILE_NM ,A.PHSC_FILE_NM ,A.FILE_SIZE ,A.DOWNLOAD_COUNT ,A.REG_ID ,GET_USER_NAME(A.REG_ID) AS REG_NM ,A.REG_DT FROM NIC64B A WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT A.FIU_TMSG_ID --전문ID ,GET_CODE_NAME('F001', A.FIU_TMSG_ID) AS FIU_TMSG_NM ,A.FIU_TMSG_TRA_C --전문트랜잭션코드 ,A.FIU_TMSG_TRX_SEQ --전문거래순번 ,TO_DATE(A.FIU_TMSG_TRX_DH, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS FIU_TMSG_TRX_DH --전문거래일시 ,A.FIU_SEND_G_C ,GET_CODE_NAME('F005', A.FIU_SEND_G_C) AS FIU_SEND_G_NM --송수신구분코드 ,A.FIU_RPT_TYPE_C ,GET_CODE_NAME('F002', A.FIU_RPT_TYPE_C) AS FIU_RPT_TYPE_NM --보고메세지유형코드 ,A.FIU_SEND_PRBL_C ,GET_CODE_NAME('F004', A.FIU_SEND_PRBL_C) AS FIU_SEND_PRBL_NM --송수신장애코드 ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT --혐의거래생성일자 ,A.SSPS_DL_ID --혐의거래ID ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ||'-'|| SSPS_DL_ID AS SSPS_DL_CRT_ID ,A.FIU_USER_ID ,GET_USER_NAME(A.FIU_USER_ID) AS FIU_USER_NM --사용자ID ,A.DR_DH --등록일시 ,A.CHG_DH --변경일시 FROM FIU03B A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

SELECT A.FIU_TMSG_VER -- 전문버전 ,A.FIU_TMSG_ID -- 전문ID ,A.FIU_ITEM_ID -- 항목ID ,A.FIU_ITEM_ORD -- 항목순서 ,A.FIU_ITEM_KOR_NM -- 항목한글명 ,A.FIU_ITEM_ENG_NM -- 항목영문명 ,A.FIU_ITEM_TYPE_C -- 항목유형 ,A.FIU_ITEM_LEN -- 항목길이 ,A.FIU_ITEM_ESEN_YN -- 항목필수여부 ,A.FIU_ITEM_CRYP_YN -- 항목암호화여부 ,A.FIU_ITEM_CPRS_YN -- 항목압축여부 ,A.FIU_ITEM_FIX_YN -- 항목고정길이 ,A.FIU_ITEM_GRP_ID -- 항목그룹코드ID ,A.FIU_SEND_G_C -- 송수신구분 ,A.FIU_BAS_G_C -- 기본구분 ,A.FIU_ITEM_DESC -- 항목설명 ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.DR_DH, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_DH -- 등록일 --,GET_USER_NAME(A.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NO -- 등록자 ,A.DR_OP_JKW_NO ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.CHG_DH,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_DH -- 등록일 --,GET_USER_NAME(A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO -- 변경자 ,A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM FIU02B A WHERE A.FIU_TMSG_ID = #{sfid, jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.update: UPDATE FIU01B SET FIU_TMSG_KOR_NM = #{FIU_TMSG_KOR_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 전문한글명 ,FIU_TMSG_ENG_NM = #{FIU_TMSG_ENG_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 전문영문명 ,FIU_SEND_FRQ_C = #{FIU_SEND_FRQ_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 발송주기 ,FIU_TMSG_LEN = #{FIU_TMSG_LEN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 전문길이 ,FIU_ALL_COMN_YN = #{FIU_ALL_COMN_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 전사공통여부 ,FIU_IF_COMN_YN = #{FIU_IF_COMN_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 인터페이스 공통여부 ,FIU_BAS_COMN_YN = #{FIU_BAS_COMN_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기간계 공통여부 ,FIU_TMSG_COMN_YN = #{FIU_TMSG_COMN_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 전문(KoFIU) 공통여부 ,FIU_INDV_COMN_YN = #{FIU_INDV_COMN_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 전문개발공통여부 ,FIU_TMSG_DESC = #{FIU_TMSG_DESC, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 전문설명 ,CHG_DH = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') -- 변경일 ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 변경자 WHERE FIU_TMSG_ID = #{FIU_TMSG_ID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FIU02B ( FIU_TMSG_VER -- 전문버전 ,FIU_TMSG_ID -- 전문ID ,FIU_ITEM_ID -- 항목ID ,FIU_ITEM_ORD -- 항목순서 ,FIU_ITEM_KOR_NM -- 항목한글명 ,FIU_ITEM_ENG_NM -- 항목영문명 ,FIU_ITEM_TYPE_C -- 항목유형 ,FIU_ITEM_LEN -- 항목길이 ,FIU_ITEM_ESEN_YN -- 항목필수여부 ,FIU_ITEM_CRYP_YN -- 항목암호화여부 ,FIU_ITEM_CPRS_YN -- 항목압축여부 ,FIU_ITEM_FIX_YN -- 항목고정길이 ,FIU_ITEM_GRP_ID -- 항목그룹코드ID ,FIU_SEND_G_C -- 송수신구분 ,FIU_BAS_G_C -- 기본구분 ,FIU_ITEM_DESC -- 항목설명 ,DR_DH -- 등록일시 ,DR_OP_JKW_NO -- 등록자 ) VALUES ( #{FIU_TMSG_VER, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 전문버전 ,#{FIU_TMSG_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 전문ID ,#{FIU_ITEM_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목ID ,#{FIU_ITEM_ORD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목순서 ,#{FIU_ITEM_KOR_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목한글명 ,#{FIU_ITEM_ENG_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목영문명 ,#{FIU_ITEM_TYPE_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목유형 ,#{FIU_ITEM_LEN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목길이 ,#{FIU_ITEM_ESEN_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목필수여부 ,#{FIU_ITEM_CRYP_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목암호화여부 ,#{FIU_ITEM_CPRS_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목압축여부 ,#{FIU_ITEM_FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목고정길이 ,#{FIU_ITEM_GRP_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목그룹코드ID ,#{FIU_SEND_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 송수신구분 ,#{FIU_BAS_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기관구분 ,#{FIU_ITEM_DESC, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목설명 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') -- 등록일 ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 등록자 )
mapper.update: UPDATE FIU02B SET FIU_ITEM_ORD = #{FIU_ITEM_ORD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목순서 ,FIU_ITEM_KOR_NM = #{FIU_ITEM_KOR_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목한글명 ,FIU_ITEM_ENG_NM = #{FIU_ITEM_ENG_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목영문명 ,FIU_ITEM_TYPE_C = #{FIU_ITEM_TYPE_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목유형 ,FIU_ITEM_LEN = #{FIU_ITEM_LEN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목길이 ,FIU_ITEM_ESEN_YN = #{FIU_ITEM_ESEN_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목필수여부 ,FIU_ITEM_CRYP_YN = #{FIU_ITEM_CRYP_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목암호화여부 ,FIU_ITEM_CPRS_YN = #{FIU_ITEM_CPRS_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목압축여부 ,FIU_ITEM_FIX_YN = #{FIU_ITEM_FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목고정길이 ,FIU_ITEM_GRP_ID = #{FIU_ITEM_GRP_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목그룹코드ID ,FIU_SEND_G_C = #{FIU_SEND_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 송수신구분 ,FIU_BAS_G_C = #{FIU_BAS_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기관구분 ,FIU_ITEM_DESC = #{FIU_ITEM_DESC, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 항목설명 ,CHG_DH = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') -- 변경일 ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 변경자 WHERE FIU_TMSG_ID = #{FIU_TMSG_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND FIU_ITEM_ID = #{FIU_ITEM_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT I.FIU_TMSG_KOR_NM FROM FIU01B I WHERE I.FIU_TMSG_ID = A.FIU_TMSG_ID ) AS FIU_TMSG_NM --전문명 ,A.FIU_TMSG_TRX_SEQ --전문거래순번 ,CASE WHEN A.FIU_TMSG_TRX_DH IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(A.FIU_TMSG_TRX_DH, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.FIU_TMSG_TRX_DH, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.FIU_TMSG_TRX_DH, 7, 2) || ' ' || SUBSTR(A.FIU_TMSG_TRX_DH, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.FIU_TMSG_TRX_DH, 11, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.FIU_TMSG_TRX_DH, 13, 2) ELSE '' END AS FIU_TMSG_TRX_DH --전문거래일시 ,GET_CODE_NAME('F005', A.FIU_SEND_G_C) AS FIU_SEND_NM --송수신구분 ,GET_CODE_NAME('F002', A.FIU_RPT_TYPE_C) AS FIU_RPT_TYPE_NM --보고메세지유형 ,GET_CODE_NAME('F004', A.FIU_SEND_PRBL_C) AS FIU_SEND_PRBL_NM --송수신장애 ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || '-' || A.SSPS_DL_ID AS SSPS_DL_ID --혐의거래ID ,A.FIU_USER_ID --사용자ID ,A.FIU_TRX_COMN_DATA --거래공통DATA ,TO_DATE(A.DR_DH, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_DH --등록일시 ,A.DR_OP_JKW_NO --등록조작자번호 ,TO_DATE(A.CHG_DH, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_DH --변경일시 ,A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO --변경조작자번호 ,A.FIU_TMSG_ID --전문ID ,A.FIU_TMSG_TRA_C --전문트랜잭션코드 ,A.FIU_SEND_G_C --송수신구분코드 ,A.FIU_RPT_TYPE_C --보고메세지유형코드 ,A.FIU_SEND_PRBL_C --송수신장애코드 FROM FIU03B A WHERE A.FIU_TMSG_ID = #{FIU_TMSG_ID} AND A.FIU_TMSG_TRX_DH LIKE #{FIU_TMSG_TRX_DT} || '%'

SELECT A.SQ ,DECODE(A.PROC_FALG, '0', '정상', '오류') AS PROC_FALG_NM ,PROC_FALG ,DECODE(A.PROC_FALG, '0', '해당사항 없음', PROC_CTNT) AS PROC_CTNT ,TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HNDL_DY_TM ,A.HNDL_P_ENO FROM NIC80B_LOG A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} ORDER BY A.SQ DESC

SELECT TRNSFRM_CD ,MIN(TRNSFRM_CD_EXPL) TRNSFRM_CD_EXPL ,MIN(CD_VL9) CD_VL9 FROM NIC95B WHERE CD = #{CD}
AND TRNSFRM_CD_EXPL LIKE '%'||#{TRNSFRM_CD_EXPL}||'%'
AND TRNSFRM_CD LIKE #{TRNSFRM_CD}||'%'
GROUP BY TRNSFRM_CD ORDER BY TRNSFRM_CD

SELECT GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,CHCK_STRT_NO ,CHCK_END_NO ,ISNG_BNK_CD ,ISNG_BNK_NM ,BLL_TYP_AMT ,CHCK_AMT ,CHCK_ISNG_DT ,Fn_Cdinfo_Var('DT',CHCK_ISNG_DT,'') AS CHCK_ISNG_DT_VIEW ,CHCK_KND_CD ,IO_CCD ,CHCK_B ,CNCL_F ,ENDRS_P_F ,ENDRS_P_KND_CD ,ENDRS_P_NM ,ENDRS_P_RNM_NO ,ENDRS_P_TEL_NO ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO FROM NIC76B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND GDS_NO = #{GDS_NO} AND DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} AND CHCK_STRT_NO = #{CHCK_STRT_NO}

SELECT SSPS_DL_GB --보고구분(추가자료:S, 재보고:C) ,RPT_DOC_NO --보고문서번호 ,SSPS_DL_SEQ --요청순번 ,SUBSTR(REQ_DT,1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(REQ_DT,5,2) || '-'|| SUBSTR(REQ_DT, 7,2) AS REQ_DT --요청일자 FROM NIC100B WHERE SSPS_DL_GB = 'C' --보고구분(추가자료:S, 재보고:C) AND RPT_DOC_NO =#{RPT_DOC_NO}

SELECT SSPS_DL_GB --보고구분(추가자료:S, 재보고:C) ,RPT_DOC_NO --보고문서번호 ,SSPS_DL_SEQ --요청순번 ,SSPS_DL_DOC_NO --문서번호 ,SSPS_DL_VER --버전정보 ,RPR_OGN_NM --보고기관명 ,RPR_OGN_CD --보고기관코드 ,SSPS_INFO_NM --재보고요청명/분류명 ,SSPS_INFO_CD --재보고요청코드/분류코드 ,SUBSTR(REQ_DT,1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(REQ_DT,5,2) || '-'|| SUBSTR(REQ_DT, 7,2) AS REQ_DT --요청일자 ,(REQ_CONTENT1 ||' '|| REQ_CONTENT2) AS REQ_CONTENT --정보요청내용 ,REQ_DEP --요청부서 ,REQ_DEP_TEL_NO --요청부서 전화번호 ,TO_DATE(DR_DH, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_DH --등록일시 ,(SELECT A.USER_NM FROM C_USER A WHERE A.USER_ID = DR_OP_JKW_NO ) AS DR_OP_JKW_NO --등록조작자번호 ,TO_DATE(CHG_DH, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_DH --변경일시 ,(SELECT A.USER_NM FROM C_USER A WHERE A.USER_ID = CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO --변경조작자번호 FROM NIC100B WHERE SSPS_DL_GB = 'C' --보고구분(추가자료:S, 재보고:C) AND RPT_DOC_NO = #{RPT_DOC_NO} AND SSPS_DL_SEQ = #{SSPS_DL_SEQ}

SELECT A.SSPS_DL_DOC_NO --문서번호 ,A.SSPS_DL_SEQ --요청순번 ,A.RPR_OGN_NM --보고기관명 ,A.SSPS_INFO_CD --정보분류코드 ,A.SSPS_INFO_NM --정보분류명 ,A.RPT_DOC_NO --보고문서번호 ,A.REQ_DT --요청일자 ,A.REQ_DEP --요청부서 ,A.REQ_DEP_TEL_NO --요청부서전화번호 ,DECODE(A.SSPS_PRGRS_CCD,'S','전문발송','저장/파일생성') AS SSPS_PRGRS_CCD_NM ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT --혐의거래일 ,A.SSPS_DL_ID --혐의거래ID ,A.RES_DT --제공일자 ,A.SSPS_PRGRS_CCD --보고진행구분코드(저장/파일생성:C, 전송발송:S) ,( SELECT REPLACE(B.USER_FILE_NM, '.xml','') FROM NIC101B B WHERE B.FILE_SEQ ='0' AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = A.SSPS_DL_ID ) AS FIU_USER_FILE_NM FROM NIC100B A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_GB = 'S' AND A.REQ_DT BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
AND A.SSPS_INFO_CD = #{SSPS_INFO_CD} /* 정보분류코드 */
AND A.SSPS_DL_DOC_NO LIKE '%'|| UPPER( #{SSPS_DL_DOC_NO}) || '%' /* 문서번호 */
AND A.RPT_DOC_NO LIKE '%'|| UPPER( #{RPT_DOC_NO}) || '%' /* 보고문서번호 */

SELECT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT --혐의거래일 ,A.SSPS_DL_ID --혐의거래ID ,A.RPT_DOC_NO --보고문서번호 ,A.RPR_OGN_NM --보고기관명 ,A.RPR_OGN_CD --보고기관코드 ,A.SSPS_DL_SEQ --요청순번 ,A.SSPS_INFO_NM --분류명 ,A.SSPS_INFO_CD --분류코드 ,A.SSPS_DL_DOC_NO --문서번호 ,A.REQ_DT --요청일자 ,A.REQ_DEP --요청부서 ,A.REQ_DEP_TEL_NO --요청부서전화번호 ,A.REQ_CONTENT1 || A.REQ_CONTENT2 AS REQ_CONTENT --요청내용 ,A.RES_DT --제공일자 ,A.RES_USER_NM --제공자명 ,A.RES_USER_ID --제공자ID ,A.RES_TEL_NO --제공자전화번호 ,A.RES_CONTENT --제공내용 ,A.SSPS_PRGRS_CCD --보고진행구분코드(저장/파일생성:C, 전송발송:S) FROM NIC100B A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_GB = 'S' AND A.RPT_DOC_NO = #{RPT_DOC_NO} AND A.SSPS_DL_SEQ = #{SSPS_DL_SEQ}
SELECT FILE_SEQ ,FILE_POS ,USER_FILE_NM ,PHSC_FILE_NM ,FILE_SIZE FROM NIC64B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND FILE_SEQ >= '101' AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'IFS'

SELECT FILE_POS AS FILE_PATH ,USER_FILE_NM AS FILE_NM ,USER_FILE_NM AS USER_FILE_NM ,PHSC_FILE_NM AS PHSC_FILE_NM ,FILE_SEQ FROM NIC101B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'IFS' AND FILE_SEQ !='0'

SELECT SSPS_DL_DOC_NO AS FIUDOCNUM --문서번호 ,RPR_OGN_NM AS ORGNAME --보고기관명 ,RPR_OGN_CD AS ORGNAMECODE --보고기관코드 ,SSPS_DL_SEQ AS REREPSEQUENCE --요청순번 ,SSPS_INFO_NM AS REREP --분류명(정보분류명) ,SSPS_INFO_CD AS REREPCODE --분류코드(정보분류코드) ,RPT_DOC_NO AS ORGDOCNUM --보고문서번호 ,RES_DT AS SUPPLYDATE --제공일자 ,RES_CONTENT AS SUPPLYCONTENT --제공내용 ,RES_USER_NM AS SUPPLYNAME --제공자명 ,RES_USER_ID AS USERID --제공자ID ,RES_TEL_NO AS SUPPLYPHONE --제공자전화번호 ,SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,SSPS_PRGRS_CCD /* 보고진행구분코드(저장/파일생성:C, 전문발송:F, 결과:성공:S/실패:E) */ FROM NIC100B WHERE SSPS_DL_GB = #{SSPS_DL_GB} AND RPT_DOC_NO = #{RPT_DOC_NO} AND SSPS_DL_SEQ = #{SSPS_DL_SEQ}

SELECT RPT_DOC_NO AS ORGDOCNUM --보고문서번호 ,RPR_OGN_NM AS ORGNAME --보고기관명 ,RPR_OGN_CD AS ORGNAMECODE --보고기관코드 ,SSPS_DL_SEQ AS REREPSEQUENCE --요청순번 ,SSPS_INFO_NM AS REREP --분류명(재보고요청명) ,SSPS_INFO_CD AS REREPCODE --분류코드(재보고요청코드) ,SSPS_DL_DOC_NO AS FIUDOCNUM --문서번호 ,REQ_DT AS REREPDATE --요청일자 ,REQ_CONTENT AS REREPCONTENT --정보요청내용 --,REQ_CONTENT2 ,REQ_DEP AS REREPDEPARMENT --요청부서 ,REQ_DEP_TEL_NO AS REREPPHONE --요청부서 전화번호 --,SSPS_DL_CRT_DT --,SSPS_DL_ID --,SSPS_PRGRS_CCD /* 보고진행구분코드(생성:C, 완료:F, 오류:E) */ --,SSPS_TMSG_YN /* 전문전송여부(1:전문전송시, 0:최초시) */ FROM NIC100B WHERE SSPS_DL_GB = #{SSPS_DL_GB} AND RPT_DOC_NO = #{RPT_DOC_NO} AND SSPS_DL_SEQ = #{SSPS_DL_SEQ}
SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,SND_RCPT_DOC_NO FROM NIC80B WHERE SND_RCPT_DOC_NO = #{SND_RCPT_DOC_NO} /* 송신문서번호 */ AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,SND_RCPT_DOC_NO ,SND_RCPT_FILE_NM FROM NIC80B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

/* 시나리오별 의심유형 추가 - 의심유형거래 목록 조회 */ SELECT '0' AS SELECTED ,A.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD AS COL0 ,A.DOBT_TYP_KND_NM AS COL1 ,A.APLC_DT AS COL2 ,A.APLC_STP_DT AS COL3 ,A.HG_RNK_CD AS COL4 ,DECODE(NVL(B.SCNR_ID, ''), '', 'N', 'Y') AS COL5 ,B.SCNR_ID AS SCNR_ID FROM NIC69B A LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC81B B ON A.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD = B.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD AND B.SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} WHERE A.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD NOT IN ('500', '501') AND A.HG_RNK_CD NOT IN ('000') ORDER BY A.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD
SELECT ROLE_ID AS CODE ,ROLE_NM AS NAME FROM C_ROLE

SELECT CS_NM --거래자(사업자)명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002',RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM --실명번호 구분 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO',RNMCNO,'') AS RNMCNO --거래자(사업자)실명번호 ,NTN_CD --고객 국적 ,RNMCNO --고객ID ,'' AS "지갑번호(지갑주소)" --지갑번호(지갑주소) ,'' AS "최초 가입일" -- 최초 가입일 ,RNM_CNFR_CCD --실명번호구분코드 ,RNMCNO FROM NIC01B /*고객통합기본*/ WHERE RNMCNO = #{DL_RNMCNO}

SELECT F.RPR_OGN_NM -- 계좌개설금융기관 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('AC',C.GNL_AC_NO,'') AS GNL_AC_NO -- 계좌번호 ,A.CS_NM -- 계좌주(사업자)명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002',A.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM -- 실명번호 구분 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO',A.RNMCNO ,'') AS RNMCNO -- 계좌주(사업자)실명번호 ,C.AC_OPN_DT -- 계좌등록일자 ,A.RNM_CNFR_CCD -- 실명번호 구분코드 ,F.TRNS_OGN_CD -- 계좌개설금융기관코드 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS RP_DT -- 조회일시 ,F.BRN_NM -- 조회점명 ,F.BRN_CD -- 조회점코드 ,C.RNMCNO -- 고객번호 FROM NIC01B A /*고객통합기본*/ ,NIC17B C /*계좌상품정보*/ ,NIC86B F /*혐의거래REPORTORG*/ WHERE C.RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO AND C.RNMCNO = #{DL_RNMCNO} AND C.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND C.GDS_NO IN (SELECT I.GDS_NO FROM NIC71B I WHERE I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND I.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} )

SELECT GNL_AC_NO||LPAD(ROWNUM,5,'0') AS GNL_SQ -- 거래일련번호(계좌번호 + 순번 ex) 11100001123456 + 000001) ,ROWNUM AS DL_SQ -- 거래순번 ,V.* FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.DL_DT || LPAD(TRIM(A.DL_TM),6,'0'),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS DL_DT_TM --거래발생일시 ,'' AS "거래주체 구분 코드" ,'' AS "거래주체 상세" ,GET_CODE_NAME('M045',A.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_NM --거래종류명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M046',A.DL_WY_CD) AS DL_WY_NM --거래수단명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M044',A.DL_CHNNL_CD) AS DL_CHNNL_NM --거래채널명 ,A.SMRY_TYP_NM -- 적요 ,'' AS "접근국가" ,GET_CODE_NAME('M034',A.GDS_NO) AS GDS_NM --거래상품명 ,'' AS "거래수량" ,NVL(TRIM(A.CRNCY_CD), 'KRW') AS CRNCY_CD -- 통화구분코드 ,'' AS "원화환산 거래금액" ,'' AS "총잔액(원화환산 잔액)" , D.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM -- 상대금융기관명 ,'' AS "상대 거래주체 구분 값" ,'' AS "상대 거래주체 상세" ,B.PRXY_NM --상대거래자명 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002',B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) AS PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD_NM -- 상대거래자실명구분 ,B.PRXY_RNMCNO -- 상대거래자실명번호 ,B.NTN_CD -- 상대거래자국적 ,A.DL_TYP_CD -- 거래종류코드 ,A.DL_WY_CD -- 거래수단코드 ,A.DL_CHNNL_CD -- 거래채널코드 ,D.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD -- 상대금융기관코드 ,D.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD -- 상대거래자실명구분코드 ,'A' AS GBN_CD -- 정정구분코드 (신규:A, 정정:U, 삭제:D) ,A.GNL_AC_NO ,LPAD(ROWNUM,5,'0') AS DL_SQ_VIEW FROM ( SELECT H.GNL_AC_NO --계좌번호 ,H.GDS_NO --상품번호 ,H.DL_DT --거래일자 ,H.DL_SQ --거래일련번호 ,H.DL_TM --거래시간 ,H.DL_CHNNL_CD --거래채널코드 ,H.DL_TYP_CD --거래종류코드 ,H.DL_WY_CD --거래수단코드 ,H.SMRY_TYP_NM --적요 ,H.CRNCY_CD --통화구분코드 ,H.TFND_RA --잔액금액 ,H.GNL_AC_NO||LPAD(ROWNUM,5,'0') AS GNL_SQ --거래일련번호(계좌번호 + 순번 ex) 11100001123456 + 000001 FROM NIC61B H /*출납거래내역*/ WHERE H.RNMCNO = #{DL_RNMCNO} AND H.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND H.DL_DT BETWEEN #{DL_DT_B} AND #{DL_DT_A} AND H.GDS_NO IN ( SELECT X.GDS_NO FROM NIC71B X WHERE X.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND X.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND X.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} ) ) A ,NIC99B B /*거래대리인정보*/ ,NIC63B C /*출납수표내역*/ ,NIC62B D /*출납송금내역*/ WHERE A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.GDS_NO = B.GDS_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = C.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.GDS_NO = D.GDS_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = D.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = D.DL_SQ(+) ) V WHERE ROWNUM <= 300

SELECT RNMCNO ,RL_OWNR_RNMCNO ,RL_OWNR_RLT_CTT ,GET_CODE_NAME('A509', RL_OWNR_CNFR_CCD) AS RL_OWNR_CNFR_CCD ,SEQ ,RL_OWNR_NM ,RL_OWNR_ENG_NM ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004', RL_OWNR_NTN_CD) AS RL_OWNR_NTN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A512', RL_OWNR_RLT_CD) AS RL_OWNR_RLT_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A508', RL_OWNR_CCD) AS RL_OWNR_CCD ,QTA_R FROM NIC15B_1 WHERE RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} ORDER BY SEQ DESC

SELECT '--' AS REQ_STS ,CASE WHEN A.CTR_CAC_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CAC_EXEC_YN -- 취소정정수행여부 ,B.DL_P_RNMCNO AS DL_P_RNMCNO ,FN_NIC70B_INFO(B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, B.DL_P_RNMCNO , 'DL_P_NM') AS DL_P_NM ,E.GNL_AC_NO AS FRST_GNL_AC_NO
,B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AS FRST_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,B.SSPS_DL_ID AS FRST_SSPS_DL_ID ,B.RPR_PRGRS_CCD AS FRST_RPR_PRGRS_CCD ,B.OK_CCD AS FRST_OK_CCD ,B.RPR_CCD AS FRST_RPR_CCD ,B.INST_ID AS FRST_INST_ID ,B.RNM_PR_DL_SQ AS FRST_RNM_PR_DL_SQ ,C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AS CAC_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,C.SSPS_DL_ID AS CAC_SSPS_DL_ID ,C.RPR_PRGRS_CCD AS CAC_RPR_PRGRS_CCD ,C.OK_CCD AS CAC_OK_CCD ,C.RPR_CCD AS CAC_RPR_CCD ,C.INST_ID AS CAC_INST_ID ,C.RNM_PR_DL_SQ AS CAC_RNM_PR_DL_SQ ,D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AS REP_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,D.SSPS_DL_ID AS REP_SSPS_DL_ID ,D.RPR_PRGRS_CCD AS REP_RPR_PRGRS_CCD ,D.OK_CCD AS REP_OK_CCD ,D.RPR_CCD AS REP_RPR_CCD ,D.INST_ID AS REP_INST_ID ,D.RNM_PR_DL_SQ AS REP_RNM_PR_DL_SQ ,D.DOC_NO_YR AS DOC_NO_YR -- 최종보고완료 기본(대표)문서번호년도 ,D.DOC_SQ AS DOC_SQ -- 최종보고완료 기본(대표)문서번호
,D.RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR AS REP_RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR ,'' AS SN_COMMENT ,GET_CODE_NAME('A103',C.RPR_CCD) AS CAC_RPR_CCD_NM
,REPLACE(REPLACE(GET_CODE_NAME('M062',E.CTR_DL_KND_CD),'영수','입금'),'지급','출금') AS FRST_CTR_DL_KND_CD_NM ,REPLACE(REPLACE(GET_CODE_NAME('M062',F.CTR_DL_KND_CD),'영수','입금'),'지급','출금') AS REP_CTR_DL_KND_CD_NM
,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', E.HANDLNG_BRN_CD, '') AS FRST_HANDLNG_BRN_NM ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', F.HANDLNG_BRN_CD, '') AS REP_HANDLNG_BRN_NM
,TO_CHAR(E.CSH, 'FM999,999,999,999') AS FRST_CSH ,TO_CHAR(F.CSH, 'FM999,999,999,999') AS REP_CSH
,CASE WHEN B.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' /* 결재진행중 */ THEN ( SELECT Z.ACT_NAME FROM WF_PROC_INSTANCE X ,WF_WORKLIST Y ,WF_ACT Z WHERE X.WORK_ID = Y.WORK_ID AND Y.ACT_ID = Z.ACT_ID AND X.INST_ID = B.INST_ID ) WHEN B.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '9' AND B.OK_CCD = '2' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('A301', B.OK_CCD)/* 보고제외 */ WHEN D.RPR_CCD IN ('03', '97') THEN GET_CODE_NAME('A103', D.RPR_CCD) /* 취소보고 */ ELSE GET_CODE_NAME('A029', NVL(D.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, B.RPR_PRGRS_CCD)) /* 결재완료, 파일관련, 보고완료 */ END AS PRGRS_NAME /* 진행상태명 */ ,CASE WHEN C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT IS NULL THEN '-' WHEN C.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' THEN ( SELECT K.ACT_NAME FROM WF_PROC_INSTANCE I ,WF_WORKLIST J ,WF_ACT K WHERE I.WORK_ID = J.WORK_ID AND J.ACT_ID = K.ACT_ID AND I.INST_ID = C.INST_ID) /* 결재진행중 */ ELSE GET_CODE_NAME('A029', C.RPR_PRGRS_CCD) /* 결재완료, 파일관련 */ END AS CAC_PRGRS_NAME /* 취소,정정보고 진행상태명 */
,H.FIU_NO AS CAC_FIU_NO ,H.FIU_REG_DT AS CAC_FIU_REG_DT ,G.FIU_NO AS REP_FIU_NO ,G.FIU_REG_DT AS REP_FIU_REG_DT
,B.RNM_PR_TL_DL_CNT AS FRST_RNM_PR_TL_DL_CNT ,C.RNM_PR_TL_DL_CNT AS CAC_RNM_PR_TL_DL_CNT ,D.RNM_PR_TL_DL_CNT AS REP_RNM_PR_TL_DL_CNT
,B.RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR AS FRST_RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR ,C.RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR AS CAC_RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR ,D.RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR AS REP_RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR
,B.RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ AS FRST_RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ ,C.RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ AS CAC_RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ ,D.RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ AS REP_RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ
,CASE WHEN C.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN ('10', '99') THEN 'download' END AS CAC_TRSMT_ST_NM --KoFIU보고파일 ,CASE WHEN D.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN ('9', '10', '99') THEN 'download' END AS REP_TRSMT_ST_NM --KoFIU보고파일 ,H.SND_RCPT_FILE_NM AS CAC_KOFIU_FILE --KoFIU보고파일명 ,G.SND_RCPT_FILE_NM AS REP_KOFIU_FILE --KoFIU보고파일명 ,C.CORT_CNCL_RSN_CNTNT -- 정정취소보고사유
FROM ( SELECT X.FRST_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,X.FRST_SSPS_DL_ID ,MAX(CASE WHEN Y.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CAC' AND (Y.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' /* 결재중 */ OR Y.OK_CCD != '2' /* 보고제외 아닌거 */) THEN Y.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || Y.SSPS_DL_ID END) AS CTR_CAC_KEY ,MAX(CASE WHEN Y.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '10' /* 보고완료 */ THEN Y.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || Y.SSPS_DL_ID END) AS CTR_REP_KEY FROM NIC66B X /* 최초건 */ ,NIC66B Y /* 취소,정정(CAC). 보고완료(RPR_PRGRS_CCD 10). 각각 마지막 DT, ID */ WHERE 1=1 AND Y.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO} AND Y.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT}
AND X.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD in ('CTR', 'CAC') AND X.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = Y.FRST_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND X.SSPS_DL_ID = Y.FRST_SSPS_DL_ID GROUP BY X.FRST_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, X.FRST_SSPS_DL_ID ) A /* DT, 고객기준 */ LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC66B B /* 최초 진행건(CTR) */ ON 1=1 AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = A.FRST_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = A.FRST_SSPS_DL_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC66B C /* 취소,정정 진행건(CAC) */ ON 1=1 AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || C.SSPS_DL_ID = A.CTR_CAC_KEY AND C.RPR_PRGRS_CCD != '10' LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC66B D /* 최종 보고 완료 건(CTR,CAC) */ ON 1=1 AND D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || D.SSPS_DL_ID = A.CTR_REP_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC75B E ON 1=1 AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = E.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = E.SSPS_DL_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC75B F ON 1=1 AND D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = F.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND D.SSPS_DL_ID = F.SSPS_DL_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC80B G ON 1=1 AND D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = G.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND D.SSPS_DL_ID = G.SSPS_DL_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC80B H ON 1=1 AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = H.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = H.SSPS_DL_ID
ORDER BY B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, B.SSPS_DL_ID

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY V.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT DESC, V.SSPS_DL_ID ASC) AS NU ,( SELECT I.CS_NM FROM NIC01B I WHERE I.RNMCNO = V.DL_P_RNMCNO ) AS DL_P_NM ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',V.HANDLNG_BRN_CD,'') AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM ,( SELECT 'D' AS TEXT FROM NIC66B_W I WHERE I.INST_ID = V.INST_ID AND I.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = 'D' AND I.WORK_ID = ( SELECT MAX(X.WORK_ID) FROM NIC66B_W X WHERE X.INST_ID = V.INST_ID ) ) AS RPR_PRGRS_CCD ,( SELECT '[반려]' AS TEXT FROM NIC66B_W I WHERE I.INST_ID = V.INST_ID AND I.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = 'D' AND I.WORK_ID = ( SELECT MAX(X.WORK_ID) FROM NIC66B_W X WHERE X.INST_ID = V.INST_ID ) ) || ( CASE WHEN V.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' THEN V.ACT_NAME ELSE GET_CODE_NAME('A029',V.RPR_PRGRS_CCD) END ) AS ACT_NAME ,GET_CODE_NAME('A301', V.OK_CCD) AS OK_CCD_NM ,FN_NIC70B_INFO(V.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, V.DL_P_RNMCNO ,'RNMCNO') RNMCNO ,( SELECT TO_DATE(SUBSTR(I.FIU_TMSG_TRX_DH,1,8), 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM FIU03B I WHERE I.FIU_TMSG_ID ='03100050' /*파일종료응답 전문*/ AND I.FIU_RPT_TYPE_C = '01' /*보고*/ AND I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = V.SSPS_DL_ID AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = V.SSPS_DL_ID) AS KOFIUDATE --KoFIU보고일자 ,( SELECT MAX(I.RPR_P_NM) FROM NIC66B_W I WHERE I.WORK_ID IN (SELECT MAX(X.WORK_ID) FROM NIC66B_W X ,WF_WORKLIST Y ,WF_ACT Z WHERE X.PAR_INST_ID = V.INST_ID AND X.WORK_ID = Y.WORK_ID AND Y.ACT_ID = Z.ACT_ID AND Z.ACT_NAME = '담당자' ) ) AS INPUT_P_NM ,V.* ,GET_CODE_NAME('A103', V.RPR_CCD) AS RPR_CCD_NM FROM ( SELECT /*+INDEX(A PK_NIC66B)*/ A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT||'-'||A.SSPS_DL_ID AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ,C.DL_DT AS DL_DT_TM_VIEW ,A.DL_P_RNMCNO ,A.RNM_PR_DL_SQ ,A.OK_CCD ,CASE WHEN C.CTR_DL_KND_CD IN ('12','22','24','26','99') THEN '입금' WHEN C.CTR_DL_KND_CD IN ('11','21','23','25','98') THEN '출금' ELSE '' END AS CTR_DL_KND_CD_NM ,TO_CHAR(C.CSH, 'FM999,999,999,999') AS CSH ,CASE WHEN CTR_DL_KND_CD IN ('11','12') THEN B.GNL_AC_NO ELSE '' END AS GNL_AC_NO_FULL ,B.GNL_AC_NO AS LST_ACNT_NO ,D.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO ,A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD
,A.XCL_RSN_CNTNT ,'' AS HDQT_XCL_RSN_CNTNT ,A.INST_ID ,E.SMRY_TYP_NM AS SMRY_TYP_NM ,CASE WHEN ( CASE WHEN A.OK_CCD = '2' AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN('9','10') THEN '99999999' WHEN A.OK_CCD = '1' AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '10' THEN A.RPR_DT END ) = '99999999' THEN '-' -- 보고제외로 결재종료 ELSE ( CASE WHEN( CASE WHEN A.OK_CCD = '1' AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '10' THEN A.RPR_DT -- Kofiu보고완요일자 ELSE 'X' END ) = 'X' THEN TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,1,8) ,'YYYYMMDD')||'일' --결재가 종료 되지 않았을때 ELSE TO_DATE(A.RPR_DT,'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,1,8) ,'YYYYMMDD')||'일' -- Kofiu에 보고 되었을때 END ) END AS DL_DT_CNT --경과일수 ,C.HANDLNG_BRN_CD ,F.ACT_NAME ,A.RPR_CCD ,CASE WHEN A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN ('9', '10', '99') THEN 'download' END AS TRSMT_ST_NM --KoFIU보고파일 ,( SELECT I.SND_RCPT_FILE_NM FROM NIC80B I WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = I.SSPS_DL_ID ) AS KOFIU_FILE --KoFIU보고파일명
FROM NIC66B A ,NIC71B B ,NIC75B C ,NIC83B D ,NIC61B E ,( SELECT I.INST_ID, K.ACT_NAME FROM WF_PROC_INSTANCE I , WF_WORKLIST J , WF_ACT K WHERE I.WORK_ID = J.WORK_ID AND J.ACT_ID = K.ACT_ID ) F WHERE 1=1 AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO} AND (A.FRST_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, A.FRST_SSPS_DL_ID) IN (SELECT I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,I.SSPS_DL_ID FROM NIC66B I WHERE I.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO} AND I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND I.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR') AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND B.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND C.GNL_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND C.GDS_NO = D.GDS_NO(+) AND C.DL_DT = D.DL_DT(+) AND C.DL_SQ = D.DL_SQ(+) AND C.GNL_AC_NO = E.GNL_AC_NO AND C.GDS_NO = E.GDS_NO AND C.DL_DT = E.DL_DT AND C.DL_SQ = E.DL_SQ AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND A.INST_ID = F.INST_ID )V ORDER BY V.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS T_CNT ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN ( '2') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS C_CNT ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN RPR_PRGRS_CCD NOT IN ( '2') AND OK_CCD = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS F_CNT ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN ('10') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS R_CNT /* 10:보고완료 */ ,( SELECT I.RPR_PRGRS_CCD FROM NIC66B I WHERE I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} ) AS RPR_PRGRS_CCD FROM NIC66B WHERE 1=1 AND DL_P_RNMCNO = (SELECT X.DL_P_RNMCNO FROM NIC66B X WHERE X.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND X.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} ) AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR') GROUP BY DL_P_RNMCNO
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC80B SET RPR_OGN_CD = #{RPR_OGN_CD} /* 보고기관코드 */ ,RPR_OGN_NM = #{RPR_OGN_NM} /* 보고기관명 */ ,RPR_RSPSB_P_NM = #{RPR_RSPSB_P_NM} /* 보고책임자명 */ ,RPR_CHRG_P_NM = #{RPR_CHRG_P_NM} /* 보고담당자명 */ ,RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO = #{RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO} /* 보고담당자전화번호 */ ,RPR_CHRG_P_CNFR_RCG_ST_CD = #{RPR_CHRG_P_CNFR_RCG_ST_CD} /* 보고담당자확인승인상태코드 */ ,RPR_CHRG_P_ENO = #{RPR_CHRG_P_ENO} /* 보고담당자사번 */ ,TRSMT_ST_CD = #{TRSMT_ST_CD} /* 전송상태코드 */ ,SND_RSLT_CD = #{SND_RSLT_CD} /* 발송결과코드 */ ,SND_RCPT_CCD = #{SND_RCPT_CCD} /* 송수신구분코드 */ ,SND_RCPT_FILE_NM = #{SND_RCPT_FILE_NM} /* 송수신파일명 */ ,SND_RCPT_DOC_NO = #{SND_RCPT_DOC_NO} /* 송수신문서번호 */ ,HNDL_DY_TM = SYSDATE /* 처리일시 */ ,HNDL_P_ENO = #{HNDL_P_ENO} /* 처리자사번 */ ,RPR_CHRG_P_RCG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyyMMdd') /* 보고담당자승인일자 */ ,RPR_CHRG_P_RCG_TM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') /* 보고담당자승인시간 */ ,FNL_HNDL_FNSH_TM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') /* 최종처리완료시간 */ ,SND_RCPT_TM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') /* 송수신시간 */ WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT 'CAC' || TO_CHAR(LPAD(SUBSTR(NVL(MAX(SSPS_DL_ID),'CAC000000000'),4,9) + '1','9','0')) AS SSPS_DL_ID FROM NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_CAC} AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CAC'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC66B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD ,SSPS_TYP_CD ,SSPS_DL_RPR_CCD ,DL_P_RNMCNO ,RNM_PR_DL_SQ ,RPR_CCD ,RPR_PRGRS_CCD ,RPR_DT ,SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_CD ,SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_NM ,RPR_RSPSB_P_ENO ,RPR_RSPSB_P_NM ,RPR_CHRG_P_ENO ,RPR_CHRG_P_NM ,RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,OK_CCD ,RNM_PR_TL_DL_CNT ,XCL_RSN_CNTNT ,FRST_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,FRST_SSPS_DL_ID ,PRV_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,PRV_SSPS_DL_ID ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_CAC} ,#{SSPS_DL_ID_CAC} ,'CAC' ,SSPS_TYP_CD ,SSPS_DL_RPR_CCD ,DL_P_RNMCNO ,#{RNM_PR_DL_SQ} ,#{RPR_CCD} ,#{RPR_PRGRS_CCD} ,RPR_DT ,SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_CD ,SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_NM ,RPR_RSPSB_P_ENO ,RPR_RSPSB_P_NM ,RPR_CHRG_P_ENO ,RPR_CHRG_P_NM ,RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,#{OK_CCD} ,#{RNM_PR_TL_DL_CNT} ,#{XCL_RSN_CNTNT} ,CASE WHEN SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' THEN SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ELSE #{FRST_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} END ,CASE WHEN SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' THEN SSPS_DL_ID ELSE #{FRST_SSPS_DL_ID} END ,SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AS PRV_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID AS PRV_SSPS_DL_ID FROM NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

INSERT INTO NIC71B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,GDS_OPN_DT ,GDS_OPN_BRN_CD ,AC_OPN_BRN_NM ,MN_DL_DPRT_CD ,MN_DL_DPRT_NM ,AC_OPN_BRN_PST_NO ,AC_OPN_PRXY_F ,AC_OPN_OBJ_CCD ,DL_GDS_CD ,GDS_TYP_DTLS_NM ,ADT_TRGT_STRT_DT ,ADT_TRGT_END_DT ,INVSTR_CCD ,DL_OBJ_CCD ,STAT_DATE ,STAT_CD ,INSR_JAMT ,PREM_PYMD_DVCD ,EXPR_DATE ,GOOD_CODE_DTAL ,GOOD_CODE_ITEM ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,RNMCNO ,CS_NM ,DPT_CD ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_CAC} ,#{SSPS_DL_ID_CAC} ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,GDS_OPN_DT ,GDS_OPN_BRN_CD ,AC_OPN_BRN_NM ,MN_DL_DPRT_CD ,MN_DL_DPRT_NM ,AC_OPN_BRN_PST_NO ,AC_OPN_PRXY_F ,AC_OPN_OBJ_CCD ,DL_GDS_CD ,GDS_TYP_DTLS_NM ,ADT_TRGT_STRT_DT ,ADT_TRGT_END_DT ,INVSTR_CCD ,DL_OBJ_CCD ,STAT_DATE ,STAT_CD ,INSR_JAMT ,PREM_PYMD_DVCD ,EXPR_DATE ,GOOD_CODE_DTAL ,GOOD_CODE_ITEM ,SYSDATE ,#{AML_LOGIN_ID} ,RNMCNO ,CS_NM ,DPT_CD FROM NIC71B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

INSERT INTO NIC75B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,DL_TM ,STR_DL_KND_CD ,CTR_DL_KND_CD ,DL_KND_NM ,DL_WY_CD ,DL_WY_NM ,DL_CHNNL_CD ,DL_CHNNL_NM ,SMRY_TYP_CD ,SMRY_TYP_NM ,DL_UPRC ,DL_Q ,DL_AMT ,EC_AMT ,CRNCY_CD ,FCRNCY_DL_AMT ,USD_EXCH_AMT ,FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD ,FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD_NM ,DL_TYP_CD ,CSH ,CHCK_AMT ,STND_IS_CD ,STND_IS_CD_NM ,CSH_PY_FOGN_NM ,CSH_PY_FOGN_CD ,CSH_PY_BRN_NM ,CSH_PY_BRN_CD ,CSH_PY_BRN_PST_NO ,CNCT_AC_NO ,SCRTS_BLNC ,TFND_RA ,RCVBL_AMT_RA ,FNCNG_AND_SL_AMT ,HANDLNG_BRN_CD ,HANDLNG_BRN_NM ,HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO ,CHRG_P_ENO ,CHRG_P_NM ,BNK_BRN_CD ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,OGN_CD ,LN_AMT ,LN_INT_AMT ,I_AMT_P_NM ,I_AMT_P_RNM_NO ,I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,I_AMT_P_TEL_NO ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_CAC} ,#{SSPS_DL_ID_CAC} ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,DL_TM ,STR_DL_KND_CD ,CTR_DL_KND_CD ,DL_KND_NM ,DL_WY_CD ,DL_WY_NM ,DL_CHNNL_CD ,DL_CHNNL_NM ,SMRY_TYP_CD ,SMRY_TYP_NM ,DL_UPRC ,DL_Q ,DL_AMT ,EC_AMT ,CRNCY_CD ,FCRNCY_DL_AMT ,USD_EXCH_AMT ,FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD ,FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD_NM ,DL_TYP_CD ,CSH ,CHCK_AMT ,STND_IS_CD ,STND_IS_CD_NM ,CSH_PY_FOGN_NM ,CSH_PY_FOGN_CD ,CSH_PY_BRN_NM ,CSH_PY_BRN_CD ,CSH_PY_BRN_PST_NO ,CNCT_AC_NO ,SCRTS_BLNC ,TFND_RA ,RCVBL_AMT_RA ,FNCNG_AND_SL_AMT ,HANDLNG_BRN_CD ,HANDLNG_BRN_NM ,HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO ,CHRG_P_ENO ,CHRG_P_NM ,BNK_BRN_CD ,SYSDATE ,#{AML_LOGIN_ID} ,OGN_CD ,LN_AMT ,LN_INT_AMT ,I_AMT_P_NM ,I_AMT_P_RNM_NO ,I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,I_AMT_P_TEL_NO FROM NIC75B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

INSERT INTO NIC83B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_PST_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_OBJ_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_OBJ_CNTNT ,CPRTY_TRSNS_OPN_PRXY_F ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_DT ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CLSF_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_BRTDY ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_PST_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_ADDR ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_TEL_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_MBL_TEL_NO ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_CAC} ,#{SSPS_DL_ID_CAC} ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_PST_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_OBJ_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_OBJ_CNTNT ,CPRTY_TRSNS_OPN_PRXY_F ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_DT ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CLSF_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_BRTDY ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_PST_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_ADDR ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_TEL_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_MBL_TEL_NO ,SYSDATE ,#{AML_LOGIN_ID} FROM NIC83B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

INSERT INTO NIC73B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,MN_DL_BRN_CD ,MN_DL_BRN_NM ,DL_BRN_PST_NO ,RPR_PRGRS_CCD ,RPR_DT ,SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_CD ,SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_NM ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_CAC} ,#{SSPS_DL_ID_CAC} ,MN_DL_BRN_CD ,MN_DL_BRN_NM ,DL_BRN_PST_NO ,RPR_PRGRS_CCD ,RPR_DT ,SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_CD ,SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_NM FROM NIC73B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

INSERT INTO NIC70B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,DL_P_RNMCNO ,RNMCNO ,DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,RNM_PR_DL_SQ ,RNM_PR_TL_DL_CNT ,DL_P_NM ,DL_P_NTNLT_CD ,DL_P_NTNLT_NM ,DL_OBJ_CD ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,INDV_CORP_CCD ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_CAC} ,DL_P_RNMCNO ,RNMCNO ,DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,RNM_PR_DL_SQ ,RNM_PR_TL_DL_CNT ,DL_P_NM ,DL_P_NTNLT_CD ,DL_P_NTNLT_NM ,DL_OBJ_CD ,SYSDATE ,HNDL_P_ENO ,INDV_CORP_CCD FROM NIC70B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND DL_P_RNMCNO = ( SELECT I.DL_P_RNMCNO FROM NIC66B I WHERE I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}) AND 0 = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC70B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_CAC} AND DL_P_RNMCNO = ( SELECT I.DL_P_RNMCNO FROM NIC66B I WHERE I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}))
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*)OVER() AS TOTALCOUNT ,ROWNUM AS SEQ ,V.* FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT A.DL_DT ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.DL_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DL_DT_VIEW ,A.GNL_AC_NO ,A.GDS_NO ,A.DL_SQ ,A.DL_P_RNMCNO ,B.RNMCNO ,A.AI_SCORE ,A.AI_CLASS_CD ,A.AI_STR_YN ,GET_CODE_NAME('M044', B.DL_CHNNL_CD) AS DL_CHNNL -- 거래채널 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M045', B.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP -- 거래종류 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M046', B.DL_WY_CD) AS DL_WY -- 거래수단 ,B.DL_AMT -- 거래금액 ,(SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = B.HANDLNG_BRN_CD) AS BRN_NM -- 거래지점 FROM AI_STR_SCORE A ,NIC61B B
,NIC75B C
WHERE A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO AND A.GDS_NO = B.GDS_NO AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ
AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.DL_DT = C.DL_DT AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND A.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO AND A.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ
AND A.DL_DT >= #{stDate}
AND A.DL_DT <= #{edDate}
AND UPPER(B.RNMCNO ) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{RNMCNO}) || '%'
AND A.GNL_AC_NO LIKE '%' || #{GNL_AC_NO} || '%'
ORDER BY
DL_DT_VIEW RNMCNO GNL_AC_NO DL_TYP DL_TYP DL_AMT DL_WY DL_CHNNL AI_SCORE AI_CLASS_CD AI_STR_YN DL_DT_VIEW
ASC DESC
) V ) WHERE 1=1
AND SEQ >= ( ( #{thisPage} - 1 ) * #{pageCount} + 1 ) AND SEQ <= ( #{thisPage} * #{pageCount} )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT A.DL_DT ,A.AI_CLASS_CD --위험 분류 코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('AI03', A.AI_CLASS_CD) AS AI_CLASS_NM ,A.AI_SCORE --점수 ,B.AI_TYPE --변수 구분 코드 ,B.AI_FACTOR --변수ID ,B.AI_FACTOR_NM --변수 이름 ,B.AI_VALUE --변수값 ,B.AI_INF --영향도(%) ,B.AI_INF_D --영향도 방향 ,NVL( ( SELECT ((B.AI_INF-MIN(C.AI_INF))/NULLIF((MAX(C.AI_INF)-MIN(C.AI_INF)),0)*100) FROM AI_STR_ITEM C WHERE C.AI_FACTOR = B.AI_FACTOR), 0) AS AI_INF_LO_V --상대영향도 FROM AI_STR_SCORE A ,AI_STR_ITEM B WHERE A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.GDS_NO = B.GDS_NO AND A.GDS_NO = #{GDS_NO} AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ AND A.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO} ORDER BY AI_INF DESC )
WHERE ROWNUM <= #{top_flag}

SELECT A.DL_DT ,A.GNL_AC_NO ,A.GDS_NO ,A.DL_SQ ,A.DL_P_RNMCNO ,A.AI_SCORE ,A.AI_CLASS_NM ,B.AI_FACTOR_NM ,B.AI_VALUE ,B.AI_INF ,B.AI_INF_D FROM AML_TB_STR_AI_SCORE A ,AML_TB_STR_AI_ITEM B WHERE A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT AND A.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO AND A.GDS_NO = B.GDS_NO AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND B.AI_FACTOR_NM = #{AI_FACTOR_NM} ORDER BY AI_INF DESC
SELECT AI_FP_ID AS CODE ,AI_FP_ID AS NAME FROM AI_FP
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AI_MODEL ( AI_ML_CRT_DT ,AI_ML_ID ,AI_ML_TYP ,AI_ML_NM ,AI_ML_FILE ,AI_ML_L_DT ,AI_ML_L_DATA_CNT ,AI_ML_ACC ,AI_ML_PRC ,AI_ML_REC ,AI_ML_F1S ,AI_ML_ACTIVE ) VALUES ( TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,#{AI_ML_ID} ,#{AI_ML_TYP} ,#{AI_ML_NM} ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,'N' )
mapper.select: ( SELECT AI_ML_ID ,'-' AS AI_ML_PRE_ST_DT ,'INIT' AS AI_ML_PRE_ED_DT ,AI_ML_P_DATA_CNT ,AI_ML_ACC ,AI_ML_PRC ,AI_ML_REC ,AI_ML_F1S ,AI_ML_CF_TP ,AI_ML_CF_TN ,AI_ML_CF_FP ,AI_ML_CF_FN ,ACT_L ,ACT_M ,ACT_H ,ACT_PRE_L ,ACT_PRE_M ,ACT_PRE_H FROM AI_MODEL WHERE AI_ML_ID = #{AI_ML_ID} ) UNION ALL ( SELECT AI_ML_ID ,AI_ML_PRE_ST_DT ,AI_ML_PRE_ED_DT ,AI_ML_P_DATA_CNT ,AI_ML_ACC ,AI_ML_PRC ,AI_ML_REC ,AI_ML_F1S ,AI_ML_CF_TP ,AI_ML_CF_TN ,AI_ML_CF_FP ,AI_ML_CF_FN ,ACT_L ,ACT_M ,ACT_H ,ACT_PRE_L ,ACT_PRE_M ,ACT_PRE_H FROM AI_MODEL_HIST WHERE AI_ML_ID = #{AI_ML_ID} AND AI_ML_ACC IS NOT NULL )

SELECT A.AI_FP_ID ,A.AI_FP_QUERY ,A.AI_FP_EX_YN ,COUNT(B.AI_ML_ID) AS USE_ML_CNT FROM AI_FP A ,AI_ML_FP_MAP B WHERE A.AI_FP_ID = B.AI_FP_ID(+) GROUP BY A.AI_FP_ID, A.AI_FP_QUERY, A.AI_FP_EX_YN ORDER BY AI_FP_ID
SELECT AI_F_ID ,AI_F_NM ,AI_F_TYPE ,F_EX_REL_CD ,EX_REL_TB ,EX_REL_COL FROM AI_FEATURE WHERE AI_FP_ID = #{AI_FP_ID} ORDER BY EX_REL_TB, EX_REL_COL

SELECT SUBSTR(D.RS32_2,INSTR(D.RS32_2, '_',1,1)-LENGTH(D.RS32_2),INSTR(D.RS32_2, '_',-1,1)) AS STR_NO ,A.RS33_1 AS GRID_NO ,A.RS33_3 AS RS33_3 ,B.RS3A_1 AS RS3A_1 ,CASE E.RS4A_2 WHEN '1' THEN '개인' ELSE '법인' END AS INDV_CORP_CCD FROM BRS320TB D ,BRS330TB A ,BRS3A0TB B ,BRS360TB C ,BRS4A0TB E WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.RS31_1 = D.RS31_1 AND A.RS32_1 = D.RS32_1 AND SUBSTR(B.RS32_2,-LENGTH(#{SSPS_TYP_CD_RULE}),LENGTH(#{SSPS_TYP_CD_RULE})) = #{SSPS_TYP_CD_RULE} -- 시나리오ID AND A.RS31_1 = B.RS31_1 AND A.RS32_1 = B.RS32_1 AND A.RS33_1 = B.RS33_1 AND A.RS32_1 = ( SELECT MAX(X.RS32_1) FROM BRS330TB X WHERE X.RS31_1 = A.RS31_1 AND X.RS32_1 = A.RS32_1 ) AND B.RS34_1 = ( SELECT MAX(RS34_1) FROM BRS3A0TB X WHERE X.RS31_1 = B.RS31_1 AND X.RS32_1 = B.RS32_1 ) AND B.RS31_1 = C.RS31_1 AND B.RS32_1 = C.RS32_1 AND B.RS34_1 = C.RS34_1 AND B.RS35_1 = C.RS35_1 AND C.RS36_2 != 'D' AND B.RS35_1 = C.RS35_1 AND A.RS31_1 = E.RS43_1 AND B.RS35_1 = E.RS45_1 AND E.RS4A_2 = #{INDV_CORP_CCD} -- 개인,법인(1,2) ORDER BY A.RS33_1

SELECT TYPE_CD AS TS_TYPE_CD ,STR_VALUE || CASE WHEN BASE_YN = 'Y' THEN ' ★' ELSE '' END AS TS_STR_VALUE ,SUM(DAY_CNT) AS TI_SUM_CNT FROM AML_STR_VALUE2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND STR_CD = #{SSPS_TYP_CD_RULE} AND INDV_CORP_CCD = #{INDV_CORP_CCD} -- 개인법인구분 GROUP BY TYPE_CD ,STR_VALUE || CASE WHEN BASE_YN = 'Y' THEN ' ★' ELSE '' END ORDER BY TYPE_CD DESC

SELECT NVL(MIN(BASE_DT),'') AS MIN_BASE_DT ,NVL(MAX(BASE_DT),'') AS MAX_BASE_DT ,IN_VAL FROM AML_STR_VALUE2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND STR_CD = #{SSPS_TYP_CD_RULE} AND INDV_CORP_CCD = #{INDV_CORP_CCD} GROUP BY IN_VAL

SELECT NVL(MIN(BASE_DT),TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS((SYSDATE+1),-1),'YYYYMMDD')) AS MIN_BASE_DT ,NVL(MAX(BASE_DT),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')) AS MAX_BASE_DT ,STR_VALUE FROM AML_STR_VALUE2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND BASE_YN = 'Y' AND STR_CD = #{SSPS_TYP_CD_RULE} AND INDV_CORP_CCD = #{INDV_CORP_CCD} GROUP BY STR_VALUE
SELECT BASE_DT ,DAY_CNT FROM AML_STR_VALUE2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND STR_CD = #{SSPS_TYP_CD_RULE} AND INDV_CORP_CCD = #{INDV_CORP_CCD} -- 개인법인구분 AND STR_VALUE = #{STR_VALUE} ORDER BY BASE_DT DESC

WITH BASE_1 AS ( SELECT #{SSPS_TYP_CD_RULE} AS STR_NO
,REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE( XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT(E, A.RS4E_2) ORDER BY A.RS4E_1 ).EXTRACT('//text()').getCLOBVal(), '&', '&' ), ''', '''' ), '"', '"' ), '<', '<' ), '>', '>' ) AS SQL1
FROM BRS4E0TB A ,BRS430TB B WHERE A.RS43_1 = B.RS43_1 AND REPLACE(SUBSTR(B.RS43_3,1,6),'_','') = '혐의거래자' AND SUBSTR(B.RS43_3,INSTR(B.RS43_3, '_',1,1)-LENGTH(B.RS43_3),INSTR(B.RS43_3, '_',-1,1)) = #{SSPS_TYP_CD_RULE} -- 시나리오ID ) ,BASE_2 AS ( SELECT STR_NO ,NO_CD ,RS33_1 ,RS33_3 ,CASE WHEN RS33_3 LIKE '%율' THEN CASE YUL WHEN 0.5 THEN RS3A_1_1 - 10 WHEN 1 THEN RS3A_1_1 WHEN 2 THEN RS3A_1_1 + 10 END WHEN RS33_3 LIKE '%연령%' THEN RS3A_1_1 WHEN ROUND(RS3A_1_1 * YUL, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE ROUND(RS3A_1_1 * YUL, 0) END AS RS3A_1_1 ,CASE WHEN RS33_3 LIKE '%율' THEN CASE YUL WHEN 0.5 THEN RS3A_1_2 - 10 WHEN 1 THEN RS3A_1_2 WHEN 2 THEN RS3A_1_2 + 10 END WHEN RS33_3 LIKE '%연령%' THEN RS3A_1_2 WHEN ROUND(RS3A_1_2 * YUL, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE ROUND(RS3A_1_2 * YUL, 0) END AS RS3A_1_1 ,YUL_NO FROM ( SELECT #{SSPS_TYP_CD_RULE} AS STR_NO ,('{'||B.RS31_1||'::'||B.RS33_1||'}') NO_CD ,B.RS33_1 ,F.RS33_3 ,B.RS32_1 ,E.RS36_2 --개인/법인 ,CASE WHEN E.RS36_2 = '1' THEN ( CASE B.RS33_1 WHEN 1 THEN TO_NUMBER(#{ANAL_VALUE0}) WHEN 2 THEN TO_NUMBER(#{ANAL_VALUE1}) WHEN 3 THEN TO_NUMBER(#{ANAL_VALUE2}) WHEN 4 THEN TO_NUMBER(#{ANAL_VALUE3}) WHEN 5 THEN TO_NUMBER(#{ANAL_VALUE4}) END) END AS RS3A_1_1 ,CASE WHEN E.RS36_2 = '2' THEN ( CASE B.RS33_1 WHEN 1 THEN TO_NUMBER(#{ANAL_VALUE0}) WHEN 2 THEN TO_NUMBER(#{ANAL_VALUE1}) WHEN 3 THEN TO_NUMBER(#{ANAL_VALUE2}) WHEN 4 THEN TO_NUMBER(#{ANAL_VALUE3}) WHEN 5 THEN TO_NUMBER(#{ANAL_VALUE4}) END) END AS RS3A_1_2 FROM BRS440TB A ,BRS3A0TB B ,BRS320TB D ,BRS360TB E ,BRS330TB F WHERE A.RS43_1 = B.RS31_1 AND B.RS31_1 = D.RS31_1 AND A.RS44_1 = B.RS34_1 AND B.RS31_1 = E.RS31_1 AND B.RS32_1 = E.RS32_1 AND B.RS34_1 = E.RS34_1 AND B.RS35_1 = E.RS35_1 AND E.RS31_1 = F.RS31_1 AND E.RS32_1 = F.RS32_1 AND B.RS33_1 = F.RS33_1 AND E.RS36_1 = 2 AND E.RS36_2 =#{INDV_CORP_CCD} -- 개인/법인 AND REPLACE(SUBSTR(D.RS32_2,1,6),'_','') = '기준DATA' AND SUBSTR(D.RS32_2,INSTR(D.RS32_2, '_',1,1)-LENGTH(D.RS32_2),INSTR(D.RS32_2, '_',-1,1)) = #{SSPS_TYP_CD_RULE} -- 시나리오ID ) A ,( SELECT 1 AS YUL_NO ,0.5 AS YUL FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS YUL_NO ,1 AS YUL FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS YUL_NO ,2 AS YUL FROM DUAL ) B WHERE 1 = 1 ) SELECT STR_NO ,BASE_YN ,TYPE_CD ,CASE WHEN #{INDV_CORP_CCD} = '1' THEN S_CD1 ELSE S_CD2 END AS S_CD ,CASE WHEN #{INDV_CORP_CCD} = '1' THEN ('SELECT COUNT(*) AS C_CNT FROM ( '||REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(SQL1,CD1,VAL11),CD2,VAL12),CD3,VAL13),CD4,VAL14),CD5,VAL15),'[23]','''1'''),'[25]',(''''||(STR_NO||'X')||'''')),'-- 정상',''),'-- 발신','') ||' ) A') ELSE ('SELECT COUNT(*) AS C_CNT FROM ( '|| REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(SQL1,CD1,VAL21),CD2,VAL22),CD3,VAL23),CD4,VAL24),CD5,VAL25),'[23]','''2'''),'[25]',(''''||(STR_NO||'X')||'''')),'-- 정상',''),'-- 발신','')||' ) A') END AS SQL_1 FROM ( SELECT M.STR_NO ,SQL1 ,(A.YUL_NO||NVL(B.YUL_NO,'')||NVL(C.YUL_NO,'')||NVL(D.YUL_NO,'')||NVL(E.YUL_NO,'')) AS TYPE_CD ,CASE WHEN (NVL(A.YUL_NO,'2')||NVL(B.YUL_NO,'2')||NVL(C.YUL_NO,'2')||NVL(D.YUL_NO,'2')||NVL(E.YUL_NO,'2')) = '22222' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS BASE_YN ,(A.RS33_3||':'||A.RS3A_1_1 || CASE WHEN B.RS33_3 IS NOT NULL THEN (', '||B.RS33_3||':'||B.RS3A_1_1) ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN C.RS33_3 IS NOT NULL THEN (', '||C.RS33_3||':'||C.RS3A_1_1) ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN D.RS33_3 IS NOT NULL THEN (', '||D.RS33_3||':'||D.RS3A_1_1) ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN E.RS33_3 IS NOT NULL THEN (', '||E.RS33_3||':'||E.RS3A_1_1) ELSE '' END ) AS S_CD1 ,(A.RS33_3||':'||A.RS3A_1_2 || CASE WHEN B.RS33_3 IS NOT NULL THEN (', '||B.RS33_3||':'||B.RS3A_1_2) ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN C.RS33_3 IS NOT NULL THEN (', '||C.RS33_3||':'||C.RS3A_1_2) ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN D.RS33_3 IS NOT NULL THEN (', '||D.RS33_3||':'||D.RS3A_1_2) ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN E.RS33_3 IS NOT NULL THEN (', '||E.RS33_3||':'||E.RS3A_1_2) ELSE '' END ) AS S_CD2 ,NVL(A.NO_CD,'') AS CD1, NVL(A.RS3A_1_1,'') AS VAL11, NVL(A.RS3A_1_2,'') AS VAL21 ,NVL(B.NO_CD,'') AS CD2, NVL(B.RS3A_1_1,'') AS VAL12, NVL(B.RS3A_1_2,'') AS VAL22 ,NVL(C.NO_CD,'') AS CD3, NVL(C.RS3A_1_1,'') AS VAL13, NVL(C.RS3A_1_2,'') AS VAL23 ,NVL(D.NO_CD,'') AS CD4, NVL(D.RS3A_1_1,'') AS VAL14, NVL(D.RS3A_1_2,'') AS VAL24 ,NVL(E.NO_CD,'') AS CD5, NVL(E.RS3A_1_1,'') AS VAL15, NVL(E.RS3A_1_2,'') AS VAL25 FROM ( SELECT * FROM BASE_1 ) M LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM BASE_2 WHERE RS33_1 = 1 ) A ON M.STR_NO = A.STR_NO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM BASE_2 WHERE RS33_1 = 2 ) B ON M.STR_NO = B.STR_NO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM BASE_2 WHERE RS33_1 = 3 ) C ON M.STR_NO = C.STR_NO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM BASE_2 WHERE RS33_1 = 4 ) D ON M.STR_NO = D.STR_NO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM BASE_2 WHERE RS33_1 = 5 ) E ON M.STR_NO = E.STR_NO WHERE 1 = 1 ) A

SELECT LISTAGG(PARAM_NM, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY PARAM_NM) AS IN_PARAM FROM ( SELECT CASE RS33_1 WHEN 1 THEN ('('||A.RS33_1||')'||A.RS33_3||':'||#{ANAL_VALUE0}) WHEN 2 THEN ('('||A.RS33_1||')'||A.RS33_3||':'||#{ANAL_VALUE1}) WHEN 3 THEN ('('||A.RS33_1||')'||A.RS33_3||':'||#{ANAL_VALUE2}) WHEN 4 THEN ('('||A.RS33_1||')'||A.RS33_3||':'||#{ANAL_VALUE3}) WHEN 5 THEN ('('||A.RS33_1||')'||A.RS33_3||':'||#{ANAL_VALUE4}) ELSE '' END AS PARAM_NM FROM BRS330TB A , BRS320TB B WHERE A.RS31_1 = B.RS31_1 AND A.RS32_1 = B.RS32_1 AND SUBSTR(B.RS32_2,INSTR(B.RS32_2, '_',1,1)- LENGTH(B.RS32_2),INSTR(B.RS32_2, '_',-1,1)) = #{SSPS_TYP_CD_RULE} -- 시나리오ID AND A.RS32_1 = ( SELECT MAX(X.RS32_1) FROM BRS330TB X WHERE X.RS31_1 = A.RS31_1 AND X.RS32_1 = A.RS32_1 ) AND A.RS33_3 <> 'Query' ) A

WITH T_TEMP AS ( SELECT #{S_TYPE_CD} AS S_TYPE_CD ,SUBSTR( #{S_S_CD} || ',', 1, INSTR(#{S_S_CD} || ',', ',', 1, 1) - 1 ) AS S_S_CD_1 ,SUBSTR( #{S_S_CD} || ',', INSTR(#{S_S_CD} || ',', ',', 1, 1) + 1, INSTR(#{S_S_CD} || ',', ',', 1, 2) - INSTR(#{S_S_CD} || ',', ',', 1, 1) - 1 )AS S_S_CD_2 ,SUBSTR( #{S_S_CD} || ',', INSTR(#{S_S_CD} || ',', ',', 1, 2) + 1, INSTR(#{S_S_CD} || ',', ',', 1, 3) - INSTR(#{S_S_CD} || ',', ',', 1, 2) - 1 )AS S_S_CD_3 ,SUBSTR( #{S_S_CD} || ',', INSTR(#{S_S_CD} || ',', ',', 1, 3) + 1, INSTR(#{S_S_CD} || ',', ',', 1, 4) - INSTR(#{S_S_CD} || ',', ',', 1, 3) - 1 )AS S_S_CD_4 ,SUBSTR( #{S_S_CD} || ',', INSTR(#{S_S_CD} || ',', ',', 1, 4) + 1, INSTR(#{S_S_CD} || ',', ',', 1, 5) - INSTR(#{S_S_CD} || ',', ',', 1, 4) - 1 )AS S_S_CD_5 FROM DUAL ) SELECT S_S_CD_1 || CASE WHEN LENGTH(S_TYPE_CD) > 0 THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(S_TYPE_CD, 1, 1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN S_S_CD_1 LIKE '%율:%' THEN '(-10)' ELSE CASE WHEN S_S_CD_1 LIKE '%연령%' THEN '(고정)' ELSE CASE WHEN SUBSTR(S_S_CD_1, -2) = ':1' THEN '(MIN 1)' ELSE '(50%)' END END END WHEN SUBSTR(S_TYPE_CD, 1, 1) = '2' THEN '(100%)' WHEN SUBSTR(S_TYPE_CD, 1, 1) = '3' THEN CASE WHEN S_S_CD_1 LIKE '%율:%' THEN '(+10)' ELSE CASE WHEN S_S_CD_1 LIKE '%연령%' THEN '(고정)' ELSE '(200%)' END END END ||',' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN S_S_CD_1 <> S_S_CD_2 THEN S_S_CD_2 || CASE WHEN LENGTH(S_TYPE_CD) > 1 THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(S_TYPE_CD, 2, 1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN S_S_CD_2 LIKE '%율:%' THEN '(-10)' ELSE CASE WHEN S_S_CD_2 LIKE '%연령%' THEN '(고정)' ELSE CASE WHEN SUBSTR(S_S_CD_2, -2) = ':1' THEN '(MIN 1)' ELSE '(50%)' END END END WHEN SUBSTR(S_TYPE_CD, 2, 1) = '2' THEN '(100%)' WHEN SUBSTR(S_TYPE_CD, 2, 1) = '3' THEN CASE WHEN S_S_CD_2 LIKE '%율:%' THEN '(+10)' ELSE CASE WHEN S_S_CD_2 LIKE '%연령%' THEN '(고정)' ELSE '(200%)' END END END ||',' ELSE '' END ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN S_S_CD_2 <> S_S_CD_3 THEN S_S_CD_3 || CASE WHEN LENGTH(S_TYPE_CD) > 2 THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(S_TYPE_CD, 3, 1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN S_S_CD_3 LIKE '%율:%' THEN '(-10)' ELSE CASE WHEN S_S_CD_3 LIKE '%연령%' THEN '(고정)' ELSE CASE WHEN SUBSTR(S_S_CD_3, -2) = ':1' THEN '(MIN 1)' ELSE '(50%)' END END END WHEN SUBSTR(S_TYPE_CD, 3, 1) = '2' THEN '(100%)' WHEN SUBSTR(S_TYPE_CD, 3, 1) = '3' THEN CASE WHEN S_S_CD_3 LIKE '%율:%' THEN '(+10)' ELSE CASE WHEN S_S_CD_3 LIKE '%연령%' THEN '(고정)' ELSE '(200%)' END END END ||',' ELSE '' END ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN S_S_CD_3 <> S_S_CD_4 THEN S_S_CD_4 || CASE WHEN LENGTH(S_TYPE_CD) > 3 THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(S_TYPE_CD, 4, 1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN S_S_CD_4 LIKE '%율:%' THEN '(-10)' ELSE CASE WHEN S_S_CD_4 LIKE '%연령%' THEN '(고정)' ELSE CASE WHEN SUBSTR(S_S_CD_4, -2) = ':1' THEN '(MIN 1)' ELSE '(50%)' END END END WHEN SUBSTR(S_TYPE_CD, 4, 1) = '2' THEN '(100%)' WHEN SUBSTR(S_TYPE_CD, 4, 1) = '3' THEN CASE WHEN S_S_CD_4 LIKE '%율:%' THEN '(+10)' ELSE CASE WHEN S_S_CD_4 LIKE '%연령%' THEN '(고정)' ELSE '(200%)' END END END ||',' ELSE '' END ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN S_S_CD_4 <> S_S_CD_5 THEN S_S_CD_5 || CASE WHEN LENGTH(S_TYPE_CD) > 4 THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(S_TYPE_CD, 5, 1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN S_S_CD_5 LIKE '%율:%' THEN '(-10)' ELSE CASE WHEN S_S_CD_5 LIKE '%연령%' THEN '(고정)' ELSE CASE WHEN SUBSTR(S_S_CD_5, -2) = ':1' THEN '(MIN 1)' ELSE '(50%)' END END END WHEN SUBSTR(S_TYPE_CD, 5, 1) = '2' THEN '(100%)' WHEN SUBSTR(S_TYPE_CD, 5, 1) = '3' THEN CASE WHEN S_S_CD_5 LIKE '%율:%' THEN '(+10)' ELSE CASE WHEN S_S_CD_5 LIKE '%연령%' THEN '(고정)' ELSE '(200%)' END END END ||',' ELSE '' END ELSE '' END AS V_S_CD FROM T_TEMP
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC80B SET RPR_OGN_CD = #{RPR_OGN_CD} -- 보고기관코드 ,RPR_OGN_NM = #{RPR_OGN_NM} -- 보고기관명 ,RPR_RSPSB_P_NM = #{RPR_RSPSB_P_NM} -- 보고책임자명 ,RPR_CHRG_P_NM = #{RPR_CHRG_P_NM} -- 보고담당자명 ,RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO = #{RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO} -- 보고담당자전화번호 ,RPR_CHRG_P_CNFR_RCG_ST_CD = #{RPR_CHRG_P_CNFR_RCG_ST_CD} -- 보고담당자확인승인상태코드 ,RPR_CHRG_P_ENO = #{RPR_CHRG_P_ENO} -- 보고담당자사번 ,TRSMT_ST_CD = #{TRSMT_ST_CD} -- 전송상태코드 ,SND_RSLT_CD = #{SND_RSLT_CD} -- 발송결과코드 ,SND_RCPT_CCD = #{SND_RCPT_CCD} -- 송수신구분코드 ,SND_RCPT_FILE_NM = #{SND_RCPT_FILE_NM} -- 송수신파일명 ,SND_RCPT_DOC_NO = #{SND_RCPT_DOC_NO} -- 송수신문서번호 ,HNDL_DY_TM = SYSDATE -- 처리일시 ,HNDL_P_ENO = #{HNDL_P_ENO} -- 처리자사번 ,RPR_CHRG_P_RCG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') -- 보고담당자승인일자 ,RPR_CHRG_P_RCG_TM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') -- 보고담당자승인시간 ,FNL_HNDL_FNSH_TM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') -- 최종처리완료시간 ,SND_RCPT_TM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') -- 송수신시간 ,SND_BEFORE_RCPT_DOC_NO = #{SND_BEFORE_RCPT_DOC_NO} -- 종전문서번호 WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} -- 혐의거래생성일자 AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} -- 혐의거래ID
mapper.select: SELECT ITEM_CNTNT1 , --의심스러운 거래자 ITEM_CNTNT2 , --거래 발생일자 ITEM_CNTNT3 , --거래 발생장소(영업점) ITEM_CNTNT4 , --금융거래 수단(상품) ITEM_CNTNT5 , --금융거래 방법(특이거래) ITEM_CNTNT6 , --혐의거래로 판단한 사유 RPR_RSN_CNTNT , --종합의견 ATT_FILE_NM , --첨부파일명 작성 DOBT_DL_GRD_CD , --의심스러운 거래의 등급 설정 DOC_NM AS SEND_DOC_NM, --별도송부 문서명 작성 NVL((SELECT SND_RCPT_DOC_NO FROM NIC80B where SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} and SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND ROWNUM = 1),'') AS RE_DOC FROM NIC67B WHERE 1=1 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT T2.DL_DT||T2.DL_TM AS DL_DT_TM -- 거래 발생일자 , T2.HANDLNG_BRN_NM -- 거래 발생장소(영업점) , T2.DL_WY_NM -- 금융거래 수단(상품) , TRIG_CTNT -- 종합의견 , T1.TRIG_CTNT AS BIZ_DESC -- 혐의거래로 판단한 사유 , C.PRDT_NAME -- 종목명 FROM NIC66B T1, NIC75B T2, C_BIZ A, MMA010TB B, SID.IDO_A_UUP_PRODUCT C WHERE T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T2.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = T2.SSPS_DL_ID AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.BIZ_ID = B.RT30_1 AND B.MA01_8 = 'S' AND B.MA01_6 = T1.SSPS_TYP_CD AND T2.HANDLNG_BRN_NM IS NOT NULL AND T2.DL_WY_NM IS NOT NULL AND T2.ISUS_PRDT_ID = C.PRDT_ID(+) ORDER BY T2.DL_DT||T2.DL_TM DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT DECODE(NVL(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'Y'),'Y',B.ITEM_CNTNT1, A.ITEM_CNTNT1) AS ITEM_CNTNT1 --의심스러운 거래자 ,DECODE(NVL(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'Y'),'Y',B.ITEM_CNTNT2, A.ITEM_CNTNT2) AS ITEM_CNTNT2 --거래 발생일자 ,DECODE(NVL(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'Y'),'Y',B.ITEM_CNTNT3, A.ITEM_CNTNT3) AS ITEM_CNTNT3 --거래 발생장소(영업점) ,DECODE(NVL(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'Y'),'Y',B.ITEM_CNTNT4, A.ITEM_CNTNT4) AS ITEM_CNTNT4 --금융거래 수단(상품) ,DECODE(NVL(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'Y'),'Y',B.ITEM_CNTNT5, A.ITEM_CNTNT5) AS ITEM_CNTNT5 --금융거래 방법(특이거래) ,DECODE(NVL(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'Y'),'Y',B.ITEM_CNTNT6, A.ITEM_CNTNT6) AS ITEM_CNTNT6 --혐의거래로 판단한 사유 ,DECODE(NVL(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'Y'),'Y',B.RPR_RSN_CNTNT, A.RPR_RSN_CNTNT) AS RPR_RSN_CNTNT --종합의견 ,DECODE(NVL(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'Y'),'Y',B.ATT_FILE_NM, A.ATT_FILE_NM) AS ATT_FILE_NM --첨부파일명 작성 ,DECODE(NVL(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'Y'),'Y',B.DOBT_DL_GRD_CD, A.DOBT_DL_GRD_CD) AS DOBT_DL_GRD_CD --의심스러운 거래의 등급 설정 ,DECODE(NVL(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'Y'),'Y',B.DOC_NM, A.DOC_NM) AS SEND_DOC_NM --별도송부 문서명 작성 ,NVL( ( SELECT SND_RCPT_DOC_NO FROM NIC80B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND ROWNUM = 1),'') AS RE_DOC ,DECODE(NVL(A.AI_RPR_RSN_CNTNT,'Y'),'Y',B.AI_RPR_RSN_CNTNT, A.AI_RPR_RSN_CNTNT) AS AI_RPR_RSN_CNTNT --AI 종합의견 FROM NIC67B A ,( SELECT * FROM NIC88B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND MN_DL_BRN_CD = ( SELECT MIN(MN_DL_BRN_CD) FROM NIC88B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} ) ) B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID(+) = B.SSPS_DL_ID

SELECT CASE WHEN HG_RNK_CD = '000' THEN 'T' ELSE 'C' END AS GUBUN ,DOBT_TYP_KND_CD ,DOBT_TYP_KND_NM ,HG_RNK_CD FROM NIC69B A WHERE '20080101' BETWEEN APLC_DT AND APLC_STP_DT START WITH A.HG_RNK_CD = '000' CONNECT BY PRIOR A.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD = A.HG_RNK_CD ORDER BY A.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD

SELECT D.STKHD_NM COL19 ,D.RNM_CNFR_CCD COL20 FROM NIC66B A ,NIC70B B ,NIC79B C ,NIC74B D WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = C.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = D.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND D.STKHD_CCD = #{STKHD_CCD}
SELECT A.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD ,A.DOBT_TYP_KND_NM FROM NIC69B A ,NIC81B B WHERE A.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD = B.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD AND B.SCNR_ID = #{SSPS_TYP_CD} GROUP BY A.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD , A.DOBT_TYP_KND_NM

SELECT GNL_AC_NO ,ACNT_NO AS ACNT_NO ,OPN_BRN_CD ,Fn_Cdinfo_Var('DPT',A.OPN_BRN_CD,'') AS AC_OPN_BRN_NM ,MN_DL_DPRT_CD ,Fn_Cdinfo_Var('DPT',A.MN_DL_DPRT_CD,'') AS MN_DL_DPRT_NM ,AC_OPN_BRN_PST_NO ,GET_CODE_NAME('A105',A.AC_OPN_PRXY_F) AS AC_OPN_PRXY_F ,GET_CODE_NAME('M057',A.AC_TY_CD) AS AC_TY_NM ,CS_NM FROM NIC71B A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

SELECT GDS_NO ,GNL_AC_NO ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('AC', A.GNL_AC_NO, '') AS GNL_AC_NO_VIEW ,GDS_OPN_BRN_CD ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.GDS_OPN_BRN_CD, '') AS AC_OPN_BRN_NM ,MN_DL_DPRT_CD ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.MN_DL_DPRT_CD, '') AS MN_DL_DPRT_NM ,AC_OPN_BRN_PST_NO ,GET_CODE_NAME('A105', A.AC_OPN_PRXY_F) AS AC_OPN_PRXY_F ,GET_CODE_NAME('M034', A.GDS_NO) AS GDS_NM FROM NIC71B A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

choose.when: SELECT MA01_6 AS CODE ,'[' || MA01_6 || '] ' || BIZ_NM AS NAME FROM C_BIZ A INNER JOIN MMA010TB B ON A.BIZ_ID = B.RT30_1 WHERE A.EDIT_YN ='Y' ORDER BY CODE
choose.otherwise: SELECT A.SCNR_ID AS CODE ,'[' || A.SCNR_ID || ']' || A.SCNR_NM AS NAME FROM TMS_APPL A ORDER BY CODE

mapper.select: SELECT DOBT_TYP_KND_CD AS CODE ,DOBT_TYP_KND_NM AS NAME FROM NIC69B WHERE HG_RNK_CD = '000' ORDER BY DOBT_TYP_KND_CD

SELECT MN_DL_BRN_CD AS CODE ,( SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.MN_DL_BRN_CD) AS NAME FROM NIC73B A WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{param0} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{param1} UNION SELECT MN_DL_BRN_CD ,( SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = B.MN_DL_BRN_CD) AS NAME FROM NIC88B B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{param2} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{param3}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM NIC69B WHERE DOBT_TYP_KND_CD = #{DOBT_TYP_KND_CD}
mapper.select: SELECT '0' AS SELECTED ,DOBT_TYP_KND_CD COL0 ,DOBT_TYP_KND_NM COL1 ,APLC_DT COL2 ,APLC_STP_DT COL3 ,HG_RNK_CD COL4 FROM NIC69B WHERE DOBT_TYP_KND_CD NOT IN ('500', '501') AND HG_RNK_CD NOT IN ('000') ORDER BY DOBT_TYP_KND_CD

SELECT '0' AS SELECTED ,DOBT_TYP_KND_CD COL0 ,DOBT_TYP_KND_NM COL1 ,APLC_DT COL2 ,APLC_STP_DT COL3 ,TO_CHAR(HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD') COL4 -- 0609 ,HG_RNK_CD COL5 FROM NIC69B WHERE DOBT_TYP_KND_CD NOT IN ('500', '501') -- 0609 AND HG_RNK_CD NOT IN ('000') -- 상위코드 ORDER BY DOBT_TYP_KND_CD
SELECT '0' AS SELECTED ,DOBT_TYP_KND_CD COL1 ,A.SQ COL2 ,A.SCNR_ID COL3 ,'[' || SCNR_ID || '] ' || GET_SYNARIO_NAME(SCNR_ID) COL4 FROM NIC81B A WHERE A.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD = #{DOBT_TYP_KND_CD}

SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AS BOARD_ID ,SSPS_DL_ID AS BOARD_SEQ ,FILE_SEQ ,FILE_POS ,USER_FILE_NM ,PHSC_FILE_NM ,FILE_SIZE ,DOWNLOAD_COUNT ,REG_ID ,GET_USER_NAME(REG_ID) AS REG_NM ,REG_DT FROM NIC64B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} ORDER BY BOARD_SEQ , FILE_SEQ
