SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AS BOARD_ID ,SSPS_DL_ID AS BOARD_SEQ ,FILE_SEQ ,FILE_POS ,USER_FILE_NM ,PHSC_FILE_NM ,FILE_SIZE ,DOWNLOAD_COUNT ,REG_ID ,GET_USER_NAME(REG_ID) AS REG_NM ,REG_DT FROM NIC64B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{BOARD_ID} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{BOARD_SEQ} AND FILE_SEQ = #{FILE_SEQ}
SELECT 'CAC' || TO_CHAR(LPAD(SUBSTR(NVL(MAX(SSPS_DL_ID),'CAC000000000'),4,9) + '1','9','0')) AS SSPS_DL_ID FROM NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CAC'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC66B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD, SSPS_TYP_CD, SSPS_DL_RPR_CCD, DL_P_RNMCNO, RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR, RNM_PR_DL_SQ, RPR_CCD, RPR_PRGRS_CCD, RPR_DT, SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_CD, SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_NM, RPR_RSPSB_P_ENO, RPR_RSPSB_P_NM, RPR_CHRG_P_ENO, RPR_CHRG_P_NM, RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO, HNDL_DY_TM, HNDL_P_ENO, OK_CCD, XCL_RSN_CNTNT, TRIG_CTNT ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_CAC}, #{SSPS_DL_ID_CAC}, 'CAC', SSPS_TYP_CD, SSPS_DL_RPR_CCD, DL_P_RNMCNO, RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR, RNM_PR_DL_SQ, '03', #{RPR_PRGRS_CCD}, RPR_DT, SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_CD, SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_NM, RPR_RSPSB_P_ENO, RPR_RSPSB_P_NM, RPR_CHRG_P_ENO, RPR_CHRG_P_NM, RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO, HNDL_DY_TM, HNDL_P_ENO, #{OK_CCD}, XCL_RSN_CNTNT, TRIG_CTNT FROM NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO NIC66B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD, SSPS_TYP_CD, SSPS_DL_RPR_CCD, DL_P_RNMCNO, RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR, RNM_PR_DL_SQ, RPR_CCD, RPR_PRGRS_CCD, RPR_DT, SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_CD, SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_NM, RPR_RSPSB_P_ENO, RPR_RSPSB_P_NM, RPR_CHRG_P_ENO, RPR_CHRG_P_NM, RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO, HNDL_DY_TM, HNDL_P_ENO, OK_CCD, XCL_RSN_CNTNT, TRIG_CTNT ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_CAC}, #{SSPS_DL_ID_CAC}, 'CAC', SSPS_TYP_CD, SSPS_DL_RPR_CCD, DL_P_RNMCNO, RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR, RNM_PR_DL_SQ, '03', #{RPR_PRGRS_CCD}, RPR_DT, SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_CD, SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_NM, RPR_RSPSB_P_ENO, RPR_RSPSB_P_NM, RPR_CHRG_P_ENO, RPR_CHRG_P_NM, RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO, HNDL_DY_TM, HNDL_P_ENO, #{OK_CCD}, XCL_RSN_CNTNT, TRIG_CTNT FROM NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

INSERT INTO NIC71B SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_CAC} , #{SSPS_DL_ID_CAC} , GNL_AC_NO , AC_OPN_BRN_NM , MN_DL_DPRT_CD , MN_DL_DPRT_NM , AC_OPN_BRN_PST_NO , AC_OPN_PRXY_F , AC_OPN_OBJ_CCD , DL_OBJ_CCD , STAT_DATE , STAT_CD , GOOD_CODE_DTAL , GOOD_CODE_ITEM , SYSDATE , #{AML_LOGIN_ID} , RNMCNO , CS_NM , MERGE_YN , AC_TY_CD , AC_OPN_DT , OPN_BRN_CD , PRFT_BRN_CD , PRFT_BRN_NM , ACNT_NO , SPRN_KEEP_TAGT_YN , SPRN_KEEP_DATE , GDS_NO FROM NIC71B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

INSERT INTO NIC75B SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_CAC} , #{SSPS_DL_ID_CAC} , GNL_AC_NO , GDS_NO , DL_DT , DL_SQ , DL_TM , STR_DL_KND_CD , CTR_DL_KND_CD , DL_KND_NM , DL_WY_CD , DL_WY_NM , DL_CHNNL_CD , DL_CHNNL_NM , SMRY_TYP_CD , SMRY_TYP_NM , DL_UPRC , DL_Q , DL_AMT , EC_AMT , CRNCY_CD , FCRNCY_DL_AMT , USD_EXCH_AMT , FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD , FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD_NM , DL_TYP_CD , CSH , CHCK_AMT , STND_IS_CD , STND_IS_CD_NM , CSH_PY_FOGN_NM , CSH_PY_FOGN_CD , CSH_PY_BRN_NM , CSH_PY_BRN_CD , CSH_PY_BRN_PST_NO , CNCT_AC_NO , SCRTS_BLNC , TFND_RA , RCVBL_AMT_RA , FNCNG_AND_SL_AMT , HANDLNG_BRN_CD , HANDLNG_BRN_NM , HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO , CRCT_CCD , CHRG_P_RPR_ST_CCD , CHRG_P_ENO , CHRG_P_NM , RPR_TRGT_XCL_DL_CCD , BNK_BRN_CD , SYSDATE , #{AML_LOGIN_ID} , OGN_CD , LN_AMT , LN_INT_AMT , I_AMT_P_NM , I_AMT_P_RNM_NO , I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD , I_AMT_P_TEL_NO , MERGE_YN , GDS_DIT_CD , TRDG_CODE , DTLS_TRDG_NAME , FUNS_SCRS_CODE , TRTY_DTLS_CODE , ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE , PRDT_CLSN_CODE , SERV_CLSN_CODE , ISUS_PRDT_ID , RLTV_ACNT_ID , RNMCNO , MNGG_BRN_CD , PRFT_BRN_CD , SPRN_KEEP_TAGT_YN , SPRN_KEEP_DATE , FRST_CSH FROM NIC75B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

INSERT INTO NIC83B SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_CAC} , #{SSPS_DL_ID_CAC} , GNL_AC_NO , GDS_NO , DL_DT , DL_SQ , CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD , CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM , CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD , CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD_NM , CPRTY_TRSNS_PST_NO , CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_OBJ_CD , CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_OBJ_CNTNT , CPRTY_TRSNS_OPN_PRXY_F , CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_DT , CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO , CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM , CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO , CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD , CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CLSF_NM , CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD , CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_BRTDY , CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_PST_NO , CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_ADDR , CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_TEL_NO , CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_MBL_TEL_NO , SYSDATE , #{AML_LOGIN_ID} , '' FROM NIC83B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC70B SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_CAC} ,DL_P_RNMCNO ,CS_NO ,DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,RNM_PR_DL_SQ ,RNM_PR_TL_DL_CNT ,DL_P_NM ,DL_P_NTNLT_CD ,DL_P_NTNLT_NM ,DL_OBJ_CD ,SYSDATE ,HNDL_P_ENO ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,SPRN_KEEP_TAGT_YN ,SPRN_KEEP_DATE FROM NIC70B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND DL_P_RNMCNO = ( SELECT DL_P_RNMCNO FROM NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} ) AND 0 = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC70B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_CAC} AND DL_P_RNMCNO = ( SELECT DL_P_RNMCNO FROM NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} ) )

INSERT INTO NIC71B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,GDS_OPN_DT ,GDS_OPN_BRN_CD ,AC_OPN_BRN_NM ,MN_DL_DPRT_CD ,MN_DL_DPRT_NM ,AC_OPN_BRN_PST_NO ,AC_OPN_PRXY_F ,AC_OPN_OBJ_CCD ,DL_GDS_CD ,GDS_TYP_DTLS_NM ,ADT_TRGT_STRT_DT ,ADT_TRGT_END_DT ,INVSTR_CCD ,DL_OBJ_CCD ,STAT_DATE ,STAT_CD ,INSR_JAMT ,PREM_PYMD_DVCD ,EXPR_DATE ,GOOD_CODE_DTAL ,GOOD_CODE_ITEM ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,RNMCNO ,CS_NM ,DPT_CD ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_CAC} ,#{SSPS_DL_ID_CAC} ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,GDS_OPN_DT ,GDS_OPN_BRN_CD ,AC_OPN_BRN_NM ,MN_DL_DPRT_CD ,MN_DL_DPRT_NM ,AC_OPN_BRN_PST_NO ,AC_OPN_PRXY_F ,AC_OPN_OBJ_CCD ,DL_GDS_CD ,GDS_TYP_DTLS_NM ,ADT_TRGT_STRT_DT ,ADT_TRGT_END_DT ,INVSTR_CCD ,DL_OBJ_CCD ,STAT_DATE ,STAT_CD ,INSR_JAMT ,PREM_PYMD_DVCD ,EXPR_DATE ,GOOD_CODE_DTAL ,GOOD_CODE_ITEM ,SYSDATE ,#{AML_LOGIN_ID} ,RNMCNO ,CS_NM ,DPT_CD FROM NIC71B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

INSERT INTO NIC75B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,DL_TM ,STR_DL_KND_CD ,CTR_DL_KND_CD ,DL_KND_NM ,DL_WY_CD ,DL_WY_NM ,DL_CHNNL_CD ,DL_CHNNL_NM ,SMRY_TYP_CD ,SMRY_TYP_NM ,DL_UPRC ,DL_Q ,DL_AMT ,EC_AMT ,CRNCY_CD ,FCRNCY_DL_AMT ,USD_EXCH_AMT ,FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD ,FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD_NM ,DL_TYP_CD ,CSH ,CHCK_AMT ,STND_IS_CD ,STND_IS_CD_NM ,CSH_PY_FOGN_NM ,CSH_PY_FOGN_CD ,CSH_PY_BRN_NM ,CSH_PY_BRN_CD ,CSH_PY_BRN_PST_NO ,CNCT_AC_NO ,SCRTS_BLNC ,TFND_RA ,RCVBL_AMT_RA ,FNCNG_AND_SL_AMT ,HANDLNG_BRN_CD ,HANDLNG_BRN_NM ,HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO ,CHRG_P_ENO ,CHRG_P_NM ,BNK_BRN_CD ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,OGN_CD ,LN_AMT ,LN_INT_AMT ,I_AMT_P_NM ,I_AMT_P_RNM_NO ,I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,I_AMT_P_TEL_NO ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_CAC} ,#{SSPS_DL_ID_CAC} ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,DL_TM ,STR_DL_KND_CD ,CTR_DL_KND_CD ,DL_KND_NM ,DL_WY_CD ,DL_WY_NM ,DL_CHNNL_CD ,DL_CHNNL_NM ,SMRY_TYP_CD ,SMRY_TYP_NM ,DL_UPRC ,DL_Q ,DL_AMT ,EC_AMT ,CRNCY_CD ,FCRNCY_DL_AMT ,USD_EXCH_AMT ,FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD ,FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD_NM ,DL_TYP_CD ,CSH ,CHCK_AMT ,STND_IS_CD ,STND_IS_CD_NM ,CSH_PY_FOGN_NM ,CSH_PY_FOGN_CD ,CSH_PY_BRN_NM ,CSH_PY_BRN_CD ,CSH_PY_BRN_PST_NO ,CNCT_AC_NO ,SCRTS_BLNC ,TFND_RA ,RCVBL_AMT_RA ,FNCNG_AND_SL_AMT ,HANDLNG_BRN_CD ,HANDLNG_BRN_NM ,HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO ,CHRG_P_ENO ,CHRG_P_NM ,BNK_BRN_CD ,SYSDATE ,#{AML_LOGIN_ID} ,OGN_CD ,LN_AMT ,LN_INT_AMT ,I_AMT_P_NM ,I_AMT_P_RNM_NO ,I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,I_AMT_P_TEL_NO FROM NIC75B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}

INSERT INTO NIC83B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_PST_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_OBJ_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_OBJ_CNTNT ,CPRTY_TRSNS_OPN_PRXY_F ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_DT ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CLSF_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_BRTDY ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_PST_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_ADDR ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_TEL_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_MBL_TEL_NO, HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_CAC} ,#{SSPS_DL_ID_CAC} ,GNL_AC_NO ,GDS_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_PST_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_OBJ_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_OBJ_CNTNT ,CPRTY_TRSNS_OPN_PRXY_F ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OPN_DT ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CLSF_NM ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_BRTDY ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_PST_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_ADDR ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_TEL_NO ,CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_MBL_TEL_NO ,SYSDATE ,#{AML_LOGIN_ID} FROM NIC83B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT V.KEY_DATE ,V.KEY_ID ,V.BOGO_STATUS ,V.KEY_CUST_ID ,V.KEY_CUST_SEQ ,V.DL_DT ,V.DL_TM FROM ( SELECT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AS KEY_DATE ,A.SSPS_DL_ID AS KEY_ID ,A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD AS BOGO_STATUS ,A.DL_P_RNMCNO AS KEY_CUST_ID ,A.RNM_PR_DL_SQ AS KEY_CUST_SEQ ,C.DL_DT AS DL_DT ,C.DL_TM AS DL_TM FROM NIC66B A ,NIC71B B ,NIC75B C ,NIC83B D WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND B.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND C.GNL_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND C.GDS_NO = D.GDS_NO(+) AND C.DL_DT = D.DL_DT(+) AND C.DL_SQ = D.DL_SQ(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = #{CMD_SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD_CTR} UNION ALL SELECT E.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AS KEY_DATE ,E.SSPS_DL_ID AS KEY_ID ,E.RPR_PRGRS_CCD AS BOGO_STATUS ,E.DL_P_RNMCNO AS KEY_CUST_ID ,E.RNM_PR_DL_SQ AS KEY_CUST_SEQ ,I.DL_DT AS DL_DT ,I.DL_TM AS DL_TM FROM NIC66B E ,NIC84B F ,NIC66B G ,NIC71B H ,NIC75B I ,NIC83B J WHERE E.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = F.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND E.SSPS_DL_ID = F.SSPS_DL_ID AND F.RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR = G.RPR_DOC_NO_DL_YR AND F.RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ = G.RPR_DOC_NO_FNL_SQ AND G.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = H.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND G.SSPS_DL_ID = H.SSPS_DL_ID AND H.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND H.SSPS_DL_ID = I.SSPS_DL_ID AND H.GNL_AC_NO = I.GNL_AC_NO AND H.GDS_NO = I.GDS_NO AND I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = J.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND I.GNL_AC_NO = J.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND I.GDS_NO = J.GDS_NO(+) AND I.DL_DT = J.DL_DT(+) AND I.DL_SQ = J.DL_SQ(+) AND E.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND E.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = #{Cmd_SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD_CAC} ) V ORDER BY V.DL_DT, V.KEY_CUST_ID, V.DL_TM

SELECT DISTINCT NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MAX(T3.DL_DT),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY')) KEY_YEAR FROM NIC66B A ,NIC71B B ,NIC75B C ,NIC83B D WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND B.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND C.GNL_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND C.GDS_NO = D.GDS_NO(+) AND C.DL_DT = D.DL_DT(+) AND C.DL_SQ = D.DL_SQ(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD}
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC80B SET RPR_OGN_CD = #{RPR_OGN_CD} -- 보고기관코드 ,RPR_OGN_NM = #{RPR_OGN_NM} -- 보고기관명 ,RPR_RSPSB_P_NM = #{RPR_RSPSB_P_NM} -- 보고책임자명 ,RPR_CHRG_P_NM = #{RPR_CHRG_P_NM} -- 보고담당자명 ,RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO = #{RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO} -- 보고담당자전화번호 ,RPR_CHRG_P_CNFR_RCG_ST_CD = #{RPR_CHRG_P_CNFR_RCG_ST_CD} -- 보고담당자확인승인상태코드 ,RPR_CHRG_P_ENO = #{RPR_CHRG_P_ENO} -- 보고담당자사번 ,TRSMT_ST_CD = #{TRSMT_ST_CD} -- 전송상태코드 ,SND_RSLT_CD = #{SND_RSLT_CD} -- 발송결과코드 ,SND_RCPT_CCD = #{SND_RCPT_CCD} -- 송수신구분코드 ,SND_RCPT_FILE_NM = #{SND_RCPT_FILE_NM} -- 송수신파일명 ,SND_RCPT_DOC_NO = #{SND_RCPT_DOC_NO} -- 송수신문서번호 ,HNDL_DY_TM = SYSDATE -- 처리일시 ,HNDL_P_ENO = #{HNDL_P_ENO} -- 처리자사번 ,RPR_CHRG_P_RCG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyyMMdd') -- 보고담당자승인일자 ,RPR_CHRG_P_RCG_TM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') -- 보고담당자승인시간 ,FNL_HNDL_FNSH_TM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') -- 최종처리완료시간 ,SND_RCPT_TM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') -- 송수신시간 WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} -- 혐의거래생성일자 AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} -- 혐의거래ID
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(DOC_SQ), 0) + 1 AS DOC_NO FROM NIC66B WHERE DOC_NO_YR = #{DOC_NO_YR} AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD in ('CTR','CAC')

SELECT TRNS_OGN_CD, TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW ,BRN_CD ,BRN_NM ,RPR_OGN_NM ,RPR_RSPSB_P_ENO ,RPR_RSPSB_P_NM ,RPR_CHRG_P_ENO ,RPR_CHRG_P_NM ,RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO ,TO_CHAR(HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO FROM NIC86B

SELECT TRNS_OGN_CD ,BRN_CD ,BRN_NM ,RPR_OGN_NM ,RPR_RSPSB_P_ENO ,RPR_RSPSB_P_NM ,RPR_CHRG_P_ENO ,RPR_CHRG_P_NM ,RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO ,TO_CHAR(HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO FROM NIC86B

SELECT A.CTR_STR_CCD CTR_STR_CCD ,A.RPR_YR RPR_YR ,A.RPR_DT ,MAX(A.SQ) AS SQ ,( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC80B I WHERE I.RPR_DT = A.RPR_DT AND I.CTR_STR_CCD ='C' AND I.SND_RCPT_CCD = '01') AS CNT_OK ,( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC80B I WHERE I.RPR_DT = A.RPR_DT AND I.CTR_STR_CCD ='C' AND I.SND_RCPT_CCD = '03') AS CNT_CANCEL ,A.TRSMT_ST_CD AS TRSMT_ST_CD ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MAX(A.FNL_HNDL_FNSH_TM),'HH24MISS'),'HH24:MI:SS') AS FNL_HNDL_FNSH_TM ,A.RPR_CHRG_P_ENO AS RPR_CHRG_P_ENO ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MAX(A.SND_RCPT_TM),'HH24MISS'),'HH24:MI:SS') AS SND_RCPT_TM ,( SELECT MIN(I.DOC_SQ) FROM NIC66B I ,NIC80B J WHERE I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = J.SSPS_DL_ID AND J.CTR_STR_CCD = A.CTR_STR_CCD AND J.RPR_DT = A.RPR_DT AND J.RPR_YR = A.RPR_YR ) AS MIN_DOC_SQ ,( SELECT MAX(I.DOC_SQ) FROM NIC66B I ,NIC80B J WHERE I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND I.SSPS_DL_ID = J.SSPS_DL_ID AND J.CTR_STR_CCD = A.CTR_STR_CCD AND J.RPR_DT = A.RPR_DT AND J.RPR_YR = A.RPR_YR ) AS MAX_DOC_SQ FROM NIC80B A WHERE A.RPR_DT BETWEEN #{START_DATE} AND #{END_DATE} AND A.CTR_STR_CCD = 'C' GROUP BY A.CTR_STR_CCD,A.RPR_YR, A.RPR_DT, A.TRSMT_ST_CD,A.RPR_CHRG_P_ENO ORDER BY A.RPR_DT

SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.FNL_HNDL_FNSH_TM,'HH24MISS'),'HH24:MI:SS') AS FNL_HNDL_FNSH_TM ,B.SND_RCPT_FILE_NM ,A.DOC_NO_YR||'-'||LPAD(A.DOC_SQ,'10','0') AS DOC_SQ ,B.TRSMT_ST_CD ,B.SND_RCPT_CNTNT FROM NIC66B A ,NIC80B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.CTR_STR_CCD = #{CTR_STR_CCD} AND B.RPR_YR = #{RPR_YR} AND B.RPR_DT = #{RPR_DT} AND B.SND_RSLT_CD = #{SND_RSLT_CD} -- S 전송,R 수신 ORDER BY FNL_HNDL_FNSH_TM DESC

SELECT ROWNUM AS SEQ ,W.* FROM ( SELECT V.* FROM ( SELECT GET_CODE_NAME('A301', NVL(OK_CCD, '0')) AS OK_CCD ,C.ACT_NAME AS ACT_NAME ,A.DPRT_NM ,A.RPR_P_NM ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT',A.RPR_P_DY_TM,'') RPR_P_DY_TM ,GET_CCD_NAME(A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, #{LANG_CD}) AS SN_PRC_CCD_NM ,A.CNTNT ,A.WORK_ID FROM NIC66B_W A ,WF_WORKLIST B ,WF_ACT C WHERE A.PAR_INST_ID = #{INST_ID} AND A.WORK_ID=B.WORK_ID AND B.ACT_ID=C.ACT_ID UNION ALL SELECT GET_CODE_NAME('A301','0') AS OK_CCD ,A.ACT_NAME ,D.DEP_TITLE ,U.USER_NM ,NULL ,GET_CCD_NAME('I', #{LANG_CD}) SN_PRC_CCD_NM ,'' ,B.WORK_ID FROM C_DEP_INFO D ,C_USER U ,WF_ACT A ,WF_WORKLIST B ,WF_WORK_PARTICIPANT E LEFT OUTER JOIN WF_WORK_PERFORMER F ON ( E.WORK_ID = F.WORK_ID AND E.PARTICIPANT_ID = F.PERFORMER_ID ) ,WF_PROC_INSTANCE G WHERE D.DEP_ID = U.DEP_ID AND U.USER_ID IN ( SELECT I.USER_ID FROM C_USER I ,C_USER_GROUP_ROLE J WHERE I.USER_ID = J.USER_ID AND ( I.DEP_ID || '.' || J.ROLE_ID = E.PARTICIPANT_ID OR TO_NUMBER(I.USER_ID) = TO_NUMBER(E.PARTICIPANT_ID ) ) AND I.DEL_YN = 'N' ) AND F.WORK_ID IS NULL AND B.ACT_ID = A.ACT_ID AND B.WORK_ID = E.WORK_ID AND B.WORK_STATUS_CD IN ('READY','ACTIVE') AND G.PAR_INST_ID = #{INST_ID} AND G.INST_ID = B.INST_ID AND B.WORK_ID = G.WORK_ID ) V ORDER BY V.WORK_ID ) W
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM NIC90B WHERE RPR_DT = #{RPR_DT}
mapper.select: SELECT SUBSTR(RPR_DT,7,2) COL0 ,RPR_DT COL1 ,DRY_CNTNT COL2 FROM NIC90B WHERE RPR_DT BETWEEN #{START_DT} AND #{END_DT} ORDER BY 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM NIC86B
mapper.select: SELECT A.*, ( SELECT SIDO || ' ' || GUGUN || ' ' || DONG || ' ' || BUNJI FROM NIC92B_ZIP WHERE ZIPCODE = A.RPR_ORG_PST_NO AND SEQ = A.SEQ AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS RPR_ORG_PST_ADDR FROM NIC86B A

SELECT SUBSTR(A.ZIPCODE, 0, 3)||'-'||SUBSTR(A.ZIPCODE, 4, 3) AS ZIPCODE ,A.SIDO AS SIDO ,A.GUGUN AS GUGUN ,A.DONG AS DONG ,A.BUNJI AS BUNJI ,A.SEQ FROM NIC92B_ZIP A WHERE A.DONG LIKE '%' || #{DONG} || '%' ORDER BY A.SIDO, A.GUGUN, A.DONG, A.BUNJI

SELECT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ,A.MN_DL_BRN_CD ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',A.MN_DL_BRN_CD,'') AS MN_DL_BRN_NM ,( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE B ,C_USER C ,C_DEP_INFO D WHERE B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND C.DEP_ID = D.DEP_ID AND B.GROUP_ID = 5 AND B.ROLE_ID = '3' AND D.DEP_DESC = A.MN_DL_BRN_CD ) AS BRANCH1 --지점담당자 ,( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE E , C_USER F , C_DEP_INFO G WHERE E.USER_ID = F.USER_ID AND F.DEP_ID = G.DEP_ID AND E.GROUP_ID = 5 AND E.ROLE_ID = '6' AND G.DEP_DESC = A.MN_DL_BRN_CD ) AS BRANCH2 --지점책임자 ,( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE H , C_USER I , C_DEP_INFO J WHERE H.USER_ID = I.USER_ID AND I.DEP_ID = J.DEP_ID AND H.GROUP_ID = 5 AND H.ROLE_ID = '11' AND J.DEP_DESC = A.MN_DL_BRN_CD ) AS BRANCH3 --지점장 FROM NIC73B A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC73B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,MN_DL_BRN_CD ,MN_DL_BRN_NM ,DL_BRN_PST_NO ,RPR_PRGRS_CCD ,RPR_DT ,SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_CD ,SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_NM ) ( SELECT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ,#{DPRT_CD} ,( SELECT B.DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B B WHERE B.DPRT_CD = #{DPRT_CD} ) ,A.DL_BRN_PST_NO ,A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD ,A.RPR_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_CD ,A.SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_NM FROM NIC73B A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.MN_DL_BRN_CD = #{MN_DL_BRN_CD} )
mapper.select: SELECT (B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT || '-' || B.SSPS_DL_ID) AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A ,GET_CODE_NAME('A101',B.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD) AS SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD_VIEW ,CASE WHEN B.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' THEN A.ACT_NAME ELSE GET_CODE_NAME('A029',B.RPR_PRGRS_CCD) END AS ACT_NAME ,GET_CODE_NAME('A301', (NVL(B.OK_CCD, '0')) ) AS OK_CCD_NM ,C.MN_DL_BRN_CD AS HANDLNG_BRN_CD ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',C.MN_DL_BRN_CD,'') AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM ,B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,B.SSPS_DL_ID ,B.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD ,B.RPR_PRGRS_CCD ,A.WORK_ID ,B.INST_ID ,A.PARTICIPANT_ID AS USER_ID ,( SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.PARTICIPANT_ID) AS USER_NM ,C.RPR_PRGRS_CCD AS NIC73B_CCD FROM V_WF_STANDBY A ,NIC66B B ,NIC73B C WHERE A.PARTICIPANT_ID IN ( SELECT USER_ID FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{LOGIN_ID} ) AND A.PAR_INST_ID = B.INST_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2'

SELECT D.PARTICIPANT_ID AS USER_ID ,B.DEP_DESC FROM NIC66B T1 ,V_WF_STANDBY D ,C_USER C ,C_DEP_INFO B WHERE T1.INST_ID = D.PAR_INST_ID AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND D.PARTICIPANT_ID = C.USER_ID AND C.DEP_ID = B.DEP_ID

SELECT GET_CODE_NAME('M049', A.FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD ) AS PURPOSE ,TRIM(FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD) PURPOSECODE /* 외환거래목적코드 */ FROM NIC75B A WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} /* 혐의거래생성일자*/ AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} /* 혐의거래ID */ AND GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} /* 종합계좌번호 */ AND GDS_NO = #{GDS_NO} /* 상품번호 */ AND DL_DT = #{DL_DT} /* 거래일자 */ AND DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} /* 거래일련번호 */ AND FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD IS NOT NULL /* 거래일련번호 */

SELECT DISTINCT ISSTOCKLIST, STOCKLISTTYPECODE,get_code_name('M060', A.STOCKLISTTYPECODE ) AS STOCKLISTTYPE FROM ( SELECT B.DL_P_RNMCNO, B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, NVL(B.LSTNG_F,'2') AS ISSTOCKLIST, --상장여부(법인/단체의 경우-법인구분) DECODE(NVL(B.LSTNG_F,'2') ,'2','99' ,'1', CASE WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '01') > 0 THEN '01' WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '02') > 0 THEN '02' END ) AS STOCKLISTTYPECODE --상장정보(법인/단체의 경우-상장정보) 거래소-거래소코드*, ... FROM NIC79B B , NIC66B C WHERE C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND B.LSTNG_F = '1' AND (INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '01') > 0 OR INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '02') > 0) AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} UNION SELECT B.DL_P_RNMCNO, B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, NVL(B.LSTNG_F,'2') AS ISSTOCKLIST, --상장여부(법인/단체의 경우-법인구분) DECODE(NVL(B.LSTNG_F,'2') ,'2','99' ,'1', CASE WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '11') > 0 THEN '03' WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '12') > 0 THEN '04' WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '13') > 0 THEN '05' WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '14') > 0 THEN '06' END ) AS STOCKLISTTYPECODE --상장정보(법인/단체의 경우-상장정보) 거래소-거래소코드*, ... FROM NIC79B B , NIC66B C WHERE C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND B.LSTNG_F = '1' AND ( INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '11') > 0 OR INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '12') > 0 OR INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '13') > 0 OR INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '14') > 0 ) AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} UNION SELECT B.DL_P_RNMCNO, B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, NVL(B.LSTNG_F,'2') AS ISSTOCKLIST, --상장여부(법인/단체의 경우-법인구분) DECODE(NVL(B.LSTNG_F,'2') ,'2','99' ,'1', CASE WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '11') > 0 THEN '03' WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '12') > 0 THEN '04' WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '13') > 0 THEN '05' WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '14') > 0 THEN '06' END ) AS STOCKLISTTYPECODE --상장정보(법인/단체의 경우-상장정보) 거래소-거래소코드*, ... FROM NIC79B B , NIC66B C WHERE C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND B.LSTNG_F = '2' AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} ) A

SELECT DISTINCT A.ISSTOCKLIST ,A.STOCKLISTTYPECODE ,GET_CODE_NAME('M060', A.STOCKLISTTYPECODE ) AS STOCKLISTTYPE FROM ( SELECT B.DL_P_RNMCNO ,B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,NVL(B.LSTNG_F,'N') AS ISSTOCKLIST --상장여부(법인/단체의 경우-법인구분) ,DECODE(NVL(B.LSTNG_F,'N') ,'N','99','Y', CASE WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '01') > 0 THEN '01' WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '02') > 0 THEN '02' END ) AS STOCKLISTTYPECODE --상장정보(법인/단체의 경우-상장정보) 거래소-거래소코드*, ... FROM NIC79B B ,NIC66B C WHERE C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND B.LSTNG_F = 'Y' AND (INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '01') > 0 OR INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '02') > 0) AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} UNION SELECT B.DL_P_RNMCNO ,B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,NVL(B.LSTNG_F,'N') AS ISSTOCKLIST --상장여부(법인/단체의 경우-법인구분) ,DECODE(NVL(B.LSTNG_F,'N') ,'N','99','Y', CASE WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '11') > 0 THEN '03' WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '12') > 0 THEN '04' WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '13') > 0 THEN '05' WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '14') > 0 THEN '06' END ) AS STOCKLISTTYPECODE --상장정보(법인/단체의 경우-상장정보) 거래소-거래소코드*, ... FROM NIC79B B ,NIC66B C WHERE C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND B.LSTNG_F = 'Y' AND ( INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '11') > 0 OR INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '12') > 0 OR INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '13') > 0 OR INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '14') > 0 ) AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} UNION SELECT B.DL_P_RNMCNO ,B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,NVL(B.LSTNG_F,'N') AS ISSTOCKLIST --상장여부(법인/단체의 경우-법인구분) ,DECODE(NVL(B.LSTNG_F,'N') ,'N','99','Y', CASE WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '11') > 0 THEN '03' WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '12') > 0 THEN '04' WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '13') > 0 THEN '05' WHEN INSTR(B.LSTNG_INFO, '14') > 0 THEN '06' END ) AS STOCKLISTTYPECODE --상장정보(법인/단체의 경우-상장정보) 거래소-거래소코드*, ... FROM NIC79B B ,NIC66B C WHERE C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND C.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND B.LSTNG_F = 'N' AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} ) A

SELECT QUESTION_NM QUESTION ,QUESTION_CD QUESTIONCODE ,HG_RNK_CD FROM ( SELECT DECODE(A.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD, '501', B.ETC_CNTNT, A.DOBT_TYP_KND_NM) QUESTION_NM ,A.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD QUESTION_CD ,DECODE(B.F_CCD, 'N' , ' : 예' , 'Y' , ' : 아니오') F_CCD ,SUBSTR(A.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD, 0, 1)||'00' AS HG_RNK_CD FROM NIC69B A, NIC68B B WHERE A.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD = B.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND SUBSTR(A.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD, 0, 1) || '00' = #{QST_TTL_CD} ) ORDER BY QUESTION_CD

SELECT B.DOBT_TYP_KND_NM QUESTIONTITLE ,B.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD QUESTIONTITLECODE FROM ( SELECT DECODE(I.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD,'501',J.ETC_CNTNT,I.DOBT_TYP_KND_NM) QUESTION_NM /* 의심유형종류명 */ ,I.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD QUESTION_CD /* 의심유형종류코드 */ ,DECODE(J.F_CCD, 'N' , ' : 예' , 'Y' , ' : 아니오') F_CCD ,I.HG_RNK_CD FROM NIC69B I ,NIC68B J WHERE I.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD = J.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD AND J.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD NOT IN('500','501') AND J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND J.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} ) A ,NIC69B B WHERE SUBSTR(A.QUESTION_CD,0,1) || '00' = B.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD GROUP BY B.DOBT_TYP_KND_NM, B.DOBT_TYP_KND_CD ORDER BY DOBT_TYP_KND_CD

SELECT SSPS_TYP_CD,SSPS_TYP_NM,CHG_DATE,RT31_1,ALT_CNT,RPT_CNT,RPT_RATE,COND1||CASE WHEN COND2 IS NOT NULL THEN ','||COND2 ELSE NULL END AS COND1 FROM ( SELECT SCNR_ID AS SSPS_TYP_CD , SCNR_NM AS SSPS_TYP_NM , LST_APPL_DTTM AS CHG_DATE --,(SELECT SET_VAL FROM TMS_SET_VAL X WHERE SCNR_ID = X.SCNR_ID AND ROWNUM=1 GROUP BY SCNR_ID, SET_VAL_CD D, SET_VAL) AS COND2 , NULL AS RT31_1 , 10 AS ALT_CNT , 2 AS RPT_CNT , 20 || '%' AS RPT_RATE , (SELECT SET_VAL FROM TMS_SET_VAL X WHERE A.SCNR_ID = X.SCNR_ID AND ROWNUM=1 AND SET_VAL_CD = 1 GROUP BY SCNR_ID, SET_VAL_CD, SET_VAL) AS COND1 , (SELECT SET_VAL FROM TMS_SET_VAL X WHERE A.SCNR_ID = X.SCNR_ID AND ROWNUM=1 AND SET_VAL_CD = 2 GROUP BY SCNR_ID, SET_VAL_CD, SET_VAL) AS COND2 FROM TMS_APPL A WHERE SCNR_ID = #{SSPS_TYP_CD} )

SELECT A.ALERT_ID ,A.ALERT_DT ,A.CUST_ID ,B.CS_NM ,A.ALERT_CNT ,A.STR_CNT ,A.STR_YN ,A.STR_CHRG_ID ,A.RULE_ID ,(SELECT SCNR_NM FROM TMS_APPL X WHERE A.RULE_ID = X.SCNR_ID) RULE_NM ,(ALERT_SCORE || '/' || ALERT_LEVEL) AS ALERT_SCORE ,A.ASSIGN ,A.CHRG_ID ,A.CHRG_NM ,A.ASSIGN_DT ,A.PROC_STEP ,B.INDV_CORP_CCD FROM TMP_ALERT A LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC01B B ON A.CUST_ID = B.RNMCNO WHERE 1=1 AND ROWNUM <= #{ROW_NUM} AND RULE_ID = #{SSPS_TYP_CD} AND A.PROC_STEP ='0'

SELECT #{SSPS_TYP_CD} AS STR_NO ,LISTAGG(A.RS4E_2) WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY A.RS4E_1) AS SQL1 FROM BRS4E0TB A ,BRS430TB B WHERE A.RS43_1 = B.RS43_1 AND REPLACE(SUBSTR(B.RS43_3,1,6),'_','') = '혐의거래자' AND SUBSTR(B.RS43_3,INSTR(B.RS43_3, '_',1,1)-LENGTH(B.RS43_3),INSTR(B.RS43_3, '_',-1,1)) = #{SSPS_TYP_CD} -- 시나리오ID
SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')|| LPAD(SEQ_TB_AML_ATLBTL_SIMUL.NEXTVAL,6,0) AS STR_ID FROM DUAL

SELECT A.ALERT_ID ,A.ALERT_DT ,A.CUST_ID ,B.CS_NM ,A.ALERT_CNT ,A.STR_CNT ,A.STR_YN ,A.STR_CHRG_ID ,A.RULE_ID ,(SELECT SCNR_NM FROM TMS_APPL X WHERE A.RULE_ID = X.SCNR_ID) RULE_NM ,(ALERT_SCORE || '/' || ALERT_LEVEL) AS ALERT_SCORE ,A.ASSIGN ,A.CHRG_ID ,A.CHRG_NM ,A.ASSIGN_DT ,A.PROC_STEP ,CASE WHEN A.PROC_STEP = 0 THEN '내부종결' ELSE '검토완료' END PROC_STEP_NM ,B.INDV_CORP_CCD FROM TMP_ALERT A LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC01B B ON A.CUST_ID = B.RNMCNO WHERE A.GUBN = #{GUBN} ORDER BY A.ALERT_DT DESC

SELECT ROWNUM ,A.ALERT_ID ,A.ALERT_DT ,A.CUST_ID ,B.CS_NM ,A.RULE_ID ,(SELECT I.BIZ_NM FROM C_BIZ I LEFT OUTER JOIN MMA010TB J ON I.BIZ_ID = J.RT30_1 AND J.MA01_8 ='S' WHERE J.MA01_6 = A.RULE_ID) RULE_NM ,(A.ALERT_SCORE || '/' || A.ALERT_LEVEL) AS ALERT_SCORE ,A.CLS_RSN ,A.PROC_STEP FROM TMP_ALERT A LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC01B B ON A.CUST_ID = B.RNMCNO WHERE A.ALERT_ID IN
#{alert}
mapper.update:
UPDATE TMP_ALERT SET PROC_STEP = 9 WHERE 1 = 1
AND ALERT_ID = #{alert}
mapper.select:
SELECT ROWNUM ,A.ALERT_ID ,A.ALERT_DT ,A.CUST_ID ,B.CS_NM ,A.RULE_ID ,(SELECT I.BIZ_NM FROM C_BIZ I LEFT OUTER JOIN MMA010TB J ON I.BIZ_ID = J.RT30_1 AND J.MA01_8 ='S' WHERE J.MA01_6 = A.RULE_ID) RULE_NM ,(A.ALERT_SCORE || '/' || A.ALERT_LEVEL) AS ALERT_SCORE ,A.SSPS_RSN ,A.CHRG_ID ,A.CHRG_NM ,A.PROC_STEP FROM TMP_ALERT A LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC01B B ON A.CUST_ID = B.RNMCNO WHERE A.ALERT_ID IN
#{alert}
mapper.update:
UPDATE TMP_ALERT SET PROC_STEP = 4 WHERE 1 = 1
AND ALERT_ID = #{alert}
mapper.select: SELECT INP_ITEM_CD ,INP_ITEM_NM ,SRT_SQ ,SSPS_DL_P_ITEM_YN ,SSPS_DL_ITEM_YN ,REG_ID ,REG_DTTM ,UPD_ID ,UPD_DTTM FROM TMS_QRY_INP_ITEM ORDER BY SRT_SQ
SELECT INP_ITEM_CD FROM TMS_QRY_INP_ITEM WHERE INP_ITEM_CD = #{INP_ITEM_CD}
SELECT CODE ,NAME FROM ( SELECT I.CNTNT AS CODE ,I.CD_NM AS NAME FROM NIC92B I WHERE I.CD = 'A045' ) ORDER BY CODE

SELECT BZDM_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A045', BZDM_CD) AS BZDM_NM ,'00' AS PAR_ID --FOR TREE ROOT NODE ,GET_CODE_NAME('A046', BIZ_CD) AS BIZ_NM ,BIZ_CD AS CODE ,GET_CODE_NAME('A046', BIZ_CD) AS NAME FROM TMS_BZDM_MNG WHERE BZDM_CD = #{BZDM_CD} UNION ALL SELECT A.BZDM_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A045', A.BZDM_CD) AS BZDM_NM ,A.BIZ_CD AS PAR_ID ,GET_CODE_NAME('A046', A.BIZ_CD) AS BIZ_NM ,B.SCNR_ID AS CODE ,NVL(B.SCNR_NM, GET_CODE_NAME('A046', A.BIZ_CD)) AS NAME FROM TMS_BZDM_MNG A LEFT OUTER JOIN TMS_REQ B ON (A.BZDM_CD = B.BZDM_CD AND A.BIZ_CD = B.BIZ_CD) WHERE A.BZDM_CD = #{BZDM_CD} AND B.SCNR_CCD = 'STR' ORDER BY CODE

SELECT A.SCNR_ID ,A.SCNR_NM ,A.BZDM_CD ,A.BIZ_CD ,A.SCNR_DESC ,A.AC_DL_CCD ,NVL( (SELECT DECODE(T.CS_CCD, '1', 'Y') FROM TMS_TRGT_CS_MNG T WHERE T.SCNR_ID = A.SCNR_ID AND T.CS_CCD = '1'), 'N') AS INDV_YN ,NVL( (SELECT DECODE(T.CS_CCD, '2', 'Y') FROM TMS_TRGT_CS_MNG T WHERE T.SCNR_ID = A.SCNR_ID AND T.CS_CCD = '2'), 'N') AS CORP_YN ,B.WORK_CYCL ,B.USE_YN ,(SELECT MAX(X.APPL_DTTM) FROM TMS_APPL_HIST X WHERE X.SCNR_ID = A.SCNR_ID ) AS LST_APPL_DTTM FROM TMS_REQ A ,TMS_RUN_INFO B WHERE A.SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} AND A.SCNR_ID = B.SCNR_ID
SELECT SCNR_ID ,SET_VAL_CD ,SRT_ORDR ,SET_VAL_NM ,DATA_TYP_CD ,DCML_PLC FROM TMS_SET_VAL_MNG WHERE SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID}
SELECT BIZ_CD AS VALUE ,GET_CODE_NAME('A046',BIZ_CD) AS NAME FROM TMS_BZDM_MNG WHERE BZDM_CD = #{BZDM_CD} ORDER BY BIZ_CD

SELECT INP_ITEM_CD AS CODE ,INP_ITEM_NM AS NAME ,'INP_ITEM' AS GUBUN ,SRT_SQ AS SEQ FROM TMS_QRY_INP_ITEM WHERE SSPS_DL_P_ITEM_YN ='Y' UNION ALL SELECT SET_VAL_CD AS CODE ,SET_VAL_NM AS NAME ,'STANDARD_ITEM' AS GUBUN ,SRT_ORDR AS SEQ FROM TMS_SET_VAL_MNG WHERE SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} ORDER BY GUBUN, SEQ

SELECT INP_ITEM_CD AS CODE ,INP_ITEM_NM AS NAME ,'INP_ITEM' AS GUBUN ,SRT_SQ AS SEQ FROM TMS_QRY_INP_ITEM WHERE SSPS_DL_ITEM_YN ='Y' UNION ALL SELECT SET_VAL_CD AS CODE ,SET_VAL_NM AS NAME ,'STANDARD_ITEM' AS GUBUN ,SRT_ORDR AS SEQ FROM TMS_SET_VAL_MNG WHERE SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} ORDER BY GUBUN, SEQ
SELECT QRY_TYP_CD ,REG_ORDR ,QRY_CNTNT FROM TMS_REQ_QRY WHERE SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} ORDER BY QRY_TYP_CD, REG_ORDR

SELECT A.SCNR_ID AS SCNR_ID ,GET_CODE_NAME('A046', A.BIZ_CD) AS CATG_NM ,A.SCNR_NM AS NAME ,A.SCNR_DESC AS REMARK ,CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TMS_TRGT_CS_MNG WHERE SCNR_ID = A.SCNR_ID) = 2 THEN '개인,법인' ELSE CASE WHEN (SELECT CS_CCD FROM TMS_TRGT_CS_MNG WHERE SCNR_ID = A.SCNR_ID) = '1' THEN '개인' WHEN (SELECT CS_CCD FROM TMS_TRGT_CS_MNG WHERE SCNR_ID = A.SCNR_ID) = '2' THEN '법인' ELSE '' END END AS INDV_CORP ,GET_CODE_NAME('A049',A.AC_DL_CCD) AS AC_DL ,GET_CODE_NAME('A031',B.WORK_CYCL) AS WORK_CYCL ,(SELECT LISTAGG(T.SET_VAL_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY SRT_ORDR) FROM TMS_SET_VAL_MNG T WHERE T.SCNR_ID = A.SCNR_ID ) AS SET_VAL FROM TMS_APPL A ,TMS_RUN_INFO B WHERE A.SCNR_ID = B.SCNR_ID AND A.SCNR_CCD = 'STR' AND A.BZDM_CD = #{BZDM_CD}
SELECT QRY_CNTNT FROM TMS_APPL_QRY WHERE SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} AND QRY_TYP_CD = 'S0' ORDER BY REG_ORDR
SELECT QRY_CNTNT FROM TMS_APPL_QRY WHERE SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} AND QRY_TYP_CD = 'S1' ORDER BY REG_ORDR

SELECT BZDM_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A045', BZDM_CD) AS BZDM_NM ,'00' AS PAR_ID --FOR TREE ROOT NODE ,GET_CODE_NAME('A046', BIZ_CD) AS BIZ_NM ,BIZ_CD AS SCNR_ID ,GET_CODE_NAME('A046', BIZ_CD) AS SCNR_NM ,0 AS SNO ,'-' AS APP_NO ,'-' AS APP_DT ,'-' AS SN_CCD ,'-' AS SN_CCD_NM ,'-' AS APPR_ROLE_ID ,'-' AS TARGET_ROLE_ID ,0 AS NUM_SQ ,'-' AS SUB_TITLE_NM ,'-' AS USE_YN FROM TMS_BZDM_MNG WHERE BZDM_CD = #{BZDM_CD} UNION ALL SELECT B.BZDM_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A045', A.BZDM_CD) AS BZDM_NM ,B.BIZ_CD AS PAR_ID ,GET_CODE_NAME('A046', A.BIZ_CD) AS BIZ_NM ,B.SCNR_ID AS SCNR_ID ,NVL(B.SCNR_NM, GET_CODE_NAME('A046', A.BIZ_CD)) AS SCNR_NM ,NVL(D.SNO, 0) AS SNO ,NVL(D.APP_NO, '-') AS APP_NO ,NVL(D.APP_DT, '-') AS APP_DT ,NVL(D.SN_CCD, 'N') AS SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A033', NVL(D.SN_CCD, '-')) AS SN_CCD_NM ,NVL(D.APPR_ROLE_ID,'-') AS APPR_ROLE_ID ,NVL(D.TARGET_ROLE_ID,'-') AS TARGET_ROLE_ID ,NVL(D.NUM_SQ, 0) AS NUM_SQ ,B.SCNR_DESC AS SUB_TITLE_NM ,NVL(E.USE_YN,'-') AS USE_YN FROM TMS_BZDM_MNG A, TMS_APPL B, TMS_SET_VAL_APP C, AML_APPR D, TMS_RUN_INFO E WHERE A.BZDM_CD = B.BZDM_CD AND A.BIZ_CD = B.BIZ_CD AND A.BZDM_CD = #{BZDM_CD} AND B.SCNR_CCD = 'STR' AND B.LST_APP_NO = C.APP_NO(+) AND B.SCNR_ID = C.SCNR_ID(+) AND C.APP_NO = D.APP_NO(+) AND D.GYLJ_LINE_G_C(+) = 'TMS1' AND B.SCNR_ID = E.SCNR_ID ORDER BY SCNR_ID
SELECT SET_VAL_CD ,SET_VAL_NM FROM TMS_SET_VAL_MNG WHERE SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} ORDER BY SRT_ORDR ASC
SELECT CS_CCD FROM TMS_TRGT_CS_MNG WHERE SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} ORDER BY CS_CCD

SELECT A.CS_CCD ,B.SET_VAL_CD ,C.SET_VAL FROM TMS_TRGT_CS_MNG A LEFT JOIN TMS_SET_VAL_MNG B ON A.SCNR_ID = B.SCNR_ID LEFT JOIN TMS_SET_VAL_REQ C ON A.SCNR_ID = C.SCNR_ID AND B.SET_VAL_CD = C.SET_VAL_CD AND A.CS_CCD = C.CS_CCD WHERE A.SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} AND A.CS_CCD = #{CS_CCD}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO TMS_SET_VAL_APP A USING DUAL ON (A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} ,A.UPD_ID = #{HNDL_P_ENO} ,A.UPD_DTTM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( APP_NO ,SCNR_ID ,REG_ID ,REG_DTTM ,UPD_ID ,UPD_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{APP_NO} ,#{SCNR_ID} ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )
mapper.select: SELECT A.CS_CCD ,A.SET_VAL_CD ,A.SET_VAL ,B.SET_VAL_NM FROM TMS_SET_VAL_REQ A ,TMS_SET_VAL_MNG B WHERE A.SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} AND A.SCNR_ID = B.SCNR_ID AND A.SET_VAL_CD = B.SET_VAL_CD

SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.SCNR_ID ,B.NUM_SQ ,SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(B.APP_DT, 5,2)||'-'||SUBSTR(B.APP_DT, 7,2) AS APP_DT ,B.APPR_ROLE_ID ,(SELECT ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID = B.APPR_ROLE_ID ) AS APPR_ROLE_NM ,B.SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A033', B.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM ,B.RSN_CNTNT FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP A LEFT JOIN AML_APPR B ON A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO WHERE A.SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} ORDER BY NUM_SQ DESC , TO_NUMBER(A.APP_NO) DESC

SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.SCNR_ID ,C.SCNR_NM ,B.NUM_SQ ,SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(B.APP_DT, 5,2)||'-'||SUBSTR(B.APP_DT, 7,2) AS APP_DT ,B.APPR_ROLE_ID ,(SELECT ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID = B.APPR_ROLE_ID ) AS APPR_ROLE_NM ,B.SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', NVL(B.SN_CCD, 'N')) AS SN_CCD_NM FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP A LEFT JOIN AML_APPR_HIST B ON A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO LEFT JOIN TMS_APPL C ON A.SCNR_ID = C.SCNR_ID WHERE A.SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} AND A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO}

SELECT A.APP_NO ,NVL(A.CS_CCD,B.CS_CCD) AS CS_CCD ,CASE WHEN A.SET_VAL != B.SET_VAL THEN '변경' WHEN A.SET_VAL = B.SET_VAL THEN '유지' WHEN A.SET_VAL IS NOT NULL AND B.SET_VAL IS NULL THEN '추가' WHEN B.SET_VAL IS NOT NULL AND A.SET_VAL IS NULL THEN '삭제' ELSE '' END GUBUN ,NVL(A.SET_VAL,NULL) AS SET_VAL --|| A.SET_VAL_CD ,NVL(B.SET_VAL,NULL) AS PREV_SET_VAL --|| B.SET_VAL_CD ,NVL(A.SET_VAL_CD,B.SET_VAL_CD) AS SET_VAL_CD FROM (SELECT * FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP_DTL WHERE APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ) A FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP_DTL WHERE APP_NO IN ( SELECT NVL(MAX(X.APP_NO), 0) AS PREV_APP_NO FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP_DTL X LEFT JOIN TMS_SET_VAL_APP Y ON X.APP_NO = Y.APP_NO WHERE X.APP_NO < #{APP_NO} AND Y.SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} ) ) B ON A.SET_VAL_CD = B.SET_VAL_CD AND A.CS_CCD = B.CS_CCD WHERE A.CS_CCD = #{CS_CCD,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT TMS_RUN_INFO_CHG_MNG_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS CHG_SEQ FROM DUAL

SELECT A.CHG_SEQ ,A.CHG_CNTNT ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.HIST_DTTM , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HIST_DTTM ,A.REG_ID ,B.USER_NM AS REG_NM FROM TMS_RUN_INFO_CHG_MNG A LEFT JOIN C_USER B ON A.REG_ID = B.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TMS_RUN_INFO_HIST C ON A.CHG_SEQ = C.CHG_SEQ LEFT JOIN TMS_REQ D ON C.SCNR_ID = D.SCNR_ID WHERE 1=1
AND D.BZDM_CD = #{amlType}
GROUP BY (A.CHG_SEQ, A.CHG_CNTNT, A.HIST_DTTM, A.REG_ID, B.USER_NM)
ORDER BY A.CHG_SEQ DESC

SELECT A.SCNR_ID ,A.SET_VAL_CD ,A.SET_VAL_NM ,B.SET_VAL FROM TMS_SET_VAL_MNG A LEFT JOIN TMS_SET_VAL_REQ B ON A.SCNR_ID = B.SCNR_ID AND A.SET_VAL_CD = B.SET_VAL_CD WHERE A.SCNR_ID = #{scenarioId} AND A.SET_VAL_CD = 1 ORDER BY A.SET_VAL_CD DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.SET_VAL_CD ASC) AS ROW_NUM ,A.SCNR_ID ,A.SET_VAL_CD ,A.SET_VAL_NM ,B.SET_VAL FROM TMS_SET_VAL_MNG A INNER JOIN TMS_SET_VAL_REQ B ON A.SCNR_ID = B.SCNR_ID AND A.SET_VAL_CD = B.SET_VAL_CD WHERE A.SCNR_ID = #{scenarioId} ORDER BY A.SET_VAL_CD DESC
SELECT * FROM TMS_QRY_INP_ITEM WHERE INP_ITEM_CD = 24
mapper.update: MERGE INTO TMS_APPL A USING DUAL ON (SCNR_ID = #{scenarioId} AND SCNR_CCD = #{scenarioCode}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET LST_APPL_DTTM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,UPD_ID = #{userId jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,UPD_DTTM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( SCNR_ID ,LST_APPL_DTTM ,SCNR_CCD ,SCNR_NM ,SCNR_DESC ,REG_ID ,REG_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{scenarioId} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,#{scenarioCode} ,#{scenarioName} ,#{scenarioName} ,#{userId jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )
mapper.select: SELECT APPL_DTTM ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(APPL_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS APPL_DTTM_FORMATTED ,QRY_TYP_CD FROM TMS_APPL_HIST_QRY WHERE SCNR_ID = #{scenarioId} ORDER BY APPL_DTTM DESC
SELECT SET_VAL_CD ,SET_VAL_NM ,SRT_ORDR ,APPL_SET_VAL FROM TMS_SMUL_SET_VAL WHERE SMUL_ID = #{SMUL_ID} ORDER BY SRT_ORDR
SELECT QRY_CNTNT FROM TMS_SMUL_QRY WHERE SMUL_ID = #{SMUL_ID} AND QRY_TYP_CD = 'S0' ORDER BY REG_ORDR
SELECT SET_VAL_CD ,SET_VAL_NM ,SRT_ORDR ,DATA_TYP_CD ,DCML_PLC FROM TMS_SET_VAL_MNG WHERE SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID}
SELECT QRY_CNTNT FROM TMS_APPL_QRY WHERE SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} AND QRY_TYP_CD ='S0' ORDER BY REG_ORDR
SELECT INP_ITEM_CD ,INP_ITEM_NM ,SRT_SQ FROM TMS_QRY_INP_ITEM WHERE SSPS_DL_P_ITEM_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SRT_SQ ASC
SELECT TMS_SMUL_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS SMUL_ID FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TMS_SMUL ( SMUL_ID ,SCNR_ID ,WORK_START_DTTM ,WORK_END_DTTM ,SMUL_NM ,SMUL_CTNT ,CS_CCD ,SSPS_DL_TRGT_START_DT ,SSPS_DL_TRGT_END_DT ,WORK_ST_CD ,ERR_CTNT ,WRKR_ID ,REG_ID ,REG_DTTM ,UPD_ID ,UPD_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{SMUL_ID} ,#{SCNR_ID} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,'' ,'' ,'' ,#{CS_CCD} ,#{fromDate} ,#{toDate} ,'2' ,'' ,#{userID} ,#{userID} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,#{userID} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )
mapper.update: UPDATE TMS_SMUL SET WORK_END_DTTM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,WORK_ST_CD = '1' WHERE SMUL_ID = #{SMUL_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT SSPS_DL_TRGT_DT ,SSPS_DL_CRT_CNT FROM TMS_SMUL_RSLT_DT WHERE SMUL_ID = #{SMUL_ID} ORDER BY SSPS_DL_TRGT_DT DESC
mapper.update: MERGE INTO TMS_SET_VAL_MNG USING DUAL ON (SCNR_ID = #{scenarioId} AND SET_VAL_CD = #{SET_VAL_CD}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET UPD_ID = #{userId jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,UPD_DTTM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( SCNR_ID ,SET_VAL_CD ,SET_VAL_NM ,SRT_ORDR ,DATA_TYP_CD ,DCML_PLC ,REG_ID ,REG_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{scenarioId} ,#{SET_VAL_CD} ,#{setValNm} ,1 ,1 ,'' ,#{userId jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )
mapper.select: SELECT T1.* FROM (SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A033', A.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NAME FROM AML_APPR A INNER JOIN C_GYLJ_D B ON A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND A.SNO = B.SNO WHERE A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GUBUN} ORDER BY A.APP_DT DESC ,A.NUM_SQ ASC ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT APP_NO,SN_CCD,GET_CODE_NAME('A033', B.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NAME FROM TMS_APPL A LEFT JOIN AML_APPR B ON A.LST_APP_NO = B.APP_NO AND GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'TMS2' WHERE SCNR_ID = 'CTR01'
mapper.update: MERGE INTO TMS_SET_VAL_APP USING DUAL ON (APP_NO = #{APP_NO} AND SCNR_ID = #{scenarioId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET UPD_ID = #{HNDL_P_ENO jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,UPD_DTTM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( APP_NO ,SCNR_ID ,REG_ID ,REG_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{APP_NO} ,#{scenarioId} ,#{HNDL_P_ENO jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )
mapper.select: SELECT A.APP_NO ,B.APP_DT ,B.SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A033', B.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM ,B.RSN_CNTNT FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP A INNER JOIN AML_APPR B ON A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO WHERE A.SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} ORDER BY B.APP_DT DESC, A.APP_NO DESC

SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.APP_DT ,A.APPR_ROLE_ID ,B.ROLE_NM ,A.SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A033', A.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM ,C.SCNR_ID ,D.SCNR_NM FROM AML_APPR_HIST A INNER JOIN C_ROLE B ON A.APPR_ROLE_ID = B.ROLE_ID INNER JOIN TMS_SET_VAL_APP C ON A.APP_NO = C.APP_NO INNER JOIN TMS_APPL D ON C.SCNR_ID = D.SCNR_ID WHERE A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ORDER BY A.NUM_SQ DESC

SELECT A.APP_NO ,NVL(A.CS_CCD,B.CS_CCD) AS CS_CCD ,CASE WHEN A.SET_VAL != B.SET_VAL THEN '변경' WHEN A.SET_VAL = B.SET_VAL THEN '유지' WHEN A.SET_VAL IS NOT NULL AND B.SET_VAL IS NULL THEN '추가' WHEN B.SET_VAL IS NOT NULL AND A.SET_VAL IS NULL THEN '삭제' ELSE '' END GUBUN ,NVL(A.SET_VAL,NULL) AS SET_VAL --|| A.SET_VAL_CD ,NVL(B.SET_VAL,NULL) AS PREV_SET_VAL --|| B.SET_VAL_CD ,NVL(A.SET_VAL_CD,B.SET_VAL_CD) AS SET_VAL_CD FROM (SELECT * FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP_DTL WHERE APP_NO = #{APP_NO}) A FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP_DTL WHERE APP_NO IN (SELECT NVL(MAX(A.APP_NO), 0) AS PREV_APP_NO FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP_DTL A LEFT JOIN TMS_SET_VAL_APP B ON A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO WHERE A.APP_NO < #{APP_NO} AND B.SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} ) ) B ON (A.SET_VAL_CD = B.SET_VAL_CD)
SELECT A.SET_VAL_CD , B.SET_VAL FROM TMS_SET_VAL_MNG A INNER JOIN TMS_SET_VAL_REQ B ON A.SCNR_ID = B.SCNR_ID AND A.SET_VAL_CD = B.SET_VAL_CD WHERE A.SCNR_ID = #{scenarioId} ORDER BY A.SET_VAL_CD DESC
SELECT SET_VAL_CD , SET_VAL FROM TMS_SET_VAL WHERE SCNR_ID = #{scenarioId} ORDER BY SET_VAL_CD DESC

SELECT JOB_DT AS JOB_DT_ORG ,TO_CHAR(TO_TIMESTAMP(B.JOB_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISSFF3'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS JOB_DT ,JOB_SEQ ,SCNR_ID ,CS_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M006', B.CS_CCD) AS CS_CCD_NM ,WORK_ST_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A039', B.WORK_ST_CD) AS WORK_ST_NM ,B.REG_ID ,( SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = B.REG_ID ) AS REG_NM ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.REG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REG_DTTM ,B.UPD_ID ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = B.REG_ID ) AS UPD_NM ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.UPD_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPD_DTTM FROM TMS_BTCH_HIST_DTL B WHERE JOB_DT = #{JOB_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND JOB_SEQ = #{JOB_SEQ, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT JOB_DT AS JOB_DT_ORG ,TO_CHAR(TO_TIMESTAMP(B.JOB_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISSFF3'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS JOB_DT ,JOB_SEQ ,SCNR_ID ,CS_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M006', B.CS_CCD) AS CS_CCD_NM ,SET_VAL_CD ,SET_VAL_NM ,SET_VAL ,B.REG_ID ,( SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = B.REG_ID ) AS REG_NM ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.REG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REG_DTTM ,B.UPD_ID ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = B.REG_ID ) AS UPD_NM ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.UPD_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPD_DTTM FROM TMS_BTCH_HIST_SET_VAL B WHERE JOB_DT = #{JOB_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND JOB_SEQ = #{JOB_SEQ, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT CNTNT AS BIZ_CD ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TMS_BZDM_MNG WHERE BZDM_CD = #{BZDM_CD} AND BIZ_CD = CNTNT) AS CNT FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'A046' AND CD_NM = #{BIZ_NM}
SELECT CNTNT AS AC_DL_CCD FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'A049' AND CD_NM = #{AC_DL}
SELECT CNTNT AS CS_CCD FROM NIC92B WHERE CD IN ('M006') AND CD_NM = #{INDV_CORP}
SELECT CNTNT AS WORK_CYCL FROM NIC92B WHERE CD IN ('A031') AND CD_NM = #{WORK_CYCL}

SELECT DPRT_CD --지점코드 , DPRT_NM --지점명 , KFTC_BRHN_CODE --Kofiu보고지점코드 , DECODE(USE_CCD, 'Y', 'N', 'N', 'Y') AS USE_CCD --폐쇄여부 , KOFIU_RGSN_YN --검토여부 , DPRT_POST_NO , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DPRT_CD) AS ROW_NUM FROM NIC41B WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(DPRT_CD) LIKE '%'||UPPER(#{DPRT_CD})||'%'
AND UPPER(DPRT_NM) LIKE '%'||UPPER(#{DPRT_NM})||'%'
AND UPPER(KFTC_BRHN_CODE) LIKE '%'||UPPER(#{KFTC_BRHN_CODE})||'%'
AND NVL(KOFIU_RGSN_YN, 'X') = #{KOFIU_RGSN_YN}
ORDER BY DPRT_CD

SELECT T.ROLE_ID , T.ROLE_NAME , T.CNT_30 , T.CNT_35 , T.CNT_38 , T.CNT_40 , T.ORDERBY FROM (
SELECT '4' AS ROLE_ID , '본점담당자' AS ROLE_NAME , SUM(X.CNT_30) AS CNT_30 , SUM(X.CNT_35) AS CNT_35 , SUM(X.CNT_38) AS CNT_38 , SUM(X.CNT_40) AS CNT_40 , 1 AS ORDERBY FROM ( SELECT NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN D.PROC_ID = 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)), 0) AS CNT_30 , NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN D.PROC_ID = 35 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)), 0) AS CNT_35 , NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN D.PROC_ID = 38 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)), 0) AS CNT_38 , NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN D.PROC_ID = 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)), 0) AS CNT_40 FROM SSQ.WF_PROC_INSTANCE A INNER JOIN SSQ.WF_WORK_PARTICIPANT B ON B.WORK_ID = A.WORK_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.WF_WORK_PERFORMER C ON C.WORK_STATUS_CD = 'FINISHED' AND C.WORK_ID = B.WORK_ID AND C.PERFORMER_ID = B.PARTICIPANT_ID INNER JOIN SSQ.WF_PROC_INSTANCE D ON D.INST_ID = A.PAR_INST_ID INNER JOIN SSQ.NIC66B E ON E.INST_ID = D.INST_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND D.PROC_ID IN (35, 38) AND C.PERFORMER_ID IS NULL AND (B.PERSON_YN='N' AND B.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID FROM SSQ.C_USER_GROUP_ROLE AA , SSQ.C_USER BB WHERE AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID = '2012851193.4')) -- 본점담당자 GROUP BY D.PROC_ID UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS CNT_30 , COUNT(*) AS CNT_35 , 0 AS CNT_38 , 0 AS CNT_40 FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR', 'KYC') AND RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '9' AND OK_CCD = '1' UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS CNT_30 , 0 AS CNT_35 , COUNT(*) AS CNT_38 , 0 AS CNT_40 FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '9' AND OK_CCD = '1' UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS CNT_30 , COUNT(*) AS CNT_35 , 0 AS CNT_38 , 0 AS CNT_40 FROM SSQ.NIC66B A , SSQ.NIC80B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND LENGTH(B.RPR_OGN_CD) = 6 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR', 'KYC') AND COALESCE(KFU_RRPR_STS_CD, KFU_RPR_STS_CD , RPR_PRGRS_CCD) IN ('14','24','34','44','54','60','99') AND OK_CCD = '1' UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS CNT_30 , 0 AS CNT_35 , COUNT(*) AS CNT_38 , 0 AS CNT_40 FROM SSQ.NIC66B A, SSQ.NIC80B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND LENGTH(B.RPR_OGN_CD) = 6 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND NVL(KFU_RPR_STS_CD , RPR_PRGRS_CCD) IN ('14','24','34','54','99') AND OK_CCD = '1' UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS CNT_30 , COUNT(*) AS CNT_35 , 0 AS CNT_38 , 0 AS CNT_40 FROM SSQ.NIC100B WHERE SSPS_DL_GB = 'S' AND SSPS_PRGRS_CCD = '70' ) X
UNION ALL SELECT '5' AS ROLE_ID , '본점책임자' AS ROLE_NAME , NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN D.PROC_ID = 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)), 0) AS CNT_30 , NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN D.PROC_ID = 35 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)), 0) AS CNT_35 , NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN D.PROC_ID = 38 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)), 0) AS CNT_38 , NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN D.PROC_ID = 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)), 0) AS CNT_40 , 2 AS ORDERBY FROM SSQ.WF_PROC_INSTANCE A INNER JOIN SSQ.WF_WORK_PARTICIPANT B ON B.WORK_ID = A.WORK_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.WF_WORK_PERFORMER C ON C.WORK_STATUS_CD = 'FINISHED' AND C.WORK_ID = B.WORK_ID AND C.PERFORMER_ID = B.PARTICIPANT_ID INNER JOIN SSQ.WF_PROC_INSTANCE D ON D.INST_ID = A.PAR_INST_ID INNER JOIN SSQ.NIC66B E ON E.INST_ID = D.INST_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND D.PROC_ID IN (35, 38) AND C.PERFORMER_ID IS NULL AND (B.PERSON_YN='N' AND B.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID FROM SSQ.C_USER_GROUP_ROLE AA , SSQ.C_USER BB WHERE AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID = '2012851193.5')) -- 본점책임자 GROUP BY D.PROC_ID UNION ALL SELECT '104' AS ROLE_ID , '보고책임자' AS ROLE_NAME , NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN D.PROC_ID = 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)), 0) AS CNT_30 , NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN D.PROC_ID = 35 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)), 0) AS CNT_35 , NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN D.PROC_ID = 38 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)), 0) AS CNT_38 , NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN D.PROC_ID = 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)), 0) AS CNT_40 , 3 AS ORDERBY FROM SSQ.WF_PROC_INSTANCE A INNER JOIN SSQ.WF_WORK_PARTICIPANT B ON B.WORK_ID = A.WORK_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.WF_WORK_PERFORMER C ON C.WORK_STATUS_CD = 'FINISHED' AND C.WORK_ID = B.WORK_ID AND C.PERFORMER_ID = B.PARTICIPANT_ID INNER JOIN SSQ.WF_PROC_INSTANCE D ON D.INST_ID = A.PAR_INST_ID INNER JOIN SSQ.NIC66B E ON E.INST_ID = D.INST_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND D.PROC_ID IN (35, 38) AND C.PERFORMER_ID IS NULL AND (B.PERSON_YN='N' AND B.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID FROM SSQ.C_USER_GROUP_ROLE AA , SSQ.C_USER BB WHERE AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID = '2012851193.104')) -- 준법감시인 GROUP BY D.PROC_ID ) T ORDER BY T.ORDERBY

-- PROC_ID = 35(STR) -- PROC_ID = 38(CTR) SELECT M.PROC_ID AS PROC_ID , NVL(X.CNT, 0) AS CNT FROM (SELECT 35 AS PROC_ID, 'STR' AS PROC_NAME, 2 AS ORDERBY FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 38 AS PROC_ID, 'CTR' AS PROC_NAME, 3 AS ORDERBY FROM DUAL ) M LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT D.PROC_ID AS PROC_ID , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SSQ.WF_PROC_INSTANCE A INNER JOIN SSQ.WF_WORK_PARTICIPANT B ON B.WORK_ID = A.WORK_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.WF_WORK_PERFORMER C ON C.WORK_STATUS_CD = 'FINISHED' AND C.WORK_ID = B.WORK_ID AND C.PERFORMER_ID = B.PARTICIPANT_ID INNER JOIN SSQ.WF_PROC_INSTANCE D ON D.INST_ID = A.PAR_INST_ID INNER JOIN SSQ.NIC66B E ON E.INST_ID = D.INST_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND D.PROC_ID IN (35, 38) AND C.PERFORMER_ID IS NULL AND (B.PERSON_YN='N' AND B.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID FROM SSQ.C_USER_GROUP_ROLE AA , SSQ.C_USER BB WHERE AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID = '2012851193.5')) -- 본점책임자 GROUP BY D.PROC_ID ) X ON X.PROC_ID = M.PROC_ID

-- PROC_ID = 35(STR) -- PROC_ID = 38(CTR) SELECT M.PROC_ID AS PROC_ID , NVL(X.CNT, 0) AS CNT FROM (SELECT 35 AS PROC_ID, 'STR' AS PROC_NAME, 2 AS ORDERBY FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 38 AS PROC_ID, 'CTR' AS PROC_NAME, 3 AS ORDERBY FROM DUAL ) M LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT D.PROC_ID AS PROC_ID , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SSQ.WF_PROC_INSTANCE A INNER JOIN SSQ.WF_WORK_PARTICIPANT B ON B.WORK_ID = A.WORK_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.WF_WORK_PERFORMER C ON C.WORK_STATUS_CD = 'FINISHED' AND C.WORK_ID = B.WORK_ID AND C.PERFORMER_ID = B.PARTICIPANT_ID INNER JOIN SSQ.WF_PROC_INSTANCE D ON D.INST_ID = A.PAR_INST_ID INNER JOIN SSQ.NIC66B E ON E.INST_ID = D.INST_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND D.PROC_ID IN (35, 38) AND C.PERFORMER_ID IS NULL AND (B.PERSON_YN='N' AND B.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID FROM SSQ.C_USER_GROUP_ROLE AA , SSQ.C_USER BB WHERE AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID = '2012851193.104')) -- 보고책임자 GROUP BY D.PROC_ID ) X ON X.PROC_ID = M.PROC_ID
mapper.update: INSERT INTO SSQ.L_SMS_MSTR ( PRCE_SEQ , PRCE_DATE , SMS_STNR_CODE , SMS_CTNT , PCPR_ID , PRCE_STAT_CODE , PRCE_DATE_TIME ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(PRCE_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM SSQ.L_SMS_MSTR) , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') , #{SEND_GB} , #{SMS_CTNT} , #{USER_ID} , '0' , SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
WITH TEMP_X AS (SELECT /*+ FULL(B) PARALLEL(B 8) */ A.RNMCNO , TRIM(A.CS_NM) CS_NM , B.GNL_AC_NO FROM SSQ.NIC01B A , SSQ.NIC17B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.RNMCNO NOT IN( SELECT DL_P_RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT DL_P_RNMCNO , MAX(SSPS_DL_CRT_DT) AS LAST_SSPS_DT FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE 1 = 1 AND DL_P_RNMCNO IN ( SELECT ENTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_BYBS_CLNT_CLSN A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.BYBS_CLNT_CLSN_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND A.VLD_YN = 'Y' ) GROUP BY DL_P_RNMCNO ) T WHERE T.LAST_SSPS_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-90, 'YYYYMMDD') ) AND B.ACNT_NO = #{ACNT_NO} ) , TEMP_Y AS ( SELECT /*+ FULL(T) PARALLEL(T 8) */ T.DL_AMT , T.DL_DT , T.DL_TYP_CD FROM SSQ.NIC61B T WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.GNL_AC_NO = (SELECT GNL_AC_NO FROM SSQ.NIC17B WHERE TRIM(ACNT_NO) = #{ACNT_NO} AND ROWNUM = 1) AND T.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -12), 'YYYYMMDD') AND T.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} ) , TEMP_Z AS ( SELECT /*+ FULL(T) PARALLEL(T 8) */ T.CSH , T.DL_DT , T.DL_TYP_CD FROM SSQ.NIC61B_CTR T WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.GNL_AC_NO = (SELECT GNL_AC_NO FROM SSQ.NIC17B WHERE TRIM(ACNT_NO) = #{ACNT_NO} AND ROWNUM = 1) AND T.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -12), 'YYYYMMDD') AND T.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} ) SELECT T.ORDERBY , T.RNMCNO , T.CS_NM , T.GNL_AC_NO , T.GB , T.TRDG_SIZE FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ORDERBY , X.RNMCNO , X.CS_NM , X.GNL_AC_NO , '3개월' AS GB , '* 최근 3개월 거래규모 : 총입금 ' || Y.I_AMT_M || '(현금 ' || Y.I_CSH_M || ') / 총출금 ' || Y.O_AMT_M || '(현금 ' || Y.O_CSH_M || ')' AS TRDG_SIZE FROM TEMP_X X , (SELECT TO_CHAR(ROUND(SUM(T.I_AMT) / 1000000, 0), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '백만원' AS I_AMT_M , TO_CHAR(ROUND(SUM(T.I_CSH) / 1000000, 0), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '백만원' AS I_CSH_M , TO_CHAR(ROUND(SUM(T.O_AMT) / 1000000, 0), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '백만원' AS O_AMT_M , TO_CHAR(ROUND(SUM(T.O_CSH) / 1000000, 0), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '백만원' AS O_CSH_M FROM ( SELECT SUM(M.DL_AMT) AS I_AMT , 0 AS I_CSH , 0 AS O_AMT , 0 AS O_CSH FROM TEMP_Y M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01','04','08') -- 입금(01:입금,04:영수,08:이체영수) AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -3), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} UNION SELECT 0 AS I_AMT , 0 AS I_CSH , SUM(M.DL_AMT) AS O_AMT , 0 AS O_CSH FROM TEMP_Y M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02','05','09') -- 출금(02:출금,05:송금,09:이체송금) AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -3), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} UNION SELECT 0 AS I_AMT , SUM(M.CSH) AS I_CSH , 0 AS O_AMT , 0 AS O_CSH FROM TEMP_Z M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01') -- 01:입금 AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -3), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} UNION SELECT 0 AS I_AMT , 0 AS I_CSH , 0 AS O_AMT , SUM(M.CSH) AS O_CSH FROM TEMP_Z M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02') -- 02:출금 AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -3), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} ) T ) Y UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ORDERBY , X.RNMCNO , X.CS_NM , X.GNL_AC_NO , '6개월' AS GB , '* 최근 6개월 거래규모 : 총입금 ' || Y.I_AMT_M || '(현금 ' || Y.I_CSH_M || ') / 총출금 ' || Y.O_AMT_M || '(현금 ' || Y.O_CSH_M || ')' AS TRDG_SIZE FROM TEMP_X X , (SELECT TO_CHAR(ROUND(SUM(T.I_AMT) / 1000000, 0), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '백만원' AS I_AMT_M , TO_CHAR(ROUND(SUM(T.I_CSH) / 1000000, 0), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '백만원' AS I_CSH_M , TO_CHAR(ROUND(SUM(T.O_AMT) / 1000000, 0), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '백만원' AS O_AMT_M , TO_CHAR(ROUND(SUM(T.O_CSH) / 1000000, 0), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '백만원' AS O_CSH_M FROM ( SELECT SUM(M.DL_AMT) AS I_AMT , 0 AS I_CSH , 0 AS O_AMT , 0 AS O_CSH FROM TEMP_Y M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01','04','08') -- 입금(01:입금,04:영수,08:이체영수) AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -6), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} UNION SELECT 0 AS I_AMT , 0 AS I_CSH , SUM(M.DL_AMT) AS O_AMT , 0 AS O_CSH FROM TEMP_Y M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02','05','09') -- 출금(02:출금,05:송금,09:이체송금) AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -6), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} UNION SELECT 0 AS I_AMT , SUM(M.CSH) AS I_CSH , 0 AS O_AMT , 0 AS O_CSH FROM TEMP_Z M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01') -- 01:입금 AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -6), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} UNION SELECT 0 AS I_AMT , 0 AS I_CSH , 0 AS O_AMT , SUM(M.CSH) AS O_CSH FROM TEMP_Z M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02') -- 02:출금 AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -6), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} ) T ) Y UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ORDERBY , X.RNMCNO , X.CS_NM , X.GNL_AC_NO , '12개월' AS GB , '* 최근 12개월 거래규모 : 총입금 ' || Y.I_AMT_M || '(현금 ' || Y.I_CSH_M || ') / 총출금 ' || Y.O_AMT_M || '(현금 ' || Y.O_CSH_M || ')' AS TRDG_SIZE FROM TEMP_X X , (SELECT TO_CHAR(ROUND(SUM(T.I_AMT) / 1000000, 0), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '백만원' AS I_AMT_M , TO_CHAR(ROUND(SUM(T.I_CSH) / 1000000, 0), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '백만원' AS I_CSH_M , TO_CHAR(ROUND(SUM(T.O_AMT) / 1000000, 0), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '백만원' AS O_AMT_M , TO_CHAR(ROUND(SUM(T.O_CSH) / 1000000, 0), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '백만원' AS O_CSH_M FROM ( SELECT SUM(M.DL_AMT) AS I_AMT , 0 AS I_CSH , 0 AS O_AMT , 0 AS O_CSH FROM TEMP_Y M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01','04','08') -- 입금(01:입금,04:영수,08:이체영수) AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -12), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} UNION SELECT 0 AS I_AMT , 0 AS I_CSH , SUM(M.DL_AMT) AS O_AMT , 0 AS O_CSH FROM TEMP_Y M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02','05','09') -- 출금(02:출금,05:송금,09:이체송금) AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -12), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} UNION SELECT 0 AS I_AMT , SUM(M.CSH) AS I_CSH , 0 AS O_AMT , 0 AS O_CSH FROM TEMP_Z M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01') -- 01:입금 AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -12), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} UNION SELECT 0 AS I_AMT , 0 AS I_CSH , 0 AS O_AMT , SUM(M.CSH) AS O_CSH FROM TEMP_Z M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02') -- 02:출금 AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -12), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} ) T ) Y UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ORDERBY , X.RNMCNO , X.CS_NM , X.GNL_AC_NO , '3개월' AS GB , '입금 ' || Y.I_AMT || '(현금 ' || Y.I_CSH || ')' AS TRDG_SIZE FROM TEMP_X X , (SELECT TO_CHAR(SUM(T.I_AMT), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '원' AS I_AMT , TO_CHAR(SUM(T.I_CSH), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '원' AS I_CSH FROM ( SELECT SUM(M.DL_AMT) AS I_AMT , 0 AS I_CSH FROM TEMP_Y M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01','04','08') -- 입금(01:입금,04:영수,08:이체영수) AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -3), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} UNION SELECT 0 AS I_AMT , SUM(M.CSH) AS I_CSH FROM TEMP_Z M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01') -- 01:입금 AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -3), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} ) T ) Y UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS ORDERBY , X.RNMCNO , X.CS_NM , X.GNL_AC_NO , '6개월' AS GB , '입금 ' || Y.I_AMT || '(현금 ' || Y.I_CSH || ')' AS TRDG_SIZE FROM TEMP_X X , (SELECT TO_CHAR(SUM(T.I_AMT), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '원' AS I_AMT , TO_CHAR(SUM(T.I_CSH), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '원' AS I_CSH FROM ( SELECT SUM(M.DL_AMT) AS I_AMT , 0 AS I_CSH FROM TEMP_Y M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01','04','08') -- 입금(01:입금,04:영수,08:이체영수) AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -6), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} UNION SELECT 0 AS I_AMT , SUM(M.CSH) AS I_CSH FROM TEMP_Z M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01') -- 01:입금 AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -6), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} ) T ) Y UNION ALL SELECT 6 AS ORDERBY , X.RNMCNO , X.CS_NM , X.GNL_AC_NO , '12개월' AS GB , '입금 ' || Y.I_AMT || '(현금 ' || Y.I_CSH || ')' AS TRDG_SIZE FROM TEMP_X X , (SELECT TO_CHAR(SUM(T.I_AMT), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '원' AS I_AMT , TO_CHAR(SUM(T.I_CSH), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '원' AS I_CSH FROM ( SELECT SUM(M.DL_AMT) AS I_AMT , 0 AS I_CSH FROM TEMP_Y M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01','04','08') -- 입금(01:입금,04:영수,08:이체영수) AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -12), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} UNION SELECT 0 AS I_AMT , SUM(M.CSH) AS I_CSH FROM TEMP_Z M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01') -- 01:입금 AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -12), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} ) T ) Y
UNION ALL SELECT 7 AS ORDERBY , X.RNMCNO , X.CS_NM , X.GNL_AC_NO , '3개월' AS GB , '출금 ' || Y.O_AMT || '(현금 ' || Y.O_CSH || ')' AS TRDG_SIZE FROM TEMP_X X , (SELECT TO_CHAR(SUM(T.O_AMT), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '원' AS O_AMT , TO_CHAR(SUM(T.O_CSH), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '원' AS O_CSH FROM ( SELECT SUM(M.DL_AMT) AS O_AMT , 0 AS O_CSH FROM TEMP_Y M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02','05','09') -- 출금(02:출금,05:송금,09:이체송금) AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -3), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} UNION SELECT 0 AS O_AMT , SUM(M.CSH) AS O_CSH FROM TEMP_Z M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02') -- 02:출금 AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -3), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} ) T ) Y UNION ALL SELECT 8 AS ORDERBY , X.RNMCNO , X.CS_NM , X.GNL_AC_NO , '6개월' AS GB , '출금 ' || Y.O_AMT || '(현금 ' || Y.O_CSH || ')' AS TRDG_SIZE FROM TEMP_X X , (SELECT TO_CHAR(SUM(T.O_AMT), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '원' AS O_AMT , TO_CHAR(SUM(T.O_CSH), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '원' AS O_CSH FROM ( SELECT SUM(M.DL_AMT) AS O_AMT , 0 AS O_CSH FROM TEMP_Y M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02','05','09') -- 출금(02:출금,05:송금,09:이체송금) AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -6), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} UNION SELECT 0 AS O_AMT , SUM(M.CSH) AS O_CSH FROM TEMP_Z M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02') -- 02:출금 AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -6), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} ) T ) Y UNION ALL SELECT 9 AS ORDERBY , X.RNMCNO , X.CS_NM , X.GNL_AC_NO , '12개월' AS GB , '출금 ' || Y.O_AMT || '(현금 ' || Y.O_CSH || ')' AS TRDG_SIZE FROM TEMP_X X , (SELECT TO_CHAR(SUM(T.O_AMT), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '원' AS O_AMT , TO_CHAR(SUM(T.O_CSH), 'FM999,999,999,999') || '원' AS O_CSH FROM ( SELECT SUM(M.DL_AMT) AS O_AMT , 0 AS O_CSH FROM TEMP_Y M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02','05','09') -- 출금(02:출금,05:송금,09:이체송금) AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -12), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} UNION SELECT 0 AS O_AMT , SUM(M.CSH) AS O_CSH FROM TEMP_Z M WHERE M.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02') -- 02:출금 AND M.DL_DT > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BASE_DT}, 'YYYYMMDD'), -12), 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.DL_DT <= #{BASE_DT} ) T ) Y ) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY ORDERBY
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TMS_SET_VAL WHERE SCNR_ID != 'CTR01'
DELETE FROM AML_APPR_HIST WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'TMS1' AND APP_NO IN (SELECT APP_NO FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP WHERE SCNR_ID != 'CTR01' )
DELETE FROM AML_APPR WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'TMS1' AND APP_NO IN (SELECT APP_NO FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP WHERE SCNR_ID != 'CTR01' )
DELETE FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP_DTL WHERE APP_NO IN (SELECT APP_NO FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP WHERE SCNR_ID != 'CTR01' )
DELETE FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP WHERE SCNR_ID != 'CTR01'
DELETE FROM TMS_SET_VAL_REQ WHERE SCNR_ID != 'CTR01'
mapper.update: UPDATE TMS_APPL SET LST_APP_NO = NULL WHERE SCNR_ID != 'CTR01'
mapper.select: SELECT AML_APPR_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS APP_NO , B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AS GYLJ_LINE_G_C , AML_APPR_HIST_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS NUM_SQ , #{APP_DT} AS APP_DT , 0 AS WLR_SQ , #{REG_DT} AS REG_DT , B.SNO AS SNO , 'E' AS SN_CCD -- 결재완료 , #{BRN_CD} AS BRN_CD , B.GYLJ_ROLE_ID AS APPR_ROLE_ID , B.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID AS TARGET_ROLE_ID , #{RSN_CNTNT} AS RSN_CNTNT , #{PRV_APP_NO} AS PRV_APP_NO -- WORKFLOW.INST_ID , #{HNDL_P_ENO} AS HNDL_P_ENO , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TODAY FROM C_GYLJ_M A INNER JOIN C_GYLJ_D B ON A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C WHERE A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND B.SNO = (SELECT MAX(SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TMS_SET_VAL WHERE SCNR_ID = 'CTR01'
DELETE FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP_DTL WHERE APP_NO IN (SELECT APP_NO FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP WHERE SCNR_ID = 'CTR01' )

DELETE FROM TMS_SET_VAL_REQ WHERE SCNR_ID = 'CTR01'
DELETE FROM TMS_SET_VAL_MNG WHERE SCNR_ID = 'CTR01' AND SET_VAL_CD != '1'

DELETE FROM AML_APPR WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'TMS2' AND APP_NO IN (SELECT APP_NO FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP WHERE SCNR_ID = 'CTR01' )
